Name: ParagonCorp
Description:
Be part of Indonesia’s most purposeful beauty movement. At ParagonCorp, we believe beauty is more than skin deep — it’s a force for good. With 14,000+ Paragonians across the nation, we build brands that move markets, touch hearts, and uplift communities. Our growth isn’t a reward for doing good — it’s driven by it. Because we don’t grow after being beneficial — we grow by choosing to be beneficial.

As Indonesia’s leading beauty company, our hypersegmented portfolio reflects the diversity of needs, dreams, and lifestyles across generations: Wardah, Make Over, Emina, Kahf, Putri, Crystallure, Instaperfect, Labore, Biodef, Tavi, Wonderly, OMG, Beyondly, and Earth Love Life — 14 brands born from insight, science, and deep care for our consumers.

We grow with intention. Guided by our three pillars — Product, People, and Planet — we create not only high-performing innovations, but also meaningful impact through sustainable action, talent development, and community collaboration. Everything we do is rooted in our belief: For the Greater Good, For Life.

Grow with Purpose. Grow at ParagonCorp. Unleash your potential in a place where bold ideas matter, where care fuels progress, and where your everyday work creates lasting impact.

#BeyondBusiness #UnleashYourPotential #ForTheGreaterGoodForLife

Name: Wings Group Indonesia (Sayap Mas Utama)
Description:
What is today a major corporation that exports its products around the world began life over 60 years ago in East Java. Over the years, Wings has grown to become one of Indonesia's well-known brands.

The company's first products were soap and detergent, which proved a hit with customers. Soon other cleaning products were introduced and distribution channels were established across Indonesia. The next few decades saw Wings steadily expand its product lines and now produces and sell hundreds of SKUs of household, personal care and food products.

Today, Wings is recognized as a leading local manufacturer and distributor of household and personal care products. Blending local knowledge and advanced manufacturing technologies, Wings is still dedicated to company's vision of providing quality products at affordable prices.

Name: DIAGEO India
Description:
Diageo India is among the country’s leading beverage alcohol company and a subsidiary of global leader Diageo Plc. The company manufactures, sells and distributes an outstanding portfolio of premium brands such as Johnnie Walker, Black Dog, Black & White, VAT 69, Antiquity, Signature, The Singleton, Royal Challenge, McDowell’s No1, Smirnoff, Ketel One, Tanqueray, Captain Morgan and Godawan, an artisanal single malt whisky from India. 

Headquartered in Bengaluru, our wide footprint is supported by a committed team of over 3000 employees, 37 manufacturing facilities across states and union territories in India, a strong distribution network and a state-of-the-art Technical Centre. Incorporated in India as United Spirits Limited (USL), the company is listed on both the National Stock Exchange (NSE) and Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) in India.

For more information about Diageo India, our people, our brands, and our performance, visit us at www.diageoindia.com. Visit Diageo’s global responsible drinking resource, http://www.DRINKiQ.com, for information, initiatives, and ways to share best practices.

Celebrating life, every day, everywhere.

Name: Orang Tua Group
Description:
Selama lebih dari setengah abad, kami telah mengolah bahan-bahan dari sumber alam menjadi produk-produk berkualitas pilihan konsumen. Berawal dari produk minuman kesehatan dgn ramuan alamiah yg diolah secara tradisional, produk-produk kami berkembang semakin modern, canggih, praktis, & efisien sesuai dgn tuntutan zaman. Warisan nenek moyang kita, yg telah terbukti khasiatnya sejak dahulu, terus dikembangkan secara berkesinambungan tanpa meninggalkan rahasia keasliannya.
 Melalui riset dan inovasi, kami selalu menghadirkan Unique Winning Products untuk memenangkan persaingan & menciptakan produk-produk bermerek pilihan utama konsumen dgn investasi merek yg terus menerus dilakukan. Sebut saja merek-merek TANGO, FORMULA, TEH GELAS, FULLO, OOPS, VITACHARM, KIRANTI, & lain-lain yg sudah tidak asing lagi. Mulai dari pasta gigi & sikat gigi hingga makanan & minuman kesehatan, beragam produk kami telah menjadi bagian dari kehidupan masyarakat Indonesia. Bahkan, banyak produk kami yg sudah dapat dinikmati oleh konsumen di berbagai negara.

Komitmen pada kualitas & inovasi membuat kami mampu berdiri tegak selama lebih dari setengah abad & menjadi salah salah satu perusahaan consumer goods lokal yg siap bersaing dgn perusahaan-perusahaan dunia yg sejenis. Beberapa merek dari produk kami bahkan menjadi pemimpin pasar di Indonesia & meraih berbagai penghargaan atas kepuasan konsumen & merek terbaik melalui lembaga surveyor yg diakui secara nasional maupun internasional. 

Semua kemajuan yg telah dicapai ini tidak lepas dari nilai-nilai yg telah kami yakini sejak awal serta terjalinnya hubungan kekeluargaan yg dekat dengan konsumen, karyawan, pemilik, & pihak-pihak lain yg terkait. Kehadiran kami adalah untuk selalu memenuhi kebutuhan konsumen & memberikan kontribusi bagi kesejahteraan masyarakat. Maka, kami terus berupaya untuk mengembangkan usaha & menyempurnakan layanan serta kualitas produk-produk sesuai dgn kebutuhan konsumen, baik saat sekarang maupun akan datang.

Name: Emami Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1974 by two childhood friends - RS Agarwal and RS Goenka, Emami Ltd. has positioned itself as one of the leading and fastest growing personal care and healthcare businesses in India. With a prodigious portfolio of household brand names such as BoroPlus, Navratna, Kesh King, Fair and Handsome, Zandu Balm, Mentho Plus Balm and Fast Relief, Emami employs around 25,000 employees across geographies. Well known for its aggressive marketing powered by celebrity endorsements, Emami products are available in over 4.9 million retail outlets across India through its network of ~3200 distributors with a global footprint spanning over 70 countries including SAARC, MENAP, SEA, Africa, Eastern Europe and the CIS countries. Emami Ltd is the flagship Company of the diversified Emami Group.

To know more, please visit www.emamiltd.in and www.emamigroup.com

Name: Daikin Airconditioning India Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Daikin Air-conditioning India Pvt. Ltd., a subsidiary of Daikin Industries Ltd. is one of the leading global manufacturers of both commercial and residential air-conditioning systems. After introducing our superior air-conditioning solutions in India in the year 2000, we gained the trust of our valuable customers with our innovative range of products and dedication towards quality. Our never-ending quest for innovation has made us the market leaders for both commercial use and high-end residential air-conditioning systems. An ISO 14001 certified company; we remain committed to keep you at the core of everything we do. We at Daikin, with global philosophy of ‘Quality First’ walk on to realise our dream for a better world.

Name: Nutrifood
Description:
Founded in 1979, Nutrifood is an innovative company that manufactures & markets international-quality health foods & beverages under leading brands. 
Nutrifood is a company that innovatively inspires and supports every individual to attain balanced life by living a fun healthy-life and being mindful of nutrition intake, thus enjoying a longer healthy life.

Our activity is supported by three pillars:

Nutrifood innovatively provides premium product and services of in high quality, ease and pleasant, and effective based on scientific approach.

"INSPIRING A NUTRITIOUS LIFE"

Name: Bombril
Description:
Somos a Bombril, empresa  de marcas brasileiras icônicas, presentes na casa de mais de 90% dos brasileiros. Bombril, Limpol, MonBijou nossas grandes estrelas, ao longo dos últimos 77 anos, foram construídas com muita inovação, campanhas memoráveis, cheias de autenticidade e irreverência. 

Um legado enorme, com um grande futuro pela frente. Assim queremos continuar crescendo e fortalecendo nossas marcas. Transformação é a palavra da vez e você que curte um desafio é a pessoa certa para construir essa nova jornada com a gente.

Name: ANMOL INDUSTRIES LIMITED
Description:
We are committed to achieving excellence and leading our conglomerate to the forefront of success. Our focus on growth is unwavering, driven by a deep respect for life's value and a dedication to progress. Our goal is to reach new heights with a global mindset.

Anmol is dedicated to delivering unparalleled value to society, consumers, employees, and stakeholders alike. We constantly strive to raise the bar for our associates, ensuring their growth and development.

Through strategic asset leveraging, we enhance group synergy and strive for global competitiveness. This approach is key to sustaining our growth and achieving long-term success. Join us in our journey towards excellence.


Description -
Anmol Industries Ltd. (formerly Anmol Biscuits Ltd.) is a renowned brand and a key player in India's Biscuits and Bakery market. Our product line includes a wide range of biscuits, including sweet, semi-sweet, and health-focused varieties, premium cookies, bar cakes, and rusk.

We take pride in our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, which enable us to produce high-quality products. Guided by our core values of Quality, Ethics, and Brand Promise, Anmol has earned a reputation as one of the most trusted and responsible brands in the packaged food industry.

Name: Ontex
Description:
Since 1979 we have been driven by a simple purpose – to partner with our stakeholders and make great quality products accessible to all. Over time we have grown into an international company in the baby, feminine and adult care categories, trusted by people of all generations, to make their everyday lives that little bit easier.

Ontex is a leading international developer and producer of baby care, feminine care and adult care products, both for retailers and healthcare, primarily in Europe and North America. The group employs around 5,100 people, with plants and offices in 11 countries, and its innovative products are distributed in around 100 countries. Ontex is headquartered in Aalst, Belgium and is listed on Euronext Brussel, where it is a constituent of the Bel Mid index. To keep up with the latest news, visit ontex.com or follow Ontex on LinkedIn.

Name: GROHE
Description:
About GROHE

GROHE is a leading global brand for complete bathroom solutions and kitchen fittings. Since 2014 GROHE has been part of the strong brand portfolio of LIXIL, a manufacturer of pioneering water and housing products. In order to offer "Pure Freude an Wasser", every product is based on the brand values of quality, technology, design and sustainability. Portfolio highlights such as the GROHE Eurosmart line or the GROHE thermostat series as well as groundbreaking innovations such as the GROHE Blue water system are the perfect embodiment of these values. Focused on customer needs, GROHE creates life-enhancing and sustainable product solutions that offer added value for consumers. To make everyday work easier for its professional partners, the brand also offers a comprehensive range of services, including the GROHE + loyalty program and GIVE – a training program for the next generation of installers.
With water at the core of its business, GROHE contributes to LIXIL’s corporate responsibility strategy with a resource-saving value chain: from CO2-neutral* production, water- and energy-saving product technologies, the removal of unnecessary plastic in the product packaging, all the way to the launch of Cradle to Cradle Certified products. With the hybrid communication ecosystem GROHE X, the brand provides further impulses for the industry. Whether digitally on the brand experience hub, physically or hybrid in the GROHE X Brand & Communication Experience Center in Hemer, Germany or on the road with the GROHE X Motion Trucks, the brand connects people to enhance LIXIL’s purpose to “make better homes a reality for everyone, everywhere”.
 
* includes CO2 compensation projects, more on green.grohe.com.

Name: Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd
Description:
Kansai Nerolac is one of the largest paints & coatings companies in India having a significant presence in industrial and decorative paints sectors.

We embarked our journey in 1920 as Gahagan Paints and Varnish Co. Ltd. at Lower Parel in Bombay. In 1930, three British companies merged to formulate Lead Industries Group Ltd. In 1933, Lead Industries Group Ltd. acquired entire share capital of Gahagan Paints in 1933 and thus, Goodlass Wall (India) Ltd. was born. 

Subsequently, by 1946, Goodlass Wall (India) Ltd. was known as Goodlass Wall Pvt. Ltd. In 1957, Goodlass Wall Pvt. Ltd. grew popular as Goodlass Nerolac Paints (Pvt.) Ltd. Also, it went public in the same year and established itself as Goodlass Nerolac Paints Ltd. 
   
In 1976, Goodlass Nerolac Paints Ltd. became a part of the Tata Forbes Group on acquisition of a part of the foreign shareholdings by Forbes Gokak.

In 1983, Goodlass Nerolac Paints Ltd. strengthened itself by entering in technical collaboration agreements with Kansai Paint Co. Ltd., Japan and Nihon Tokushu Toryo Co. Ltd., Japan. 

In 1986, Goodlass Nerolac Paints Ltd. turned into a joint venture of the Tata Forbes and the Kansai Paint Co. Ltd., with the latter acquiring 36% of its share capital.

In 1999, Kansai Paint Company Ltd., Japan took over the entire stake of Tata Forbes group and thus GNP became a wholly owned subsidiary of Kansai Paint Company Ltd. 

In 2006, on the 11th of July, Goodlass Nerolac Paints Ltd. name has been changed to Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd.

Name: Faber-Castell Perú
Description: Desde 1761, fabricamos y comercializamos reconocidos artículos escolares, de escritorio, de escritura fina y de arte, preferidos en el Perú y el mundo, para liberar tu creatividad en todo momento

Name: Lotte Kolson (Pvt.) Limited
Description:
Lotte Kolson (Pvt.) Limited is a subsidiary of LOTTE Group. The name is synonymous with dynamic and innovative food products related to snacks, biscuits, cakes and pasta.

A household name since 1942, KOLSON has been a leading confectionery and food manufacturing company in Pakistan with a big share of worldwide exports as well. It has the distinction of being one of the pioneer food processing industries in Pakistan. Some of the Kolson flagship brands are Slanty, Bravo, Potato Sticks and Jam Hearts.

LOTTE Group – a South Korean conglomerate with a turnover of US$ 65 billion; enjoys presence in 70 countries in key business areas which include: food, retail, tourism, chemicals, construction, manufacturing & finance.

LOTTE Confectionery Co. Ltd. is the group’s flagship company in Foods and Beverages category. The delicious world of LOTTE Confectionery started out in 1967 with a tiny pack of chewing gum. Today LOTTE Confectionery is producing over 500 products globally, which includes Gum, Candy, Biscuits, Chocolates, Snacks and Ice cream. 

OUR PHILOSOPHY:

We aim to deliver quality products day in and day out that delight our consumers and build loyalty and trust in our brands and our organization. Being a food manufacturing company, we understand our responsibility in providing the best quality products enriched with high quality ingredients and pure value.

Name: Grupo AlEn
Description:
Somos una empresa mexicana con 75 años de historia, líder en la fabricación de productos de limpieza que ofrecen soluciones innovadoras para el hogar. Nuestras 17 marcas de alto valor, como Cloralex, Pinol, Microdyn Ensueño y Eficaz están presentes en 97% de los hogares mexicanos y llegan a millones de personas en México, Estados Unidos, Centroamérica y El Caribe. Nuestro propósito es construir un mundo más limpio y sostenible para ti.

Con más de 6,000 colaboradores, hoy operamos 5 plantas de manufactura y 2 plantas de reciclaje, y constantemente seguimos innovando para llevar bienestar a más hogares en nuestro Centro de Innovación, Investigación y Desarrollo AlEn.

Desde hace más de 30 años, somos pioneros en el reciclaje de plástico, y hoy somos uno de los mayores recicladores de América. Gracias a iniciativas como el programa “Reciclar para Ganar”, contamos con más de 85 máquinas automatizadas de acopio y diversos canales de reciclaje, involucrando a la comunidad en nuestros esfuerzos por construir un futuro más sostenible.

En los últimos 5 años, a través de Fundación AlEn, hemos beneficiado a más de 5.6 millones de personas y donado más de 3 millones de productos. Continuamos implementando programas como “Agua en mi Escuela”, con el objetivo de construir comunidades más saludables, llevando soluciones para el acceso al agua a escuelas de México.

Te invitamos a conocer más sobre nuestro propósito y nuestras acciones en www.grupoalen.com.

Name: Grupo Simões
Description:
Grupo Simões é grupo empresarial atuante na Região Norte do Brasil.
Formado atualmente por 6 empresas e uma Sede Administrativa, está organizado em  três grandes divisões: Logística Portuária, Gases Industriais e Veículos.


Divisão de Gases Industriais:  Conta com duas unidades produtoras, situadas em Manaus e Belém, e um centro de distribuição em Porto Velho .

Divisão de Veículos:  Atualmente,  conta com duas franquias, a concessionária Murano Veículos representada pela marca Fiat e a concessionária Shizen Veículos representada pela marca Honda,  ambas localizadas em Manaus. 

Logística Portuária: Possui um Terminal Portuário em desenvolvimento - o Terminal Portuário de Novo Remanso, localizado em Novo Remanso, cidade de Itacoatiara (AM).

Name: Le Creuset
Description:
Founded in 1925 in the small town of Fresnoy Le Grand, France, Le Creuset is a global cookwares company best known for its premium and vibrantly colored enameled cast iron cookware.  Preferred by everyone from top chefs to novice cooks around the world, Le Creuset cast iron cookware is produced to this day in the original Fresnoy location. Additionally, the Le Creuset brand has expanded to offer premium stoneware, cooking and wine tools, stockpots, kettles, and high performance stainless steel and forged hard anodized cookware.

Le Creuset products can be found in company-owned Le Creuset retail stores as well as at fine cookware retailers throughout the world, and online at www.lecreuset.com.

Name: ASA Indústria
Description:
O Grupo ASA conta com a dedicação de mais de 1.700 colaboradores, que desde a fundação da empresa, em 1996, produz marcas que são líderes em suas categorias e chegam na casa de milhares de famílias. Iniciamos com a produção do sabão em barra Bem-te-vi e do sabão em pó Invicto, pouco tempo depois, nos anos 2000, tivemos o lançamento das fraldas Baby&Baby e adquirimos as fábricas Palmeiron e Vitamilho, diversificando nosso portfólio de produtos e chegando cada vez mais perto dos nossos clientes. Em 2015, ampliamos ainda mais a nossa atuação com a fundação da CBMC – Cimento Forte, fortalecendo o mercado da construção.

Nosso time está distribuído nas quatro unidades fabris, nos estados de Pernambuco e Paraíba, e contribui com a produção de mais de 210 itens dos segmentos de alimentos, bebidas, higiene, limpeza e construção. Aqui, crescemos junto com a história do Grupo ASA!

Name: Grupo SID
Description:
Grupo SID es uno de los conglomerados de empresas dominicanas de fabricación y comercialización de productos de consumo masivo más grandes de la República Dominicana con más de 2,000 productos bajo su sombrilla y presencia en 17 países. Enfocada en la creación de bienestar para sus colaboradores, aliados comerciales, consumidores y la sociedad en general, Grupo SID es considerada como una de las mejores organizaciones dominicanas para trabajar, posee de los más altos estándares de calidad industrial y alianzas comerciales con marcas y empresas internacionales de alto prestigio mundial.


Misión
Crear bienestar, construyendo y generando valor para proveer y asegurar mejores condiciones a todos los pilares de nuestra organización: nuestros consumidores, nuestros clientes, nuestros suplidores, nuestro personal, nuestros accionistas y nuestra comunidad.

Visión
Ser el grupo empresarial líder en los mercados en que compiten, reconocido por el éxito de sus empresas, las cuales añaden valor y significado a la vida cotidiana de nuestros consumidores a través de nuestras marcas, productos y servicios de la más alta calidad.

Valores
Crecer
Servir
Proteger
Compartir

Name: OXXO Colombia
Description:
Formamos parte del Grupo FEMSA y desde la apertura de nuestra primera tienda en Colombia en 2009, nos hemos esforzado en ser parte del estilo de vida de muchas personas así de fácil! 

En OXXO Colombia nos preocupamos por brindar una amplia oferta de productos y servicios con precios competitivos que nos permitan ser relevantes y oportunos en el día a día de las comunidades en donde se encuentran nuestras tiendas.

Name: Square Food & Beverage Ltd.
Description:
Square Food & Beverage Limited, has started its journey in 2001 as a member of Square Group, the leading corporate house in Bangladesh. Within a short span of time, it has been able to create a strong foothold in the market through its quality products and customer services. For its obsession with quality management, the company had obtained the international quality standard ISO 9001 in 2005. Strong commitment to quality, adoption of advanced technology, stress on human resource development, focus on continuous improvement and introduction of new products for the growing markets have given the company a decisive position in the industry. Recently the company achieved ISO 22000 for its food safety management system.

Square Food & Beverage Limited has introduced three popular brands in the market namely Radhuni, Ruchi and Chashi. Radhuni is the flagship brand of the company. Just after its introduction, Radhuni drew the attention of housewives who demanded convenience and time saving cooking. The product range of Radhuni is enriched with basic spices, mixed spices, cereals & pulses based products, edible oil and dairy. On the other hand, Ruchi is providing ready-to-eat snacks like Chanachur, Fried Dal, Banana Chips, Jhuribhaja, Peanut, Chutney, Pickles and Honey. Ruchi has won the heart of the youngsters for its healthy, tasty & innovative ground breaking products.

The new brand of the company, Chashi is the landmark of those products which are collected directly from the farmers having the indigenous essence and freshness.

The company assures to meet the increasing demand for quality products both at home and abroad. The products with international standards are being exported to more than 22 countries. Dedication to quality, innovative products, customer service and reasonable price has given the company a unique position in the food market.

Name: Caloi
Description:
Desde 1898, fabricamos bicicletas. 99% de chances de que sua primeira bicicleta foi uma Caloi. Como se fosse um aperto de mãos, você segurou o guidão e nunca mais largou. Isso mudou seu mundo, sua perspectiva, seu caminho. 

Mais de um século incentivando a mobilidade sustentável, o lazer saudável e o esporte amador e profissional, a Caloi é líder do mercado nacional de bicicletas. A empresa atua em diversos segmentos, desde mountain bike até mobilidade urbana e bicicletas infantis. 

A nossa história é escrita por pessoas e bicicletas. Estamos presentes desde um passeio de bicicleta no domingo com a família à competições esportivas. Cada projeto, cada reunião, cada momento é uma oportunidade para inspirar as pessoas com os nossos produtos. 

Buscamos ser a empresa mais apaixonante para se trabalhar na indústria, criando as condições para que todos os colaboradores contribuam e se desenvolvam em um ambiente de trabalho positivo e efetivo.

Se você se identifica com o nosso propósito, venha fazer parte dessa equipe!

Name: Akij Venture Group
Description: Akij Venture is one of Bangladesh’s trusted consumer goods manufacturing companies & largest industrial conglomerates in Bangladesh, comprising over 25 companies and subsidiaries like Food & Beverage, Health & Hygiene Unit, Publications, Paper mills, Insurance Unit, Dairy Farm, Electronics, Bycycle & Engineering etc. Akij Venture is a concern of Akij group who has a rich history of over 70+ years.

Name: FLiPO
Description:
En FLiPO nos hemos dado cuenta de que la vida en blanco y negro no es vida. Apostamos por el color, los riesgos, la diversión. Es por ello que hemos trabajado en crear un producto versátil, innovador y de alta calidad. Unas gafas que complementan la mirada, que permiten mostrar al mundo diferentes facetas y versiones de uno mismo. 

FLiPO es la primera marca en conseguir modular la gafa al 100%. Ponemos las lentes y la visión. Dejamos que el color y el estilo lo pongan las personas. #TuCreasFliPO

FLiPO permite añadir nuevos clips funcionales, clips de diseño y varillas a conjunto, creando así infinitas combinaciones. ¿Por qué disponer de un solo estilo si puedes tener todos en uno?

Name: Familia Institucional
Description: Familia Institucional is part of Grupo Familia and with more than 25 years of experience, we accompany and advise institutions to generate well-being in a sustainable way for users through superior performance hygiene experiences and solutions.

Name: Funko
Description:
Funko (NASDAQ: FNKO) is a leading pop culture lifestyle brand. We provide connection to pop culture with a product line that includes vinyl figures, action toys, plush, apparel, board games, housewares, NFTs and accessories. As the world’s largest proprietor of licenses, entertainment enthusiasts display their fandom through the lens of Funko products.

The company also powers the Loungefly, Mondo, Funko Games and Digital Pop! brands, while offering a large selection of lifestyle goods through Funko.com, Loungefly.com and FunkoEurope.com as well as at our retail locations in Everett, Washington and Hollywood, California. Learn more at https://funko.com/, and follow us on Twitter (@OriginalFunko) and Instagram (@OriginalFunko).

Name: Bajaj Consumer Care
Description:
Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd. is the second largest company in the Shishir Bajaj Group of companies. The history of Bajaj Consumer Care dates back to 1953 when Mr. Kamalnayan Bajaj established Bajaj Sevashram to market and sell hair oils and other beauty products.
Today, the company is one of the leading players in the Hair oil category with brands like Bajaj Almond Drops Hair Oil, 100% pure Coconut Oil, Bajaj Brahmi Amla Hair Oil, Bajaj Amla Hair oil. Our flagship Brand, Bajaj Almond Drops Hair oil is the No. 1* hair oil in Indian market with Premium positioning & high brand recall. 
In addition to Hair Oils, the company also diversifies in products across Hair care, Skin care, Personal care & Ethnic range segments with successful brands like Bajaj Almond Drops Hair Serum, Bajaj Gulab Jal & the entire portfolio of Bajaj No Marks range of products featuring in the list.

Name: Brasal
Description:
O diferencial transformador da Brasal é ter uma equipe conectada pelas mesmas crenças. Com sede em Brasília, sua cidade de origem, expandiu suas atividades para os estados de Goiás, Minas Gerais e Tocantins. 
É uma dos maiores grupos empresariais do Centro-Oeste e atua nos segmentos segmentos de produção e distribuição de bebidas (Brasal Refrigerantes), incorporação e construção imobiliária (Brasal Incorporações), revenda de veículos (Brasal Veículos), comercialização de combustíveis (Brasal Combustíveis) e geração de energia limpa (Brasal Energia).
A Cultura de Realização Brasal, um conjunto de diretrizes, integra e direciona as empresas. O relacionamento com ecossistemas diversificados, com especificidades distintas, fortalece a abertura das empresas Brasal e de seus colaboradores ao aprendizado permanente e ao aprimoramento da habilidade de fazer conexões que resultem em soluções, produtos e serviços inovadores.

Name: Beco
Description:
A little revolution now and then is a good thing. How we live, what we buy and what we throw away has ripple effects on the world around us. Therefore, we are dedicated to eco-friendly and biodegradable alternatives you just can’t wait to use in your home.

For the past few years, we’ve been a company with strong beliefs about the rights of people and planet. We believe that a company's values are as important as the products it makes. We know that plant-based products can provide the efficacy you are looking for, and that products designed from compostable plant-based ingredients are a more sustainable option than ingredients made from plastic. We believe that waste, is well... a waste. It's why we offer end to end sustainability – from raw material sourcing to manufacturing processes to packaging to delivery to disposal of the used product. 

We have a lot of beliefs, but the biggest one is doing things right, being trustworthy, positive and straightforward.

We invite you on our journey to nurture simplicity, spirituality and purity. What do you believe?

Name: The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company
Description:
At ScottsMiracle-Gro, we believe good can grow anywhere. That’s why we’re committed to GroMoreGood everywhere. This purpose drives us to develop industry-leading lawn and gardening products that help people everywhere express themselves on their own piece of the Earth. It also defines how we see our responsibility to our communities, our planet, our consumers, and each other.

Our associates are the heart and soul of everything we do at ScottsMiracle-Gro and our subsidiary the Hawthorne Gardening Company. By putting our associates first, we nurture a culture in which we GroMoreGood together. 

Since our founding over 150 years ago, ScottsMiracle-Gro has been deeply rooted in family and community. We embrace our responsibility to create a better life for our associates and consumers. When you join us, you grow professionally and challenge yourself in new ways. You work on some of America’s most trusted and recognized brands. You have opportunities to attain your physical, financial and personal best. You give back. You become an important member of a passionate team that lives out its values every single day.

Our purpose to GroMoreGood is a clear path forward for our company, one that pushes us to innovate for the future, think bigger and be better. We hope you will join us!

Name: Froneri Egypt
Description:
Froneri is an Ice Cream company, created in 2016 as a dynamic joint-venture between R&R and Nestlé, we are the second largest manufacturer of ice cream in Europe, the third largest worldwide and the number one private label producer worldwide.
We are a fast-growth international business with a vision to build the world’s best ice cream company. A passionate challenger brand, we are building the market through sole category focus and delivering value for retailers and consumers.
Operating in 23 countries and with over 15,000 employees, Froneri is a one-stop shop for all customers looking for ice cream products no matter where you are in the world.

Name: PT Ultrajaya
Description:
The leading dairy and Aseptic/UHT beverage manufacturer in Indonesia, founded in 1975. PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Co. Tbk is headquartered in the city of Bandung and has a public listing on the Jakarta Stock Exchange. 

With a strong presence in the UHT Milk and RTD Tea categories and top rated brands like Ultra Milk and Teh Kotak the company dominates the respective market segments. Ultrajaya also produces and markets Sweetened Condensed Milk and has a fast growing line of Health Beverages which include Sari Asem Asli and Sari Kacang Ijo.

As a pioneer in the industry Ultrajaya has always been a driving force behind the growth of the liquid milk category in Indonesia and the company and its employees are committed to improving the health of Indonesian citizens by providing only the very best quality milk, which is produced by cows from Ultrajaya's very own farms.

In 2014 Ultrajaya announced a joint venture with Japanese beverage manufacturer ITO EN to form ITO EN ULTRAJAYA in Jakarta for the purpose of combining the best Japanese tea with the marketing and distribution strength of Ultrajaya in Indonesia.

Name: César Iglesias, S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a la fabricación, distribución y venta de productos de consumo masivo en las áreas de limpieza, cuidado personal y alimentación. 

Durante 111 años de crecimiento sostenido, hemos realizado importantes inversiones, que nos han permitido convertirnos en una de las empresas de capital dominicano más grandes del país y el caribe.

Name: LifeStyles Healthcare
Description:
LifeStyles has a history dating back to 1905 when Eric Ansell first started making condoms in Richmond Australia.Today LifeStyles is a Global leader in the sexual wellness sector, comprising a broad range of condom, personal lubricant and other related products. LifeStyles is the world’s #2 condom company with leading latex brands such as LifeStyles, Manix, Control, Unimil, Blowtex and others, as well as the fast-growing, highly-innovative non-latex condom brand SKYN.

LifeStyles Healthcare was created on September 1 2017 when the consortium of Humanwell Healthcare & CITIC Capital private equity purchased the Sexual Wellness division from Ansell.

As of December 1, 2022, LifeStyles is owned by Linden Capital Partners, a Chicago-based private equity firm focused on the healthcare industry.

Name: Culligan International
Description: There’s nothing more fundamental to life on Earth than water. That’s why Culligan believes if we can transform water, we can transform the world. With better science and better service, we change what’s possible for more people. Better drinking water for more neighborhoods and families. More sustainable practices for the planet. And more solutions to make more lives better. We turn water you can live with into water you can love.

Name: Alza.cz a.s.
Description:
Alza.cz Inc. is one of the leading European e-commerce companies based in the Czech Republic.  With a huge product catalog, a wide range of innovative services, and a professional and friendly staff, we aim to offer an excellent consumer experience and the best prices in Europe.

Do you want to join a progressive, expanding company?  We are always looking for people who are passionate about their work and will help us continue to develop and improve.  If you think you have skills or experience that would fit well, and you’re interested in working in a friendly and dynamic environment, we would love to hear from you!

You can find information about Alza’s development and history here - http://www.alza.cz/article/141.htm

Name: Multi Bintang Indonesia
Description:
As the pioneer of the beer industry in Indonesia with a proud history of over than 90 years in the country, Multi Bintang Indonesia is synonymous with BINTANG, Indonesia’s favourite and most iconic beer brand. As part of the HEINEKEN Company, Multi Bintang Indonesia also produces and markets the world’s most valuable international premium beer brand, Heineken, as well as a portfolio of other beer brands including BINTANG Crystal, BINTANG Radler, and BINTANG Anggur Merah.  

We believe in making a positive impact, creating a real change in the world. Join us and let’s do something that matters!

Name: Novaventa
Description:
En Novaventa nos apasiona llevar a millones de consumidores en Colombia, diferentes productos que se conviertan en soluciones innovadoras y de conveniencia para todos. 

Somos parte de Grupo Nutresa, la principal compañía de alimentos de latinoamérica. Conformamos su red de comercialización, distribuyendo sus productos y de marcas aliadas mediante los formatos de venta por catálogo, máquinas dispensadoras y comercio electrónico.

Somos la compañía que está #SiempreContigo. Únete a un equipo de trabajo innovador, digital y apasionado por crear modelos de comercialización disruptivos.

Name: BR BRANDS - MERHEJE
Description:
Desde 1950 a Merheje vem criando, inovando e produzindo acessórios diversos para seus cuidados pessoais.

Investindo em tecnologia, moda, cores, formas e temas diversos, a Merheje proporciona a seus produtos funcionalidade, ergonomia, modernidade, higiene e segurança.

O portfólio variado visa atender a vários tipos de públicos, sejam homens ou mulheres, bebês, teens ou adultos.

Name: Alimentosideal
Description: Somos una empresa Guatemalteca que Produce, Mercadea, Vende y Distribuye PRODUCTOS ALIMENTICIOS para el mercado de Centroamérica y Panamá, con Precio y Calidad Competitiva, buscando una Rentabilidad adecuada para nuestros Accionistas y el Bienestar de nuestros Colaboradores

Name: Faber-Castell Group
Description:
Faber-Castell is one of the world’s leading companies for high-quality products for writing, drawing and creative design as well as decorative cosmetic products. 
With more than two billion pencils and coloured pencils per year and around 6,500 employees, Faber-Castell is the world’s leading manufacturer of wood-cased pencils. Nowadays the company is represented in over 120 countries and has its own production sites in ten countries as well as sales companies in 22 countries. 
Founded in 1761, Faber-Castell is one of the oldest industrial companies in the world and has been owned by the same family for nine generations. The company owes its leading position on the international market to its traditional commitment to the highest quality, its environmental leadership and the large number of product innovations.

Name: MGA Entertainment
Description:
MGA Entertainment is on a mission to inspire imagination and creativity through innovative toys, entertainment, and experiences that transform play into limitless possibilities. As the largest privately held toy and entertainment company in the U.S., MGA is a global leader in designing and delivering world-class consumer products that spark wonder and drive play forward. Headquartered in Los Angeles with offices worldwide, MGA’s portfolio spans a dynamic range of original and licensed brands — from toys, dolls, games, and electronics to fashion, home décor, and entertainment content including hit movies and TV series. The company is recognized for its bold approach to storytelling, trendsetting design, and deep commitment to quality. The award-winning MGA family includes fan-favorite brands such as L.O.L. Surprise!, Little Tikes, Rainbow High, Bratz, MGA’s Miniverse, Yummiland, CarTuned, Wonder Factory, BABY born, and Zapf Creation.  To learn more, visit www.mgae.com and follow MGA on LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram andFacebook. 

History: 
Isaac Larian, Founder and CEO, helped found a company called ABC Electronics in 1979, which changed its name to Micro Games of America in the late 80s. Then, in the late 90s when Larian looked to shift from electronic games to dolls and toys, the company name was changed to MGA Entertainment. In 2001 the company launched the cultural phenomenon Bratz; in 2006 MGA acquired iconic childhood brand, Little Tikes, building a robust portfolio of toys; in 2016 it launch the unboxing global sensation L.O.L. Surprise!; and in 2022 it launched MGA's Miniverse, the first DIY miniature collectible on the market. And the innovation keeps coming ...

Name: Cortés Hermanos
Description:
Desde nuestra fundación en 1929, somos la compañía más grande de manufactura de chocolate en la cuenca del caribe, exportando nuestros productos a más de 20 paises. Nuestras fábricas en República Dominicana y Puerto Rico elaboran sobre 50 variedades distintas de productos derivados del cacao líderes en sus respectivas categorías. 
Aparte de nuestras marcas tradicionales y emblemáticas, nos encontramos en un estado de innovación constante hacia nuevos productos, servicios y modelos de negocio que nos mantienen a la vanguardia de nuestra industria. Un ejemplo de esto es nuestra reciente incursión en la industria hostelera, con nuestros restaurantes “Chocobar Cortés”, orientados a destacar el chocolate como ingrediente estelar en Puerto Rico y el estado de Nueva York. En el año 2021, abrimos las puertas a un Centro de Visitantes en nuestra fábrica más moderna hasta la fecha, en el municipio de Pedro Brand en República Dominicana, que destaca la historia de nuestra compañía y la industria del chocolate en ese país.



Nuestra Misión: 
"Desarrollar, producir y comercializar productos relacionados a la alimentación y al bienestar, que crean experiencias excepcionales."

Nuestra Visión:
"Una empresa diversificada con presencia internacional significativa en las categorías de alimentos y de bienestar."
 
Nuestros valores, siempre presentes:

• Gente 
Apreciamos a nuestros chocolateros y desarrollamos su potencial en un ambiente respetuoso y estimulante.

• Excelencia
Estamos comprometidos con la calidad y efectividad en nuestros procesos, productos y servicios.

• Innovación
Promovemos la generación de ideas nuevas que nos muevan a un nivel superior.

• Responsabilidad
Cumplimos a cabalidad todos los compromisos manteniendo nuestra credibilidad ante clientes y relacionados.

¿Quieres formar parte de nuestra misión?
Escribenos a Reclutamiento@corteshermanos.com

Name: Bugaboo
Description:
For day one. For the journey. For the future.
Pioneering parenting products designed with the next generation in mind.

Certified B Corp

Name: tonies USA
Description: #Toniebox is a #ScreenFree, imagination-based audio speaker that plays music and stories when you place a Tonie on top. With a growing and extensive library of Tonie characters, you can find your favorites from literary classics, to Disney movies, or even record your own special stories with Creative-Tonies.

Name: Wildcraft India
Description:
Born in the tropics. Raised in the great outdoors. 

Wildcraft is India’s first and largest homegrown brand with a mission of rekindling the explorer in each of us. Equipping us from head-to-toe with crafted travel gear, apparel & footwear. 

Made for everything you expect out there. And a lot you don’t.
#ReadyForAnything

Get in touch to know more.

Name: PinarArabia
Description:
The much-loved Turkish brand, Pinar has been the quality choice of consumers, and a leader in the food sector since 1973. Launched as a milk and dairy products brand, today Pinar meets various, and versatile consumer needs across the dairy, meat and drinking water segments.

As a pioneer in the food sector, Pinar has a string of proud ‘firsts’ that include the first healthy long life milk, ready-to-serve mayonnaise, cream cheese, frozen meat products, packed turkey products, and the first non-returnable bottled water.

An increasingly competitive environment makes it even more critical for brands to gain consumer appreciation. With every new category it enters, Pinar successfully, and consistently maintains its iconic brand identity. This has only strengthened its prime position in Turkey, and kept it in sync with global trends. With its stable brand love, consumer loyalty, and sustainable profitability, the brand is poised newer segments and markets.

Name: Boomerang
Description: Boomerang gives you access to everything, without the need of buying it.

Name: Anex co.
Description:
At Anex, we're a dedicated team driven by one goal: supporting parents who refuse to compromise on their journey through parenthood. Inspired by their unwavering commitment, we design minimal, ergonomic products that empower them to thrive amidst the challenges of raising a child. Parenthood is a new beginning, and our enduring designs are built to last, ensuring parents can embrace every moment without hesitation.

www.anexbaby.com

Name: Rise & Fall
Description:
Here at Rise & Fall, we’re no strangers to the retail game. We’ve seen how it works – who it benefits, who it hurts. We’ve witnessed fast fashion destroying the earth. Seen monumental mark-ups and manufacturers missing out. Watched high quality goods become less and less accessible.

We’ve lived it, breathed it and had enough.

So, we’ve decided to do something different. Something better. We’re taking traditional retail, and we’re changing it. Making luxury accessible, by bringing you exceptional goods – without the luxury mark-ups.

All of the quality, none of the cost.

We’re sourcing the world’s best materials, creating products built to last. Partnering with world-class manufacturers, giving them access, recognition and more money for their goods. Opening doors for you by offering luxury essentials for up to 80% less than you’re used to. Choosing collaboration over convention, and responsibility over greed. Making things better. For everyone.

Welcome to a whole new way of doing things.

Welcome to Rise & Fall.

Name: Orrefors Kosta Boda AB
Description:
Orrefors Kosta Boda AB, with the brands Orrefors and Kosta Boda, is a Swedish company designing and manufacturing high-quality glassware for everyday use and art glass. We are the Nordic countries’ largest glassworks group with a history that date back to 1742. The heart of our business is located in the Kingdom of Crystal in the state of Småland where over a million visitors flock every year to see our spectacular production.

Orrefors Kosta Boda AB is since 2005 part of New Wave Group, a company active with several brands on the consumer and business markets in the areas of sports, recreation, home interior and gifts. New Wave Group is listed on the NASDAQ OMX Stockholm.

Name: C.A. Carlin
Description:
C.A. Carlin (formerly Carlin Group) is a full-service brokerage committed to delivering real time revenue for brands through all classes of trade. Since 1962, we’ve built industry relationships on a foundation of action. We turn information into insight. We convert insight into programs. We drive programs that deliver results on your timeline.

Thanks to our operating partnership with C.A. Fortune and C.A. Ferolie, we’re uniquely positioned to offer our clients a national agency solution that leads with an innovative platform for understanding consumer and shopper behaviors, omnichannel coverage model, long-standing regional and national customer relationships, and unparalleled flexibility.

Name: Varmora Plastech Pvt. Ltd
Description: Varmora Plastech Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer and exporter of houseware products. We are a successful brand in the plastic industry with wide range of innovative and attractive products. This range of products from Varmora Plastech comes with its unique and user-friendly designs. The products include – bottles, tiffins, dinner sets, dry storage and others kitchen products. Made from 100% virgin and food grade plastic, our products are completely healthy and safe.

Name: Hire Station Ltd
Description:
With branches across the UK Hire Station are one of the leading UK tool hire shops. Hire Station offer a Tool and Equipment Hire service for all your hire needs. Our extensive range of tools include cement mixers, cleaning equipment, access and building equipment to plant hire and power tools. When it comes to hiring tools, we are the people to talk to. For total confidence in tool hire, wherever you are - we've got you covered.

Visit our website today or call: 0370 99 00 999

Think training, think Hire Station. We have a variety of training courses available from PASMA, abrasive wheel training, fire warden training and more. Call our training team today: 0330 123 4361

Name: Matthews Memorialization
Description:
As a leader in the Memorialization industry, Matthews is committed to helping our customers grow their businesses and helping families move from grieving to remembrance by providing products of superior craftsmanship, and programs and services that help families in their time of need. Matthews Aurora Funeral Solutions is a leading provider to the funeral home industry, offering an extensive variety of high-quality wood, metal and cremation caskets, urns, stationery, and exceptional sales and service support. Matthews Cemetery Products is a leader in the industry with high-quality products and exceptional industry expertise. We help our customers serve families by providing innovative tools and comprehensive product offerings that help memorialize their loved ones. Our products include bronze and granite memorials, cremation products including glass-front niches and cremation gardens, and both community and private mausoleums featuring memorialization products and statuary. 

*Matthews Memorialization is a Matthews International Company.

Name: Bambu Earth
Description:
Modernity has wreaked havoc on our biome and our bodies. Society puts its belief in silver-bullet skincare solutions made in a lab, loaded with synthetic preservatives, and delivered to you in a plastic bottle.

We believe in the healing power of nature, knowing that earth has long provided us with everything we need to maintain healthy, beautiful skin. But, the ingredients have to be harvested fresh, stored free of contaminants, and put into powerful formulations that aren't watered down or loaded with fillers.

Join us and find the secret that hyper-industrialization has stolen from us--nature provides everything we need to restore out skin to its natural, vibrant state.

Name: Sievi
Description: Sievi is the leading manufacturer of Safety and Occupational footwear in Northern Europe. The Sievi brand, the mark of quality, offers unsurpassed work safety, fit and wearer comfort. Sievi is continuously working with the latest technology, materials and features to develop the best footwear for work. Our goal is to manufacture the most suitable and wearer friendly safety and occupational footwear for all working conditions; footwear which helps increase work safety, efficiency, and job satisfaction. Working footwear today must also be stylish and fit together with clothing and uniforms. Sievi’s extensive collection forms a product family, where you can find the precise footwear for all your occupations and working conditions. Sievi, the mark for professionals.

Name: Dilaco
Description:
En 1972 nace DILACO como una de las principales empresas chilenas importadoras de ingredientes para la elaboración de productos lácteos.
Con el tiempo y en un mundo de constantes cambios, DILACO fue incorporando nuevas líneas de negocios.  Actualmente con más de 30 proveedores extranjeros, entregamos soluciones a medida para nuestros clientes de la industria sanitaria, alimentos y bebidas, medioambiental, biotecnología, farmacéutica, entre otras. 

Contamos con 4 grandes divisiones:
- Ambiental
- BioLab
- Control de Calidad
- Alimentos

La calidad de servicio junto a la orientación al cliente son parte de nuestros principales objetivos.  Nuestra  infraestructura permite  realizar la  cadena de distribución, desde el punto de origen hasta la entrega final a tiempo y con altos estándares de calidad.

Somos líderes en los  diferentes mercados  en que participamos.

Name: Aqualla
Description: Aqualla design and supply Taps, Showers, Mirrors, Heated Towel Rails and Accessories to leading bathroom showrooms across Northern Ireland, Republic of Ireland and England.

Name: Ludendo
Description:
Le Groupe LUDENDO, dont l’enseigne phare est La Grande Récré, est un groupe français spécialisé dans le commerce des jeux, des jouets, de la fête et des loisirs pour l’enfant et la famille. Il est co-leader du marché français du jouet et compte parmi les leaders européens.
Les forces de La Grande Récré résident dans son histoire et sa nature mêlant valeurs humaines, passion d’entreprendre et esprit commerçant.
Forte de son réseau de 154 magasins (129 en France métropole, 10 dans les Dom-Tom, 13 au Maroc, 1 en Côte d’Ivoire et 1 en République de Djibouti) et de ses 1300 Parents Conseils, La Grande Récré est une marque référente dans le jouet depuis plus de 40 ans.

Name: Maven Genetics
Description: Maven was founded with one goal in mind: to breed and cultivate premium and exotic indoor cannabis of the highest quality. We are hyper-focused on ensuring that every step of the process, from seed to sale, delivers on that goal.  With over twenty years of experience cultivating award-winning strains, we are consistently curating unique and top of the line products made to enhance any experience.

Name: Sugarbud Craft Growers Corp.
Description:
Sugarbud is a federally licensed Alberta based boutique craft cannabis company, focused on the cultivation and production of high quality, genetically diverse, select-batch connoisseur cannabis products.

TSX Venture Ticker: SUGR
OTCQB Ticker: SBUDF
Instagram: @sugarbudcannabis
Facebook: @sugarbudcraftgrowers
Twitter: @SugarBudCGC

Name: NAYA BY AFRICA
Description:
NAYA by Africa is an innovative Ghanaian brand that sustainably transforms indigenous African plant oils and extracts—processed by women in rural communities—into natural, aromatherapy products, hand-crafted to care for you. 

What we do

Supporting Ghanaian women in indigenous industries - 
Our brand creates a sustainable market for the women in rural communities who process raw shea butter, black soap, and indigenous plant oils.  

Encouraging STEAM in African industry - 
We encourage Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics by being a company that embodies all five. Through research and development, we develop effective and versatile products, creatively evolving the African soap-making and oil-processing traditions that have existed for generations. 

Caring for our #NAYAtribe - 
We want to care for you with the highest quality of products and customer service because we believe that our Tribe deserves nothing but the best.

Name: The Organic Forest
Description:
We are not just a beauty brand, we're a bunch of nature-loving folks obsessed with bringing you plant-based goodness, straight from the farms to you. 

At The Organic Forest, we are driven by our purpose to craft high-performing organic hair and body care products that are as kind to the planet as they are to your hair and body. 

Our efficacious formulas are made with the purest natural ingredients, without any baddies, bottled with care. We recycle more plastic than we use because we believe that these small acts of love can make a big difference for generations to come. 

Our strength lies in our 100% plant based ingredients. Each one is thoughtfully picked to solve every concern. We source these natively  through ethical farming practices to preserve their quality, so that only the best quality ingredients make their way into our nature-derived products.

Name: Vorwerk España
Description:
Vorwerk España, filial del grupo familiar alemán Vorwerk fundado en 1883 (611.000 empleados, 2.600 millones de euros de facturación), es líder mundial en la venta directa de electrodomésticos de alta gama (Kobold y Thermomix).
 En España, presentes desde el año 1973, contamos con 400 empleados directos y más de 9.000 agentes comerciales que son el corazón de nuestro negocio. 
Nuestros pilares fundamentales son el talento, la pasión y el liderazgo de nuestros equipos acompañados por la innovación de nuestros productos. Ambos van de la mano con el único objetivo de proporcionar una experiencia de nivel a nuestros clientes.

Name: Axus
Description:
Through a network of stockists, we distribute three core brands in the U.K. and Ireland:

Axus Decor - High quality tools and accessories for the professional painter and decorator.  The range includes everything a painter needs from protective workwear and preparation, through painting and wallpapering to finishing and cleaning up.

OLFA - Advanced cutting and scraping tools for the construction, craft, sign and print industries, made in Japan to exceptionally high standards.  OLFA products are designed to achieve unparalleled results quickly and conveniently.

Artline Decor - State-of-the-art, decorative architectural mouldings made from high density polyurethane - a modern plaster alternative.  Polyurethane benefits from being lightweight and easy to install, saving much effort and time.  At the same time it is strong and slightly flexible, which stops it from being damaged during installation and delivery.  Injection moulded for precisely defined patterns, lines and contours.

Name: Lime Vizio Inc
Description:
Lime Vizio Inc is a premier floral and gifting company, delivering flowers since 2010.

LIME VIZIO has a tradition of excellence in flower delivery, and today we are one of the largest and most trusted online floral and gifting retailers in the US and Canada. LIME VIZIO takes pride in being a leader in quality, innovation, artistry and dependability. That tradition of innovation and forward-thinking has grown LIME VIZIO into a gifting powerhouse, with a family of brands that includes Blossom Flowers, Sunny Flowers and Gift on Schedule. Our entrepreneurial culture and unwavering commitment to our people creates a dynamic work environment that celebrates collaboration, quality, superior service and constant innovation.

Name: AllPeople Marketplace
Description:
AllPeople is an online marketplace that makes it easier to purchase socially and environmentally responsible goods with competitive prices, carbon-neutral shipping, and a give-back program greater than any other e-commerce company.
 
AllPeople is built on 3 Commitments directly tied to our social and environmental values, that set us apart from other online marketplaces:

#1 - Responsible Products - All our products are carefully vetted and independently verified to ensure what our consumers buy is safe, sustainable, and provided by businesses that are socially and environmentally responsible. Simply, we do the research and curate so consumers can feel good about what they buy, without needing to analyze if every product or company matches their values. We don’t want to compete with brands doing good - so we’re choosing to befriend these brands by curating and marketing their products. 

#2 - Sustainability - We provide carbon-neutral shipping for all our orders. It’s our way of addressing climate change due to transportation-related carbon emissions from our business.

#3 - Social Good - 5% of every purchase on AllPeople goes to a non-profit organization of the customer’s choice. At checkout, the customer chooses and we pay. Simple as that. Our giveback program gives 5-10x more than the majority of give back programs (we give 10x more than the AmazonSmile program).

AllPeople is built and led by a diverse team of people in age, background, and experience, including entrepreneurs, advisors, and over 90 students from 40+ universities across the U.S. Our work is fast-paced, hands-on, and is an exciting opportunity to be involved with building the next big online shopping platform - built for people and the planet!

Name: PT Berger Paints Indonesia
Description:
PT Berger Paints Indonesia is a proud subsidiary of Berger Paints Singapore Pte Ltd, part of one of the world’s most trusted names in the coatings industry. Launched as a greenfield operation in 2016, we've rapidly expanded our footprint across Indonesia in a short span of time.

At PT Berger Paints Indonesia ( Formerly known as PT Asian Paints Indonesia), we believe that clarity of vision shapes the future. With a commitment to excellence, we aim to be at the forefront of inspiring décor solutions, empowering our customers to bring their dream spaces to life.

Name: Pastalinda S.A.
Description:
En el año 1948, Augusto Prot, industrial Italiano, en su fábrica de Milán (Italia) construía equipos para enología (lavadoras, embotelladoras, tapadoras, etiquetadoras de botellas, etc).

Debido a los traumáticos eventos de la 2° guerra mundial, decidió vender la fábrica (que sigue funcionando con la misma marca "Prot") para buscar nuevos horizontes.

Así fue que se trasladó con su familia a la Argentina, y se radicó en Gral. Las Heras (Pcia de Buenos Aires), donde instaló una planta dedicada a la fabricación de equipos pulverizadores para frutales. También diseño y fabricó cortadoras de fiambre, ralladoras, lavarropas y secadoras.

En el ínterin, fiel al estilo italiano amante de las pastas, pensó en diseñar una maquina para elaborar pastas caseras que fuera superior a todo lo que se conocía en aquel entonces.

Es así que ideó y desarrolló el novedoso sistema que permite introducir la masa en los rodillos de sobado y de corte a través de bandejas fijas, sistema que aportó a la máquina mayor comodidad y facilidad de uso. Dicho invento fue patentado así como también su diseño ornamental de inconfundible belleza estética, y esta combinación en muy poco tiempo se convirtió en un éxito total.

Trabajamos para garantizar un entorno favorable para el crecimiento y desarrollo sustentable de México a través de nuestras marcas.

Avec des membres d'équipe travaillant à la fois à distance et en mode hybride dans 5 emplacements mondiaux, nous sommes honorés d'avoir vendu plus de 500 millions de produits réputés et digne de confiance. Name: Little Giant Ladder Systems
Description:
Ladders purpose-built for your profession. Because doing electrical has far different height and safety requirements than putting up drywall. Because a ladder meant for HVAC work should have a place for primer and cement. We build ladders designed to keep trade workers safe, and partner with safety experts across the country to solve real-world safety problems that trade professionals face on job sites every day. When you get a Little Giant Ladder System, you’re getting more than a ladder custom-built for the task. You’re getting greater performance, more convenience, ergonomic support and most importantly, peace of mind. 

A family-owned company located in the USA, Little Giant was founded in the 1970s when Hal and Brigitte Wing designed a new kind of ladder made specifically for painters. That great idea has grown into hundreds of models and accessories, each specifically developed to make jobs easier and safer for the hard-working men and women who form the backbone of this country.

In the past five years alone, Little Giant has received over 50 patents on safety improvements in climbing equipment design. We’re the industry leaders in safety and innovation and strap on our boots in the morning ready to get to work and do our part to help keep trade professionals safe. Thousands of people are injured on ladders every day. It is our goal, our mission, to bring that number as close to zero as possible. So the fathers, mothers, brothers and sisters that climb our ladders come home unharmed to their families each and every day.

Name: La Filipina Uy Gongco Group of Companies
Description:
La Filipina Uy Gongco Corporation was incorporated in 1971 under the leadership of Mr. Alfonso Uy. From a humble beginning, the Company has grown into a diversified business involved in trading of agricultural products and baking supplies, among others. The Company owns one of the biggest and modern flour mills in the country and is a dominant player in the production and sales of flour and flour by-products nationwide. It is also one of the largest importer and distributor of various grades of fertilizer and a leading producer of animal feeds in the country. It is the owner-operator of agricultural estates such as hog and sugar cane farms, sugar mill, corn mill, hotel, bank, shopping mall and real estate development. The Company expanded its product line from raw agricultural produce to meat processing, pasta manufacturing and logistics operations thru its fully integrated, modern, state-of-the-art facilities equipped to produce and distribute consumer products for domestic and international markets.

The Company is committed to the most sanitary and efficient operations as it recognizes its responsibility to the public for safe and healthy food. It uses the freshest pork from its farms with no extenders added to the product. The company acquired the most technologically advanced corn-drying facilities that keep the moisture level of dried corn low and therefore renders the corn aflatoxin-safe. The Company also invested in an expensive equipment so that Filipinos can have a healthier alternative for staple food, the RiCO CORN RICE. Currently, the Company holds in its portfolio the “Amigo Segurado”, “La Filipina” and “RiCO Corn Rice” brands, among others.
Location: Bonifacio Global City, Taguig City, NCR

Name: PicoBrew Inc.
Description:
Five years ago, brothers Bill and Jim Mitchell’s frustrations with homebrewing prompted the duo to create an entirely new beer-brewing process.

Jim, a food chemist and physicist, desired to incorporate more control in the process of beer brewing on a small scale. Bill, having been building software, boards, and appliances for decades, knew this was possible. The two joined forces with engineer Avi Geiger and formed PicoBrew.

A few years (and many pints of beer) later, the award-winning PicoBrew Zymatic was born. Zymatic improved the precision, repeatability, and overall quality of the beer-brewing experience and today is used by homebrewers and breweries all over the world. To date, the Zymatic has been awarded 3 patents, with over a dozen pending.

Following Zymatic, PicoBrew looked to the best part of any brewing exercise—enjoying the final product! From this research, KegSmarts was born to bring the same level of precision, repeatability and quality to both the beer fermenting and serving experience. Together, the combination of Zymatic and KegSmarts enable a true craft brewery experience without the hassle and expense of actually building a craft brewery.

PicoBrew’s newest product, Pico, makes brewing beer at home so easy that anyone—even someone who has never brewed before—can create and enjoy amazing craft beer at home. With Pico, beer lovers can discover great craft beer from breweries around the world and brew it easily, customized to their taste, using quality ingredients.

Beer is our passion, and enjoying fresh beer you brewed yourself is an incredible experience. To every beer lover out there, we say thank you and cheers!

Name: Hillbrush
Description:
Hillbrush is the UK’s largest manufacturer of brushes and hygienic cleaning tools. We distribute our products worldwide and have set the benchmark for quality, innovation and service across the cleaning, food manufacturing and agricultural industries. With a range of over two-thousand products, distribution partners in over 90 countries, and a new manufacturing factory plus office space constructed in 2017, our mission for continuous development is as prominent now as it was when the company started in 1922.

We are based in Mere, Wiltshire, and we also have a facility in Baltimore MD, (USA) where we supply Champion Brush horse grooming brushes and Hillbrush Hygiene products to the US and Canadian market.

Hillbrush Hygiene features ground-breaking filament technology to help ensure the highest standards of cleanliness and safety in the workplace. Our roots lie in the craftsmanship of traditional wooden brushware and we produce a wide range of brooms and ancillary items as part of the Hillbrush Traditional Range. Hillbrush Commercial completes the product portfolio and features a vast range of products suitable for all manner of applications across the janitorial, catering and HORECA sectors.

Our extensive manufacturing division can produce bespoke items to meet your specific requirements, through injection moulding, product branding or workplace organisation with our shadow boards.

We were granted the Royal Warrant by HM The Queen in 1982 and our brushes are still used by a number of royal households today. 

In April 2017 we launched Visit Hillbrush, our new visitor centre, which combines a dining shopping and museum experience. We offer free parking (plus disabled and electric charging bays), free wifi, outdoor seating, and are family-friendly. (Dogs are also welcome on our terrace.)

Name: Mount-It!
Description: Mount-It!, a leading supplier of advanced, affordable mounting and workspace solutions, was established in 2006 in San Diego, CA. We have over 100 employees and two locations in the U.S. We ship our products from two warehouses - one on each coast. We strive to offer the highest quality products at value prices, and offer a catalog of over 700 different types of mounting solutions ranging from commercial display wall and ceiling mounts, monitor desk mounts, ergonomic office solutions, projector mounts, and products for the office, home office, and home theater. We source our products directly from highly qualified fabricators that meet our selection requirements. This approach eliminates wholesaler costs, which allows us to pass on the savings to our customers. Our products are popular with systems integrators and VARs servicing government, military, education, hospitality, healthcare, and similar commercial environments.  You can find us as a supplier to Staples, B&H Photo, GSA Advantage, Synnex, SHI, and many integration firms across North America, LATAM, the Caribbean, and South America. We have been featured in the top 1500 on the Inc. 5000 Fastest Growing Companies list for 2015-2021, as well as the top 30 of San Diego’s Fastest Growing Private Company list from 2014-2019. We are proud of our team for making this achievement possible and are grateful to our customers for giving us a chance to serve them.

Description:

Vi arbetar nära våra återförsäljare och erbjuder ett brett sortiment som passar alla barn under de viktiga tre första åren. Bambino Mam är marknadsledare i Norden på sugnappar och nappflaskor och vi går i spetsen för att utveckla babyprodukter och öka kunskapen om små barns behov och utveckling.
 
Vi har en omsättning på ca 125 miljoner kr och är ett sammansvetsat team i Stockholm som samarbetar med partners i Sverige, Norge, Danmark, Island och Baltikum.

Name: Swan Mill Paper Company
Description:
Swan Mill Paper Company is well known for the Swantex brandname and is the largest part of diversified group.

The Group employs about 400 people in the UK and Asia. 

They manufacture c5 billion napkins pa in Kent plus distribute the full disposable tableware solution to both the 'away from home' and 'at home' retail markets.

Having a design studio in the UK and an office in Hong Kong plus expertise in both geographies Swantex works with both UK and international customers to develop new products, ranges and categories.

The 'Swantex Green' range is specifically targeted at categories that have traditionally used single use plastics. Now in stock is a full range of FSC and composable paper straws, wooden cutlery and accessories, bagasse plates & food containers and 100% recycled FSC napkins.

The group also prints giftwrap and tinsel at their Wales factory in the UK which also distributes Christmas decorations, bags, cards and over 30 million Christmas crackers from their own China based factory. All can be supplied ex UK or FOB China as part of the design product expertise.

Group also owns Ling Designs and the Great British Card Company Ltd which are both specialist greetings card publishers with different but complementary looks and also luxury gift packaging brand Penny Kennedy.
 
Swantex Asia is based in Hong Kong and provides sourcing, QA and inspection expertise for the group plus sells to UK and international customers on an FOB basis out of China. Main markets are Australia, Europe and the USA and many well  known worldwide high street names are serviced by the team

Having successfully completed 5 acquisitions in the recent past please contact cgorton@swantex.com with any opportunities.

For employment enquiries please contact careers@swantex.com and if you think you have a product or service we would be interested in buying please contact purchasing@swantex.com 

Also follow us on twitter & Instagram   @swantex_ltd @pennykennedyuk @GreetingsbyLing

Name: Colchones Relax
Description:
RELAX is a leading company in the resting equipment sector, with implementation throughout the national territory, and is currently one of the great leaders of this market.
To carry out the design, development and marketing of its products, Relax has one of the most modern factories in Europe and even one of the most avant-garde in the sector. Choosing the best product, gives you the best guarantee of a good night rest. New technologies and new generation materials ensure a restful and of course quality sleep. Our product range is complemented by a wide range of bases, pillows and other complements. 
The company has a large area of 61000 m2 in Zaragoza, which allows the achievement of its project, one of the most ambitious in the world of rest equipment manufacturing. Apart of the lastest technology machinery, Relax is also assisted with the invaluable help of a qualified team of almost 400 people.

We observed the environment and noticed the level of technology of the rest sector had reached unsuspected limits: components, technology, complex processes... Therefore, we decided to move from technification to humanization, learn from the more than 100 years of experience of the company and transmit that information in a more natural way, through an understandable communication trying to simplify the purchasing process so that users spend their time on what's really important. 
With this, Relax is trying to be a driving force for a deep and honest change in the market. Because we think the transformation is born in oneself and then spreaded. Join us. A new way to manufacture, sell and buy mattresses is possible. That's why our management model includes caring for people, sustainability and commitment to education and equality.

We are going to make you sleep in a better world.

Name: IG Design Group Plc
