Name: Identity Group
Description: Welcome to Identity Group. We specialize in Experiential Graphics and Interior Signage. With over 250,000 square feet of manufacturing space across two state-of-the-art facilities, we are your go-to experts for captivating signage and experiential graphics. Connect with us on LinkedIn to explore our latest projects and industry insights. Let's bring your brand vision to life! #IdentityGroup #Signage #ExperientialGraphics

Name: Stobag do Brasil
Description:
25 anos de inovação no mercado brasileiro.
Stobag. Aproveite a vida aqui fora.

Fundada em 1964, na Suíça, a Stobag possui hoje plantas de produção em oito países e distribuição mundial. Presente desde 1992 no mercado brasileiro, a fábrica está sediada em São José dos Pinhais, no Paraná. Com reconhecida qualidade e um DNA inovador, a Stobag busca unir funcionalidade, estética e arquitetura em seus produtos, levando qualidade de vida e bem-estar para cada um de seus clientes.

Name: The Chits Inn
Description:
The story begins with three sailors all with a vision to go ashore in comfortable clothing, enabling them to carrying our shore-side duties; drinking rum, spinning dits and steering ships.

Language difficulty, or unable to replenish at sea resulted in either no decent ashore 'rig' or borrowing your 'oppos' clothes in order to have a successful run ashore.

Our mantra of “Dressing to Impress” drives us to seek the best designs with the highest quality of material.

Run ashore testing every product to ensure its “sailor proof” to ensure a product you receive will last a whole-deployment.

Name: CRAZE GmbH
Description:
Our story began in January 2012, when our founder and Managing Director Michael Aschenbrenner decided to venture into the toy industry with cool, collectible bracelets and colourful loop bracelet kits.
 
It was a great decision - then since that time, we have been developing, designing, and distributing innovative and creative toys and trendy products for kids and young adults all over Europe from right here in the green heart of Karlsruhe. We don't just focus on well-known or popular licensed products like BIBI & TINA, FIREMAN SAM, DISNEY FROZEN, CARS or DREAMWORKS DRAGONS. Under our brands CRAZE SPLASH BEADYS water beads, CRAZE MAGIC SAND, CRAZE RAINBOW BEADYS fuse beads, CRAZE SCOUBIDOUS or CRAZE LOOPS we also offer a successful range of trendy products in the creative and pocket money segments.
 
Whether we’re selling licensed goods or our own designs, innovation, creativity, quality, and safety define our products. We continuously expand our product range by adding new, creative ideas, allowing us to grow continuously and successfully in the European trend and toy markets.
 
And that’s not all! Our goal throughout it all remains the same: To create vibrant, desirable, and fun toys for children and design attractive products for our retail partners that lead to successful returns.
 
From concept to design to finished toy: our products impress, down to the smallest detail, delighting experts big and small alike. Our products have already received multiple “Innovative Product” honours from the family magazine “Familie & Co,” and the Federal Association of Toy Retailers (BVS), has nominated our products to its “TOP 10 TOYS” on two separate occasions.

Name: SUITSUIT | Certified B Corp
Description:
Founded in 2008 SUITSUIT has evolved into a contemporary brand for the inquisitive, creative and globe-trotting consumer seeking original and trendy travel accessories.

Its unique suitcase covers turn every basic suitcase into a trendy travel accessory. They are effortlessly stylish, colorful and fun as well as practical and durable enough for even the most experienced traveler.

SUITSUIT continues to innovate, bringing our design and production expertise to deliver high quality luggage. Designed, manufactured and extensively tested to withstand the rigours of today’s travel.
Are you open to new influences, are you critical, fashion conscious, an eager traveler, and entirely in touch with the latest developments in fashion and design? Unafraid to take on new concepts and sufficiently adventurous to cross some boundaries now and then? Then SUITSUIT, the latest label, is just the thing for you!

Name: TSI Consumer Goods GmbH
Description: TSI entwickelt, produziert und vertreibt TSI Brands und Private Label Produkte im Food und Non-Food Segment. TSI verkauft mehr als 125 Millionen Konsumgüter pro Jahr – und das in sechs Kategorien. Das Produkt-Portfolio umfasst mehr als 150 angemeldete Marken und über 2.000 Artikel.

Name: Reduce
Description: It all started in 2006, at the Kreafle family dining room table, with one idea: let’s make reusable drinkware that’s actually worth using. Fast forward, and that idea has turned into Reduce — a family-owned, Atlanta-rooted brand that’s shaking up the world of hydration. Our mission is simple: reduce single-use plastic with drinkware that works as hard as you do, no matter where life takes you.

Name: Move2Play
Description:
We make moving fun! 

Childhood moves fast, and we believe it’s better spent with screen-free play. That’s why we are the world’s first toy company dedicated to movement-based development. By creating toys that make movement fun and exciting, we aim to support parents in nurturing healthy habits in their little ones while having the opportunity to be creative and silly. Rigorously kid-tested and loved by parents, our products are engaging, fun and safe to create unforgettable moments of play and growth together. 

With over 1,000,000 toys sold, it's easy to see why kids across the country love Move2Play.

Name: Fizz Creations Limited
Description:
Fizz Creations Ltd is a creative novelty gift supplier based on the sunny south coast of England near Brighton. We are specialists in the creation of original and innovative licensed and non licensed gift ideas. 

With many years of experience in the gift industry we have the knowledge, experience and creativity to bring a contact stream of new ideas to your range. 

We supply major retailers in the UK, and have distributors all over the globe. We always welcome new customers, please get in touch if you are interested in working with us, or if you just want some further information.

Name: Bil-Jax
Description: Scaffold, event staging, and tent flooring manufacturing company that continues to provide high quality products to the markets we serve.

Name: Pacha Soap Co.
Description: Pacha Soap Co. is a purpose-driven company. We handcraft natural, artisanal products to delight the senses and enhance well being. Our mission is to challenge the standards for what it means to be an ethical business by taking radical steps to empower communities around the world with long term, sustainable solutions. Made good so you can feel good and do good.

Name: Futurewagon
Description:
At Futurewagon, we are are building exciting DTC brands that are artistic and purpose driven. We are the company behind some popular lifestyle brands like Alicia Souza, Coastal Habitat and Happywagon. 

We believe that the new age consumer has evolving needs and deserves brands that can make their lives better and happier. With the consumer landscape changing at lightening speeds, huge gaps exist today and will for a long time!

We've been passionate about decoding some of these niche consumer needs and turning them into meaningful brands. As we prepare for growth, we are going after larger opportunities to build digital-first brands that are globally relevant. 

In the short journey so far, we've also been fortunate enough to see and experience how brands can create a positive impact in the world around us! As a result, we've become strong believers in the fact that brands we build should not just delight customers but become catalysts for economic growth.

In hindsight, the way we named our company seems more apt than ever! Together, we are truly steering our wagon into a future full of possibilities! 

Come aboard and join us on our ride!

Name: The Sola Company
Description:
Sola is proud to be the #1 low-carb bread brand in the U.S.

Founded by Chef Ryan in 2012, Sola is redefining what bread can be - delicious, satisfying, and aligned with modern wellness. Our breads and bagels are thoughtfully crafted to be low-carb, high-protein, high-fiber, low-calorie, and made with no added sugar.

Whether you're focused on fitness, following a GLP-1 journey, or just making smarter choices, Sola helps you enjoy the foods you love, without compromise.

Name: BIC
Description:
BIC fabrique depuis 75 ans des produits de grande qualité accessibles à tous, partout dans le monde. Cette vocation a permis au Groupe de devenir une marque reconnue et visible dans plus de 160 pays dans le monde.
L'écriture manuelle compte parmi les étapes fondamentales du développement psychomoteur des enfants. Afin de soutenir l’écriture manuscrite, BIC a conçu BIC Kids pour apprentissage, une gamme unique spécifiquement pensée pour les enfants et destinée à leur donner les bonnes habitudes de prise en main des outils.
Les experts affirment que l'apprentissage de l'écriture demeure une étape cruciale du développement psychomoteur des enfants. L'écriture n'est pas une simple tâche mécanique : elle fait appel à diverses facultés liées à l'attention, la concentration, la mémoire et la perception dans l'espace. Acquérir de bonnes bases dès le début de l'apprentissage est essentiel, car nous savons bien qu'il est difficile pour un enfant de modifier ses habitudes d’écriture lorsqu'il n'a pas appris à positionner correctement ses doigts.

Name: Australian Gold, LLC
Description: Australian Gold is a world leader in sun care and tanning products.  As a part of the offerings from New Sunshine LLC, Australian Gold's sun care products can be found in large retail chains, while premium indoor tanning products can be found in salons throughout the world.

Name: Yamaha Distributors South Africa
Description:
Yamaha Distributors are the sole importer and distributor of Yamaha products and spares, as well as various other leisure brands, to the Southern African region.

Yamaha Distributors consists of the following group of companies:

-Global Music Instruments: musical instruments & pro audio equipment
-Balanced Audio: audio visual equipment
-Yamaha Distributors: motor & marine equipment
-After Market Products: accessory related brands within the motorcycle and marine markets

Our success is based on the core values that we continually strive for in our dealings with the Southern African market. Honesty, integrity, excellent communication and sound business ethics, together with a focus on quality and the development of innovation, have put us in the position of being one of the most highly regarded distributors in the Southern African region. 

Combined with this is the fact that our parent company, Bidvest, is an economic giant in the national and international environment, with annual revenue in excess of US$17 billion dollars. Their interests are spread over 300 businesses, structured into four divisions, with focus on food service, logistics, broad services trading and distribution. http://www.bidvest.co.za/ 

Yamaha’s range of products are recognized the world over for superior quality in design, technology, craftmanship, and customer-oriented services. 

Home to a family of Yamaha artists, riders and ambassadors. 

I Play Yamaha.  I Ride Yamaha

Name: TECNOSUPERIORE
Description:
Tecnosuperiore Group is specialized in the production of large kitchen appliances, built-in and free-standing, distributed on the market under the brands Superiore, Smalvic, Tecnogas, Ardesia. 
The mission of Tecnosuperiore is clear: to bring a renewed Italian spirit to the world. 
A Made in Italy that is expressed through a new iconography, which collects the great heritage of the past and evolves it into contemporary reference models. 
A Made in Italy that enters a new era, freeing itself from geographic territoriality to become a democratic good open to everyone, in every part of the world. 
A Made in Italy immediately recognizable to an attentive and evolved interlocutor, which is inspired by contemporary and current icons, but which knows how to grasp the roots of the past.
The ability to design, the fact that production is still carried out in Italy, the choice of materials, the desire to innovate and create models for every need, the aesthetics and design express the great culture of Made in Italy that the Group strongly wishes to preserve and transfer to its appliances.

Name: Sigma Corporation India Ltd.
Description:
Leading Automotive Ancillary that is OE & Aftermarket Supplier of Vibration Control (Rubber-to-Metal bonded) products, Machined Forgings & Castings, Welded, Stamped Sub Assemblies for Passenger Cars and Commercial Vehicle applications. 

Typical products include Anti-Vibration Parts such as Engine Mounts, Strut Mounts & Kits, Engine Pulleys, Transmission Mounts, Suspension Bushings, Shaft Couplings, Shaft Supports, Torque Rods and Torque Rod kits.
   
Based out of New Delhi, Sigma Group has been among the leading Automotive Suppliers & Exporters in the country for several decades.

The group supplies its products to OEMs over India, Europe, US and Latin America, as well as to its exclusive Aftermarket Distributors and Channel Partners across the world.

Name: Morning Owl
Description: Our story starts in the forests of Kerala, India, where rubber trees thrive and are found in abundance.  Our mattress factory, which is situated in Kottayam, Kerala, is also surrounded by vast rubber forests.  The latex used in our mattresses and pillows are tapped from these forests which is spread across most of Kerala.

Name: PT Khong Guan Biscuit Indonesia
Description: PT Khong Guan Biscuit Indonesia is a consumer goods company based out of Indonesia.

Name: El Helal & Silver Star
Description:
Helal Group is a family owned business developed by Salem Helal when he was 20 years old. Inspired by his father’s small workshop that produced sorghum brooms, Salem began investing in machinery to create a brush-making factory in 1981. By 1998, Salem increased his production capacity, added more cleaning product lines, founded the trading company El Helal & Golden Star Egypt for Household Products, and created one of Egypt’s most valuable and trusted brands. In the 2000s, he expanded his business by establishing more factories that produced detergents, plastic household products, cartons, and cookware.
Currently, Helal Group is the largest manufacturer of household products in Egypt. All of the product ranges are home-oriented and include 1,500 products. Since its inception, the Helal name has been synonymous with quality and trust in the products it manufactures. The company’s main objective is to ensure that any product that carries the name and logo of Helal guarantees quality and trust.

Name: Times Trading Co. Inc.
Description:
Starting from humble beginnings amidst the aftermath of the Second World War in 1945, we have since grown from a small retail outlet selling basic school supplies into one of the Philippines' premier distributors of school and office supplies, exclusively representing some of the most well-known brands in the country. 

We stand for products that give the end user better value - products that simply function better, last longer, are innovative and enjoyable to use.

Our customers include the nation's leading bookstores, department stores, specialty stores and private institutions. 

We are a progressive company looking for talented individuals who believe in excellence and creativity. Join us!

Visit our website at www.times.com.ph or contact us at 242-5741 to 50 for more details.

Name: Ariston France
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de la marque Ariston France, fabricant de solutions pour chauffage et eau chaude.

Ariston est un leader mondial du confort thermique avec une expertise significative sur les marchés du chauffage et de l’eau chaude sanitaire. Fort d’une présence historique en France auprès du grand public avec la marque Ariston, le groupe a développé sa notoriété sur les chauffe-eau avant de monter en puissance sur les applications de chauffage comme la pompe à chaleur.

Très présent à l’international, le Groupe Ariston a la particularité d’être cotée à la bourse de Milan tout en gardant un actionnariat à majorité familial. Ce positionnement permet au groupe de réaliser des investissements importants, illustré notamment par le lancement du plus grand site de production de solutions renouvelables en Italie en 2021, tout réalisant de la croissance externe comme lors de l’acquisition des marques Brink et Wolf en 2022.

Ariston, tout en étant un acteur historique du génie climatique assure sa transition vers des solutions renouvelables et décarbonées afin d’accompagner la transition du secteur du bâtiment. Egalement conscient des enjeux sociétaux, Ariston favorise un ancrage local qui se traduit par la présence de sites de production au plus près de ses marchés. Le groupe compte ainsi 25 sites de production à travers le monde dont 2 en France pour un total de 13 sites en Europe.

S’appuyant sur des valeurs fortes tels que l’intégrité, la durabilité et l’engagement, Ariston promeut un confort durable pour tous. Cela se traduit par la commercialisation de produits fiables qui embarquent une très haute efficacité énergétique et toujours plus d’intelligence.

Name: Gaggenau Industrie, S.A.S.
Description: Gaggenau Industrie, S.A.S. is a consumer goods company based out of Rue Baudelaire, 67640 Lipsheim, France.

Name: SCI-MX Nutrition
Description: Since 2007, SCI-MX has been fueling fitness and sporting journeys. Our sports nutrition products empower diverse goals, developed by expert in-house nutritionists. Elevate your game with our premium supplements, and perform at your peak.

Name: Bostik Australia
Description:
Bostik is about much more than sticking things together. For over a century, we have developed smart solutions that touch and improve people’s daily lives.

After starting life in 1889 as the Boston Blacking Company in Massachusetts USA, the company established business in Australia in 1915. Several products were launched under the Bostik brand as early as the 1940’s, with the business taking on the Bostik company name in the 1960’s.

Arkema, a specialty materials player offering innovative and sustainable solutions, acquiredBostik in 2015, providing access to unique research and development capabilities to help build a world that is safer, more sustainable, and adaptive.

Today, Bostik Australia manufactures and supplies quality sealants and adhesives across the Construction, Consumer, and Industrial markets. Many of our products are made in Australia, including everyone's favourite reusable adhesive - Blu Tack.

Name: lelive.africa
Description:
lelive was founded in 2020 by amanda du-pont and a passionate, dedicated team in south africa.

the name “leh-lee-veh” taken from amanda’s swazi name, langalelive is interpreted as “light of the world.”

lelive is a clean, conscious, and high-performance skincare brand formulated with african botanics and scientific actives to give you clear and glowing skin.
all products are sourced and made locally.
the brand has won multiple awards.

Name: TEMPUR UK Ltd
Description:
At TEMPUR, we research, develop, engineer, manufacture and distribute mattresses, pillows and other sleep and relaxation products. Thanks to our years of experience in the lab – and in the bedroom – we are confident that we can deliver a great night’s sleep to you.

In the late 60s, NASA scientists invented a completely new material that was then used onboard the Space Shuttles. Our founders realized the material’s unique potential. So they took that original NASA invention and spent years perfecting it into TEMPUR Material and created the world’s first viscoelastic mattress and pillow. 

TEMPUR material distributes weight and pressure evenly, so all you feel is weightless. Today, TEMPUR material lies at the core of all our mattresses and pillows and is still the only mattress brand recognised by NASA and certified by the Space Foundation.

At TEMPUR, we are always interested in hearing from people with the right skills and abilities who can help make TEMPUR an even stronger brand.

Name: Domusa Teknik
Description:
Since 1976 we are dedicated to the production and sale of products aimed at the hvac and comfort.

Our production activity is focussed on the manufacture of Solar Systems for the generation of domestic hot water, heat pumps, cast iron and steel gas or diesel oil boilers, biomass boilers, hot water heat-exchangers, electrical boilers, and diesel burners.

As a result of several years of research, we have developed a new technology to burn biomass, creating a range of boilers with the highest performances.

Keeping to our philosophy of innovation with meaning, we set out with this range to bring consumers who are committed to renewable energies, an alternative that is much closer to the highest levels of biomass technology at a reasonable price for a more sustainable environment.

We have been part of MONDRAGON corporation since 1998, together with another 257 autonomous and independent businesses and cooperatives, with production subsidiaries and corporate offices in 41 countries and sales in more than 150.

We therefore belong to the most important business group in the Basque Country, which is the tenth biggest company in Spain by number of employees and turnover.

Strong commitment to excellence

As a result of Domusa Teknik's commitment to a management model which is directed towards people participation and towards the customer, in 2010 we obtained the Silver Q for excellence in management.

Name: KUDOS Showers
Description:

Since 1999, Kudos have been designing and manufacturing innovative showering products from our base on the edge of the beautiful Lake District. All products are created to deliver the very best in functionality, performance and value. No compromise is made in their production and each are hand built by a skilled team.

This approach delivers the very best showering solutions suitable for all types of installations. So whether you’re an occasional user in your holiday home retreat, a 500 room hotel that has to delight guests daily or a hectic family home that probably demands more from its shower than any other, you can be assured that all Kudos products are fit for purpose, stylish, great value and backed by our Lifetime Guarantee.

Name: Veto Pro Pac
Description:
A tool bag should perform some basic functions: First, it should keep your tools where you can easily get to them. Secondly, it should protect them at the job site, on the way to the job site and everywhere in between. And finally, a tool bag should make carrying tools comfortable.

But first things first. Like anything that’s built to last, VETO PRO PAC tool bags start with a butt-kicking foundation. In this case, it’s a 3mm thick polypropylene base that is not only waterproof, but “drop from the second floor” proof. Next we oriented the storage system vertically using interior pockets made of PVC-impregnated 1800 denier, a waterproof nylon that can take whatever a flathead or Phillips head screwdriver can dish out.

While VETO PRO PAC tool bags could be considered “soft bags” they don’t wilt and lose their shape like canvas or other synthetic bags. That’s because every PRO PAC tool bag uses a patented integrated center panel that extends to the very bottom of the bag. This allows for easy access and balances your load distribution — effectively keeping you from becoming a regular at the chiropractor’s office. Speaking of pain, the place where your burly hand makes contact with the tool bag is typically where discomfort can put a damper on any quitting time. But we don’t do “typically” too well around here. The handle on VETO PRO PAC tool bags is unlike any you’ve experienced. It’s ergonomically designed for stiff hands and is hinged through the fabric for extra durability. It also collapses front or back depending on how you set it up. Bonus!

Name: Termikel A.S.
Description:
Termikel A.Ş. has been maintaining the success story which started in 1957 with Termo Pressure Cooker based on the principle of Mr. Mehmet Kaya, the founder, who says: “The half of the success in business depends on courage and the other half on courtesy”. Today the trademark “Termikel” is conveyed to the entire world out of the borders of Turkey with the free standing and built-in products offered by Termikel A.Ş.

Termikel is carrying out the production, sales and marketing organizations of the free standing and built-in oven and cookers through different companies of it, one of them being in Germany. Apart from its broad export network, it offers to the consumers a wide range of products with its Termikel built-in product concept shops and showrooms.

Since its foundation, Termikel has signed many innovations like the first rectangle oven with glass door, first mini-washing machine with automatic wringer and the first churn with eccentric belt and it has found its respectable place among the leading companies of the sector. As of 2008, the company keeps on its productions in one of the biggest and most modern facilities of Turkey and Europe. Termikel carries out its productions in its new facilities of 45.000 sqm which has been built on an open area of 60.000 sqm. The company manufactures all kinds of ovens, whether free standing or built-in, electricity or LPG or natural gas operated, with the Termikel assurance and at the international standards by expert teams in all stages from design to after sales services.

futurestatebrands.com

Name: Boston Whaler
Description: For more than 50 years, Boston Whaler has been building superior quality, unsinkable sport fishing, pleasure and yacht tender boats. Founded in 1958 and headquartered in Edgewater, FL, the company’s unique foam-cored construction process contributes not only unsurpassed flotation, but also superior ride characteristics and durability. The current product line ranges from 11 to 42 feet and is distributed around the world by a network of exceptional dealers. For more information about The Unsinkable Legend, please visit www.bostonwhaler.com. Boston Whaler is owned by Brunswick Corporation, the largest marine manufacturer in the world.

Name: United Wheels Inc.
Description:
We're United Wheels, the global holding company of beloved outdoor brands Huffy, Niner, Buzz eBikes, Batch Bicycles, and VAAST, that enable our riders and their families to get out and enjoy the world around them.

You might recognize our bikes from the millions of riders around the world who use our products every day. Our brands ship more than 5 million bicycles annually to thousands of retail locations in over 50 countries.

At United Wheels, we are passionate about building memories that last a lifetime. From bikes, trikes, and scooters, to e-bikes and ride-ons, we design products for every member of the family with a focus on durability, comfort, and fun!

Global Reach:

You’ll find United Wheels products enjoyed by riders across the globe. We operate in three main regions: Asia Pacific, the Americas, and Europe.

United Wheels is a company dedicated to bringing you the best in wheeled goods and outdoor fun. Our global presence fuels our success and ensures our products bring smiles to riders everywhere, thanks to the innovation and passion of our diverse teams located in the US, Mexico, Canada, UK, Europe, and Asia.

More Than Just Wheeled Goods:

Our vertically integrated global holding company, Covation, specializes in the manufacturing and distribution of wheeled goods and outdoor brands. Covation Holdings Limited is the global holding company of United Wheels along with our manufacturing business, FuturuX, which allows us to service customers end-to-end from the beginning stages of the design through the final production of wheeled goods. The Allite material sciences company completes the list of Covation businesses. Allite stretches the limits of innovation, functionality, and versatility of specialty alloys for the 3C and outdoor industries. Covation products and services impact the lives of millions worldwide every day.

Ride with Us!

Want to learn more? Visit us at www.unitedwheels.com and join the adventure!

Name: Foodco National Foodstuff UAE
Description:
Foodco Holding - P.J.S.C is a conglomerate listed on the Abu Dhabi Stock Exchange.
The Group started its operations in 1979, primarily engaged in the FMCG distribution of the Modern Trade, Traditional Trade, HORECA.

The Group has a portfolio of diversified investment which includes development and  Management of Real Estate, Marketable Securities.

Third Party Logistics operation recently launched state of the art warehouses along with a Business Center offering all Supply Chain Services and other related value added services.

The Group is preparing to launch the new facility for Food Processing and Packaging to enable backward integration in order to gain competitive advantage in the local and regional markets.

The group has a successful Restaurant Operation specializing in Catering and International Franchises.

Name: GTRC by Alghanim Industries
Description:
Gulf Trading and Refrigerating Company (GTRC), established in the early 1950s, is a major FMCG distributor in Kuwait and a wholly-owned subsidiary of Alghanim Industries. Over the years, GTRC has built itself into a well-established organization, handling products in food, hygiene, personal care, lighting and other categories. GTRC proudly represents various blue chip multi-national companies with more than 100 brands in its portfolio.

Our vision is to be best-in-class distributor representing renowned FMCG brands across all trade channels in the market-place.

Name: Nordiska Kompaniet, NK
Description:
Nordiska Kompaniet, a department store at the forefront. Looking for the latest fashion, top-notch service and a fine dining experience? Then Nordiska Kompaniet is the place for you. NK Department Store is among Scandinavia's leading luxury fashion stores and the prime destination for shoppers looking for fashion, beauty and lifestyle inspiration.

When Josef Sachs founded Nordiska Kompaniet in 1902 he had a clear vision: the great department store NK was to be a commercial and cultural theatre – a contemporary stage. Ambitious words perhaps, but they still permeate every aspect of NK.

Josef Sachs grundade Nordiska Kompaniet 1902 och hade redan då en tydlig ambition. Varuhuset NK skulle vara en kommersiell och kulturell teater – en scen för samtiden. Måhända är det storslagna ord, men de genomsyrar fortfarande allt NK gör. 

Portarna till varuhuset på Hamngatan i Stockholm slogs upp 1915. Sedan dess har allt från ikoniska personligheter till exklusiva lanseringar passerat revy. Oavsett vad som sker på NK är varuhuset känt för att alltid ligga steget före.

Hufvudstaden AB står som ägare av AB Nordiska Kompaniet, som in sin tur äger NK fastigheterna och varumärket. Våra avdelningar drivs av 110 NK-företagare i Stockholm och 50 NK-företagare i Göteborg. Varuhuset i Göteborg etablerades 1971.

Välkommen till NK.

Description:
Los Nietitos es una empresa uruguaya líder en la elaboración y transformación de productos a base de frutas, vegetales y lácteos, con un amplio portafolio que acompaña a los distintos sectores del mercado. Hoy, más de 200 colaboradores forman parte de nuestro equipo y de nuestro crecimiento sostenido.

Desde 2013, Los Nietitos S.A. forma parte del Grupo ANDROS, un grupo francés de origen familiar, referente global en productos a base de frutas y lácteos, con plantas industriales en todos los continentes y presencia comercial en más de 100 países.

Nuestra sede, planta industrial y centro de distribución se encuentran en La Paz, Colonia, desde donde desarrollamos y comercializamos una amplia gama de productos alimenticios, destacándonos en dulces, mermeladas, dulce de leche, jugos, entre otros,  así como en el desarrollo de insumos para panadería y confitería, heladería y preparados lácteos.

En Los Nietitos trabajamos con un objetivo claro: ofrecer productos que se destaquen por su sabor y calidad, innovando de manera constante y optimizando nuestros procesos para responder a las necesidades de consumidores y clientes en mercados cada vez más dinámicos.
Los Nietitos. Hecho con gusto.

Name: Urban Arrow
Description:
At Urban Arrow, we build top-of-the-line electric cargo bikes. We were the first to do it, actually. Needless to say, we’re crazy about them. But there’s one thing that is even more important to us: the person riding that bike. Owners and riders like you. With every bike we build, we have you and your specific transport needs in mind. 

Whatever it is you care about, we got you covered. Our mission is to improve life and to improve life in (sub-)urban areas, with our cargo bikes. Making things cleaner. Quieter. And more efficient.

Description: Proudly South African is the national Buy Local campaign launched in 2001 by government, organised business, organised labour and community organisations (the constituencies represented in the National Economic Development and Labour Council – Nedlac) to boost job creation and national pride by promoting South African companies and their products and services.

Name: Herff Jones
Description:
The Herff Jones tradition is about rewarding academic and athletic excellence with world class symbols of achievements. Since 1920, we've built our reputation on uncompromising standards of quality and a sincere commitment to honoring the milestones and memorable moments in life. Offering a diverse product range, we share a common goal: to honor tradition and reward achievement. 

From preschool to graduate school to the Supreme Court robes, Herff Jones products are cherished worldwide as prestigious symbols of accomplishment. Only the finest materials go into our products and the most meticulous designs and craftsmanship mold them into treasured remembrances.

Name: Avell Notebooks
Description:
A Avell, fabricante de notebooks, está no mercado há 7 anos. Em pouco tempo de existência, a empresa tem inovado o mercado nacional de portáteis com modelos de notebooks de alto desempenho e personalizados, das mais variadas cores, formas e tamanhos. Desde sua fundação, tem como objetivo oferecer aos clientes os melhores produtos, variedades, qualidade dos serviços de pré e pós venda e muita tecnologia. Nosso processo de fabricação está de acordo com o PPB, além de possuir ISO 9001.
O que vendemos?
Com foco na mobilidade das pessoas, a Avell comercializa notebooks de alto padrão, abrangendo pessoas que necessitam de notebook para uso pessoal, empresarial (projetistas, arquitetos, designers, etc) e até mesmo para pessoas que gostam de jogos. A Flexibilidade de competitividade dos preços, tornam os produtos Avell, uma excelente opção de escolha na hora de adquirir um notebook.

Name: Mooving
Description: Since our beginning in 2011, we have transformed the world of stationery stores, stationery and gifts with our innovative proposal. During this creative journey, we have become the undisputed market leaders. With each product we develop, we create not only items, but also experiences that are full of design, imagination and style. We expand our border with the aim of taking the #MoovingStyle to every corner in Latin America. We are currently present in most of the region, and feel motivated to continue to grow and expand our market. We started this journey in which innovation is our compass and design our universal language.

Name: PT.Lion Wings
Description:
If you have not heard our name before, that is because we have just rename our company to become P.T. Lion Wings (formerly P.T. LIONINDOJAYA) in 2004.

P.T. LION WINGS is the synergy of two conglomerates, namely LION CORPORATION of JAPAN and WINGS GROUP of INDONESIA. Combining the two power together, we have more than 150 years of history, advanced research and development centres, latest technologies and state of the art production faciliteies, to give you, our most valuable customers, a full range of world class products.

Currently our products are distributed in all five continents, through the cooperation of our partners and exclusive distributors, in over 100 countries spanning the globe.
Our market share in each respective countries are growing at a very fast pace, a strong indication that our products gain acceptance in most of the market worldwide, a quality proven beyond any doubts, a very competitive price and the commitment of support from every aspect of our human resources.

Everyone at P.T. LION WINGS is dedicated to provide services of international standard, our factories are GMP and ISO certified, to cater to every needs of our partners, distributors and customers. On behalf of everyone at P.T. LION WINGS, I thank you for your continual support, your outmost confidence in our superior products and services, and I am optimistic, through our partnership, our mutual business will grow far and beyond and for years to come.

Thank you and best regards,

F. Henry Katuari
President Director

Name: Sleepwell
Description:
Sleepwell, the flagship brand of Sheela Foam Ltd., stands as a beacon of trust and innovation in comfort. For over the last four decades, we have revolutionised the way India sleeps by seamlessly blending advanced sleep science with heartfelt care.
With over 1.2 crore satisfied customers, Sleepwell’s sleep solutions are engineered to deliver unmatched comfort, safety, and sustainability. Our offerings extend beyond best-selling mattresses to cutting-edge customised polyurethane foam products that serve industries from automobiles to apparel and packaging.

Powered by 10 state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and a robust network of over 5,000 exclusive outlets and 100 distributors nationwide, Sleepwell is committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation. We utilise technologies such as VPF for cleaner, greener foam production—because sustainability isn’t just a goal; it’s at the heart of everything we do.

As a proud part of the Sheela Group—India’s leading polyurethane foam manufacturer and an ISO 9001 certified company—Sleepwell continues to set the gold standard in sleep solutions, driving comfort, quality, and trust for millions of Indians.

 Visit us at www.mysleepwell.com

Name: RL Higiene
Description:
Uma solucionadora em higiene e limpeza profissional. Assim a RL Higiene se define hoje, 47 anos depois de ingressar no segmento e acompanhar todas as suas transformações. Entre seus principais clientes estão escritórios com alto nível de exigência, indústrias reguladas por rigorosas normas de higienização, escolas conceituadas, restaurantes, hotéis, consultórios e academias.  

A RL Higiene propõe soluções integradas que ajudam seus clientes a economizar dinheiro e água, melhorar a qualidade e a produtividade e também a reduzir o descarte de resíduos, tudo isso através de uma gestão que reduz o consumo com produtos mais eficientes, estabelece metas para orçamento, treina a equipe de operadores de limpeza e introduz o consumo consciente.


Missão: 

Por amor e respeito à vida, nossas soluções de higiene e limpeza promovem a saúde e o bem estar das pessoas e contribuem para um mundo mais sustentável.


Visão 2020: 

Ser a melhor escolha no mercado ao gerar valor aos clientes com soluções diferenciadas em higiene e limpeza, garantindo assim a longevidade da empresa. 


Valores:

Colaboração, Perenidade, Paixão, Respeito, Excelência e Integridade.


Acesse rl.com.br

Name: Seminovos Movida
Description:
A Seminovos Movida é uma empresa especializada em veículos seminovos em franca expansão, com pontos de venda espalhados pelas principais capitais do país. São mais de 60 lojas em todo o território nacional, oferecendo um atendimento diferenciado para proporcionar ao cliente a segurança e o auxílio necessários na hora de adquirir um veículo e fechar o melhor negócio!

Temos mais de 3 mil veículos seminovos em estoque e a maior variedade de cores e marcas. Nossos modelos vão desde compactos populares até esportivos luxuosos, passando por vans, utilitários e sedãs. Com baixa quilometragem, todos têm procedência garantida e são revisados por profissionais qualificados que entendem de automóveis.

Grandes grupos de concessionárias, lojistas e revendedores contam ainda com um atendimento especializado e condições diferenciadas para compras no atacado.

Fazemos parte da empresa Movida Participações, criada em 2015 para administrar operações de aluguel de carros, venda de seminovos e gestão e terceirização de frotas de veículos leves, e somos sinônimo de conforto e melhor custo-benefício quando o assunto é carro seminovo!

Name: BWX Limited
Description:
BWX is a global, natural beauty company with a portfolio of leading natural brands in Australia, USA, Canada, UK, China, and select other international markets.

Founded and headquartered in Victoria, Australia; our expertise in innovation, product development, manufacturing and marketing natural products makes us unique in the beauty industry.

Our goal at BWX is to make natural beauty the only choice for people wanting to live a healthy, balanced life, free from unnecessary toxins.

We believe everything we need to nourish, rejuvenate and enhance our bodies can be found in nature and our goal is to give people all over the planet a choice for natural personal care without compromising on performance.

We want to use our business to inspire the advancement of plant and mineral-based science without causing unnecessary harm to the planet.

We say NO to testing our products on animals, not because it suits our brands commercial goals, but because it is core to our belief system.

BWX is a business with purpose and believes in giving. We are actively involved in giving back to causes relating to the environment, social responsibility and projects that empower women.

Name: Big Agnes Inc
Description:
At our core, we want to inspire you to get outside and find the same appreciation for the backcountry we have.

In 2001, Big Agnes started without a real plan, but with a mission: Make the best gear possible to help folks like you get outside and chase your dreams. Respected industry vets told us we were crazy, and the camping market was “too saturated”. Still, we were driven to make better gear and be apart of some really cool adventures, so we kept at it.

Based in a ski town in northwestern Colorado, our backyard is an outdoor paradise with testing grounds right out our front door. The Continental Divide Trail is home to some of our favorite trails for skiing, hiking, and mountain biking. The Mount Zirkel Wilderness beckons us with its high alpine summits; its highest peak is the inspiration behind the company’s name. A stone’s throw from our office flows the Yampa River. Most lunch hours you’ll find an office quiet enough to hear a pin drop while we’re out finding fresh air or tracks testing the gear you’ll be using for your own adventures.

Name: Flamingo Horticulture
Description:
Flamingo Horticulture is a vertically integrated horticulture business active in the growing, processing, marketing and distribution of sustainably, produced flowers and premium vegetables. The group consists of the Flamingo Flowers and Flamingo Produce, Flamingo Horticulture Kenya, Flamingo Horticulture South Africa, Omniflora, Dudutech, Flamingo Flowers BV (FFBV) and our joint venture business FV Seleqt.  

The group is a core supplier to most of the leading UK multiple retailers, as well as internationally to customers in Europe, South Africa, the Middle East, Japan and Australia. The quality of our processing operations, logistics network and our ideally located farming operations in Africa give us the infrastructure and technical capabilities to deliver an impeccable service to all of our customers, helping us maintain our position as one of the leading, global companies within our industry.  

We have UK sites in Stevenage, Sandy, Spalding and Weston and large scale farming operations in Kenya, Tanzania and South Africa. The FFBV and FV Select businesses operate out of the Westland region in Holland, the Omniflora business is located near Frankfurt airport in Germany and our Dudutech business is based in Naivasha, Kenya. 

The company was formed in 1982 and grew through a series of organic and acquisitive developments until 2007, when it was itself acquired by James Finlay Limited (JFL). Following a successful period, which saw a significant period of capital investment, under the ownership of JFL the business was sold to Sun Capital in November 2015 and reverted to using the name Flamingo Horticulture in January 2016.   

The group has an annual turnover in excess of £300 million and employs more than 10,000 people across all of our locations. We are an ethical business and are fully committed to principles of fairness and sustainability in all of the geographies in which we operate.

Efficient capital structure, cutting edge technology, operational discipline and a widespread distribution network, have together attributed to enhance RSPL Health BD and enabled the organization to deliver value to consumers. The driving force at RSPL Health BD is to understand profound changes in product technology and consumer needs to make our brands the way consumer desires them to be. We believe that the only constant in the history of mankind is evolution and so it is our endeavor to give superior brand experience and most superior value for consumer's money. Our undeterred pursuit for evolution has led the company to progress on the path of value during our growth.

Name: Quirky
Description:
We launch products invented by real people like you. 

We believe the best ideas in the world aren't actually in the world... they're locked inside people's heads. We exist to solve that problem. We make invention accessible.

Since launching in 2009, Quirky has rapidly changed the way the world thinks about invention.

We bring new consumer products to market by enabling a fluid conversation between a global community of inventors, Quirky's expert staff, and globally recognized consumer brands. 

The world influences our business in real-time, and we share our revenue directly with the inventors and partners who helped us launch the most innovative new products you've ever seen.

Name: Pacific Smoke International Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Pacific Smoke International – Pioneering a Smoke-Free Future

At Pacific Smoke International, we’re not just a company—we’re a movement. As Canada’s leading wholesale distributor of premium electronic vaporizers and e-liquids, we’re on a bold mission to eliminate combustible cigarettes and empower people to make healthier lifestyle choices.

Why We Exist
 Our Vision: To eliminate combustible cigarettes from the world.
 Our Mission: To empower 1 million individuals by creating and distributing products that improve their lifestyle choices.

Why Join Our Team?
 Impact-Driven Work: Be part of an industry-changing company that’s making a real difference.
 Growth & Innovation: We’re constantly evolving—expect challenges, learning, and opportunities to lead.
 A Global Family: With 200+ team members across Canada, the U.S., and the UK, we foster a culture of collaboration, trust, and ambition.
 Your Growth Matters: We invest in our people—through mentorship, skill-building, and career advancement.

Our Core Values
Judgment - We make sound decisions despite not always having all the information
Curiosity - We ask eager to learn and open-minded
Agility - We embrace change
Results - We deliver amazing things that make an impact to our organization
Ownership - We follow through on our commitment
Teamwork - We fully support once a decision has been made

Be Part of Something Bigger
If you’re passionate about innovation, health, and growth, we want you on our team. At Pacific Smoke International, you’re not just an employee—you’re a changemaker.

Name: Golden Harvest
Description:
Golden Harvest is one of Bangladesh’s leading business group with diversified interests in Food, Dairy, Commodity, Information Technology, Logistics, Real Estate, Aviation, Infrastructure Development  and Insurance.

Golden Harvest has been a pioneering force in the frozen food sector in Bangladesh and is the country’s first company to develop its own Cold Chain network in collaboration with USAID.

Golden Harvest started its journey as a Commodity Brokerage company and later on expanded its business and is now a leading force behind various business sectors and employing over 1200 People.

Golden Harvest is also the Joint Venture partner of Nippon Express, Asia’s largest logistics company with network in over 480 locations worldwide.

Golden Harvest strongly believes in giving back to the society and runs a CSR programme that includes Bangladesh Human Rights Foundation, TAC Charitable Hospital, Alvina Samdani Trust and Samdani Art Foundation that organizes Dhaka Art Summit, the largest non-commercial South Asian art dedicated event.

Name: Aurora Fine Brands
Description:
Aurora is a Brazilian family owned company that stands out for its history of more than 75 years.

Since 1946, Aurora imports and distributes the most renowned premium international market leading fine foods and drinks brands. Aurora’s presents its portfolio in four commercial divisions: Spirits & Liqueurs, Wines (Inovini), Confectionery and Fine Foods, that productively and efficiently share the Sales, Import, Logistics, IT and Human Resources areas.

The Spirits & Liqueurs and Wines divisions enjoy a marketing team and an on premise staff focused on the main on-trade accounts in São Paulo (metropolitan area and countryside), Rio de Janeiro, Belo Horizonte, Salvador, Brasilia, Recife, Curitiba and Fortaleza.

Both the Confectionery and the Fine Foods divisions, in which Aurora enjoys a leading position in Brazil, benefit from a specialized marketing team and a dedicated team to food-service; restaurants and hotels.

The planning and execution of each brand’s distribution strategy is the result of the joint effort of the marketing areas and the brand owners.

Aurora has its own sales force, covering the Brazilian market, through wholesalers, sub-distributors, Key Accounts and sales to retailers in general. The exclusive merchandising team reaches Brazil’s major cities, actively promoting Aurora’s brands and products in medium and major supermarket chains and delicatessen stores.

Aurora totals a number of 165 employees allocated between its main office in São Paulo and its distribution center located at the Anhanguera Highway. This DC features a storage area of over 9,000m2 and cool chambers to keep all products in their appropriate temperatures. In 2015, in order to improve service to the midwest, north and northeastern regions a branch office was opened in Espirito Santo State.

Aurora’s commitment to an efficient customer service, professional ethics, social responsibility and consistency over time is part of its core values.

Name: Shurtape Technologies, LLC
Description:
Shurtape is an industry-leading producer of pressure sensitive tape products. We design, develop, and engineer our tape to meet the most exacting standards. Headquartered in North Carolina, we’re a privately owned company, with manufacturing plants in Hickory, Stony Point and Hudson, North Carolina. We’re also a world-leader with investments in several countries on four continents – including a manufacturing and converting plants in Germany, Mexico, Peru, United Arab Emirates and China. We look far and wide for opportunity – from growing globally to expanding our product offering.

We’ve been successful because of our emphasis on cultivating long-term relationships based on impeccable customer support. Some of our customers have been with us for 40 years. In addition to customer service, Shurtape stands for dependable quality, reliable performance and on-time delivery on each roll of paper, cloth, film, foil and specialty tapes. That’s what drives us. That’s our promise to you. We fulfill that promise by investing aggressively in manufacturing improvements, product design innovations, back-office technology, distribution – and in the people who have contributed to the company's growth and success.

Name: Tavola SpA
Description: Tavola SpA. is an Italian consumer goods company founded in Milan in 1947. It operates with distributed, licensed and owned brands and has leadership positions in several categories. It is present in the following distribution channels: mass market (both supermarkets and drugstores), DIY, car accessories stores and petrol stations. In Europe, Tavola Iberica Lda is the operating branch for Portugal and Spain. We are present in other European markets and in the rest of the World (US, China, Mexico, Australia, …) with distributors.

Name: CG Corp Global
Description: A leading Nepal based multinational conglomerate CG Corp Global, is the first enterprise from the Himalayan nation to be recognized by Forbes Asia Magazine. Established in 1935, the enterprise comprises of 202 companies and 261 brands across verticals which include, FMCG, Hospitality, Education, Realty, Energy/Infra, Electronics, cement & telecom/IT.  Conferred as Asia's Best Employer brand by the Employer Branding awards (2017), the group employees over 15,000+ highly skilled and trained professionals. With operations based out of 27 countries, the group has marked a remarkable global growth story driven by rapid expansion under the leadership of Chairman Dr. Binod K. Chaudhary and the next generation of the Chaudhary family. CG Corp Global is a traditional corporation that continually evolves with Industry disruptions and commits to the highest standards in whatever it undertakes. Beyond business, the company has a distinctive philanthropic inclination and works towards the benefit of society through its strong CSR arm- CG Foundation.

Name: Born Good
Description:
We believe that our everyday solutions lie nestled in the bounty of nature. We also believe that scientific intervention can increase the efficacy and potency of these solutions. It is this core belief that lies at the heart of our company. 

We are Born Good. Our products are formulated by a team of accredited bio-scientists and chemists, and backed by over 50 years of expertise in the global textile processing industry from our parent companies - Ramsons Garment Finishing Equipment (Ramsons) & European Textile Chemical Corporation (ETCC) 

Our parent companies have been working with global clothing brands including Levi’s, Zara, H&M and Gap Inc. for over 20 years, and with their guidance were able to jointly conceptualize and bring to market the sustainable products used in the manufacturing of clothes.  

We hope to bring our lab-tested, proven and eco-certified range of detergents and home care to your family.

Name: Edmond de Rothschild Heritage
Description:
Créé en 2016 et implanté sur 4 continents, Edmond de Rothschild Heritage s’attache à partager un art de vivre unique et authentique pour transmettre aux futures générations un patrimoine moderne, respectueux des traditions, des hommes et de la terre.
Avec 500 hectares de vignes minutieusement réparties dans le monde, les équipes vinicoles subliment des terroirs et domaines d’exception pour produire des vins singuliers. Aussi, l’art de vivre Rothschild s’exprime pleinement sur les hauteurs de Megève, au Domaine du Mont d’Arbois, depuis 1920 : de somptueux hôtels (dont le Four Seasons Hôtel Megève 5*), des restaurants gastronomiques et un golf de 18 trous. Une expérience unique qui se poursuit en Espagne, au cœur de la Rioja, avec le Palacio de Samaniego. Des lieux sans pareil, qui ont une âme, celle de la famille. C’est également en région parisienne, fidèle à la vision de ses aïeux, qu’Edmond de Rothschild préserve et magnifie le poumon vert de la capitale : exploitation agricole, unité de méthanisation, élevage laitier et fromagerie célèbre pour le seul et unique Brie de Meaux Fermier AOP qu’elle produit. En Isère, les Pépinières de l’Ambre, elles, magnifient la nature dans ce qu’elle a de plus précieux.
Edmond de Rothschild Heritage cultive des savoir-faire rares et précieux dans le respect de ses valeurs originelles : excellence, authenticité et passion. Sa philosophie : donner du sens à l’exceptionnel.
Les produits Edmond de Rothschild Heritage sont disponibles sur le Wine Club.

Name: Fischer
Description:
A Irmãos Fischer S/A Ind. e Com. é uma empresa de âmbito nacional, com projeção a outros países, que nasceu de uma modesta oficina de consertos de bicicletas, aberta por Ingo Fischer em 1961, em instalações alugada na cidade de Brusque(SC).

Com dedicação e trabalho, a história da Irmãos Fischer se fez a passos largos. Em 1966 os irmãos Ingo e Nivert Fischer fundaram oficialmente a empresa que recebeu o nome de Irmãos Fischer S/A Ind e Comércio. A empresa tinha como objetivo de efetuar consertos de eletrodomésticos e a fabricação de pias de aço inox. Logo os outros irmãos ingressaram na empresa somando forças aos idealizadores.

Nesta época nossa região apresentava um grande desenvolvimento no setor pesqueiro e a Fischer ingressou na fabricação de máquinas especiais para a indústria pesqueira o que resultou em forte crescimento. A história da Fischer é marcada pelo trabalho árduo, pelo dinamismo, pela visão e pela constante pesquisa para aperfeiçoamento e desenvolvimento de novos produtos. Com apenas seis anos de existência, tornava-se Sociedade Anônima, já então em prédio industrial próprio.

Após investimentos em sua expansão em 1996, a empresa ocupa atualmente um novo e moderno complexo industrial. A Fischer reúne 150.000m2 de parque fabril onde produz todos os produtos dos segmentos em que atua. São diversas instalações inteiramente modernizadas, com investimentos em tecnologia, processos industriais e logística para garantir a máxima qualidade e eficiência em todos os produtos.

Com mais de 50 anos de história e credibilidade, a Fischer tem constante zelo com a qualidade de seus produtos, o que lhe permite conquistar o mercado como fabricante de produtos com alta tecnologia, desempenho, sofisticação e durabilidade.

The Company also provides exclusive private label products to leading retailers worldwide.

Name: Amscan
Description:
With hard work and a dream,  the Amscan family of brands have grown into the world’s leading designer, manufacturer, and distributor of decorated party supplies, costumes, accessories, and balloons.  Our mission is to help people celebrate life's special moments. 

From humble beginnings in 1947, Amscan began as a small scale operation out of a family garage in the suburbs of NYC.  Today, Amscan serves over 40,000 retail outlets across the globe as the wholesale consumer products and manufacturing division of Party City Holdings Inc. 

To learn more about our wholesale division, visit www.amscanforyou.com.

For custom manufacturing and promotional products, visit www.amscanmanufacturing.com

To register as a new US customer online, visit www.amscan.com

Anagram International, Ya Otta Piñata, Grasslands Road, Suit Yourself Costumes and Print Appeal.

Amscan Inc.'s worldwide locations include our corporate headquarters in Elmsford, NY, as well as our locations in China, England, Canada, Germany, Japan, Mexico, and Australia. We have seven state-of-the-art distribution centers throughout the world and six domestic manufacturing facilities.

Description:
Con más de 110 años de trayectoria, Samsonite ha creado un amplio legado de soluciones de viajes innovadoras. Nuestros productos son conocidos en todo el mundo por su durabilidad, confiabilidad y diseño. 
 
Nuestro objetivo es ser la empresa de equipaje y maletas de viaje más sostenible del mundo. Reconociendo nuestra influencia y experiencia en innovación, tenemos una oportunidad única de ser los creadores del cambio: “Nuestro viaje responsable”, una estrategia y compromiso global para liderar la industria en sostenibilidad. A medida que Samsonite siga creciendo, seguiremos aprovechando nuestras soluciones innovadoras y defendiendo las mejores prácticas de sostenibilidad para apoyar causas significativas e impactantes.

Tenemos presencia en más de 8 países de Latinoamérica a través de nuestras marcas Samsonite, Saxoline, Secret, Xtrem, American Tourister, Tumi y Lipault.

Name: Viking Range, LLC
Description:
Viking Range, LLC introduced professional performance to the home kitchen with our flagship ranges in 1987, and a culinary revolution was born. Thanks to demand and innovation, our line quickly grew into the complete Viking kitchen (both indoor and out). The Viking Life embodies the epicurean lifestyle available through our products, relationships, Viking Cooking Schools, and our world-class Alluvian Resort.

On December 31, 2012, The Middleby Corporation, a global leader in the commercial foodservice equipment industry, acquired Viking. Middleby has more than 50 companies in its portfolio and has a proven track record of acquiring and growing companies through bringing innovative, patented products to the market. Many synergies and growth opportunities exist between Viking and other Middleby brands and the acquisition of Viking strategically positioned Middleby to expand into the residential market with a strong, leading brand. Middleby has an established presence outside of the U.S., which will help Viking expand to new markets in the future.

From recipes to design cues, we believe the kitchen should be a collaborative space. So please share your ideas and tips with us!

Name: Stanhome México
Description:
Stanhome fue creado en Estados Unidos en 1931 por Stanley Beveridge, y ha sido una empresa pionera en un modelo de ventas único: la venta directa. En 1997 Stanhome fue adquirido por Groupe Rocher, y actualmente está presente en 5 países (Italia, Francia, España, México y Venezuela). 
 
Gracias a una red de más de 200,000 Consejeras, Stanhome distribuye una selección de marcas únicas y complementarias dedicadas al cuidado del hogar, la familia y la belleza. Los valores que nos impulsan todos los días son: Transparencia, Compartir y transmitir, Tolerancia y Estar abiertos a los demás. 
 
Con la visión de volver a un comercio consciente, Stanhome está comprometido con el respeto del medio ambiente: nos movilizamos diariamente para mejorar nuestro impacto ambiental. Luchamos para reducir el uso de recursos como el agua o el papel. Además, nuestros folletos de ventas están impresos en papel proveniente de fuentes sustentables.
 
Participar en la aventura de Stanhome significa tener la oportunidad de trabajar en equipos ágiles que fomentan nuevas ideas y apoyan las iniciativas del proyecto para cada una de nuestras marcas de cuidado del hogar (Stanhome), dermocosméticos (Family Expert) y cosméticos (Flormar y Kiotis), en la búsqueda de una misión común: acompañar, facilitar y mejorar tu vida cotidiana.
 
3 pilares estructuran nuestra dinámica: la manera de ser, la de hacer y la de interactuar.
 
Por eso también somos una empresa socialmente responsable, y hacemos un donativo anual a la Fundación para niños de "Ministerios de Amor, A.C.".
 
En 2020, celebramos 70 años como Stanhome México!
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: EASTERN PROVINCE CEMENT COMPANY
Description:
One of the major cement Plant in Saudi Arabia with a capacity of 12000 Tonnes/Day Cement production.
Company (https://www.epcco.com.sa/)
 History:
· Foundation stone was placed on February 3rd, 1982 the first Kiln was lighted up on the October 4th, 1984 with first Clinker rolling out of the Kiln on the October 06th, 1984. However, the commercial production started on January 01st, 1985.
· Clinker designed capacity is 3,300,000 tons per year @ 10,500 tons per day. 
· Cement designed capacity is 3,500,000 tons per year @ 12,000 tons per day.
· RAw material grinding is achieved by two closed circuit mills with production capacity of 400 tons/hour and one vertical roller mill with 330 tons/hour. 
· Clinker production is from three gas kilns to produce 3500 tons per day by each.
· Clinker is cooled and transferred to five Silos; the total storing capacity is 230,000 tons.
· Cement is grounded by four cement mills of 12,000 tons/day capacities and stored in five Silos. Cement is dispatched in bulk bags and in jumbo bags. Bulk cement can be loaded directly from the cement Silos to cement bulkers. Bagging, loading and stacking are done by automatic machines, enabling the dispatching faster and economical.
· The factory is considered one of the most modern, equipped with gas fired kilns (as being operated now).
· The Plant has the most modern Control systems for high quality and efficient production.
· Many modernization and expansion projects are under way for the efficient production

GURU Organic Energy redefined what an energy drink can be. Founded in Montreal in 1999, we set out to prove there was a better way. 
As the world’s first organic and natural energy drink, that belief became reality and continues to grow, keeping us rooted in the real. Made with natural caffeine and plant-based ingredients, every can reflects our belief that energy should support health, focus, and motion.

Name: Ajinomoto Philippines Corporation
Description:
Ajinomoto Philippines Corporation (APC) was established in May 9, 1958. Through the years, APC was able to grow its local business as more Ajinomoto products find their way to Filipino households. Its head office, sales offices and factories are collectively known as the APC Group. The APC Group’s mission is to bring happiness to every Filipino through our high quality products & services, that make every meal delicious, healthy and enjoyable.

APC’s complete line of quality food and seasoning products are produced by international affiliates and local toll manufacturers using Ajinomoto’s license, quality standards and technological expertise.

APC is directly servicing supermarkets, wholesalers, public markets and the food service industry and has established sales and support services with its industrial customers as supplier of raw materials, particularly ingredients for processed foods, animal nutrition and pharmaceutical products.

Name: 710 Labs
Description:
At 710 Labs, our mission is simple: to disrupt the industry through obsessive quality. We believe in quality over everything – quality people, quality thinking, quality expression, quality of life. We believe in open communication and genuine collaboration where everyone has a voice. We rise together as a team and as an industry.

710 Labs is an award-winning multi-state cannabis brand obsessed with making the richest flavored, organic, small batch cannabis on the planet. We are the OGs that hand select and hunt exotic cultivars from the most renowned breeders. We collaborate with artists such as Richard Prince, LSD World Peace, Astral Oracles, The Elder Statesman and Camp High among others for exclusive accessories and product drops.

Name: Surya Roshni
Description:
Spearheading the technological revolution in the 21st century, Surya has indeed come a long way from being a small steel tube making unit back in 1973. Today, Group’s turnover is around Rs. 5,000 Crore (US$ 800 million), an Indian manufacturing company, exporting products to over 48 countries across the globe.

Initiated in the year 1985, Surya’s lighting division was incepted with the dream of ‘Lighting Every City Every Home’. Three decades down the line, it is recognized as one of the leading brands in the lighting industry with a market share in excess of 25%. The LED technology has opened up new frontier and is potentially acknowledged as the future of lighting technology. At Surya, we not only understand the significance of this fact but also ensure that the LEDs manufactured by us are energy efficient with extremely lower maintenance cost and comes with the assurance of impressive lifespan. All these factors add to the advantages of LED lighting that will ensure that the revolution in the lighting industry is propelled forward.

All Surya LED products are specially manufactured in-house at the fully integrated plants in Kashipur (Uttrakhand) and Gwalior (M.P), supported by Surya Technology & Innovation Center (STIC) at Noida – an advanced state-of-the-art lighting laboratory and research center with the specific focus on LED. This ensures the production of only the best of cutting-edge products at all times.

With ISO 9001:2008, ISO 14001:2004 & OHSAS 18001:2007 certifications under its belt, and products that are accredited with an international performance of safety standards, Surya stands tall on its commitment to deliver quality systems and environmental issue. Surya is also known for being one of the most trusted and registered brands with various Govt. departments, institutions and international buyers.

Name: Amway Indonesia
Description:
Amway Indonesia has been certified as Top Employer Asia Pacific 2018 and Top Employer Indonesia 2018 by the Top Employers Institute. Through this recognition, Amway Indonesia is committed to keep the highest standards of excellence in employee conditions. Amway Indonesia is delighted to be recognized as an exceptional employer of choice!

*  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *  *   
Our vision of "Helping People Live Better Lives" inspires everything we do. It guides our strategic choices, drives our relationships and compels us toward a purposeful global mission to create positive change in people’s lives around the world. That vision leads Amway Indonesia to become the top direct selling company in Indonesia. 

Established on July 17, 1992 through its subsidiary, Amway Indonesia holds the license of direct sales and distribution of Amway products in Indonesia. Amway Indonesia supports 330,000 active ABO (Amway Business Owners) in Indonesia by providing first-class business resources, such as customer support, business management, order management, training and motivation.

Amway Indonesia markets about 250 Amway products consisting of Health, Cosmetics & Skin Care, Personal Care and Home Solutions. Amway Indonesia together with PT. UKMI are also committed to help Indonesian farmers and small to medium businesses expand opportunities to market local UKMWAY products to the market worldwide. Name: Hunter Fan Company
Description:
Here at Hunter, we’ve set the standard in quality and craftsmanship for 140 years.

Sure, we invented the modern day ceiling fan—but every day, we find new ways to perfect it. That’s our challenge and our passion. Why? Because a ceiling fan is something special. It’s more than a mere appliance or fixture—it’s a piece of fine furniture that’s also incredibly functional. What other home furnishing can maximize comfort, energy efficiency and aesthetics in every room?

Because we design and engineer our fans right here in Memphis, we’re able to stay at the forefront of the industry, incorporating the very latest trends and technologies into our fans, then rigorously testing them beyond established standards to ensure a lifetime of whisper-quiet performance.

Name: WALDO
Description:
Our aim is to make eyecare an essential part of everyday life by providing high quality, innovative and accessible products and service that always centre around our customers.

To us, ‘positive vision’ means caring for our eyes but also caring for our future, for our mental health, for our overall well being. So we’re on a mission to challenge eyecare perceptions and disrupt the industry.

We don’t believe in complicated processes, confusing messaging or alienating jargon. Instead we believe in transparency. We use our platform to spearhead change, inspire and spread positivity and create opportunities that enable our communities to achieve their own vision.

Name: Arctic
Description:
Arctic is the leader of the Romanian household appliances market and owner of the biggest household appliances factory in Continental Europe, with its Gaesti factory which has produced until now over 40 million refrigerators. Also, Arctic is one of the most important companies in Romania, with over 4000 employees, including subcontractors, and a turnover of 2,2 billion lei in 2017. Currently, 87% of the total Arctic production is exported in over 80 countries.

In 2017, Arctic has started construction works for a new washing machine factory, in Ulmi, Dambovita. The new project is a Greenfield investment and is the first production unit in Arçelik Group built according to Industry 4.0 digital concept. The factory integrates top notch technologies and wireless communication of the production lines with those in other countries part of the Arçelik Group, and intelligent machines. 

On the local market, Arctic has consolidated its leadership position both for its Arctic and Beko brands, by offering products and services adapted to the needs and lifestyle of its consumers. Arctic is the most powerful Romanian brands, having been ranked first for 4 years in a row in the Top 100 Most powerful Romanian brands study, made by BIZ magazine.

Name: Bebidas Duelo
Description:
Guerino De Costa, filho de imigrantes Italianos vindos da região do Vêneto, nascido em Veranópolis – RS  no  ano de 1898, foi o pioneiro na região Catarinense no ramo da viti-vinicultura, desbravando a floresta no vale do Rio do Peixe , no município do Pinheiro Preto, por onde passava a linha do trem que era o único caminho do Rio Grande do Sul à São Paulo. Quando completou 18 anos de idade saiu do Rio  Grande do Sul de trem e se aventurou em terras Catarinenses chegando a Pinheiro Preto, onde plantou  as primeiras videiras e produziu os primeiros vinhos. 

Em 1932 nasceu a cooperativa Vinhos Duelo, produzia vinhos em barricas de 100 litros e embarcava no trem com destino à São Paulo. Em 1963 seus filhos Gentil De Costa e Reinaldo De Costa assumiram a empresa Duelo e ampliaram os negócios para outros Estados. Lançaram  também outras embalagens de  produtos como garrafão de 5 litros e garrafas de vidro. Em 1987, três gerações depois, a Duelo abriu mercado para todos os Estados Brasileiros e alguns países do Mercosul. Além do vinho, lançou novos produtos como: caninha e coquetéis em embalagens de plástico.

Em 2001, a empresa  iniciou uma nova fase com a  criação da  filial em Belém, estado do Pará. Em 2010, a Duelo do Pará  tornando-se independente e mudou sua razão social para  Bebidas Duelo Ltda, modernizando a linha, investindo em novas tecnologias e ampliando seu parque fabril. Criou vários produtos como vodka Kostoff e o energético: Black Pine.  Através da nova gestão e uma visão de mercado futuro está desenvolvendo uma nova cultura de capacitação e treinamento para todos os colaboradores, objetivando melhorias dos produtos para seus clientes. Em 2012, criou um novo mix de refrigerantes com a marca Okey.

Name: Kaged
Description:
Kaged is the first, ultra-premium sports nutrition supplement line of its kind and was created to help you reach your health and fitness goals without cutting corners. From our inception in 2014, we have maintained our focus on science-based formulations to create clean, quality products. With industry-leading formulators, we have built a line of supplements which bridge the gap between sports performance and health. 

Keeping health at the forefront, our products and ingredients have been thoroughly researched, rigorously tested, certified free of banned substances, and developed without the use of any artificial flavors, colors or fillers. Only the highest quality, cutting-edge ingredients are used in our formulas to provide athletes with clean products that support their desired performance outcome.

Based in Huntington Beach, California, the Kaged line of supplements are available online at kaged.com, as well as at select retailers including Vitamin Shoppe, Amazon, GNC.com and Bodybuilding.com. 

Kaged Muscle provides more than just quality supplements. Our website is a wealth of information for athletes from any sport, at all levels. We continue to stock the website with new online training programs. Additionally, educational articles covering everything related to training, nutrition, supplements, and even healthy recipes are accessible to everyone. 

We at Kaged Muscle are focused on developing a comprehensive brand—from products to health education, to detailed training plans—Kaged Muscle is a true innovation in the sports nutrition supplement industry.

Name: Lettuce Grow

Description: Lisciani is a worldwide educational company that has been designing, developing and manufacturing educational toys that can improve the lives of children and their families, for the last 30 years. The company has a publishing background which is unique in the European industry because it was founded as a publishing house in the field of pedagogy and education.
