Name: Cranio Creations
Description:
Founded back in 2009 by a group of young, skilled and enthusiastic gamers and artists, Cranio Creations quickly evolved in one of the most well-known board game publishers in Italy. We offer games suitable for every occasion or gaming group, focusing our production on ingenious and innovative mechanics along with a gorgeous graphical design.

Most of our games are entirely designed and developed by our creative team, and distribuited around the world!

We also localize games from many of our international partners (Feuerland, CGE, Spielwiese Edition etc.)

Our catalogue features a number of international award-winning games, like Codenames (2016 Spiel des Jahres) and Terra Mystica (2013 Kennerspiel des Jahres).

But our field of action is not limited to the board game world: we also collaborate with a wide range of educational and pedagogic professional to create useful tools for educational applications.

We are also converting most of our most successful games for the mobile platform - iOS and Android - to widen our customer base.

Our most innovative advertising strategy, the ApeCranio, is a successfull blend of modern guerrilla marketing and traditional selling platforms: our operators, riding a customized three-wheeler, offer our products to people in every part of Milan.

Name: Keycraft Global
Description:
Established in 1974 as a pocket money toy supplier to high street gift shops in a small town on the North East of Scotland, Keycraft came from small beginnings.

Now almost 50 years later, Keycraft has progressed to supply a global customer base from tourist attractions to the high street market, and from the individual retailer to the distribution centres of multi-chain organisations.

With offices in USA, Canada, Australia, Hong Kong, France, Italy, Ireland and headquarters in the UK, Keycraft has been operating at a global level for some time now and are unrivalled in product development and innovation.

The strategic experts use their unique methodology called the “Science of Impulse” to delve into insights and industry trends to not only source the best products but also to work hand in hand with their customers to turn low value into high profit. Tried and tested, this approach creates opportunities to make space pay.

Name: Just Funky
Description:
Our mission to create and deliver high-quality merchandise for fans officially started in 2011, but the true origin of how our company started can be traced back to when our Chief Visionary, Raj Arora was only 15 years old. With an entrepreneurial spirit and passion to be deliberately different, Raj Arora began creating the sturdy foundation of business ideals of great designers, excellent quality products, and amazing customer service that Just Funky continues to strive for and builds off of today. 

Today, Just Funky has expanded to locations all over the world with offices in India, Hong Kong, Europe, and the United States where our headquarters is located in Richfield, Ohio. Even though Just Funky has grown so much in the last five years, we still hold our small family values of wanting to do things the right way and make people smile. 

If you want to stay up to date on the latest pop-culture trends in merchandise then check out our website or follow us on social media!

Name: Weber-Stephen Nordic
Description:
It all began with a passionate barbecue enthusiast named George Stephen, who invented the world's first kettle grill in 1952 – a grill that ended up changing barbecuing culture throughout the world. He did not do it in order to enrapture the whole world – he simply wanted to find a way to barbecue better steak for his family and friends. And he succeeded! That was over 70 years ago. 

"We are not metal benders – we are in the entertainment business". That brief sentence sums up Weber. For us, a grill is much more than a grill – it is a focal point for unforgettable experiences. This was the philosophy George Stephen founded Weber on... it is the philosophy that has revolutionised the world of barbecuing... and it is the philosophy that still permeates Weber today.

Name: Água de Cheiro
Description:
História da empresa
 
A Água de Cheiro, com mais de 40 anos de história, foi a percussora no segmento de franquias de beleza no Brasil, sendo umas das marcas com maior brand awareness do varejo brasileiro.
 
Redes Sociais 
 
Facebook: www.facebook.com/aguadecheiro
Instagram: www.instagram.com/aguadecheirooficial
 
Missão, Visão e Valores

Abrir uma franquia Água de Cheiro é ter a certeza de qualidade com preços acessíveis. São mais de 100 lojas posicionadas em todo o Brasil, com um projeto de expansão estruturado e responsável.
 
Democrática e acessível, conversa com os mais diversos perfis de público, e pode se instalar em diversas modalidades de ponto de venda, como shopping centers, galerias comerciais de super e hipermercados, comércio de rua, aeroportos, rodoviárias, etc.
  
A Água de Cheiro pensa no franqueado como um parceiro de valor e, com a experiência da rede no dia a dia da operação das unidades, pode contribuir no processo de gestão e desenvolvimento do negócio.
 
Em contínuo aperfeiçoamento no processo de comunicação, as melhores práticas são disseminadas com agilidade. Sendo a premissa do franchising a transmissão de know-how e melhores práticas, instituir um sistema capaz de gerenciar e compartilhar as informações que circulam na rede de franquias de forma padronizada pode trazer melhorias significativas na relação franqueador e franqueado e propiciar um crescimento mais sustentável para a rede como um todo.
 
 
Mais de 200 funcionários diretos e indiretos
Mais de 100 lojas 
Mais de 200 produtos comercializados

Description:

By April 2005 the company took over businesses from Sunehari Svendgaard Laboratories Limited, Sunehari Oral Care and Jai Hanuman Exports. Keeping up with this pace it reached new heights on October 21, 2006 when it was listed both on BSE (“BSE – 532771”) and NSE (“NSE – JHS”) of India. Name: 立白集团
Description:
广州立白企业集团有限公司是国内日化龙头企业，创建于1994年，总部位于广州市。主营民生离不开的日化产品，产品范围涵盖“织物洗护、餐具洗涤、消杀、家 居清洁、空气清新、口腔护理、身体清洁、头发护理、肌肤护理及化妆品”等九大类几百个品种，营销网络星罗棋布，遍布全国各省（区）、直辖市。

在国家的改革开放政策和各级党委、政府、社会各界的关心、支持和帮助下，立白近年来均保持较快增长速度，全集团年销售收入一百多亿元，洗涤用品全国销量第 一，年向国家上缴税收超10亿元，连年荣登“中国私营企业纳税百强”排行榜。立白的发展得到政府和社会各界的广泛认可，先后荣获了“中国优秀民营企业”、 “全国守合同重信用企业”、“中国优秀诚信企业”、“中国最具市场竞争力品牌”、“中国工业先锋示范单位”、“中国绿效企业最佳典范奖”等各种世界级、国 家级荣誉一百余项，立白已成为民族日化工业的一面旗帜。

随着销售的不断增长，立白的生产规模迅速扩大。至今，立白在全国各地已拥有十三大生产基地、三十多家分公司、二十多家委外加工厂，员工一万多人。全国各大 生产基地生产设备先进，生产管理规范，环境保护严格，能有效控制“三废”排放，实施清洁生产、环保生产、节约生产和循环生产，是干净整洁、绿树成荫、无粉 尘、无噪音、水资源循环利用的环境友好型工厂。立白被国家环保部授予“中国环境标志企业优秀奖”，广州番禺生产基地污水处理站经有关部门严格评估成为“广 东省环境保护示范工程”。作为勇于担当社会责任的企业公民，立白始终以消费者为中心，通过科技创新，实现节能减排和清洁生产，为消费者提供更安全、健康、 低碳、环保、卫生的产品，谋求人和自然环境健康和谐共存，实现地球生态环境的可持续性发展，让消费者生活得更好，让中国更美丽。

Description:
Aerus has a rich history dating back to 1924 and is known for excellence in our innovative technologies, unmatched service, and endless accomplishments. Skipper (formerly known as Tirtyl) is an environmental enterprise and Australia’s #1 just-add-water home and personal care range. 

Our sustainable solutions skip the waste, our proceeds tackle the war on waste, and we passionately advocate for policy change that will prevent future waste.

Skipper just-add-water products prove that there is a more sustainable and environmentally friendly way to everyday consumption, helping to restore and conserve our planet.

At present, our products are used in over 300,000 homes across Australia and the United States and we have proudly prevented over 6 million plastic bottles through our tablet alternatives. 

Want to start turning your everyday habits into a force for good?

Join us at Skipper.org

Description:

Millions of people in the trade have the need for a truly effective mobile cleaning system for hands, tools & surfaces, and Big Wipes offers the complete solution. THE BIG WIPES RANGE CLEANS
The Big Wipes product range is unique in its ability to remove a vast variety of modern construction and maintenance products such as PU expanding foam, silicone, acrylic sealants, epoxy fillers, solvent based paints, adhesives, grease, oil and so much more.

Name: Allos Hof-Manufaktur
Description: Die Allos Hof-Manufaktur ist einer der führenden vegetarischen und veganen Bio-Lebensmittelhersteller in Deutschland. Mit unseren innovativen Marken Allos, Cupper Teas, De Rit, Little Lunch sowie Tartex treiben wir unsere Mission „Food for Biodiversity“ weiter voran. An unseren Standorten in Augsburg, Bremen, Drebber und Freiburg arbeiten 280 Mitarbeitende und unterstützen mit der Herstellung von gesunden, nachhaltigen Lebensmitteln die natürliche biologische Vielfalt. Die Allos Hof-Manufaktur hat den Deutschen Nachhaltigkeitspreis 2023 im Transformationsfeld Biodiversität gewonnen und engagiert sich als Teil der B Corp-Gemeinschaft (Rezertifiziert mit 116,5 Punkten) aktiv im engen Schulterschluss mit vielen weiteren Unternehmen für ein internationales Umdenken in der Wirtschaft: für mehr Verantwortung im sozialen, ökologischen und ökonomischen Bereich. Die Allos Hof-Manufaktur greift als mittelständisches Tochterunternehmen der internationalen Ecotone-Gruppe auf ein umfangreiches internationales Netzwerk zurück. Wir haben ein gemeinsames Ziel: durch unser Handeln für den Erhalt der Artenvielfalt sowie für gesunde und nachhaltige Lebensmittel auf den Tellern zu sorgen. Als etablierter Biolebensmittelhersteller in Deutschland haben wir mit unseren eigenen Projekten und unserem Engagement in Bündnissen und Initiativen die Möglichkeit, eine nachhaltige Entwicklung weitervoranzutreiben.

Identificação
A Central Nacional de Compras Municipais CONNECT foi fundada em 2015, encontra-se publicada em Diário da República, legalmente constituída e suportada nos artigos 260º e 262º do CCP e DL 200/2008 de 9 de Outubro e está devidamente fundamentada por Estudo de Viabilidade Económico-Financeira de Augusto Mateus, Lda.

CONNECT
Destinada a todas as Entidades da Administração Pública Local Portuguesa e Empresas do SEL (Setor Empresarial Local), a CONNECT ganha uma escala ímpar a nível nacional, beneficiando de um poder negocial traduzido em acordos de fornecimento de bens e serviços que representam ganhos de tempo, preço e garantia técnica.

Porquê a Connect?
A Connect é a Central de Compras dirigida a todas as entidades da Administração Pública Local Portuguesa e Empresas do Setor Empresarial Local.
- Sem vínculos
- Sem custos
- Com transparência
- Com economia de custos

Benefícios

1 - Economias de Escala
2 – Transparência
3 - Agilidade
4- Tempo
5 -Sem Custos
6- Sem Vínculos

Name: Fannie May Confections Brands Inc.
Description:
The first Fannie May retail store was opened by H. Teller Archibald in 1920 at 11 N. LaSalle St. in Chicago. By 1935, there were nearly four dozen retail stores in Illinois and several neighboring states. During World War II, while other companies chose to change their recipes when ingredients were scarce, Fannie May stuck with its exact recipes, making only what it could which often meant closing shops early because no more candy was available - never was the taste of the candy compromised.

In 1946, just after World War II, Fannie May created its most well-known candy to date, the Pixie, by hand-pouring caramel over nuts and then placing them on a conveyor belt to be drenched in chocolate. Today, that combination of caramel and crunchy pecans covered in chocolate is one of the company's best sellers. In the 1970s and 1980s Fannie May continued to develop new candy flavors with the introduction of the Trinidad in 1970 and the creation of Eggnog Creams in 1989. In 1991 Fannie May delved into the world of sugar free candy and now offers a number of assortments. This was followed by the introduction of our elegant truffle line in 1992.

After the purchase of Fannie May by Alpine Confections, production of our chocolates moved to North Canton, Ohio based Harry London Candies in October of 2004.

Throughout the years Fannie May has developed candies that often become the center of many family and holiday traditions. Beginning with only a handful of confections, today Fannie May makes over 100 different confections and continues to develop new and innovative flavor profiles for our customers. Quality has always been the driving force behind the making of Fannie May chocolates. Fannie May's standards of excellence include maintaining our product's high quality by requiring special handling during storage and display. Our growing popularity as a premium quality product is due to our innovative approaches in manufacturing, advertising and packaging.

Name: SRDi
Description:
SRDi une PME française basée en Vendée, spécialiste de la collecte et du traitement des cartouches d’encre vide, de l’encre compatible et des accessoires multimédia.
Depuis plus de 15 ans, nous exprimons notre savoir-faire technologique, commercial et marketing et à travers la distribution et le développement de marques innovantes sur ces 3 marchés.

Nos Forces ?
-Un portefeuille de marques référentes du marché, distribuées en exclusivité chez nos clients de la GSA. Spirit of Gamer pour le gaming, JVC pour l’audio, Pantone pour les accessoires téléphonie … enrichi constamment de nouvelles marques !
-Des marques propres fortes : KeyOuest : accessoires informatiques, téléphonie et audio, Keytime : réveils mécaniques et connectés, Print3E: cartouches d’encre compatibles et Wisee, borne de collecte intelligente. 
-Une force de vente dynamique et réactive couvrant la France entière disponible pour les implantations des marques distribuées et la collecte.
-Un service design intégré Made In France en veille permanente des nouvelles tendances et capable de personnalisation pour chacun de nos clients.

Nos Valeurs ?
Nos 3 valeurs fortes d’entreprise sont l’innovation, la qualité et la durabilité incarnées par les obtentions des certifications ISO 9001 et 14001.
Nous attachons également une importance particulière au soutien de causes caritatives comme la Ligue Contre le Cancer et environnementales à travers le développement de produits éco-conçus et le soutien d’associations.

En forte croissance, l’entreprise recrute de nouveaux talents tout au long de l’année, pour plus d’informations, rendez-vous sur le site www.srdi.net .
Pour rester informés de toutes nos actualités, connectez-vous à notre page Linked In ! Pour toute question, nous sommes disponibles à contact@srdi.net

Our goal is to put a smile on your face and many faces around the globe as we continue delivering the products you and your family love.

Your Fun is Our Business.

Name: Dodie
Description: Dodie est LA marque française incontournable de la puériculture. Bienveillante, sincère et rassurante, Dodie s’adapte depuis toujours aux besoins des bébés et aux exigences de leurs parents. Name: Vorwerk Polska
Description:
Jesteśmy spółką sprzedażową, działającą w Grupie Vorwerk – dużej, międzynarodowej firmie, zajmującej się sprzedażą innowacyjnych produktów, o wysokiej jakości. Działalność firmy Vorwerk wiąże się z bogatą, 140 letnią historią. Vorwerk Polska działa od 1995 roku. Flagowym produktem jest urządzenie Thermomix, które ułatwia przygotowywanie zdrowych i smacznych posiłków. W 2019 roku Vorwerk wprowadził na polski rynek produkty Kobold — zaawansowany system utrzymania czystości w domu.

Sprzedaż realizowana jest przez Przedstawicieli Handlowych, którzy współpracują z firmą w oparciu o własną działalność gospodarczą. Pracownicy etatowi zapewniają rozwój biznesu, odpowiadając m.in. za takie obszary jak marketing, administracja, IT, czy zarządzanie.

CO NAS WYRÓŻNIA?

Innowacyjność 
Nasze produkty, m.in. urządzenie Thermomix i system czyszczący Kobold, pozwalają klientom realizować codzienne obowiązki w niecodzienny sposób.

Stabilność
Działalność firmy wiąże się z bogatą - 140 letnią historią. W Polsce jesteśmy od 1995 roku. Mamy w swoich zespołach osoby, które współtworzą Vorwerk Polska od samego początku. :)

Name: Vitha Group S.p.A.
Description:
Vitha Group S.p.a. è una società per azioni fondata nel 2011, da un gruppo di imprenditori italiani, che collaborano con un progetto comune dal 1990.

Dopo tanti anni di esperienze condivise e progetti brillantemente realizzati, noi fondatori di Vitha Group abbiamo deciso di dare vita a un grande, unico gruppo di lavoro, che abbia come priorità il benessere e la prevenzione della salute dei nostri clienti, ma che contemporaneamente offra reali opportunità lavorative a chiunque voglia dedicarsi all’affascinante mondo dell’imprenditoria commerciale.

Alla luce di tali premesse, il nostro ‘Progetto Vitha’ prevede oggi una doppia missione: 

-	fornire alle famiglie che ci accolgono prodotti per il benessere e la prevenzione  della salute, da noi accuratamente scelti in base alle certificazioni Ministeriali e  alla qualità della manifattura e dei materiali impiegati. 

-	realizzare un’opportunità imprenditoriale in franchising, che però non preveda ALCUN investimento economico da parte dei franchisee, oltre alla disponibilità a impegnarsi nel lavoro quotidiano e a rispettare l’etica aziendale. Il progetto Vitha è stato e sarà sempre aperto a tutti e a tutte le categorie sociali, a prescindere da istruzione scolastica o disponibilità economiche. Il nostro obiettivo è coinvolgere in un progetto tutto italiano persone comuni che, attraverso il lavoro, la costanza e la dedizione, possano essere formati come imprenditori indipendenti, ma attivamente coinvolti nella gestione dell’azienda madre. Il progetto Vitha prevede infatti che i Concessionari diventino azionisti della società stessa, sempre e rigorosamente senza alcun investimento economico.

#vithagroup

Name: Bonide Products LLC
Description:

Name: Julien
Description:
Julien se distingue comme un créateur de solutions de cuisine et d’aménagement de luxe, alliant design raffiné et performance irréprochable. Notre engagement envers l’excellence opérationnelle et l’innovation nous permet de réaliser des projets d’envergure, reconnus à l’international pour leur qualité et leur élégance intemporelle.

Entreprise de classe mondiale, Julien maîtrise l’art de la transformation du métal en feuille — notamment l’acier inoxydable — et intègre harmonieusement des matériaux nobles comme le bois, le marbre, le granit, l’ardoise, le Corian et le Zodiak pour donner vie à des espaces à la fois fonctionnels et esthétiques.

Nos domaines d’expertise :
• Cuisines résidentielles
• Salles de bain
• Cuisines professionnelles
• Aménagement commercial

Au fil des années, Julien a réalisé des projets emblématiques dans près de 20 pays, desservant des secteurs variés tels que les chaînes de pharmacies, les équipements médicaux, les technologies de pointe, l’électroménager, l’agroalimentaire et le transport.

Plus de 300 talents — ingénieurs, designers, concepteurs, techniciens spécialisés, ferblantiers et artisans-polisseurs — contribuent chaque jour, dans nos installations de plus de 170 000 pi² (18 000 m²), à donner forme à des projets uniques qui allient savoir-faire, design sur mesure et luxe durable.

Name: Crescent Tools
Description:

Crescent Tools' product line includes Crescent adjustable wrenches, mechanics hand tools and sets, Crescent Wiss snips, scissors, shears, knives and trade tools, Crescent Lufkin measuring tapes, rules, wheels and chalk reels, Crescent Nicholson files and saws, Crescent H.K. Porter heavy‑duty cutting products, Crescent JOBOX on-site, flammable liquid and truck storage products and Crescent APEX power tool accessories. Visit www.crescenttool.com.

Name: Orson Indonesia
Description:
Orson Indonesia is the resulting company of two unique, and efficient factories located in Jakarta, Indonesia. Our specialties include the manufacturing of skincare products like soaps and shampoos, as well as the saponification of soap noodles. We offer a wide range of vegetable-based toilet soaps encompassing the beauty, fruity, baby, medicated, and whitening segments; laundry soaps; and multipurpose soaps. Orson was established in 2002, and through our determination and calculated actions to source for excellent suppliers to partner with in our efforts to deliver superior fragrances and packaging, Orson has successfully gained a dominant position amongst top Indonesian manufacturers in just a little more than a decade.  As a result, we have successfully penetrated the Asian and African markets, and are now setting our sights into expanding into Europe and the Americas.

Name: Snow Joe
Description: Snow Joe, together with its complementary brands Sun Joe and Aqua Joe, planted its roots as a digitally native, direct-to-consumer company that designs, develops, and distributes high-quality, yet affordable, outdoor residential tools and winter weather solutions. Intuitively merging advanced eCommerce technology on the back-end with innovative tools on the front-end, the “Joe” family of brands has disrupted the home exterior, garage, yard and garden landscapes by its ability to swiftly get its tools into the hands of its customers fast when they need them most.  Founded in 2004 with the mission to bring homeowners smart winter solutions, the company has grown to become not only the market share leader in electric and cordless snowblowers, but also the leader in the electric pressure washer category. Over the years, Snow Joe has evolved into a robust, omnichannel, customer-centric business that now offers a wide range of problem-solving tools to keep homes, yards, gardens and driveways looking beautiful throughout the year. Featuring the most innovative battery platform with advanced lithium-ion technology for maximum power around your home with over 100 tools now part of the 24-Volt iON+ battery system – from cordless snow blowers and snow throwers, to cordless pressure washers, chain saws, leaf blowers and lawn mowers – there’s a solution for every season. Go With Joe and Get Equipped with the right tools to tackle any outdoor chore.

Description:
It is time for communities to turn towards a growing marketplace to provide them with feasible opportunities to generate an income at a low or nonexistent cost. A marketplace that will not only strengthen a community but repair the environment it rests on. This marketplace? Ruckify.

With a dream to change the world, Ruckify’s rent anything marketplace provides an accessible platform for everyone to use. Having built driving technology and forward-thinking leaders, Ruckify has paved the way for peer-to-peer sharing in building and established communities. This tool allows the ordinary person to generate an income from virtually nothing, and the established company to grow into new audiences and target markets. One small application gives the power to share more than items, but experiences, passions, and the potential to build a global community that can make a tourist feel at home when oceans away.

Ruckify provides its users with the freedom to do what they want when they want without the restriction of time, storage, price, and availability. While also encouraging sustainability by reusing items throughout the community without having to buy new or throw away the neglected. Ruckify gives you an opportunity to make a real difference while obtaining financial security and confidence in your entrepreneurial instincts.

Name: MARGARETE STEIFF GMBH
Description:
Margarete Steiff was born on July 24th, 1847 in Giengen an der Brenz. At only 18 months old Margarete contracted polio and was to spend the rest of her life in a wheelchair. Despite her tremendous physical discomfort and difficulties this courageous lady did not allow her hardship to distract her. Margarete attended a dressmaking school and by the age of 17 she completed her training as a skilled seamstress. In 1880, she made a little felt pincushion in the form of a delightful elephant. The elephant enchanted her family who encouraged her to make these not as functional pincushions, but as children’s TOYS! The popularity of these little elephant soft toys soon spread rapidly. Never had children had soft playmates. Most toys were made of tinplate, wood and even porcelain. In 1880, she opened her own Felt Toy Company, Margarete Steiff GmbH was founded and so began the story of Steiff toys. The company motto, which is still used today, was established: “For Children, only the best is good enough”. Many other wonderful animals joined the little elephant. To distinguish the Steiff products and to identify them as outstanding quality the now famous Trademark “Button-in-ear” was launched in 1904, invented by her nephew Franz Steiff.

About Margarete Steiff GmbH
We work daily with the pursuit that "for children only the best is good enough".
This mission state is the core of our company values. We are committed to deliver highest quality standards in all our products in the plush and children’s fashion sector. Based on our own developed standards and expectations, we test and inspect each product with great care to guarantee not only joy for children but also their health and safety, which is paramount. With more than 20.000 active Club members, Steiff products do not only light up children's eyes - they also find admiration among adults.

Name: Teleset Group
Description:
Founded in 1986, Teleset Group currently operates in a total of 60,000 m2 indoor area with 2000 employees in its 5 separate plants situated in Manisa and Çerkezköy.
Teleset Electromechanics, Metalsan Industrial Products and Karpek Packaging, each holding a leading position in their field of activity, offer a remarkably wide range of services including Cable Groups, Sheet Metal Pieces, Condensers, Hot Gas Tubes and Styrofoam Packaging products to its clients in White Goods, Consumer Electronics, Automobile and Communication sectors.

Name: Floom
Description:
Floom is an online florist marketplace that offers quality and beautiful bouquets from a curated selection of independent florists, delivered same-day.

Our hand selected independent florists create unique floral arrangements that they have designed and uploaded to the Floom website themselves. Floom makes those products accessible by providing an alternative to traditional retail and offering our partner an eCommerce channel. Customers type in a delivery postcode, and select a bespoke bouquet to send in a matter of clicks.

Our Clients include ASOS, Burberry, Conde Nast, and the BBC, to name a few. We have been featured in The Sunday Telegraph, Harper's Bazaar, Elle decor, Grazia, Wallpaper, The Guardian and ES mag.

Name: McClelland Premium Imports
Description:
McClelland Premium Imports (MPI) was founded in 2003 with the mission of bringing Europe’s finest, most authentic beers to Canada.

Staying true to that goal, our president and resident Beer Knight, Guy McClelland, has built a collection of premium craft beers from European countries steeped in brewing tradition: Austria, Belgium, England, Ireland, and Germany.

Though the styles and histories of each of our beer brands are unique, they all have one important thing in common, they are healthy. All MPI beers are ‘pure,’ all natural beers free of artificial flavouring and preservatives.

At MPI we believe that brewing is an art best perfected over time and that behind every great beer lies a romantic story. Like Gambrinus, the ‘King of Beers’ pictured in our logo, each and every MPI beer is a legendary, original.

We are passionate about our authentic craft beers and we look forward to sharing them with retailers, restaurants and bars across Canada.

Name: Sealskinz
Description:
Sealskinz are a British brand who manufacture a range of endurance accessory products, designed to enable you to get out and stay out whatever the weather.  

Our range of fully waterproof socks, gloves and hats are perfect for a wide range of outdoor activities from hiking and cycling to equestrian and more.

All of our knitted Sealskinz products are manufactured using our proprietary StretchDry technology which ensures our socks and Ultra-Grip gloves are 100% waterproof, breathable and windproof.

Every one of our socks are tested for wateproofness by hand.  Not one in a thousand, not one in a hundred, not even one in a pair, EVERY SINGLE PRODUCT is hand tested to ensure it's fully waterproof before it leaves the factory!

Name: Glasdon International Limited
Description:
Since 1959, our mission has been to design, manufacture and supply innovative market-leading products that enable our customers to contribute towards a cleaner, safer & more sustainable environment.

Customer care and new product innovation have ensured Glasdon's continuing market lead in the design and manufacture of award-winning litter bins, seating, recycling bins, bollards and marker posts, and winter gritters and grit bins.

The company is constantly expanding to meet the specialised demands of its ever-growing number of customers with an emphasis on design and value for money. Name: Pure Table Top | Certified B Corp
Description:
Hello, we’re Pure Table Top. 

Based in our beautiful showroom, The Cherry Shed, in the heart of the Leicestershire countryside, our mission is simple; to lead the way in design and innovation across the ceramic, glass and home accessories market. 

Founded at Tanith’s kitchen table in 2014, Pure Table Top’s output spans theUK and beyond. Supplying only the highest products for retail and online, we deliver over 12 million items across the globe every year. And we are only just getting started. 

As a team, we design, we develop and we innovate. Sourcing from factories around the world, we are highly experienced with our backgrounds spanning from retail buying, design and merchandising. 
Pure’s people are at the heart of everything we do. We thrive on giving our employees an inclusive working environment, in which they have access to development opportunities and in which their voices are heard and valued every day.

Name: Sarjan Watertech India Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Sarjan Watertech India Pvt. Ltd. is India's 1st BIS/ISI recipient for RO category and a reputed as well as an expert end-to-end, water purification and filtration solutions provider. 

The underlying factor that defines as well as drives Sarjan and all its functions is the singular belief that providing pure water to the people is more than just a business. We understand, better than most, how pure water is integral to life and various activities that surround and support it. Our extensive range of offerings, vividly showcase, how we have translated this very humane approach into products that stand for attributes like quality, reliability, durability, cost-effectiveness, an innovative attitude and state-of-the-art technology.

We understand the science of water, we understand the importance of purity, we understand the technology required for it, the significance of innovation and we understand your needs. At Sarjan, we seamlessly integrate these and offer products that are a benchmark of ‘The Science of Purity’

The Industry and Us.

We, at Sarjan truly believe that pure water is like a fuel that injects life into our industries. These industries in turn propel a nation forward. Hence, to us, it becomes all the more important to provide the best, the latest and the most viable answers to the necessities of the industry.

To cater to the entire gamut of requirements of the industry, Sarjan designs, manufacturers and provides Water Purification and Water Treatment Plants (Domestic, Commercial & Industrial) manufactured with stringent quality policies and practices and latest technology. These products are made to withstand the demanding conditions that prevail across various industries and still deliver optimal results with least amount of maintenance. We also have the expertise to manufacture as per your specifications / individual designs with the infrastructure & capacity to handle high volume requirements.

Name: Monsieur BARBIER
Description:
FR : Derrière sa moustache, Monsieur BARBIER développe depuis 2013 des produits et service de haute qualité alliant la tradition des maîtres barbiers au génie cosmétique français. 

Chaque référence transforme la routine matinale en vrai rituel de soin visage, avec des formulations riches et naturelles, et des solutions 2-en-1 hors du commun. Citons par exemple l’Extra-Shave, premier après-rasage anti-âge, ou encore le fameux Full Care seul shampoing Barbe & Cheveux sans parabène ni sulfate ! 

En salon ou à la maison, galénique et sensorialité sont au rendez-vous pour que chacun retrouve le plaisir du grooming, façon Barbier - d’autant que Monsieur BARBIER se donne à fond sur les formules, pas sur la facture.

Et pour encore plus de confort, retrouvez ses abonnement flexibles pour les meilleures lames du marché.

Le tout emballé avec un amour tendre, dans un packaging french touch, à la fois élégant et design : style commence dès votre salle de bain !

Barbièrement votre, 

Monsieur BARBIER

///

ENG : Behind his little mustache, Monsieur BARBIER has been developing high-quality French products since 2013, combining the tradition of master-barbers with French cosmetic genius.

Each reference transforms the morning routine into a true facial care experience, with rich natural formulations and extraordinary 2-in-1 solutions as the Extra-Shave, first aftershave with anti-aging principles, or the Full Care, only shampoo for Hair & Beard without paraben and sulfate ! 

In a saloon or at home, galenics and sensoriality await you to regain the pleasure of grooming, barber style – especially as Monsieur BARBIER bet everything on formulas, not on bills.

And for even more comfort, find its flexible subscription for the best blades of the market.

All of that is packed with love, in a French touch packaging, both elegant and design, because the style begins in your bathroom :-)

Barberly yours,

Monsieur BARBIER.

Name: African Coffee Roasters
Description:
ACR is not just a company. We focus our efforts in developing sustainability in the trade of coffee through caring for the environment and the people around us.
African Coffee Roasters is a premium roaster that deals with wholesale coffee processing as well as being a white label coffee roaster. 

In 2015 Coop Denmark decided to build a coffee roasting facility in Kenya. The idea was to shorten the supply chain from coffee suppliers to coffee consumers. In January 2016, African Coffee Roasters EPZ Limited was born. It was decided that the roasting facility should reside in Athi River, 40 kilometers outside of Nairobi.
Establishing the facility was no easy feat. First of all, we had to get all of our licenses in order before we were able to operate legally as a business. We also had to renovate our new office and factory buildings. The factory building then had to be fitted with state of the art machines before we were ready for production.
In the beginning of August we had our first day of production. This led to the shipment of our first container on the 2nd of September. The coffee has now been on Coop Denmark’s shelves since October 2016 and are rapidly expanding our client base.

Name: ShurTech Brands, LLC
Description: ShurTech Brands, LLC, markets do-it-yourself tapes, office and housewares products under the Duck, Painter’s Mate Green, FrogTape, Caremail, Easy Liner and Shurtape  brands. The company is a subsidiary of Shurtape Technologies, LLC, Hickory, N.C., an industry-leading producer of pressure sensitive masking, duct, packaging and specialty tape products, with facilities in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Germany, Mexico, Peru, United Arab Emirates and China. Shurtape services numerous markets, including industrial, packaging, HVAC, professional paint, auto, marine, aerospace, arts and entertainment, and retail. Shurtape also manufactures and markets the Shurtape and Kip brands. Visit www.shurtech.com for more information.

Name: Purina Petcare

Name: Nowodvorski Lighting
Description:
Behind every Nowodvorski Lighting lamp, there is a story of passion, attention to quality and a love of inventive solutions. We started our journey in 1994 as a small family business. Today, we are present in 45 markets around the world, creating lighting for homes, apartments and HORECA spaces, making everyday life more enjoyable. We prove that beautiful interiors are created with light.   
Nowodvorski Lighting lamps will brighten up your interior from the front door, through the living room, bathroom and garden. Our offer includes ceiling lamps, wall lamps, spotlights, downlights, rail systems and original solutions such as the Cameleon System, which defies convention and allows you to create personalised lighting. Every year, we introduce around 300 new products, responding to the latest trends and the changing needs of investors. Our luminaires are manufactured in Poland, in two plants in Częstochowa and Siemianowice Śląskie. We have 19,000 m² of production space, advanced machinery, a 4,500 m² automated logistics centre and our own photometric laboratory, which allows us to constantly ensure the highest quality of our products. Our high-quality policy is part of our brand mission, which is reflected, among other things, in our complaint rate - less than 0.5% in relation to sales in 2024.  
The heart of our brand is the product development department - Design Lab. This is where ideas are born, which the team of designers and constructors transforms into unique collections. Refined design, well-thought-out functionality and full focus on the user make our lighting go beyond the usual patterns. You can get to know Nowodvorski Lighting lamps at the Nowodvorski Brand House in Warsaw, at trade fair stands and in partner showrooms all over Europe.   
Nowodvorski Lighting has gained the trust of architects, interior designers and investors in Europe, who value it for its durability, precision and design.

Whether you're planning a large event, setting an intimate table, decorating your home or simply want to enjoy the beautiful glow of candlelight, we have candles that will be just right. Name: Sterling Manufacturing Company
Description:
Sterling has been synonymous with Electrical products in India for Decades. Sterling is an ambition and vision incorporated by like-minded people to become a preferred Contractors, Service providers & manufacturer of Electrical Goods and products with a 100% commitment to quality and reliability. Sterling is a pioneering technology leader that is writing the future of industrial digitalization. The journey over the decade has helped us excel in offering customized solutions according to industry and customer-specific needs.

We are well known for the quality of our products, our range, extensive reach, popular advertising campaigns and sensible pricing. Sterling has aggressively expanded into retail to be closest to our consumers.

As part of our ‘Smart Thinking’ we are developing our distribution network across the length and breadth of India. Most of all, we are working to be known to make the lives of millions more comfortable.

Sterling is a combination of trust, durability & savings. Appliances so diverse, there is one for everyone.

At Sterling, our engineers believe in pushing the boundaries of technology by constantly challenging it. They are driven by the need to give consumers more than they expect. Path-breaking technology is engineered to adapt to the weather conditions unique to the country. Intelligent design and innovative performance double up to provide not only cost-effectiveness but also the highest levels of energy efficiency

The Sterling manufactures product range of over 1000 products that caters to a wide range of industries covered by highly efficient Pan-India and International sales and marketing team.

For more than decades, we have been at the forefront, innovating developing and designing Domestic & industrial equipment and systems for customers across the world.

For more than twenty five years The Learning Journey has been designing and manufacturing an exclusive line of award-winning children's interactive educational products.  All products at The Learning Journey encourage learning and develop confidence as they enhance a child's potential. All products build on the skills necessary for children to be prepared for school and beyond.

Originally created in 1995, The Learning Journey has now expanded into numerous international markets with products in multiple languages, including a large range of bilingual products.  As The Learning Journey manufactures and distributes its own exclusive product line, our products offer excellent value for your money while at the same time offering you high educational value.

With The Learning Journey's complete range of interactive products, children have fun while learning and parents and educators know they have the right quality educational products for their children.

Name: Mitsubishi Electric NZ (BDT)
Description:
Mitsubishi Electric is exclusively distributed in New Zealand by 100% locally owned, Black Diamond Technologies.  Founded in 1981 by Chairman Ron Woodrow, Black Diamond Technologies Limited (formerly Melco New Zealand) has become a leader in the New Zealand Air Conditioning and Home Appliance markets.

2021 marks 40 years in the New Zealand Industry as the exclusive distributor of Mitsubishi Electric products in New Zealand. While the first 15 years were spent specialising in residential AV products like televisions and video recorders, the factory decided that they could no longer justify producing these despite their popularity in New Zealand. So, they had to focus on finding the next big thing, and the company landed upon the then fledgling compressor driven product market.

BDT is intent on cementing its position as a leader in heat pumps and refrigeration. BDT’s commitment to importing the best products for New Zealand conditions and a strong partnership with Mitsubishi Electric is highlighted by their heat pump range. This firm partnership with such a quality brand allows BDT to provide New Zealanders with market leading technology and set new benchmarks in efficiency. 

The company specialises in the marketing and distribution of Mitsubishi Electric products including Air Conditioning / Heat Pumps, Chillers, Ventilation and, Home Appliances such as refrigeration and dehumidifiers  - supplying New Zealand consumers with energy efficient, high quality products.

With its head office based in Wellington, BDT is a people-orientated company, placing great emphasis on training and educating salespeople and consumers alike. 

Strong advertising campaigns built around educating consumers on unique product benefits are coupled with ongoing investment in training at a sales level. 

Developing advanced Technical Training Facilities is part of this educational strategy with centres in Auckland, Wellington, Tauranga and Christchurch.

Name: Kol
Description:
KOL est le leader français de la livraison de vins et spiritueux en moins de 30 minutes jour et nuit aux prix des grandes surfaces et à température de dégustation.

KOL est basé sur une interface mobile disponible sur l’Apple Store qui permet à l’utilisateur de commander, via son smartphone et un paiement par carte de crédit, des boissons livrées où l’on souhaite en moins de 30 minutes dans Paris. 

KOL combine un procédé de livraison innovant offrant rapidité et qualité de dégustation : les boissons sont livrées à température de dégustation (-18 °C pour nos vodkas ou encore 9 °C pour nos champagnes ) et tout cela en moins de 30 minutes. 

KOL permet aussi d’avoir accès à un large choix de boissons sélectionné par des œnologues aux prix des grandes surfaces et un suivi de son livreur en temps réel via leur géolocalisation sur sur la carte. 

KOL est présent à Paris et en Ile de France et ouvrira à Londres et Bordeaux au second semestre 2016.

Les boissons sont choisies par l’intermédiaire d’experts dans chacune des catégories de boissons proposées. Grâce à cette démarche, KOL vous propose un combiné de références classiques et originales afin de pouvoir répondre à l’ensemble des envies et des budgets. Enfin, KOL s’efforce de proposer des nouveautés mensuelles afin de faire découvrir la richesse de petits producteurs français et étrangers.

Description:
Leader Malagasy dans la fabrication de produits d’entretien, d’hygiène, de désinfection, ainsi que de produits cosmétiques et para-pharmaceutiques, SOMAPRO incarne la nouvelle génération d’industriels engagés pour un quotidien plus propre, plus sain et plus responsable.

Avec une expertise éprouvée et une parfaite connaissance du marché local, SOMAPRO se distingue par sa capacité à innover, à proposer des gammes accessibles et performantes, et à répondre avec agilité aux besoins des particuliers comme des professionnels.

Notre site de production, basé à Alakamisy Anosiala, est au cœur d’un dispositif logistique performant, nous permettant de couvrir l’ensemble du territoire national via un réseau de distribution solide et structuré : distributeurs partenaires, grossistes, grandes et moyennes surfaces, libres services, stations-services, pharmacies et para-pharmacies.

Chez SOMAPRO, nous ne fabriquons pas seulement des produits — nous fabriquons la confiance, jour après jour, en plaçant la qualité, l’impact et la proximité au centre de toutes nos actions.

Le site de production est installé à Ambohidratrimo Anosiala. L’acheminement des produits, de la production à la mise à disposition des consommateurs, se fait via un solide réseau de partenaires distributeurs, incluant des distributeurs grossistes, les grandes et moyennes surfaces ainsi que les pharmacies.

La SOMAPRO est avant tout une belle aventure humaine. Bâtie par des hommes pour les hommes : elle est née de notre volonté de permettre à chacun de vivre sainement dans un environnement sain, propre et stimulant.

Name: Magnum Magnetics
Description:
After opening our business doors in 1991, Magnum Magnetics completed its first run of flexible magnetic sheeting in May 1992. We started operations in a 10,000-square-foot building in Marietta, Ohio. After several expansions, we now operate two manufacturing facilities in Ohio totaling 160,000 square feet and produce a wide variety of flexible permanent magnets, including sheeting, strips, and extrusions.

We are proud to say that Magnum flexible magnetic material is produced and tested in the U.S.A.  As a result, we control the content and quality of our magnetic materials from start to end. 
 
Our customers have helped us to grow, and we will always work hard to earn their respect. We know we can’t make our business relationship a long-term one if we don’t continually meet customer needs quickly and efficiently without sacrificing quality.
 
And we recognize the pivotal role our employees play in helping Magnum Magnetics meet customer needs. Our talented staff members work in an environment that encourages teamwork yet is also self-empowering.
 
We continually invest in equipment, machinery, and employees to maintain and improve our state-of-the-art and environmentally friendly manufacturing processes.  Guided by LEAN manufacturing principles, we are able to maximize our productivity while reducing operating costs, creating the most competitive prices on our products.

From origin, AXA develops, manufactures and sells builders hardware and bicycle accessories, both under its own brand name and as custom-made solutions for OEM clients. AXA has a strong position in the middle segment and high end of these markets. 
AXA changed from a product oriented to a ‘swinging’ sales & marketing organisation, utilising the well known and strong brand name ‘AXA’. 

AXA was split in two separate sales divisions, each with their own branding and marketing strategy. These two sales divisions are operating under the brand names: ‘AXA Bike Security’ and ‘AXA Home Security’.
AXA aims for substantial and profitable growth in the Home Security and Bike Security markets. This growth can be achieved among others through the development of new products, broadening of the product ranges, the increase of (export) activities, and acquisitions. 

AXA distinguishes itself from competitors not only by its high quality products but also through its branding and innovation.

Home Security
The current product portfolio of Home Security is divided into six product groups: hinges, casement stays, window fasteners, aluminium door furniture, door locks and ASSA door locks and cylinders. 

Bike Security
Bike Security is divided into three product groups: locks, lighting and guards. The locks range includes frame locks, cable locks and chain locks. The lighting product range includes front lights, rear lights and dynamos, whilst the guards range comprises chain guards and dress guards.

AXA is part of the Allegion group.
About Allegion
Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) is a global pioneer in safety and security, with leading brands like CISA, Interflex, LCN, Schlage, SimonsVoss and Von Duprin. Focusing on security around the door and adjacent areas, Allegion produces a range of solutions for homes, businesses, schools and other institutions. Allegion is a $2 billion company, with products sold in almost 130 countries.
Visit www.allegion.com.

Name: Cooper&Hunter USA / ComfortSide
Description: Comfortside, LLC specializes in the wholesale of VRF, Ductless Mini-Split Systems and variable HVAC equipment from their headquarters in Miami, FL. As the exclusive master distributor of Cooper&Hunter, OLMO and BRAVO in the USA, Canada and South America, Comfortside maintains a wide stock of HVAC equipment, in addition to offering exceptional service support, professional consultations, and an optimal logistics system. The mission of the company is to provide consumers with the best quality products for the most affordable price.

Name: The Pahadi Story
Description:
The Pahadi Story is more than a brand—it’s a movement rooted in compassion, community, and conscious living.

We bring you authentic, natural curations from the mystical hills of the Himalayas, crafted by Pahadi women farmers with love, care, and tradition. Every product we create reflects our mission: to empower local communities, promote mindful choices, and impact 1 million lives worldwide.

Our range of herbal teas, pure Himalayan salts, and wellness-driven products blend ancient wisdom with modern needs, helping you live consciously in today’s fast-paced world.

When you choose The Pahadi Story, you’re not just choosing purity from the peaks; you’re choosing to uplift lives, support sustainable practices, and reconnect with nature.

 Explore our offerings: Herbal teas, salts, powders, snacks, and more.
 Our Mission: Spreading Pahadi Wellness for modern living.
 Join us: Follow our journey to impact lives, one mindful step at a time

Name: The Vertical Collective
Description:
In the rapidly shifting climate of today's next generation of brands, being nimble enough to pivot into new product categories with a power-packed supply chain has never been more critical. With over two decades of manufacturing experience, covering over forty categories of consumer goods and representing hundreds of factories globally, The Vertical Collective is the turnkey solution for brands large and small. 

We are the rocket fuel propelling brands forward in the product space.

Name: Smart Modular Buildings
Description: Visit our website www.smartgardenoffices.co.uk for find out more about our garden rooms, offices, studios, living spaces and modular commercial buildings.

Name: WARRIOR Safety Shoes
Description:
WARRIOR -All Terrain Professional Gear 
Made in India 

Warrior Safety Footwear comes from the house of Liberty, one of the most trusted brands in India producing humatech shoes, tested & certified by latest European & Indian Safety Norms. 
 
Liberty Shoes over a decade is the leader in production of MADE IN INDIA safety footwear. 
Exporting to more than 25 countries across the world.

Name: Farinter srl
Description: farinter Italian company

Name: Toy State International Limited
Description:
Since 1984, Toy State has been an innovator and toy industry leader in the manufacture of “lights & sound” and R/C toys with a portfolio featuring their flagship Road Rippers, Nikko, and Nikko Air brands, and more recently has introduced a successful global growth strategy launching the company into new categories and retail markets. With leading licensed lines from the world’s premier entertainment, lifestyle and auto properties in its growing portfolio of brands, including Hot Wheels, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Barbie, Thomas & Friends, Marvel, DC Comics, Cat, Cat Preschool, DRL and True and the Rainbow Kingdom, Toy State products provide hours of play and imagination for kids of all ages.
For more information, please visit www.toystate.com

Name: Lafayette Interior Fashions
Description:
Lafayette Interior Fashions began as an American Dream.

Founder Joe Morgan started from humble beginnings. He was a student, a teacher, a soldier, and a salesman. But above all else, he was a dreamer.

This mindset led him to a one-room garage with a dream of owning his future as an entrepreneur in the custom window fashions industry. On Mondays, one could find him by the telephone taking orders. Wednesdays, he was in his shop, crafting his dreams. On Fridays, he was hand delivering products. For Joe, failure was never an option.

From 1950 to today, that same mindset remains true. Joe’s American dream grew into a family legacy built on quality craftsmanship. For that reason, Lafayette Interior Fashions remains one of the last American manufacturers of custom interior fashions.

Lafayette Interior Fashions
American Quality Custom | Since 1950
Where Artistry Meets Luxury in Every Stitch.

Name: Chums, Inc.
Description: In 1983, a Colorado River guide sought a simple way to keep his sunglasses out of the river. Through this innovative idea the Original Cotton Chum was born. Thirty-five years later, Chums is now a global brand that offers a wide range of outdoor accessories and gear. Chums’ mantra is simple: provide fun, quality products to enjoy while at work or play. Chums: Helping You Hang On Since 1983.

Name: Zephyr
Description: Since 1997, San Francisco-based Zephyr has continued to bring design, innovation and technology to the forefront of the kitchen ventilation hood industry. The company has challenged the perception of what ventilation means in kitchen design and created a new awareness of the importance of a high performing ventilation system. With acclaimed talent such as artistic visionary, Fu-Tung Cheng, and industrial designer, Robert Brunner, Zephyr is able to create cutting-edge residential range hoods unlike any other company. In addition, Zephyr has pioneered ventilation hood technology with the industry’s first DCBL Suppression System; an exclusive innovation that delivers the most silent, energy efficient and performance-driven range hoods available today. As a direct result of its commitment to elevating range hood design and technology, Zephyr is the recipient of several prestigious awards including Consumer Report Buy Rating, Consumer Digest Best Buy Rating, Chicago Athenaeum Good Design, ADEX (Awards for Design Excellence), Appliance Design ‘Excellence In Design’, Spark Award and the Architectural Products ‘Product Innovation Award.’

Name: The Outdoor Recreation Group
Description:
BRANDS BUILT ON EXCELLENCE. PRODUCTS BUILT FOR LIFE.

The Outdoor Recreation Group (TORG)   is a solutions-driven company, relentless in our drive to meet the needs and exceed the expectations of each and every customer within multiple product categories and industries.  We primarily focus on the Camping, Hunting and Fishing markets, with specific specialty in the sewn goods and accessory categories.  

We have the ability to offer our customers a complete and comprehensive solution for these categories with our branded or licensed portfolio of items.  

We also offer a complete OEM service for many national retailers which provides innovative product design, complete oversight of product testing and production, and final distribution to the store.   

Outdoor Recreation Group is a privately held, third generation company based in Los Angeles, CA.  For over forty years, delivering the most reliable products on the planet, all produced with a lifetime guarantee for quality.

Name: Earth Shoes
Description:
With roots dating back to the 1970’s, Earth, Inc. offers a wide range of footwear brands – each one inspired by its yoga instructor founder’s core belief that wellness and healthy living should start from the ground up.  

It all started with the heritage collection, Kalso Earth Shoes, which are famously characterized with a “grounded heel” design that emulates the mountain pose. To Earth – a contemporary collection of casual shoes with uncompromised comfort to create a collection that brings a refreshing new twist to footwear.

Earth also believes that following a path to wellness includes making our planet a healthier place for us all. In 2015, Earth partnered with a non-profit organization and planted over 750,000 trees in Sub-Sahara Africa.

Today, Earth is continuing this effort with a goal to plant another 50,000 trees in 2016 – and helps keep our air clean and our bodies healthy.

Earth. Walk Your World.

Name: SafetyLink
Description:
SafetyLink designs engineers and manufactures height safety equipment, roof anchors, horizontal lifeline systems and permanent ladders. Our products enable workers everywhere to complete jobs working at heights with building safety requirements being met ensuring safety standards are maintained throughout. Our design team works overtime to produce original quality tested fall protection equipment.

SafetyLink was established in Australia in 1998, and has fast become a leading brand exporting worldwide for personal height safety equipment. Renowned for pioneering the first energy absorbing anchor point and leading the way in the fall protection industry, this same technology is being applied to our horizontal lifeline systems.

SafetyLink's height safety anchor product range includes permanent roof anchors, horizontal lifeline systems, permanent ladder systems, ladder stabilisers, fall protection devices, temporary anchor and personal protection equipment. SafetyLink's height safety roof anchors are designed to absorb energy, reducing the risk of injury to the person and damage to the structure. SafetyLink's roof anchor range includes the patented FrogLink, TileLink, RetroLink, LadderLink and our NEW Temporary Roof Anchor the TempLink 3000.

Our roof anchors and horizontal lifelines can be installed to a multitude of materials concrete, steel, retro fit to either floor, wall, ceiling or surface mounted.  We have evolved to suit the Australia markets building and design materials therefore creating a superior product.

All SafetyLink products undergo extensive testing in a multitude of scenarios by accredited testing facilities and comply to AS/NZS 1891.4, EN 795:2012, CEN/TS 16415:2013, AS/NZS 5532-2013. SafetyLink's experienced technical team is complemented with comprehensive installation manuals and testing certificates. We have national qualified installers keeping your assets safe.

Name: DelFrescoPure
Description:
At DelFrescoPure we believe nutrition and flavour go hand-in-hand. We believe that in an industry as old as mankind there’s always opportunity to innovate. And we believe that customer service is simple - it’s just a day-in, day-out, ongoing, never-ending, persevering compassionate kind of activity. We’ve lived these beliefs for over 50 years. That’s how we’ve become a leader in the premium greenhouse industry.  We grow and market tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers, beans, eggplants and strawberries in Kingsville, Ontario, Canada… and we are darn good at it. 

For Carl Mastronardi, our President and CEO, knowing how to grow is only half the challenge. “We haven’t been a successful family-owned greenhouse for over 50 years just because we know how to grow great produce! We’ve built our legacy around the customer. We listen to our customers and deliver what consumers want. It’s a simple goal that takes enormous effort to achieve... and something everyone at DelFrescoPure is passionate about.”

DelFrescoPure brands include LivingCube, YES!Berries Your Everyday Snack, Delights Blushing with Flavor, Mini Mixers, G.R.EAT! Grab. Rinse, EAT, Mini Crunchers Cucumbers, Sweetreats, Romatalia, Euro Bean The Gourmet Slicing Bean, Dragon’s Fire and Fiesta Mix.

Name: Carbitex
Description:
Carbitex was born from the idea that pioneering advanced materials drives human ingenuity, where Future is Made. Backed by rigorous lab and field testing, Carbitex’s uniquely flexible carbon fiber composites set the standard for athletic performance.

Our three proprietary carbon fiber technology platforms have unique flexible capabilities that unlock a combination of benefits never before possible:

OmniFlex Carbon Fiber Textile
Immediate Power Transfer + Movement Support + Textile-Feel

MonoFlex Carbon Fiber Technology
Stability + Protection + Free Range Of Motion

GearFlex Carbon Fiber Technology
Power + Efficiency + Balance

Focused on performance footwear for athletes across the globe we work with some of the best companies in the world, like adidas, Saucony, Altra, Scott, and The North Face.

Name: Borgione
Description:
Da 50 anni offriamo prodotti che rendono grande la felicità dei più piccoli. 

Genitori e zie, educatori ed educatrici, specialisti e specialiste nel nostro e-commerce trovano giochi, cancelleria, materiale per lavori creativi e arredi sicuri e selezionati con
cura da noi.

Scegli un futuro prodotto del cuore su www.borgione.it

Name: Tea Forte
Description: Tea Forté (teaforte.com) is a division of Jacobs Douwe Egberts (JDE) headquartered in Maynard, MA. We offer exceptional teas to consumers, fine restaurants, and luxury hotels globally. Our people are our most valued asset, and our culture is grounded in community. Join us!

Name: Quooker Emirates
Description:
Quooker is well on its way to conquering the world. Since it was invented in 1970 by Henri Peteri, the boiling-water tap has become an indispensable tool in kitchens all over the world. 
Dutch design and innovation, Quooker provides the most efficient and sustainable solution for boiling water from tap. Today, the company holds 200 patents, and – in addition to the boiling water – hot, cold, sparkling, and chilled water also flows from the ‘tap that does it all’. 
Quooker is a company from the Netherlands that manufactures an integrated water system that offers filtered boiling, chilled and sparkling water - all from one tap. The Quooker story started in 1970 with Henri Peteri and his invention of the world’s first boiling water tap. Today Quooker holds over 200 patents and is available in more than 18 countries, employing over 600 people globally. All products are manufactured at the Quooker factory in Ridderkerk, the Netherlands.

Name: Komeco
Description:
A Komeco é uma marca brasileira 100% capital nacional e, há mais de 30 anos, desenvolve produtos com soluções tecnológicas pensando no conforto, bem-estar e sustentabilidade de seus consumidores.

Localizada na cidade de Palhoça, no Estado de Santa Catarina, a Komeco atua no ramo de geração de energia solar fotovoltaica, aquecimento solar de água, aquecimento a gás, bombas e pressurizadores e climatização como condicionadores, desumidificadores e umidificadores de ar.

Com estrutura técnica, logística e operacional estrategicamente distribuída por todo o Brasil, a Komeco garante agilidade do início ao fim de cada experiência do consumidor. Tratando-se da qualidade de seu atendimento, a Komeco é referência nisso. E mais: oferece SUPORTE NACIONAL diretamente do Brasil, ou seja, qualquer eventualidade que venha a ocorrer, é solucionada por meio do Serviço de Atendimento ao Consumidor (SAC) e o Serviço de Atendimento Técnico (SAT).

O processo de fabricação de seus produtos segue um rigoroso controle de qualidade garantido pelos Laboratórios de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento do Brasil. Além disso, a Komeco mantém parceria com o Centro de Pesquisa e Engenharia na China a fim de realizar testes laboratoriais e certificações de cada produto. 

Hoje, a Komeco é uma empresa consolidada e que conquista um espaço cada vez maior em todo o Brasil. A empresa está em contínua evolução e investe na implantação e ampliação de sua estrutura produtiva. Isso demonstra com clareza a postura de crescimento sustentável da Komeco, aliando solidez e perpetuidade à um cenário global variável. Constantemente, mais produtos e novos segmentos são abordados e cada lançamento representa muito mais que tecnologia e inovação, representa uma nova chance de promover qualidade e bem-estar aos nossos clientes.

Name: COMERCIAL ARQUÉ, S.A.
Description:
Comercial Arquè: Tu Socio en Soluciones Innovadoras

Desde 1954, Comercial Arquè ha sido un referente en Barcelona, ofreciendo soluciones de alta calidad en conversión, manipulación y comercialización de productos industriales y de embalaje. Nuestra historia, marcada por el compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación, nos ha llevado a convertirnos en COMERCIAL ARQUÉ, S.A. en 1971.

Nuestra gama de productos es amplia y diversa, incluyendo películas de estampación, accesorios de preparación de máquinas, grabados para la estampación en caliente, cintas térmicas (TTR), materiales de soporte textil, materiales para encuadernación, etiquetas antihurto (EAS), polipropileno (Durasin), escarcha y productos relacionados con la producción y personalización de tarjetas de PVC. Además, somos líderes en la fabricación de maquinaria (Impak) y ofrecemos servicios de implantación y ensamblaje de RFID.

Nuestras modernas instalaciones de 10,000 m² en l'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Barcelona, incluyen una zona de expediciones dedicada para la carga y descarga de productos de gran tonelaje. También gestionamos un Depósito Aduanero Público (D.A.P.) de aproximadamente 2,000 metros cuadrados, lo que nos permite una gestión ágil y eficiente de productos en nuestros almacenes.

En Comercial Arquè, valoramos nuestra tradición de excelencia y nuestra adaptabilidad a las cambiantes demandas del mercado. Somos un equipo comprometido con brindar soluciones de calidad y un servicio excepcional a nuestros clientes.

Confía en nosotros para dar vida a tus proyectos con productos de calidad respaldados por una historia de innovación y compromiso.

Comercial Arquè: Tu Socio en Soluciones Innovadoras para la Industria.

Name: Meyer
Description:
Our "why" — to nourish human connection by inspiring joy for every chef — one cooking innovation at a time. If you cook, you are a chef.

Meyer is one of the largest, most innovative cookware companies in the United States. Our cookware brands include Ruffoni, Anolon, Circulon, Rachael Ray, Farberware, KitchenAid, BonJour Coffee & Tea, and LocknLock Food Storage.  

Meyer has recently been selected as one of the Healthiest Employers in the Bay Area by the Silicon Valley/San Jose Business Journal and the San Francisco Business Times for the past three years. 

We are committed to delivering unparalleled and innovative service to our customers and providing employees with opportunities for professional development and individual growth. We seek positive and dedicated people to join us in keeping Meyer the leading culinary products distributor in the United States.

Name: OnePet
Description:
OnePet is dedicated to building brands that connect pet owners to pet high-quality wellness products and services tailored to benefit our pets, pet-owning families and veterinary communities. 

In 2015 it was an idea boot-strapped by US Veterans; today, it's a parent company to six successful brands and hundreds of products, with over 100 employees in more than a dozen countries. The design, development, growth, and success of these products and services are thanks to the innovative and insightful minds of our people. Under the OnePet umbrella, Certapet, One Vet, Honest Paws, Vets Preferred, Simple Wag, and Veterinarians.org all serve the pet community in uniquely different ways.

Name: KH Lloreda
Description:
KH Lloreda es una empresa familiar ubicada en Canovelles (Valles Oriental, Barcelona) que inició en 1949 su trayectoria como IRM Lloreda, Industrias de Recubrimientos Metálicos.

La necesidad de limpiar las piezas que llegaban de sus clientes, previo a su tratamiento, llevó a su propietario, Jaume Lloreda, a desarrollar sus propios productos de limpieza. Entre ellos, un producto denominado desengrasante IRM KH-7. Verificada la eficacia de estos productos y en especial del KH-7, la empresa decidió posteriormente comercializarlos. 

En los últimos años, KH Lloreda ha experimentado un importante desarrollo bajo los valores de trabajo bien hecho, trabajo en equipo, compromiso y la innovación como pilar de su estrategia de negocio. 
Hoy, es líder del mercado de limpiadores de cocina y quitamanhcas con las marcas KH7 Quitagrasas y KH7   SinManchas y ha iniciado un importante proyecto de expansión internacional.

Aspectos como la Calidad, la Seguridad, el Respeto por el Medio Ambiente, la comunicación, la motivación y la implicación social son latentes en la gestión de la compañía.

Name: Beko Balkans
Description:
Arçelik Group, which was founded in 1955, operates in consumer durables and consumer electronics sectors under the scope of Koç Holding with its production, marketing and after-sales services.
Arçelik Group has 26.000 employees worldwide and 15 production facilities throughout the world; in Turkey, Romania, Russia, China, South Africa and currently in Thailand. The Company has recently entered to the US market as Beko US Inc with its Sales & Marketing Office in Chicago and its R&D Offices in Boston and Silicon Valley will be open in 2016. 

Beko, the global brand of Arçelik, has been the brand which increased its market share the most in European white goods market within the last six years and thus has been the brand with the fastest growth in the sector. Beko remains the second biggest brand in European white goods market It is the leader brand of U.K. white goods market for years and claimed top position in French free-standing white goods market following its leadership in the Polish white goods market. Additionally, Beko has become the fastest growing white goods brand of the German market, the biggest white goods market of Europe, in the last 5 years with a more than 2-fold market growth.

Name: Camille Rose
Description:
In 2011, after years of hand-crafting skincare recipes for family and friends, Louisiana native Janell Stephens, wife and mother of five, launched a line of products in honor of her grandmother, Camille Rose.  Each homemade creation held true to Janell's heartfelt mission to produce luxurious, gourmet-inspired hair and body products that offer clean beauty solutions to a sophisticated consumer base.
Janelle quickly knew she was on to something when not only was the demand for her products outselling the supply  but consumers were asking her for what was next.  Soon after, she created and released specialty hair care products including conditioning Moisture Milk, Almond Jai Twisting Butter, Honey Leave-in and Curl Love
In 2012, Camille Rose transcended the online retail space when the products became available at over 100 Target stores after a chance meeting with a Target buyer at a gifting event. Miracles do happen!  

Other US retailers followed suit. The brand is now available at Walmart, Ulta Beauty, Sally’s Beauty, Whole Foods, Walgreens, CVS, Rite Aid and more. Camille Rose has recently expanded into the UK, South Africa, and several other countries. The rapid expansion into brick and mortar locations was only overshadowed by the immense following that the brand developed online by beauty experts, influencers and everyday consumers.
Today Janell’s brand identity outshines the mere “Founder” label, as she has packaged her business savvy and devotion to helping others into the role of a “beauty entrepreneurial expert”, mentoring and guiding women of color and small business owners helping them to reach their career objectives and beyond. This includes the work of the Janell Ennis Stephens Foundation, which was founded to support women and families in need with the mission of positively affecting the lives of families, particularly single mothers, who are striving to succeed in business or simply to provide for their family.

Name: Suncast Corporation
Description: Suncast Corporation is the leading US-based designer, manufacturer, and distributor of high-quality resin products for the home and industrial markets. A privately held company headquartered in Batavia, Illinois, Suncast prides itself on 35 years of innovation and sustainability across a wide range of product categories with materials proudly sourced in the USA.

Name: Cypher Urban Roastery
Description:
Founded in Dubai in 2016, Cypher Urban Roastery sources, supplies, and roasts specialty premium coffee to service the growing needs and taste requirements of regional wholesale consumers and specialty coffee drinkers. The company is deeply committed to the promotion of fair trade practices across the bean life cycle with an emphasis on quality, transparency, consistency, and social responsibility.

At Cypher, we believe in engaging everyone in the coffee community from farmers to brewers and nurturing strong relationships across the coffee supply chain by providing support and education to businesses and like-minded people. We do our best to equip and empower our partners in the coffee community so that they in turn can contribute to the value chain.

Being based in the Middle East, where historic links between Arab mystics and true coffee were once prevalent, and where coffee is served in many different ways, on all occasions and throughout the day, it has become our mission to revive our region's long tradition with coffee and share it with the rest of the world. It's time to rekindle the relationship between Arabia and Coffee, by bringing back old-school recipes, brewing methods, and drinking customs.

Name: Montana Knife Company
Description: MKC is an American made knife brand focusing on delivering the highest quality production knives in the world to discerning customers.  Though we are relatively new to the industry, our pedigree is not.  President and founder Josh Smith is a Master Bladesmith with over 30 years of experience.  Paired with Vice President and director of marketing, Brandon Horoho, MKC is quickly becoming recognized as a top brand.  We are the fastest growing knife company in the world and have great plans for the future.

Name: Quad Lock
Description:
Quad Lock is an award winning and fast growing Melbourne based company that revolutionised the smartphone mounting game with our patented case-based mounting system. 

Originally launched in 2012, the Quad Lock range now includes mounts for Cycling, Motorcycling, Driving, Running, and a range of Lifestyle options. To date, millions of Quad Lock products have been shipped to over 100 countries.

Name: Hausbrandt Trieste 1892 S.p.A.
Description:
Hausbrandt, Theresianer, Col Sandago.
What is there in common between these brands?
“Haus” means home in German – a place to live, a safe place that offers protection and welcomes everyone. We have created a group of brands and companies that is now united under one “roof”, “one home”, a single company, Hausbrandt Trieste 1892 S.p.A., but that is also thought of as a physical and metaphysical place to live in.
This is why “Hausbrandt” becomes a true “umbrella brand”, representing our entire group of brands and products, and this is also why all the company sites are now managed with the same attention towards the people, the environment and our products.

Name: Skyrocket
Description:
Skyrocket is an innovative, forward-thinking tech-entertainment company.

We're a catalyst for change. We create what has never been done; products that advance the idea of what "play" means. We’re at the forefront of tech-entertainment and our goal is to change the very landscape of fun. Simply put: we are the future of play.

At Skyrocket, we believe ideas can come from anyone in the company. If you have a great idea, we'll work hard to bring it to market. Just imagine seeing your idea come to life on store shelves! If transforming the very idea of fun sounds exciting to you; if a blank page is a thrilling proposition, rather than a terrifying one; if you're a team-player that can inspire the creation of something completely new, your job awaits!

Name: uppercase
Description: We are a D2C company building India's biggest and global D2C sustainable Travel accessories brand. Our brand uppercase is built specifically for the fashion forward, socially active new age customer while sharing their concern for the planet.

Name: PILOT PEN FRANCE
Description:
Depuis plus d'un siècle, PILOT a pour valeur d’apporter de nouvelles solutions d’écriture.

A l’écoute des consommateurs, nos recherches nous ont permis de créer de nouveaux standards en termes de confort, à travers les lancements des rollers encre liquide, encre gel, et plus récemment du FriXion, le roller à encre thermosensible plébiscité par les jeunes partout dans le monde.

Votre confiance nous a porté récemment au rang de marque numéro 1 mondiale dans les instruments d'écriture, et nous vous en remercions. Nous sommes aujourd’hui engagés pour répondre aux grands défis de ce nouveau millénaire comme la protection de l’environnement, et nous continuerons à innover, pour améliorer encore la qualité et le confort de nos produits.

Depuis le 1er janvier 1997, le siège social de PILOT CORPORATION OF EUROPE est implanté en Haute-Savoie, dans la région d’Annecy, au cœur du marché européen. C’est sur ce site que sont désormais réunis le centre de production européen et la filiale française.

PILOT CORPORATION OF EUROPE a pour mission de soutenir sur le plan marketing et logistique ses 7 filiales et ses 20 distributeurs européens permettant ainsi de couvrir 31 pays en Europe.

Le site de fabrication d’Annecy s’étend sur plus de 10 000 m² et assure 60% de l’approvisionnement des filiales européennes du groupe. Il dispose de 8 presses à injecter et de 6 lignes d’assemblage sophistiquées et fabrique près de 40 millions de stylos par an.

Name: Meira Oy
Description:
Meira Oy on suomalainen yritys, joka valmistaa kahvia ja maustamistuotteita omassa tuotantolaitoksessaan Helsingin Vallilassa sekä vähittäiskauppa- että Food Service -sektorille. Meira on osa italialaista Massimo Zanetti Beverage -konsernia, joka on Euroopan suurimpia kahvialan yrityksiä. Missiomme on "Reilusti Parempiin hetkiin", joka sisältää lupauksen jatkuvasta kehityksestä sekä vastuullisesta toimintatavastamme. 

Meira Ltd is a Finnish company that produces coffee and spicing products both to retail business and Food Service sector. Meira Ltd is owned by Massimo Zanetti Beverage Group, one of Europe’s biggest coffee producers and distributors. Our mission is "Fairly, for far better moments".

Name: Million Dollar Baby Co. (Babyletto, Namesake, daVinci, Monogram, & Nursery Works)
Description:
Million Dollar Baby Co. started in 1990 and is proudly family-owned and operated in Los Angeles. Since then, MDB has grown to 7 distinct brands of children’s furnishings ranging in style, aesthetic, and price, while carrying some of the industry’s most eco-conscious and award-winning designs.
