We can be found in retailers like Target and Amazon, and specialty retailers like Pottery Barn Kids and Crate & Barrel.  

Under the Million Dollar Baby Co. parent company are our family of brands: Babyletto, daVinci, Nursery Works, and Namesake.  We’re proud to offer the most Greenguard Gold–certified cribs on the market and to use FSC-certified sustainable wood across our brands whenever possible. We’ve also pioneered Styrofoam-free packaging for several of our best-selling collections — an innovation that reduces waste while protecting our products during shipment.

At Million Dollar Baby Co., our team members are our #1 priority, and we partner with exceptional partners and retailers around the world who share our core values:

• Treat Your Team Like Family — lead with respect, gratitude, empathy, and kindness.
• Make an Impact, Drive Results — focus on meaningful work that moves families forward.
• Deliver a “Wow” Customer Experience Every Time — every detail matters.
• Strive for Continuous Improvement & Learning — keep growing, keep getting better.
• Cultivate Quality Conversations — communicate honestly and thoughtfully to build trust.

Over the years, our commitment to people, innovation, and a positive workplace culture has earned us five consecutive “Best Place to Work” awards, one of the best workplaces by “Built in LA”, a 4.6 rating on Glassdoor, and 13 years on the Inc. 5000 Fastest Growing Companies list — recognitions that reflect the heart of who we are and the community we’re proud to build.  We’d love to talk to you!

Name: BSH Electroménager France
Description:
BSH Electroménager (filiale du groupe BOSCH) est le premier fabricant d’électroménager en Europe et l’un des leaders mondiaux du secteur. 

BSH Electroménager compte près de 80 sociétés implantées dans 50 pays, détient une quarantaine d’usines et emploie plus de 62 000 salariés dans le monde. 

En France, les principales marques de son portefeuille sont Bosch et Siemens. Avec 2 autres marques spécialisées, Gaggenau et Neff, BSH répond aux attentes spécifiques des consommateurs. 
BSH développe des appareils électroménagers reconnus pour leurs performances, leur design, leur efficacité énergétique et leur simplicité d’utilisation. Son portefeuille de produits couvre toute la gamme des appareils électroménagers modernes, qu’il s’agisse de fours ou de hottes, de lave-vaisselle, de lave-linge, de sèche-linge, de réfrigérateurs ou de congélateurs, ou encore d’appareils de petit électroménager (Consumer Products) comme les aspirateurs, les machines à café...

Les sites en France sont situés à Saint-Ouen (Siège social et SAV), Tournan-en-Brie (Centre logistique) et Lipsheim (Centre de recherche et développement pour la marque GAGGENAU et site de production).

BSH France a été certifiée Top Employeur France de 2016 à 2021. Cette nomination a été officiellement délivrée par le Top Employers Institute pour la qualité des mesures mises en place par BSH pour ses salariés. L'étude annuelle réalisée par le Top Employers Institute distingue les meilleurs employeurs au plan international, c'est-à-dire ceux qui proposent un environnement de travail de qualité, qui favorisent le développement des talents à tous les niveaux et qui s'attachent à développer en permanence leurs pratiques RH.

Name: Punch Studio
Description: Punch Studio is a leading supplier of Home, Gift & Stationery products to thousands of specialty retailers worldwide.  We are well known for our high quality, beautifully designed and highly giftable products. Under the Punch Studio name, we have three distinct brands: Punch Studio, Molly & Rex, and Lady Jayne. Our product lines include Stationery, Decorative Storage for Home and Office, and Bath & Home Fragrance items. Our designs are created in Culver City, CA by an in-house team of artists and designers. Our artists combine hand-painted artwork of our own creation with historical ephemera from the Kirshner Decorative Arts Collection. With this rich combination of decorative materials, we create our beautifully layered and distinctive designs. Punch Studio is growing and looking for talented people to join the organization in many key areas!

Name: Eagle Creek
Description:
For nearly 50 years, Eagle Creek has been committed to equipping travelers with the most responsibly-designed, durably-built, functionally superior adventure travel bags, luggage, packs, organizers, and gear. This unwavering commitment continues to define our company's mission to this day. Whether you're a seasoned globetrotter or new to exploring the world, allow us to introduce ourselves.

All of our gear is backed by our No Matter What Warranty. The warranty is extended to the original owner of the item and covers all functional aspects of the product for the life of your gear. No matter what happens to your Eagle Creek travel gear along the way, we are here to get you back to your next adventure as soon as possible.

Name: Alex Brands
Description: The ALEX BRANDS family of brands is comprised of some of the most iconic, recognizable and award winning toys in the industry today. With a commitment to helping children become more active and develop their imagination and creativity, ALEX BRANDS offers toys, games for children of all ages. Award-winning ALEX TOYS offers high quality toys, art supplies and craft activity kits that inspire creative expression. POOF is the world’s leading brand of foam sports balls, many of which are made in USA.  Iconic SLINKY has been the quintessential toy for fun and imagination since 1945. SCIENTIFIC EXPLORER offers a range of challenging and entertaining educational activity-based science kits.  IDEAL is the classic brand of nostalgic fun with a variety of games, magic sets, classic toys and seasonal outdoor activities. Award-winning ZOOB building sets are unique because the pieces move after they are put together, allowing for truly interactive creations. BACKYARD SAFARI is the leader in essential field gear for outdoor role play and exploration. ZILLIONZ has helped children better understand the value of money for almost 20 years.  SHRINKY DINKS is a globally recognized toy brand offering a wide variety of kits using plastic sheets that can be cut, colored and shrunk into an endless amount of original creations. BUZZ BEE TOYS is a diverse line of active play merchandise that provides high-quality, innovative products that range from foam dart and water blasters, to flying toys and junior sports offerings.  JANOD is France’s leading wooden toy brand with a long tradition of designing award-winning learning toys, role play toys and building sets, recognized for its distinguished contemporary design. KALOO has grown into a worldwide leader in plush products by using high-end fabrics and innovative themes to create desirable baby gifts sold in beautiful gift boxes with soft tags and subtle details.

Name: PepsiCo Zapadni Balkan
Description:
Kompanija PepsiCo, sa sedištem u Njujorku, jedan je od vodećih svetski proizvođač hrane i pića. PepsiCo je prisutan u više od 200 zemalja i ima najveći portfolio brendova hrane i pića na svetu, uključujući 19 proizvodnih linija kao što su Pepsi-Cola, Mountain Dew, Diet Pepsi, Lay’s, Doritos, Tropicana, Gatorade i Quaker. 
Iako je PepsiCo osnovan 1965. godine, udruživanjem kompanije Pepsi-Cola i poznatog proizvođača slanih grickalica Frito-Lay Inc. iz Dalasa, začeci kompanije vezuju se za 1898. godinu kada je mladi apotekar Kejleb Bredem, ekperimentišući sa kombinacijom začina, sokova i sirupa, napravio novo osvežavajuće piće koje je danas u svetu poznato kao Pepsi-Cola. 
Tokom 15 godina poslovanja na tržištu Zapadnog Balkana, nakon akvizicije Marbo Product-a, kompanija PepsiCo investirala je u nove proizvodne linije, povećanje kapaciteta i proširenje portfolija, uslove rada i zaposlene, kao i platforme za zaštitu životne sredine. PepsiCo Zapadni Balkan izdvojio se kao jedan od najznačajnijih proizvođača slanih grickalica u regionu sa brendovima Chipsy, Clipsy, Pardon i Gud, koji su postali deo globalnog PepsiCo portfolija. Lokalni portfolio proširen je svetski poznatim PepsiCo brendom: čuveni tortilja čips Doritos. Uvođenjem nove proizvodne linije i proširenjem proizvodnih kapaciteta, fabrika u Magliću proizvodi i planetarno popularni brend Lay’s i to od domaćih sirovina, a za potrebe izvoza na tržišta EU.
Proizvodnja se odvija u fabrici u Magliću kod Bačkog Petrovca, koja zahvaljujući investicijama namenjenim za unapređenje proizvodnih linija i izgradnju najmodernijeg skladišta gotovih proizvoda, predstavlja regionalni proizvodni centar kompanije PepsiCo za tržišta Zapadnog Balkana, dok se centralni distributivni centar za celo tržište Bosne i Hercegovine nalazi u Laktašima. 
Kompanija PepsiCo je 2024. godine deseti put zaredom dobila priznanje Top Employer u Srbiji, dok je rangirana kao broj 1 poslodavac među svim sertifikovanim kompanijama.

Name: Powered by People (PBP)
Description:
Powered by People is a B2B wholesale platform that seamlessly connects makers with buyers in North America & beyond through secure transactions. We want to make ethical, sustainable and social-impact buying easy and risk free.
 
The Creative Manufacturing and Handmade sector is one of the fastest growing global industries, yet it is slowed by communications and digital shortcomings. PBP solves this problem by providing a curated digital marketplace for buyers and makers to conduct business. The benefits are multiple. Buyers are able to customize and purchase products from a highly functional platform on flexible payment terms, leaving the international communication, payment and logistics to us. Makers—from Ghana to India to Guatemala—are able to massively expand their customer base simply by uploading their wares to the Powered by People site. And both makers and buyers can virtually track the manufacturing process every step of the way through our innovative PBP Produce tool.
 
With team members in America, Canada, Kenya, India and Mexico, PBP connects all the dots, providing financing for the makers, facilitating orders and identifying the emerging trends that buyers want on their shelves. And it is the makers, perhaps, who stand to gain the most. When their small businesses thrive, they provide not just for themselves, but their employees, families and communities.

Name: Vitakraft France
Description: Industriel producteur d’alimentation pour chien, chat, oiseaux et petits mammifères.

Name: Grupo Inteca
Description: Comercialización de Productos de Consumo Masivo

Name: Radienz Living
Description: Radienz Living is a leading North American manufacturer of home and personal care products, such as single-unit dose, facial wipes, baby wipes, and disinfectant wipes.  With manufacturing plants and warehouses in North America, Radienz Living provides customers with private-label solutions and contract manufacturing services for products found in retail and institutional markets. Through its commitment to trust and reliability, agility in innovation, and sustainable creation, Radienz Living is passionate about providing its customers with products that support a cleaner way of living and a more radiant world.

Name: epitome GmbH
Description:
Hello, we’re epitome. We’re creating a new imagining: technology advancements, experiences and high-quality digital devices. 

A fast scale start up, we number over a hundred diverse and forward striving people, who are passionate about transforming your expectations of consumer health tech.

Name: Grupo Vasconia, S.A.B.
Description: Organización mexicana fundada en 1911, con dos unidades de negocio líderes en su respectiva industria: Almexa y Vasconia Brands.

Name: T-Man Group
Description:
T-Man Group est la société de participation qui gère les intérêts du groupe RAJI figurant parmi les sociétés les plus emblématiques du Maroc. D’une entreprise familiale née en 1936 et opérant dans le commerce du thé en provenance d’Asie, son fondateur Feu Haj Hassan RAJI a fait un groupe florissant de la distribution de produits alimentaires et non alimentaires ; avant d’en amorcer le développement multisectoriel et d’investir dans de nouveaux secteurs...

Le groupe est, aujourd’hui, l’un des plus importants employeurs de son écosystème. Il compte un effectif de plus de 1500 collaborateurs répartis sur une dizaine de filiales, avec une présence dans 20 pays sur trois continents, opèrant principalement dans quatre secteurs d’activités :

- Industrie : Le groupe s’est investi depuis une vingtaine d’années dans l’agro-industrie pour disposer aujourd’hui de deux grandes unités de production

- Distribution : Le groupe est leader dans la distribution au niveau nationale et régionale, en offrant aux consommateurs un portefeuille de produits et de services de qualité, à travers des réseaux forts de distribution et des marques emblématiques

- Agriculture : Le groupe possède trois grandes exploitations agricoles d’une superficie totale de 500 hectares gérées par la société R’nim spécialisée dans l’arboriculture fruitière et l’olivier.

- Immobilier : Le groupe est spécialisé dans les lotissements de terrains, la construction d‘immeubles de moyen standing et de logements économiques. Le groupe a ainsi loti et commercialisé près de 2200 lots ayant permis la construction de plus de 9000 logements à Casablanca, Mohammedia et Marrakech.

Name: Dhaliwal Laboratories
Description:
Dhaliwal Laboratories is a family business that provides turnkey solutions for the next generation of personal care, over-the-counter, and medical device products. 

We are your third party manufacturer + marketer + designer + engineer all in one. We understand your needs as we have also come from all areas of the industry. We have manufacturing facilities based in Dallas, Mesquite, and near Chicago that encompass all aspects of production, from formulation to product delivery. We provide many services such as custom formulation and product design, flexible order size handling, short lead times and a dependable process. Our industry experience allows us to scale your production and grow with your product and brand!

We manufacture and fill a wide range of products, including: skin care, hair care, liquid soaps, deodorants, high alcohol content products, acetone based products, green products, lip balms, fragrances, mascaras, analgesic products, animal care products, OTC products, and more! Please visit our website for a full list.

Name: Graco Children's Products (A Newell Rubbermaid Company)
Description:
The Graco brand of baby gear provides thoughtful, practical and dependable parenting solutions inspired by the instincts and best intentions of a loving parent. After carefully observing a parent's natural instincts to protect, nurture, comfort and soothe, Graco brings them to life in a broad range of innovative products, from strollers and car seats to high chairs, playards, monitors and more.

Graco is a Newell Rubbermaid brand. If you'd like to learn more about careers at Graco, visit the Newell Rubbermaid Careers site: http://careers.newellrubbermaid.com/.

Name: GFR Pharma Ltd.
Description:
GFR Pharma is a full-service GMP contract manufacturer of natural health products, well-recognized in the Canadian, U.S. and international markets. In operation since 1998, we're a privately held company located near Vancouver, Canada and close to the U.S. border for efficient shipping to anywhere in the world.

Our team of industry experts makes growing a brand easier by assisting with everything from formulating and regulatory assistance to manufacturing and packaging in a variety of formats. We’re more than just a contract manufacturer; we deliver comprehensive solutions and keep innovating to help our clients stay ahead of competition in the market, and will work with your regulatory partner to ensure compliance with the country you wish to sell in.

Our focus on Quality Assurance enables GFR Pharma to consistently produce high quality supplements. We hold a number of natural health product industry certifications including a site license from Health Canada, registered Dairy Processing Establishment, Pro-Cert Organic, KosherCheck and most recently NSF certified to ensure the quality and label claims of your products. We continually invest in new capabilities, technologies and training to stay at the forefront of supplement manufacturing.

Name: Portacool, LLC
Description: Portacool, LLC leads the evaporative cooling industry with 30 years of technological and manufacturing expertise. Based in East Texas, Portacool offers cooling solutions through distributors and retailers nationally and internationally in more than 56 countries. Portacool-branded portable evaporative coolers are available in a variety of sizes to provide practical cooling solutions for commercial and residential environments to aid heat safety and productivity. Learn more at www.portacool.com.

Name: Thermos L.L.C.
Description: Over a century ago, we didn't just enter an industry, we created it. Today, the Thermos Brand legacy continues guided by a simple belief: When it comes to looking after the things that matter most, you shouldn’t have to settle for good enough.

Name: Kapa Oil Refineries Limited.
Description:
Our operations are based on the manufacture of edible oils, margarine, baking powder, detergent powder, laundry, toilet soaps and glycerine. We have further ventured in to toilet cleaners and tissue paper. We aim to lead the market in terms of quality and performance of our products and customer service.
 
Kapa is committed to being the ’benchmark company’ for quality products in Africa.
 
Our aim is to provide our customers with premium quality consumer goods at competitive prices while operating in an environmentally sensitive and socially responsible manner. We care for the community around us, contributing to education and medical facilities, providing a roof to the aged and disadvantage children.
 
We strive to attract, reward and advance our talent in an environment where each and every employee is able to achieve their aspirations.

Name: Hozelock (UK)
Description:
Being hands on in the garden can be very rewarding . Whether its through watering or planting seeds in the flowerbed, our customers enjoy being part of its growth. With over half a century of horticultural expertise. Hozelock understand the rewards of gardening and have developed the range to help gardeners to get the most from their involvement in it. We combine a knowledge and passion for gardening with a pride in craftsmanship to develop gardening solutions that help gardens flourish and come to life. Every product is crafted to work time after time, so that our customers can care for their gardens in the best possible way.

As a result , Hozelock is one of Britain's favourite gardening suppliers. From our early days, our drive has always been to develop technically perfect, visibly striking products that are part of a system. Our first product was the worlds first plastic hose connector - the Hoze-Lock. Today, our head office is in Birmingham (UK), and although we are a global garden equipment manufacturer, over 75% of our products are made in Britain. With the remaining 25% built in our overseas factories in France, Malaysia, Taiwan and China. 

Hozelock is part of the Hozelock Group. The Hozelock Group supplies products under two brands : Hozelock - our retail Gardening brand, and Tricoflex - our B2B industrial Hose brand. 

As a previous winner of the Queens Award for export, its natural that we have a heavy focus on exporting our products and services to more than 60 countries. In 2009 we won the Institute of Mechanical Engineers: Manufacturing Excellence Award (MX) for Logistics and Resource Efficiency which builds on excellent record, having won the 2008 MX Award for Customer Focus and the 2007 MX Award for Change Management.

Name: SOS Beauty Group
Description:
Backed by decades of industry experience, SOS believes in, builds, manages, and markets some of the most talked about luxury beauty brands in the world.

From our offices in LA, we work directly with artists, entrepreneurs, and beauty game-changers from around the globe, supporting their ideas at every phase of development–from the earliest stages of concepting and branding, all the way to the retail shelf.

Name: Elevva
Description:
Adquirimos y nos asociamos con vendedores de e-commerce líderes en América Latina para ayudarlos a impulsar
sus marcas y productos.
Nos convertimos en el puente entre las empresas y el siguiente nivel al que pueden llegar.
Ponemos todo nuestro conocimiento y tecnología a su servicio, para ayudarlos a escalar y optimizar sus operaciones.
Ellos tienen el conocimiento, nosotros el equipo, el capital y la tecnología.

Name: Boylan Bottling Co
Description:
The Boylan Bottling Company has been making sodas in small batches since 1891.  We weren’t the only one making sodas back then, but unlike many of the mega brands conceived in that same era, Boylan has remained true to its roots and committed to producing only authentic hand-crafted soda.  

Our Sodamasters use home grown recipes to make Boylan’s sparkling beverages from only the highest quality ingredients.  Real ingredients…the kind you can even pronounce.  We still use pure cane sugar which not only tastes better but also enhances the flavors of our sodas rather than masking them with the cloying syrupy sweetness of high fructose corn syrup.  And our thick glass bottles perfectly preserve flavor, freshness and carbonation, making for a markedly superior tasting product.  

Boylan hand-crafted sodas stand on their own and they speak for themselves – no hype, no marketing gimmicks.  While our sodas may cost more per ounce than the big soda pop brands, all of that cost is in the product…not paying for slick ad campaigns and celebrity spokespeople.  We’ve learned that the best way to sell our sodas is simply to be the best, and the accolades and awards we’ve received tell us we’re doing a pretty good job.

Name: Bloomscape
Description: Bloomscape is devoted to strengthening the relationships people have with things that grow. We make buying plants simple, by delivering healthy, ready-to-go plants to your door and giving you all the tools to keep the relationship growing.

Name: ABA Visualized
Description: Founded in January 2019, ABA Visualized has created an innovative approach of using visuals to support the mission of making effective behavior strategies more relatable, easier to understand, and more accessible to families & educators. ABA Visualized has self-published a collection of top-ranked books within the categories of Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA), Special Education, and Parenting Children with Disabilities. Additionally, ABA Visualized creates online trainings, leads public speaking events, and provides mentorship, all utilizing our signature visual approach. Through this, ABA Visualized has developed a reputation of being a leader of high-quality, approachable content in this field.

Name: Faran Sugar Mills Limited
Description: Al-Hamdulillah, Faran Sugar is ranked amongst top Six sugar mills operating in the province of Sindh in terms of production. The diversified portfolio of our customers includes the manufacture of cereals, confectionery, syrups, drinks, ice creams, biscuits and so on. Having one of the most efficient sugarcane processing facilities, Faran sugar is well placed to develop its capabilities in the years ahead. We strive to take market leading position through anticipating all the important factors that affect our business verticals. We are committed towards achieving the highest standards of quality and environmental care.

Name: King Koil
Description: At KINGKOIL INDIA, we combine 125+ years of global expertise with advanced R&D and manufacturing to deliver luxury mattresses that elevate guest comfort and reduce complaints. Trusted by JW Marriott, Radisson, Wyndham and more, we tailor hospitality solutions for durability, hygiene, and world-class sleep.

Name: Kao Singapore Private Limited
Description: Kao Singapore Private Limited is a Consumer Goods company located at 83 Clemenceau Avenue, #16-08 UE Square, Singapore.

Name: Grupo Empresarial Costa
Description:
En Grupo Empresarial Costa estamos presentes en los sectores agroalimentario, energías renovables, automoción, salud vegetal, hotelero e inmobiliario a través de nuestras marcas: Costa Food Group, Piensos Costa, Costa Food Meat, Casademont, Ibéricos Costa, Industrias Cárnicas Villar, Embutidos La Nuncia, Aviserrano, Roler, La Alegría Riojana, Juan Luna, Bodega Sommos, Sommos Hoteles, Renovables Costa, Key Salud Vegetal, Grupo Optimotor y Doble Emme. 

Apoyados en nuestros valores de honestidad, pasión y esfuerzo, desde Grupo Empresarial Costa trabajamos en un modelo global de sostenibilidad -económica, social y medioambiental- que nos permita seguir vinculados a nuestro territorio, fomentando la generación de economía, creando empleo de calidad en el entorno rural y manteniendo este compromiso en cada una de las propuestas que ofrecemos a los consumidores de nuestras marcas.

Adaptar nuestros procesos y acciones a la consecución de los ODS de la Agenda 2030 es uno de nuestros objetivos, que ya estamos trabajando desde diferentes campos, como la sostenibilidad en todos sus ámbitos, el compromiso con el territorio, la priorización de las personas (equipo y consumidores), la apuesta por la investigación y la innovación, el uso de la tecnología para optimizar nuestras vías de negocio, y la defensa de la salud y el bienestar, fomentando los hábitos de vida saludables. En estos últimos, destaca el apoyo a diferentes equipos deportivos de primera línea de Aragón, nuestra tierra, acción que también forma parte de nuestro compromiso con el territorio.

Name: ecostore
Description:
Malcolm and Melanie Rands founded ecostore on New Zealand’s Northland coast in 1993.

Part of a group that created an eco-village nestled in a valley dotted with streams and surrounded by native forest, the Rands set out to make their home as clean and green as the land they called home.
By creating hardworking, highly effective products for people and their home, removing harmful or unnecessary chemicals, the ecostore ethos has always been to put people’s health first and give them the choice to live clean.

From one New Zealand family to another – the Rands passed the baton to the Kraus family in 2013. Now led by Pablo Kraus, our goal is to be the world’s most trusted and sustainable home and body care brand.

Today we continue to proudly develop, manufacture and pack our household cleaners, laundry, body care, skincare, baby care and oral care products at our own carboNZero certified factory in Auckland and share them with the world.

Name: Jamiak Inc.
Description: Product innovation company with a family of Consumer Brands that originate with direct-to-consumer roots. We use proprietary data and analytics to determine strong product marketing fit and validate next step to product innovation.

Name: Jarden Home Brands
Description:
Jarden Home Brands markets leading consumer brands that enhance the quality and convenience of life's everyday events.  

The Ball, Kerr, and Bernardin canning and preserving brands have been trusted by consumers for generations to help preserve their harvest.  

The Diamond brand is the perfect party complement in both style and function, from innovative matches and fire starters, to cutlery, toothpicks and other food and entertaining utensils.  

Pine Mountain and Java-Log  brands of firelogs offer safe, convenient, and eco-friendly alternative to wood.  And our StarterLogg and StarterStick firestarters deliver the ultimate convenience for those preferring a natural cut wood fire.

Located in Fishers, Indiana, Jarden Home Brands is a subsidiary of Jarden Corporation (NYSE: JAH), a leading provider of niche consumer products, with over 20,000 employees worldwide. 

You may not have heard of Jarden Corporation before, but you know our brands - Abu Garcia, Ball, Berkley, Bicycle, Coleman, First Alert, JT, K2, Lehigh, Loew-Cornell, Marmot, Mr. Coffee, Oster, Penn, Pine Mountain, Rawlings, Shakespeare, Stearns, Sunbeam, and Volkl - just to name a few.

Name: Portland Leather Goods
Description: Portland Leather Goods is a start-up company founded in 2015. Since our humble beginnings inside the owner's garage, we have expanded to a stunning, sunlit warehouse in South East Portland. Our team is diverse, funny, smart & and ridiculously talented. Our days are filled with coffee, jokes, great music, shop pups, and of course, custom making leather durables that we have delivered around the world. We sell our handmade, quality leather goods all around the world.

Name: Nicopure Labs
Description:
In July of 2009, Jason Del Giudice, Jeffrey Stamler, and his brother Ken Stamler recognized an immense need in the fledgling electronic cigarette industry. With a great deal of research, passion and ingenuity, they established Nicopure Labs and devised a plan to revolutionize the E-cig industry by producing the purest, most consistent, best tasting E-liquid in the world.

What began as a modest three man operation, family owned and operated Nicopure Labs launched Halo (known as Purity in the UK), specializing in tobacco, menthol, and gourmet flavored E-liquids. Halo quickly grew into one of the most trusted E-liquid brands in the world, being the first to implement tamper resistant seals, best-by-dating, and lot numbers on its bottles. In spite of the rising success of Halo, Nicopure’s commitment to customers never wavered. As the industry evolved, so did the demand for a wider selection of flavors. Nicopure continued to position itself as an industry leader with the creation of the eVo line of E-liquids.

Today, Nicopure continues to evolve and excel at providing the most consistent, quality, and best tasting American-made E-liquids on the market.

Name: Normine Lombard
Description:
Five Reasons to Hire Us
                           (We edited this from a list of two-thousand!)

Whether you are a hiring manager, a HR specialist, or the CEO of a company; you want to be surrounded by the best and the brightest.  You want to make your competition shake in their boots at the thought of going up against you.  Building a team that can change a category is a daunting task and that’s why we are here to assist. 

                                           REASON ONE

The ad you posted resulted in 100 resumes, however, none of them are even close to a fit!

                                           REASON TWO

You are launching a category and you thought, "I wish I could recruit XYZ's sales leader to help me get this off the ground."

                                           REASON THREE
 
You have a need that is so unique that you thought no one in the world could ever do the job. 
 
                                           REASON FOUR

You need to create a team of capable individuals who all share the same passion.

                                           REASON FIVE

The position you've been trying to fill has been open for months and you're starting to feel fatigue.

Name: shift
Description: SHIFT Electronics is one of the fastest growing marketing & distribution companies with a focus on consumer electronics. With over 100 qualified professionals, Shift focuses on pure value-added distribution. Shift has the local and regional experience to deliver an unparalleled level of service, support, logistics and competitive pricing to the marketplace. We service all business sectors including wholesalers, small and medium retailers, value-added resellers, power retailers and corporate resellers. Shift’s rapid expansion and commitment to service excellence has positioned it as the market leader in the region and a favorite source of products.

Name: The Clever Factory Inc.
Description:
The Clever Factory, Inc. began in 2001 with the launch of a trend-setting line of children’s board books and has grown exponentially each year. In 20+ years, The Clever Factory’s offerings have expanded to include all types of design-driven, paper-based products including activities, stationery, gift bags, and educational products. Our products sell in 25,000+ storefronts around the world with distribution in over 12 languages globally. Fresh design, innovative product and creative minds have been the driving force behind our success. 

The Clever Factory, Inc. is headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, with offices in Hong Kong, Shanghai, and Europe. 

Follow us on Instagram! https://www.instagram.com/thecleverfactory/

Name: BBI Filtration Systems
Description: We are a manufacturer company based in the South of Brazil specialized in Carbon Block filter production and in the commercialization of other kind of water filters and spare parts. Our main purpose is with the good quality of our products and with the satisfaction of our costumers that are retailer stores and wholesalers spread for all over our country.

Name: ooia
Description: Wir verstehen uns als Female Empowerment Company und unsere Kernaufgabe sehen wir darin, gesellschaftlichen Wandel für Frauen* herbeizuführen, indem wir Dialoge führen und diese mit unseren innovativen Produkten anstoßen - von Frauen für Frauen*. Die ooshi GmbH wurde Mitte 2018 gegründet. Sie hat zwei Direct-to-Consumer Marken ooia (Periodenunterwäsche & absorbierender Still BH) und Ida's Place (ästhetische, absorbierende Inkontinenzwäsche)

Name: SCHERDEL Group
Description: With approximately 6,500 employees at 35 locations world wide, the SCHERDEL Group is a family-owned, leading company in the field of metal-forming with core competence in the production of engineering springs as well as of vehicle components and components for the medical market.

Name: Hornby Hobbies Ltd
Description: The company’s principal business is the design, development, production and supply of hobby and toy products. The company distributes its product through a network of specialist and multiple retailers throughout the UK and to over 100 countries worldwide. The company markets its products under the following brands – Hornby, Scalextric, Airfix, Humbrol, Corgi, Tri-ang, Rovex, Jouef (France), Lima (Italy), Rivarossi (Europe & USA), Electrotren (Spain), Arnold (Europe), Pocher & Bassett-Lowke.

Name: Kulfi
Description:
Welcome to Kulfi — where beauty is joyful, colorful, and unapologetically you.
Inspired by the vibrancy of South Asian culture, our products are thoughtfully crafted to flatter every skin tone and type.
We believe beauty should feel personal, empowering — never prescriptive. No rules, no gatekeeping — just tools to express every version of yourself.
From your perfect concealer match to a lip combo that’s all your own, we make creativity effortless and fun.
You belong here. This is your invitation to play.

Name: Burdette Beckmann Inc.
Description: Burdette Beckmann Inc. (BBI) is a national sales agency founded in 1955. We prioritize solution-based strategies and nurture lasting connections with our clients. Combining expertise in sales, marketing, and analytics, BBI guarantees meaningful results and productive outcomes for brands of every size and scope.

Name: Farmacias Economicas
Description:
En Farmacias Económicas, somos una familia de más de 800 empleados dedicados a cuidar la salud y el bienestar de los salvadoreños desde 2005. Nuestra misión es ofrecer medicamentos genéricos de calidad y una variedad de servicios que van desde atención en salud hasta el pago de servicios y entrega de remesas, todo en un solo lugar.

Con más de 125 sucursales en todo el país, nos hemos convertido en pioneros en el segmento de farmacias en El Salvador, destacando por la diversificación y accesibilidad de nuestros servicios. Gracias a nuestro equipo comprometido y apasionado, seguimos innovando y creciendo para servir mejor a nuestra comunidad.

 #SaludParaTodos #InnovaciónEnSalud #FarmaciasEconómicas #ElSalvador

Name: Optimize Engineering Core PVT. LTD.
Description:
Optimize Engineering Group (CEO, Adil Tariq) has concluded an agreement to establish a joint venture in Pakistan with Chinese Refrigerator and its component maker, Ningbo Top Cool Star (Chairman Jia Xiangsheng) The new company, OPTIMIZE ENGINEERING CORE (PRIVATE) LIMITED is the first JV with a Chinese manufacturer of Refrigerator parts production base in Pakistan.

Top-Cool Star as home appliances manufacturing Company, joined by two famous company, Coolstar International Group Co. Ltd &
Hangzhou Tiptop Equipment Technology Co. Ltd, both with a good
reputation in the home appliance area. A platform of One-step all covered fully solution for Home appliance industries to those who had or want to have new home appliance industries all over the
world.

Many successful projects all over the world.

Top-Cool, Your trusted Co-operator The group has 12 affiliated companies in 8 countries.

Name: Bounty Agro Ventures Inc.
Description:
Bounty Agro Ventures, Inc. (BAVI) is the Philippines’ largest rotisserie chicken company. It is also part of the country’s second-largest poultry integrator.

Its brands include Chooks-to-Go, Uling Roasters, Bounty Fresh, Adobo Connection, and HeiHei.

Through its pioneering Zero Antibiotics Chicken program, BAVI leads the local poultry industry in antibiotic stewardship in pursuit of a healthier Philippines.

Name: Crocs Vietnam
Description:
Our Vietnam office plays a critical role in the Crocs global network, supporting regional operations with a strong focus on sourcing, production, and supply chain excellence. Located in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City, this office is home to a dedicated team that helps ensure our signature comfort and quality reach millions of consumers around the world.

Working closely with global and regional partners, the Vietnam team drives efficiency, innovation, and sustainability across our product journey—from concept to consumer. The office reflects Crocs' values-driven culture, with a collaborative environment that blends local expertise and global standards.

At Crocs Vietnam, we live our “Come As You Are” mindset every day—supporting our people, strengthening our processes, and fueling the success of one of the world’s most iconic footwear brands.
Location: Floor 21st, Saigon Centre Tower 2, No. 67, Le Loi Street, Ben Nghe Ward, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City., Vietnam

Name: King Technology, Inc.
Description:
King Technology is the maker of FROG products. We create and deliver products that make life easier for people - products no one else in the pool and hot tub industry offers - and we never quit creating. 
 
Our goal is to enrich lives daily, and it starts here at our headquarters. At King Technology, you'll find inspiration and encouragement at every level - and it ripples out to our vendors, suppliers, distributors, dealers and consumers. 
 
Want to be part of an innovative company, surrounded by supportive peers and inspiring leaders? You'll find that here. You'll find a place to bring your talents, skills, and your future.

Name: Papyrus
Description:
Express Beautifully with greeting cards, boxed notes, gift packaging, and entertaining products from Papyrus. 

Papyrus began in 1950 as a small, family-run business, importing unique fine paper products from Europe. Throughout the decades Papyrus has continually evolved in design, voice, and aesthetic, while remaining true to our passion for fine craftsmanship and artistry.

Over the course of our rich history we have partnered with artists from around the globe while consistently raising the standard for design and handwork in the social expression industry.

Our dedication to fine craftsmanship is evident in all we create, with an emphasis on individually curated and handmade products. Today, our attention to high quality and the finest details remains unparalleled as we strive to inspire our customers to express beautifully and to connect with each other by celebrating the joy of everyday.

Papyrus is part of the American Greetings corporation who is a global leader in the large and enduring Celebrations marketplace.

Name: Sancal
Description:
Sancal is a family company born under the heat of the Mediterranean. With deep local roots, it is celebrating its 50th anniversary as an international company. 

"Mediterranean culture has made us what we are: a passionate, open and joyful company; energetic, hard-working and creative; family oriented and a friend of its friends; humble and responsible; fun, affectionate and friendly".

Sancal turns 50. Half a century is enough for many stories of overcoming... The most remarkable one is how a small upholstery workshop, in the middle of an almond tree field, has become a benchmark of contemporary design with a wide international projection.

It all began in the 1970s. A historical moment that brought great changes not only political, but also social and cultural, culminating with the establishment of democracy in a Spain eager for modernity, and also a time of entrepreneurial effervescence. At the beginning of this decade, the founder and president of the company, Santiago Castaño, began to produce Marie Antoinette style armchairs. 

However, on his first trips to Milan, he discovered other ways of understanding upholstered furniture, functional and flexible designs that would fit into any home. With Santiago as Sancal's exclusive designer, the company specialised in modular upholstery, using an ingenious set of independent modules through which it was possible to make an infinite number of compositions, revolutionising domestic spaces with modular systems. 

Despite all our achievements, we have the impression that everything has yet to be done.

Name: Richlife Dairies Limited
Description: Richlife Dairies Limited is a consumer goods company based out of  Pirivena Road, Wadduwa, WP, Sri Lanka.

Name: The Lumistella Company
Description:
The Lumistella Company is a family-owned global IP company where the magic of Christmas thrives year-round. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, we are home to The Elf on the Shelf Santaverse, the official source for stories from the enchanted world of Santa Claus. 

Our portfolio includes The Elf on the Shelf, Elf Pets, Elf Mates, Noorah, SnoBiggie, and more—beloved brands embraced worldwide for holiday and year-round joy. Through consumer products, brand experiences, publishing, entertainment content and our production arm, Scout Elf Productions, we bring Santa’s North Pole to life for families everywhere. 

We partner with leading studios, agencies, publishers, licensees, and entertainment companies to expand the reach of our magical universe. Guided by our core values, Family Focus, Integrity, Respect and Excellence (F.I.R.E.), we foster a creative, fast-paced culture where innovation and storytelling flourish. 

Join us as we continue to share new expressions of Santa’s timeless traditions and deliver joyful experiences that inspire believers of all ages.

Name: Bartesian
Description:
Premium Cocktails on Demand

Bartesian is your countertop mixologist. Simply insert a capsule, select the strength, and enjoy a premium cocktail in seconds.

Name: LifeProof
Description:
LifeProof began with the ready for anything WaterProof, DropProof, DirtProof, SnowProof case — FRĒ. Taking protection beyond the basics, we’ve been pushing the possibilities ever since. Designing, creating and living a balanced, sustainable life is how our future unfolds. NËXT and SEE cases keep pace with our busy back-and-forth lives, while WĀKE redefines the way forward. Built from 85% ocean-based plastic, it saves your phone and our planet. Our new Wearables collection for Apple Watch and AirPods is on a similar mission, bringing together protection, style and eco-conscious materials for a new era in the making.  

LifeProof is a brand within Otter Products, LLC. Our team is growing quickly. As new career positions emerge, it is critical that we continue to hire outstanding employee talent to support our global growth. If you are looking for a fast-paced environment with an amazing culture that values the individual, but supports the team, check out our career opportunities. We have fun, work hard and celebrate our successes. 

Visit our career site directly at www.otterproducts.com/careers or our Otter Products LinkedIn page to learn more about our culture and career opportunities.

Name: GM Group Of Companies
Description:
The roots of GM Group of Companies date back to 1958, when Late Mr. G. Mallikarjunappa, Honourable Member of Parliament, Davangere, Karnataka, India laid the foundation of the Group. Started around 50 years back in Chitradurga district in Karnataka, India the group has since diversified into a wide variety of business areas.

GM Group is one of the most respected and renowned business houses of South India. The foundation of GM Group was laid in Bheemasamudra, Chitradurga district with G. Mallikarjunappa & Sons trading in Betel nut. The Group has now ventured into diversified businesses with major focus on sugar, mining, education, power generation, agro industries, finance, hospitality and retail.

Social service has always been at the core of GM Group’s vision. The Group has actively taken care of the social and economic growth of the community in the region. The focus spans around the over-all development of the society.

G. Mallikarjunappa, as a Member of Parliament, contributed to support and improve the social and economic conditions of people in the rural areas. During his tenure the district grew exponentially, one of his biggest contributions was setting up of small scale industries across villages and potential areas which not only reduced unemployment but changed the socio-economic scenario of the region as well.

Name: PALAMIDIS SA
Description:
Palamidis SA is a diversified privately held manufacturing company operating in two dynamic industries:
Traditionally the company has been a leader in the Kitchenware industry in Greece producing its own brand and distributing high quality articles through partnerships with all major supermarket chains and specialty stores. 
The company has expanded into the food packaging industry where significant investments in the past 10 years have enabled it to become one of the fastest growing companies in this industry in Europe. The packaging division now exports to more the 26 countries on an ongoing basis.
 The management is headquartered in Kifisia, Athens, Greece.

ISO 9001:2015 & BRC IOP V5 Certified

Name: La Maison Française du Verre
Description:
La Maison Française du Verre est le fabricant de la marque Pyrex. 
Le Groupe emploie 500 personnes dans le monde entre ses bureaux à Vincennes, en Europe et au Moyen-Orient, et son usine de production, à Châteauroux. 

Créée en 1915, Pyrex est connue pour son verre borosilicate ultra-résistant à la chaleur. Pyrex place les produits au cœur des préoccupations et des usages du consommateur – préparer, cuire, conserver, servir et emporter.  
 
La priorité du Groupe est de développer des produits sains et durables, dans une logique vertueuse pour l’environnement et ses consommateurs, de la cuisine à la table.

La Maison Française du Verre is the manufacturer of Pyrex, world-famous brand of cooking utensils, in glass. 
The Group employs 500 collaborators in the world, in its offices in Vincennes, in Europe and in Middle East, and in its glass production factory, in Châteauroux. 

Created in 1915, Pyrex is known for its borosilicate glass,  ultra resistant to heat. Pyrex puts the products in the heart of the concerns and uses of the consumer – to prep, cook, store, serve and take away.  

The  priority of the Group is to develop healthy and durable products, in a virtuous logic for the environment and its consumers, from kitchen to table.

More information on www.pyrex.eu

Name: Prestone Official
Description:
Prestone provides trusted and innovative solutions to deliver worry-free vehicle performance. 

For 80 years, the Prestone name has provided customers the highest quality products, including the leading brand of antifreeze/coolant. Prestone antifreeze has protected cooling systems through seven decades of evolving engine operations and cooling system demands.

Name: Shanshal Chocolate
Description: Shanshal is an artisan’s touch, crafted with passion and pride in a facility that is the envy of the industry. Our team is made of highly experienced individuals, including master chefs who work tirelessly on preserving the quality of our ingredients and recipes, while innovating on new pieces. Our range of truffles, pralines and confectionaries are in demand at major retail outlets, hotels and venues across Lebanon and abroad. Come taste the perfection that is Shanshal!

Name: Cerebos
Description:
At Cerebos, we are passionate about connecting people through great Food and Coffee! 
Our products have been part of consumers’ lives in Australia and New Zealand for generations. 

In Australia our market leading brands are Gravox, Fountain, Saxa Salt, Asian Home Gourmet, Toby’s Estate and Mocopan. In New Zealand, our leading food and coffee brands are; Gregg’s, Robert Harris, Atomic, Bisto and Caffe L'affare. Our parent company, Cerebos Pacific Limited is fully owned by the Japanese based Suntory Limited. 

We employ 800 plus people across Australia and New Zealand.

Our corporate values are Play to Win, Fly in Formation, Think Differently and Own It. Through these values we foster a high performance culture and a collaborative environment where employees are offered challenging work along with exceptional career development opportunities. 

Additionally, we offer our employees the chance to participate in a range of health and wellbeing programs and actively encourage employees participation in our charity and community programs to help manage the demands of their busy modern lives. 

If Cerebos sounds like the kind of company you are interested in please sign up to follow us to stay informed of our business and career opportunities.

Name: Mago
Description: A Mago está há 38 anos no mercado, oferecendo a mais completa linha de confeitaria e artesanato no Brasil. Buscamos novidades, praticidade, custo benefício e principalmente a qualidade em todos os nossos produtos.

Name: Weber Canada
Description:
At Weber, grilling is a passion that’s reflected in everything we do. Our goal is to share this passion and spark inspiration with the people who matter most – our grilling community. Weber has been the world’s premiere manufacturer of charcoal and gas grills and accessories since 1952. 

In September 2014, the company opened its Canadian subsidiary Weber-Stephen Canada Co. and Weber Grill Academy in Vaughan, Ontario to expand its presence in a growing Canadian retail grilling business and to strengthen existing retail and consumer relationships.  

Weber believes that ensuring diversity is not only fundamental to its future growth and progress, but is an integral part of all its business activities worldwide. If you have the desire to work for a company that is recognized for exceptional quality products and high customer satisfaction, employment with Weber may be right for you. 

Weber brings you Canada's first Grill Academy, a custom-designed learning facility dedicated to the art and skill of grilling. For more information please visit www.webergrillacademy.ca

Name: Honest Paws
Description: Honest Paws sets the standard for premium CBD, offering products with unmatched quality. Our organic, non-GMO, and soy-free CBD undergo rigorous third-party lab testing to ensure excellence. Choose from our selection of CBD products tailored to meet your pet's specific needs. Experience the genuine impact of Honest Paws – where quality care meets simplicity.

Name: Carbonwave
Description:
Founded in January 2020, Carbonwave (previously C-Combinator) is the world's leading developer of ultra-regenerative, plant-based, advanced biomaterials from seaweed. It transforms Sargassum seaweed, a resource long considered waste and that doesn’t need land or other typical aids to grow, into biomaterials which replace derivatives from oil and other harmful industry inputs. Carbonwave is part of a new wave of companies that are building the next-generation economies that will heal the planet through materials that regeneratively sourced from our oceans.
 
Carbonwave is focused on collecting, processing and growing seaweed profitably at scale. We are marketing seaweed extracts to the agricultural industry as organic fertilizers and biostimulants; plant-based (vegan) leathers for fashion and interiors; and broad-spectrum emulsifiers with a wide range of applications across cosmetics and skin-care products.

Name: Pakshoo Industrial Group
Description:
Pakshoo Manufacturing & Chemical Co. (Private Joint Stock) was founded in 1972 with mental and material investments of Mr. Mohammad Karim Fazli as well as permanent attempts of him and a number of Iranian engineers and specialists. Having applied the state-of-the-art know how, and enjoyed the endeavors of its specialist and hardworking associates,  Pakshoo Co. is considered as the pioneer and creative company in the area of detergents industry, and can be named as one of 

the greatest and most credible companies of Iranian private sector in the area of detergents, cosmetics and toiletries. Products of this company, under such brands of Golrang, Ave, Softlan, Homeplus, Spif, Airi, Atra, Goldent and Merident are of a special standing in the Iranian market and from the viewpoint of Iranian users, and have developed to the markets of other countries as well. 

From among the products of the early years of establishment, hand washing liquid, whitening liquid, towel and clothes softening liquid, glass cleanser, stain remover and carpet shampoo can be referred to. During the next years, types of shampoo, hand washing liquid, toothpaste and hair conditioner in various colors and packages were added through hard attempts. 

Pakshoo defines the quality of products as equal to satisfaction of user, and knows it as its key for success.

Name: Beybi A.Ş.
Description:
Founded in 1949, Beybi serves its customers with a wide range of products such as household gloves, work and industry gloves, medical and surgical gloves, medical disposables and personal protective equipments.
Internalizing "continuous improvement" and "sustainable development" as its founding pillars, Beybi is a CE certified company that meets the international quality standards such as ISO13485:2003 and ISO 9001:2000 with a view to fulfilling diverse needs of its customers. 
Excellent service quality and customer satisfaction lie beneath our success story and all of us at Beybi are committed to matching your entire needs now and in the future.

Name: Droguería Proconsumo
Description:
En Droguería Proconsumo tenemos más de 60 años de estar atendiendo el mercado hondureño, nos dedicamos a la distribución, comercialización y mercadeo de productos farmacéuticos y de consumo masivo. 

Actualmente le damos servicio a más de 130 laboratorio y casas productoras en el territorio hondureño.  Representando laboratorios como Astra Zeneca, Pfizer, Grunenthal & Sanofi entre otros. Entre las casa de consumo más destacadas se encuentran Procter & Gamble, SC Johnson, Kellogg's, Abbott Nutricional, Beiersdorf, Genomma Lab y Revlon. 

Son nuestros clientes los proveedores que nos permiten representarlos en el país y los comercios a través de los cuales llegamos al consumidor final.  

Consideramos nuestra razón de ser entender y asimilar las expectativas y estrategia de posicionamiento del cliente, implementar los procesos y desarrollar las relaciones para transformarla en una realidad práctica, mientras generamos retro-alimentación relevante para el ajuste de la estrategia, en un marco de crecimiento y rentabilidad.

Nos comprometemos a mantenernos informados y adoptar prácticas tomando como referencia a los mejores ejecutores de la industria, asegurando siempre mantener una ejecución consistente, gestionando los riesgos en conjunto con nuestros proveedores y clientes.

Formamos parte de Centroamerican Consulting and Capital (CCC), una empresa holding con intereses en farmacia, distribución de artículos de consumo masivo, construcción, agricultura y educación. La inversión más grande es una farmacia de descuento con presencia en Centroamérica (con excepción de Belize) y República Dominicana. Los ingresos conjuntos el grupo exceden los 500M$ y contamos con más de 2,500 colaboradores en la región.

Name: Publisher Services, Inc
Description: At PSi, we are passionate about driving growth for our brand and retail partners through exceptional service, deep category expertise, and a relentless focus on insights. We have over 25 years of proven results, connecting brands with retailers and consumers worldwide, delivering tailored solutions that meet the ever-changing needs of the marketplace. Our commitment to innovation, collaboration, and excellence ensures that we consistently exceed expectations, creating value and opportunities for our partners at every stage.

Name: Sebamed India
Description: Sebamed is among one of the fastest growing FMCG brands in India. Sebamed range of Personal care (Skin,Hair) and Baby care products are considered to be gold standards in quality and have a unique advantage of pH 5.5.  It's among world's leading skin & hair care brands with presence in more than 85 countries.

Name: American Standard APAC
Description:
For 150 years, we’ve made it our mission to enable you to help customers create a living/working place to love every day. 

We’ve designed better bathrooms and kitchens around the world, innovating in a way that’s inviting and intuitive.

With a relentless focus on making life simpler, we design toilets, faucets, showers, bathtubs, and more that fit seamlessly into routines. They’re easy to use and built to last. 

From houses to hotels, master baths to kitchen sinks, colleges to stadiums, people around the world depend on what we make. So, we don’t take our job lightly.

We bring mindfulness to our work and our world from the materials we use to the harmful ones we don’t. Through conserving water, reducing waste, and lowering costs, we help both the planet and the people on it. 

American Standard is owned by LIXIL (TSE Code 5938), maker of pioneering water and housing products that solve everyday, real-life challenges, making better homes a reality for everyone, everywhere. 

Learn more at: https://www.americanstandard-apac.com/

Name: Brewster Home Fashions
Description:
Creating beautiful wallpapers and home décor products is our passion! Brewster Home Fashions is the most fashion forward resource for home décor, encompassing the ultimate breadth of appealing design. This 5th generation family business has achieved global recognition as an industry leader in home decor. With sophisticated designers, and offices on three continents, we are renowned for producing fresh and original decor for worldwide distribution to both residential and commercial markets. We travel the globe interpreting design and color trends in order to bring products to the marketplace that are innovative and inspiring, from eco-chic grasscloth wallcovering, to boutique styled beauties, traditional looks, and modern designs.

Brewster Home Fashions originated in 1935 as a US regional distributor of wallpaper. The company has flourished into a worldwide resource for wallpapers and home décor products, and one of the largest producers and distributors of wallcovering today. Innovation, superior quality products, technology, and on-trend designs are key to our success. With roots in the home decor industry for over 120 years, you can trust Brewster Home Fashions exquisite quality and wisdom.

Name: PlanToys
Description:
PlanToys is proving that it is possible to maintain superior quality and safety standards in addition to following a path of environmental and social responsibility. We are committed to maintaining the highest standard of ethics while creating innovative educational toys for every developmental stage of childhood. These toys inspire children's imagination as well as promoting their physical and intellectual development. PlanToys are made from non-toxic, natural materials such as organic rubberwood. Our toys enable children to play, learn and become closer to nature. 

Green - As a Green company, we strive to use environmentally safe, responsible and sustainable methods to produce our Green Toys. We are committed to minimizing our impact on the environment. 

Safe - In addition to industry standards, PlanToys follows their own stringent in-house safety standards to ensure a worry-free playtime for your children. 

Smart - The educational merits of our toys are recognized by some of the most prestigious awards in our industry such as the Parents' Choice Award and the Oppenheim Toy Portfolio Award.

Name: Flamagas
Description:
Flamagas, founded in Barcelona in 1959, demonstrates a powerful and dynamic business performance not only in the industrial area but also in the commercial field with presence in stationery, electronics and cigarette lighters. 

Flamagas is part of the Exea Corporation, a major group founded in 1914 that joins different business areas, mainly devoted to cosmetics, fashion, perfume, and dermopharmacy products.

Name: Incall S.p.A.
Description:
Incall S.p.A., thanks to the experience and professionalism acquired since 1978, is today among the leading stationery companies in the service of large retailers.

The functional periodicity of deliveries, the analysis of the proposed assortment and promotional operations and assistance at the point of sale, are the basis of our offer. Our product is not only the goods, that the G.D. knows how to find the best, but also the guarantee of an economically profitable result of the store section,  by eliminating any problem related to space management.
Incall S.p.A. is also present in the market since 2001 with its own brand Mitama.
An innovative brand with an explosive success, Mitama was created to meet the needs of modern distribution channels: genetically endowed with all the qualities necessary to win over the customers of large-scale distribution and the best stationery stores.
 Absolute quality products with cutting-edge design created in the Mitama Lab, a 100% Italian research and development center. With Mitama the consumer will always have the precise feeling of owning the right product. Mitama ranges from stationery to office storage, from paper goods  to school backpacks and accessories, combining design and functionality in an absolutely contemporary project.

Name: Gentle Supreme Sdn Bhd
Description: Gentle Supreme is an importer and sole distributor of superior household, personal care and food products. Gentle Supreme mainly carries established brand, such as Daia powder detergent, Daia Smart Liquid, Daia home cleaning ranges, BOOM powder detergent and Mi Sedaap instant noodles.

Name: The Hand Factory
Description:
The Hand Factory is the global marketplace for unique and creative goods. It is home to the heavens of extra special & remarkable products,  from unique handcrafted pieces to vintage treasures. Both in retail and bulk selling directly from product makers to our precious customers. 
In a time of increasing automation, it’s our mission to keep human connection at the heart of commerce. That’s why we built a place where creativity lives and thrives because it’s powered by people. We help our community of sellers turn their ideas into successful businesses. Our platform connects them with tons of buyers looking for an alternative - something special with a human creative touch & love, for those moments in life that deserve imagination.
As a company, we strive to lead with our guiding principles and to help spread ideas of sustainability and responsibility whose impact can reach far beyond our own business.
 
"THE WORLD OF HANDICRAFTS - EXPERIENCE THE CREATIVITY! "

Name: ALHASAWI GROUP
Description:
Alhasawi Group of Companies established in 1962 is one of the leading industries  in Kuwait  specialized in  Air-conditioning and Refrigeration Equipment.  It all started by supplying spare parts and carrying out maintenance on all kinds of air-conditioning and refrigeration equipment and expanded into manufacturing all cooling and refrigerator goods. Since then Alhasawi has been a leader in the development of Refrigeration and Air-conditioning industry in Kuwait. The State-of-the-art technical solutions blended with superb quality of products and services have made Alhasawi now one of the renowned and reputed leading manufacturers and installers and service provides of 

•Air-Condition

•Refrigerators 

•Water Cooler

•Water Heater,

•Cold Storages & Walk-In Refrigerators 

•Transport Refrigeration system

•Refrigerated Display Cabinets 

•Telecommunication Shelters

•Sandwich Panels

•A/C & Refrigeration Maintenance

Alhasawi manufactures mini-split A/C units,under original equipment manufacturer (OEM) Alhasawi brands with capacities vary from 7000 BTU to 48000 BTU. The company is proud for the recognition that receives for its products. The company holds ISO 9001 and ISO 9002 certifications and also holds the Kuwait Ministry of Electricity and Water (MEW) approval for load and power consumption for all its products, which are certified by Underwriters Laboratory (UL) of the US and CE of Europe.
 
Alhasawi Group has already proven it’s indispensable presence among people of all walks of life with fabulous service of two American based Stores - ACE Hardware and SEARS.

Name: Novi Footwear
Description:
OUR COMPANY

Established in 1986, our company currently employs over 360 employees of many different nationalities. Our strengths lie in our dedicated footwear sourcing teams, our specialised quality assurance, our systematic management of material sourcing, chemical and social compliance and our expertise in costing, logistics and supply chain related issues.

We are a member of the Wortmann Group of companies (www.wortmann.com)

SOURCING NETWORK

Our business model is driven by market demand, we are specialised in ladies, men’s and children’s footwear.

PROMOTION NETWORK

In addition to business activities undertaken in the Far East, we have sales promotion network in:
* France (Pornichet)
* Italy (Milan)
* United Kingdom (Leicester)

OPERATIONAL OFFICES

Apart from HQ office located in Hong Kong, we also have offices in China (Dongguan) and in Vietnam for almost two decades to manage our supply chain efficiently and to bring the insights between sourcing and production together. Furthermore, part of our current business is carried out in Bangladesh, Cambodia, Indonesia, Myanmar and Pakistan.

Name: Sterilite Corporation
Description:
The Sterilite Story

Who We Are
For more than 85 years, Sterilite products have helped make everyday life a little easier and a lot more organized.

You may be surprised by how many of our products are at work in your home today. It may be one of our Heavy Duty Tote Boxes in the backyard full of outdoor toys for the kids; a few of our ClearView Storage Drawers stacked up in the nursery next to the changing table; or maybe it's one of our rugged Ultra Laundry Baskets packed with towels, toys, sunscreen, and a radio for a day at the beach.

We are the largest plastic housewares company in North America. Sterilite's broad line features some of the most innovative and distinctive products available on the market today. From food storage containers and laundry / utility products to home storage and organization products in every shape, size and color; Sterilite helps you "keep it together" like no other.

Sterilite History
Sterilite Corporation was founded in 1939 as a partnership between Saul and Edward Stone and Earl Tupper. Before that time, the Stone brothers were engaged in the manufacturing of wooden heels for women's shoes. They formed the partnership to produce heels by the infant process of injection molding. The partnership was short-lived, however, because the plastic available then was not sufficiently heat resistant to withstand weight and stress in hot weather.

Luca and Massimiliano Dovo, the third generation of the family, are leading the company, chasing the next balance of tradition, quality, progress and innovation.
This pursuit is driven by a steady research of the most perfect recipes, the purest raw materials and investing in ethics, new technology and - ultimately - product
quality.
"We are craftsmen by tradition: we endeavor to keep our people true to the company’s heritage. This is why our production plant, despite its important delivery capability and automation, is fully manned by specialized artisans" Luca Dovo says.
"We are committed to CLEAN LABEL (no chemical additives, colorants, artificial flavouring, hydrogenated fats nor GMOs)" Massimiliano Dovo, the company's COO says. "When we say CLEAN LABEL we mean a simple thing: every ingredient that make its way into our products must be 100% natural. Our company mission is to provide our customers with the most natural, clean and short label, along with the pureness of the ingredients".

We meet the highest industry standards in food

Matt is het perfecte aanpasbare matras voor de beste prijs. Omdat wij overtuigd zijn van de kwaliteit van Matt lenen we hem 120 dagen vrijblijvend aan je uit. Als je niet voor honderd procent tevreden bent, laat ons dit dan weten. We halen Matt kosteloos weer op en je krijgt het volledige aankoopbedrag terug.

Als Matt teruggestuurd wordt, krijgt hij een peptalk. We herstellen zijn zelfvertrouwen en rekenen op zijn veerkracht. Daarna zoeken we een nieuwe eigenaar voor hem. Dat zijn mensen voor wie het niet vanzelfsprekend is om op een goed matras te slapen en die onze hulp goed kunnen gebruiken.

Name: Ladgroup Limited
Description:
Ladgroup limited is a model company in the Agro allied sector in Nigeria, dedicated to marketing and processing of Agro commodities. 

The company started business in 1972 by exporting agricultural produce, namely Ginger, Sheanuts, Coffee and Gum Arabic. Ladgroup became highly successful in exports and was the largest exporter of Sheanuts and Cocoa in the 70’s and 80’s, winning two major awards from the Nigerian Export Import Bank (NEXIM) namely “Best Exporter of the Year” and “Best Cocoa Exporter”.

Ladgroup has built a state of the art Sheanut Processing Factory in Ikenne, Ogun State to process Sheanuts into Shea butter. The factory is pioneer and the first of its kind in Nigeria for large scale processing of Sheanuts. The factory contributes significantly to the economy through its contribution to non-oil export earnings of the country and direct and indirect employment generation which impacts to a large extent the rural economy where numerous people are engaged in the trade.  The factory commenced operations early 2018, with an intake capacity of processing 39,000 metric tons per annum of Sheanuts. The factory consists of an Oil Mill, Solvent Extraction Plant, and a Pelleting Plant and is designed to crush other Oil Seeds like Palm Kernel, Groundnut and Soya Beans.

The company’s 47-year experience has been motivated by a pioneering spirit, coupled with a demand for excellence, integrity, and an uncompromising insistence on quality. Ladgroup’s name is respected nationally and internationally as a supplier of repute. This respect is hard won, and Ladgroup has built and maintained its most enviable reputation over many years.

Name: Cell Path Services
Description:
Cell Path Services is a well-established company with over 20 years of experience in providing medical consumables to the histology, cellular pathology, and cytology markets in South Africa and neighboring African countries. We proudly serve both the private and government sectors across the region.

We actively support local industries by offering a diverse range of locally produced products alongside imported specialized laboratory instruments. As the exclusive distributor for Cancer Diagnostics, Myr, Dakewe and pfm medical in South Africa, we ensure access to high-quality, cutting-edge solutions.

As members of SALDA (Southern African Laboratory Diagnostics Association), we adhere to the highest standards and are accredited with ISO 13485:2016 certifications.

For all your histology, cytology, and cellular pathology laboratory needs, trust us to provide a complete, cost-effective laboratory solution. Whether you’re setting up a new lab or need to maintain stock of essential consumables, we’ve got you covered.

Name: Misters
Description:
We are a men's confidence company. 
'Why does men's confidence need a company?', you may ask, and it would be a fine question. And if you asked it in the specific, 'there's too much men's confidence going around anyway', rather than in the generic, existential sense, well, more power to you. 
Anyway, we reckon that there's a lot of compensation and overcompensation for the lack of confidence that's going around. And that's getting us all down. 
Think about it. More than 50% men face ED at some stage or the other. All of us have close male friends, and yet, have any of them ever talked you about it? Unlikely. That's where we come in. 
An easy place for men to understand the story behind their sexual health questions, or other such, and an easy place to get scientifically up there products discreetly delivered to their doorstep. And it all starts with the website, www.misters.in

Name: Elmer's Products, Inc.
Description: Headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, has been a trusted brand and industry leader for more than 65 years. Elmer’s produces a variety of well-known adhesives, arts and crafts, educational and office products for use at home, school or business. Elmer’s branded products are developed to provide project solutions and to inspire people to create, build and learn for life.  Elmer’s also markets the number one instant adhesive in the U.S., Instant Krazy Glue, and X-ACTO, a leader in innovative cutting blades, knives and office supply products.

Name: Croft Architectural Hardware
Description:
Croft is a leading British manufacturer of the finest architectural hardware with a long and distinguished family heritage. Our founder's grandfather first started manufacturing architectural hardware in 1868. Five generations later, we're still based in Willenhall in the West Midlands, the historic heart of the British lock and hardware industry and are now celebrating 150 years of family manufacturing history, 1868 - 2018.

Over the course of almost 50 years, we have produced some of the most desirable door and window fittings available, all of which are made by hand by our highly experienced workforce. 

We combine traditional skills with modern manufacturing techniques and our ability to design and manufacture products to the very highest standards, means that we have acquired an unrivalled reputation for excellence. 

Every item is individually quality checked at the end of our authentic manufacturing process - it doesn't leave our factory until we're totally happy with it. 

Our craftsmen and engineers produce beautiful, quality fittings, built to stand the test of time. Our standard range includes over 1000 products, available in 27 different finishes and we hold a significant amount of our products in stock. 

Croft also manufactures a high volume of specialist bespoke items and have furnished many buildings of importance, such as royal palaces, government houses, historic castles and stately homes. We also supply to theatres, museums, hotels and private residences.

Name: Dexas International Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1969, Dexas International Ltd. designs, manufactures and markets cutting boards, kitchen tools and specialty gadgets that stimulate culinary creativity and healthier eating at home. The company also designs and manufactures a line of school and office products that are primarily made in the USA, along with a popular, collapsible pet travel and grooming gadgets line.  Dexas is proud to be a member of the GO TEXAN program through the Texas Department of Agriculture.

The Dexas product lines are available internationally, online and in retail stores throughout North America.

Dexas. The One. The Only. The Original.

Name: The Honest Home Co.

Since The Army Painter was founded in 2007, we have grown to be the largest independent manufacturer of paints and other hobby accessories for wargaming, board games, etc. in the world. Among other things, we have created licensed products for the likes of Disney and Star Wars, Dungeons & Dragons, The Walking Dead, etc.

We are strongly represented internationally with an export of 99% for no less than 56 countries. Sales are made both B2B by way of distributors, and B2C by way of Amazon and our own webshop.
