Name: Cincy Brands 3PL
Description:
Cincy Brands acquires and accelerates better-for-you consumer goods brands, and we deliver exceptional eCommerce services to clients. We are an innovative, agile, and modern-day consumer packaged goods company.  

Our foundation is deeply rooted in the expertise of former Procter & Gamble professionals and seasoned eCommerce agency leaders. This blend of traditional consumer goods experience and a digital-first strategy positions us uniquely in the market. Our focus on data, operations, automation, and cutting-edge technology enables us to get our brands and our client's brands into the hands of more consumers.  

Acquisition Focus:   

We identify and nurture high-potential brands with annual revenues ranging from $2MM to $10MM. These brands exhibit positive margins and have shown consumer demand across at least two of three channels: traditional retail, direct-to-consumer, or eCommerce marketplaces. At Cincy Brands, fair valuations and responsible brand stewardship are at the core of our acquisition strategy.  

World-Class eCommerce Services:  

Cincy Brands 3PL Services: Our expertise in direct-to-consumer fulfillment and Amazon FBA Prep sets us apart, offering high-quality and competitively priced third-party logistics services tailored to eCommerce brands.  

Exclusive Amazon Reseller Services: Vitabox, our portfolio company, is a top-tier Amazon reseller. Collaborating with both independent brands and Fortune 500 CPG companies, we write brands a PO and then handle all the intricacies of selling on platforms like Amazon and Walmart.com.  

We treat all of our service clients with the same care as we do our own brands.

Name: RMS USA
Description:
RMS first entered into the USA market in 2008. Opening its doors to our first US head office in Miami Florida. Over the next 8 years RMS grew exponentially in the USA, with its award-winning brand Grafix. Growing from puzzles, into arts and crafts, toys and activity products. Still to this day using its founding philosophy of extreme value for money for both the retailer and end consumer while having trendy, fun and up to date packaging artwork. All products are designed and developed in house by our award winning graphic design team.

The demands of the ever-changing market lead, in 2015, to RMS opening its new office in Boston specifically for Product Development. This office focused on developing new product trends to constantly stay ahead of its competition. In early 2018 RMS consolidated both US offices as one and moved the entire business to new headquarters just north of the city of Boston, led by second generation leadership. Combining offices allowed RMS to connect its sales and operations closely with its design and development teams. Featuring a new 6,000 sqft showroom on the east coast, and 3,000 sqft showroom on the west coast, in Los Angeles. In conjunction with a 25,000 sqft head office complex in a modern collaborative work space. RMS continues its growth plan to become the leader in value toys, crafts and activities in the USA.

Our products are sold worldwide to major retailers such as Costco, Bed, Bath & Beyond, Target, Pottery Barn, Restoration Hardware, Michaels, Pier 1 and independent gift shops. Our team travels around the world to deliver the latest trends and newest home lighting designs ideal for lighting a pathway, accenting a landscape or to simply enhance your deck / patio living space. To see our products please visit www.paradisegardenlighting.com 

Today, we continue to strengthen our position as a leader by researching improved technologies for sustainable lighting. We understand the responsibility of conservation of energy and preservation of our natural resources and therefore focus on more eco-friendly products.

We create high-quality, innovative products—including lashes, nail dashes, skincare, and cosmetics—while providing the tools, resources, and community that empower our brand ambassadors to build their own businesses. As the team behind the brand, we are committed to fostering their success through innovation, education, and unwavering support. Proudly female-founded, we are guided by our core values—curious, courageous, fulfilled, and playful—cultivating an environment where creativity thrives, challenges are embraced, and success is shared.

Name: EQUA

We’re turning the world upside down, one hydrated hottie at a time!

my friend!

At TOSSWARE, we proudly unite sustainability, quality, and affordability in crafting exceptional drinkware collections. Our innovative approach goes beyond the shatterproof design, patented interlocking stackability, and rounded-edge lip that define our renowned POP collection. 

Now, with our compostable NATURAL collection and dishwasher-safe RESERVE collection, we continue to lead the way in elevating the upscale disposable market. TOSSWARE is committed to offering eco-friendly solutions without compromising on performance. The NATURAL collection, crafted with compostable materials, reflects our dedication to reducing environmental impact. Simultaneously, the RESERVE collection, made dishwasher-safe for your convenience, ensures long-lasting durability and style. 

Whether gracing stadiums, festivals, vineyards, or venues, TOSSWARE has become the go-to choice across North America for those seeking class without the risk or expense of traditional glassware.

Name: APPLiA Polska, związek producentów AGD i HVAC
Description:
APPLiA Polska jest związkiem pracodawców z branży AGD i HVAC. Nasi członkowie to większość producentów i importerów AGD w Polsce:
Amica, Ariston, Atlantic, Beko, Biazet, BSH, Candy/Haier, Ciarko, Daikin, De’Longhi, Dyson, Electrolux, Elica, Fore, Franke, Gorenje/Hisense, Jura, Kärcher, Liebherr, Miele, MPM, P&G, Panasonic, Philips, SEB Group, Samsung, Sharp, S

Przemysł produkuje około  30 mln szt. urządzeń AGD rocznie oraz zatrudnia ponad 30 tys. osób. Wartość produkcji wynosi ponad 27 mld zł (2022).

Reprezentujemy naszych członków z kwestiach związanych m.in. z ochroną środowiska (elektroodpady, niebezpieczne substancje w sprzęcie), efektywnością energetyczną (etykiety energetyczne), normami technicznymi (PKN), bezpieczeństwem produktów, prawami konsumenta, obsługą serwisową, szkolnictwa zawodowego, czy prawa pracy.
APPLiA Polska prowadzi także centrum analiz branży AGD, dostarczając regularnie informacji o rynku AGD.

Jesteśmy organizacją non-profit, której statutowymi celami są:
1.reprezentowanie interesów pracodawców - producentów sprzętu AGD, członków APPLiA Polska wobec organów państwa oraz administracji publicznej,
2.koordynacja, w obszarach technicznych, uczestnictwa polskich producentów AGD w międzynarodowych, europejskich i krajowych organach normalizacyjnych,
3.prowadzenie studiów i innego rodzaju badań,
4.gromadzenie danych i statystyk w celu informowania członków Związku o sytuacji przemysłu AGD,
5.utrzymywanie kontaktów z kręgami opiniotwórczymi, konsumentami, przedstawicielami pracowników, środowiskami naukowymi, organizacjami gospodarczymi,  organizacjami społecznymi oraz mediami związanych z realizacją celów APPLiA Polska,
6.działalność w zakresie szeroko pojętej ochrony środowiska, polegająca m. in. na propagowaniu idei zrównoważonego rozwoju, pomocy swoim członkom w wypełnianiu ciążących na nich obowiązków w zakresie ochrony środowiska oraz na podejmowaniu różnorodnych działań zmierzających do podniesienia świadomości ekologicznej społeczeństwa.

Name: Scientex Berhad
Description:
Scientex Group is a publicly listed company on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad since 1990, we are a leading manufacturer in flexible plastic packaging and a prominent developer of affordable homes in Malaysia.

From our humble beginnings in 1968, our drive to achieve continuous growth has seen us become one of the world’s top manufacturers of stretch film and an integrated flexible plastic packaging producer with a presence across the packaging value chain, from stretch films, base films and printed films to bags and multi-layered flexible plastic packaging solutions used in industrial and consumer packaging.

Our Property Division, meanwhile, focused on our core objective of addressing the growing need for affordable housing. With land banks exceeding 10,506 acres spanning seven states across Peninsular Malaysia, we are proud to have completed more than 30,000 affordable homes to date, providing greater access to home ownership for Malaysians.

Name: SellEthics Marketing Group
Description:
OUR PURPOSE

"To glorify God"
By operating our business based upon Christian Biblical principles; creating an environment where our associates, customers, and suppliers are respected and appreciated.

ABOUT US

SellEthics Marketing Group, Inc. is not only the largest regional food brokerage in the southeast, but also one of the largest in the US. Founded in 1999, we began with one client and now serve over 200 clients.

SellEthics has extensive knowledge and strong relationships with the market, customer buyers, and decision makers in the southeast and work through multiple channels including grocery, dollar, convenience, wholesalers and mass merchandisers.

SellEthics is independently owned and debt-free and all shareholders are active in the business. With over 300 sales associates servicing 8 southeastern states at the headquarter level and a retail sales force that covers all spill-out retail from each account, SellEthics looks forward to meeting your strategic needs and exceeding your expectations. We provide headquarter and retail services in grocery, frozen, dairy, meat, produce, general merchandise, health/beauty care, confections and deli/bakery servicing supermarkets, wholesalers, convenience stores and dollar stores. We also own On-Shelf Marketing Group, LLC with three partners to manage Walmart and Kroger, providing headquarter, analytical and retail services.

Description:
We know that home organization is about more than tidy closets. At The Stow Company, our passion is to help make your life more efficient and enjoyable by providing intelligent storage solutions that put your belongings in their proper place. We believe in the transformative power of home organization, which is why it’s our mission to turn disorganized, stressful spaces into organized, inspired ones. It’s not just about creating a new space. It’s about creating a custom space that you’ll absolutely love.

Established in 1984, The Stow Company manufactures a complete range of residential organization solutions to organize your entire home including your closet, garage, pantry, laundry room, and more.

We are proud to be the only company covering the spectrum of residential storage and organization needs, from high-end, dealer-supplied custom solutions to do-it-yourself storage systems available online and in retail stores. Our organization systems are marketed under the Inspired Closets, ORG Home, Gorgeous Garage, ProClosets, EasyClosets, EasyGarage, Easy Track, and Garage Essentials brand names.

The Stow Company has two modern manufacturing facilities, a 450,000 square foot facility in Holland, Michigan and a 550,000 square foot facility in Nampa, Idaho.

Name: Lässig GmbH

As a dynamic and future-oriented family company, LÄSSIG has high demands on responsibility and environmental awareness. The brand has managed to establish itself as a premium lifestyle brand with high credibility and recognition, not only in equipment for babies and chil-dren. Today, LÄSSIG offers not only diaper bags but also a comprehensive range for babies and toddlers, which impresses with its design, functionality and unique charm. Commitment through conscious action, that is LÄSSIG. In addition to quality, innovation and design of the products is the focus on sustainability.

Name: Apothecary Products

Founded in 1975, Apothecary Products, LLC (APL) is a heroic consumer products company focused on simple self-care and wellness solutions that make a true difference in peoples’ lives. We deliver on our mission with a handful of innovative and growing brands, including Ezy-Dose, Equadose,  CraftMates, Strive, and Flents. 

APL is a worldwide partner with the majority of US retailers (food, drug, mass, club), independent pharmacies and drug wholesalers, along with an international presence in over 80 countries in brick and mortar and online retail channels. We also support pharmacists and the patients they serve with our innovative pharmacy products.

Since innovation is at the core of our business, we take pride in developing products that solve consumer needs and have secured over 70 patents. We are proud that the Arthritis Foundation endorses many of our Ezy Dose medication management products for their easy-to-open features.

Acquired by Norwest Equity Partners in 2014, Apothecary Products is poised to grow its leadership position by offering the best in branded consumer products and pharmacy supplies to all major classes of trade.

Name: Nippon Paint Singapore
Description:
Nippon Paint (Singapore) Co Pte Ltd is an affiliate of Nippon Paint Japan – one of the most established pioneers in the paint industry with more than 120 years of experience in paint technology. Established since 1962, Nippon Paint is now one of the leading paint manufacturers in Singapore.

Combining research and development with in-depth local market understanding, we provide end-to-end solutions for virtually all kinds of painting needs – from home furnishings, high-rise buildings, factories to numerous industrial applications.

Guided by our core values of integrity, resourcefulness and drive to achieve excellence in everything we do, we have and will continue to deliver innovative products and services to protect and beautify our surroundings.

 

Our Vision
Our Business Vision

Name: Spyderco
Description:
Spyderco, Inc. is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of high-performance folding knives, fixed blades, and sharpeners. 

Founded in 1976, we initially focused on innovative systems that sharpened all cutting tools, including knives with serrated blades. In 1981, we expanded our scope and literally redefined the form of the modern folding knife by incorporating one-handed opening via our iconic Trademark Round Hole, convenient top-of-the-pocket carry with a pocket clip, and the aggressive cutting power of a serrated edge. 

As Spyderco grew, so did our list of industry-changing accomplishments. In the late 1980s, our iconic Police model set the standard in law enforcement cutting tools. In the 1990s, our Endura and Delica helped pioneer lightweight injection-molded knife handles. We were also the first to partner with noted custom knifemakers in our groundbreaking collaborative designs and established our U.S. factory in Golden, Colorado. Along the way, we earned scores of utility and design patents and many prestigious awards from the knife industry.

Our product line now includes more than 200 folding, fixed-blade, and kitchen knives and a complete selection of sharpeners. Spyderco’s manufacturing network includes a factory at our U.S. headquarters in Golden, Colorado, as well as resources in Japan, Taiwan, Italy, and China, all of which maintain the same exacting attention to detail and commitment to excellence that made our first knives distinctively different.

Our worldwide distribution includes dealers and distributors in more than 60 countries. We serve the needs of the military, law enforcement, and first responders through our Government Services Administration (GSA) contract. We also support active uniformed personnel and military veterans through our OpFocus professional purchase program.

Every Spyderco product is backed by a limited warranty and our relentless commitment to providing reliable high performance in all our products.

Description:

MAM has its roots with an international strategy & brand centre and an international R&D hub in Austria. Our production plants are based in Hungary and Thailand - with 90% of our product parts coming from Austria. 95% of all MAM Baby products are manufactured in Europe. 
Today, we sell more than 90 million products annually in 60 countries, spread across all five continents. Our brand is market leader in many countries around the world – due to MAM´s leading iconic baby design, pioneering product technology, and continuously advancing safety standards.

We aim to act accordingly to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals and therefore brought our existing sustainability strategy into line with them. 
You can find our latest report here: www.mambaby.com/why-mam/mam-sustainability/mam-sustainability-report-2019-2020/

MAM is successful around the world because of the passion and commitment of its employees. We are proud of our people and our culture. In order to continue our progress as a purpose-driven and sustainable company, we emphasize the importance of the people who shape the future of our organisation and its culture. Name: SignoraWare
Description:
Crafting Excellence, Inspiring Kitchens Worldwide

Signoraware, a flagship brand of the Signora Group of Companies, has been setting new benchmarks in kitchenware for over three decades. Founded in 1981 by Sh. Y.K. Bansal, an electrical engineer driven by a passion for quality and innovation, the brand exemplifies excellence.

With ISO 9001-certified processes and products crafted from 100% food-grade, virgin raw materials, Signoraware ensures safety and reliability. Our cutting-edge. A global presence in Southeast Asia, Europe, North America, the Gulf, and Africa, making Signoraware a trusted name in households worldwide. Our journey is a testament to relentless pursuit and milestones of achievement.

Milestones that Define Us:

1981: Our journey began with Signora Appliances, specializing in household motors and the iconic citrus juicer with a two-way motor movement.

1992: Expanded into precision plastic molding for appliance body parts, setting the stage for our future in high-quality plastics.

2002: Made a groundbreaking entry into storage solutions by setting up one of India’s most advanced tool rooms to develop storage container molds, initiating our journey into lunch boxes and serving ware.

2010: Established a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Himachal Pradesh, revolutionizing production capabilities and storage infrastructure.

2016: Upgraded our tool room with cutting-edge CNC machines from DMG MORI, embedding technology into our DNA to enhance precision and innovation.

2020: Expanded into cookware, cleaning aids, and copper product categories, while continuously increasing production and storage capacities to meet growing demands.

2024: Continuing our innovation drive by venturing into steel and glassware categories, bringing new dimensions of style and durability to modern kitchens.

Signoraware isn't just a brand; it's a celebration of craftsmanship, trust, and relationships.

Concept Alu, entreprise familiale, forte d'une expérience reconnue, a su garder les méthodes et valeurs essentielles de l'artisanat.
Nous proposons une large gamme de Vérandas, Extensions, Pergolas et Abris de piscine, aux options variées et adaptées aux besoins de nos clients.
En tant qu’innovateurs, nous nous attachons à répondre chaque jour aux exigences les plus élevées de nos clients en capitalisant sur ce que nous savons faire : le travail "sur-mesure", une étude et une réalisation personnalisées (forme, couleur,...).
Une culture d’entreprise partagée par 180 collaborateurs.
CONCEPT ALU est une entreprise à "dimension humaine", dont les valeurs internes reposent sur l'esprit d'équipe, la bienveillance, le respect, l'implication, la confiance et la convivialité.
Le site de production est basé en Vendée (85) et la commercialisation se développe sur toute la France : le Grand Ouest dispose de 8 agences intégrées tandis que le reste de la France dispose de concessions. Dans cette phase de développement, Concept Alu recherche des entreprises prêtes à entrer dans son Réseau de concessionnaires sur quelques départements où la marque n'est pas encore représentée.

Name: Nehemiah Manufacturing Company
Description: At Nehemiah Manufacturing, our mission transcends beyond business; we're dedicated to building brands, creating jobs, and changing lives. Founded in 2009 and rooted in the heart of Cincinnati, Ohio, we champion the philosophy of 'profit with a purpose' by focusing on second-chance employment. We proudly offer opportunities to those often overlooked by the job market, including individuals with felony convictions, those recovering from substance abuse, and people who have experienced homelessness. We believe in the power of transformation through a supportive work environment that emphasizes community, culture of care, and the unique value of every team member.

Name: Chillhouse
Description:
Chillhouse is a modern and fast growing nail care brand redefining self-care through a celebration of self-expression, design-driven products, and innovative treatments. Known for its award-winning press-ons, polish, and nail care essentials, Chillhouse has become a category leader with placement in Target, Walmart, CVS, Urban Outfitters, Amazon, and hundreds of specialty and indie retailers worldwide. 

Alongside its product line, Chillhouse operates an experiential flagship in SoHo, NYC, offering nail art manicures, massages, and facials, serving as both a community hub and a destination for wellness enthusiasts. With a hyper-engaged global community and features in top-tier publications such as Vogue, The New York Times, and Oprah Magazine, Chillhouse continues to shape the future of nails, self-care, culture, and more.

Name: Aluwind
Description:
With more than 20 years of experience in Wind Energy Industry, Aluwind has 100% focus on the wind energy industry and its requirements for durable and lightweight products, flexible and cost-efficient production, and reliable deliveries. Aluwind has production and sales locations in Europe, North America and Asia. 

Through our state-of-the-art production equipment and highly trained workforce, Aluwind offer cost-effective production, assembly and kitting of structures and components for towers and Nacelles, and both for onshore and offshore projects.

Name: Alaffia
Description:
Alaffia is a social enterprise on a mission to alleviate poverty and advance gender equality in West Africa through the fair trade of indigenous ingredients found in every one of its beauty and personal care products. 

Preserving cultural traditions and knowledge, Alaffia handcrafts its award-winning clean and plant-based collections with unrefined shea butter, African black soap, coconut oil, neem extract, and baobab and moringa oils from the women-led Alaffia Village Co-op.

Name: Niagara Conservation
Description:
Founded by Bill Cutler in 1974, Niagara Conservation Corporation is a privately-held, leading manufacturer of water- and energy-conservation products & services. Niagara has revolutionized the utility conservation industry and earned a reputation as the premier resource for conservation products engineered to maximize efficiency without sacrificing performance. 

Today, Niagara services a global client base throughout North America, South America, the Caribbean, Europe, the Middle East & Australia. Niagara boasts an extensive product line including the world’s only ultra-high-efficiency toilet featuring Stealth Technology - flushing as low as 0.8 gallons per flush.
Our Mission:
To innovate and conserve without sacrificing performance.
 
Our Vision:
Niagara’s goal is to make proprietary conservation technology available to the world while bringing awareness to the importance of having the most water and energy efficient fixtures in your home or business. Our goal is to have our technology in every home in the world. We will offer superior technology, efficiency and return on investment. 

Our vision is to make our patented conservation technology available to the world. In doing so, we will build awareness to the importance of having the most water-efficient fixtures in your home or business. In everything we do, we will offer superior technology, efficiency and return on investment.

Our Values:
We act with integrity in all our business practices.
We communicate openly and candidly with customers, vendors, and employees.
We treat each other with respect.
We focus on the customer’s needs and expectations

Name: Mason Companies, Inc
Description: Mason Companies is a family-owned business that has operated in Wisconsin’s Chippewa Valley. Founded in 1904 with the sale of logging boots to local lumbermen, the company has since evolved into a nationwide retailer of footwear, apparel, and general merchandise through e-commerce and mail-order catalogs. Its portfolio includes five retail brands: ShoeMall, Stoneberry, Masseys, Mason Easy-Pay, and Maryland Square. Today, Mason Companies is one of the largest footwear catalogers in the world and remains committed to fostering a culture of mutual respect among its employees, customers, and partners.

Name: Obvi
Description:
Obvi's founders were dedicated to bringing re-generative ingredients in delicious drinks to the market.  The variety of products offers tastes for everybody - making it the obvious choice for our customers that want to do something beneficial for their hair, nails,skin, bones and gut health - instead of just drinking mostly harmful products.
 
Consume and rejuvenate! 
 
Collagen depletion at progressed age is the #1 reason for lines and wrinkles, dry skin, hair breakage, bad nail and bone, and joint support.
 
Obvi alleviates these problems and delivers taste coupled with benefits.  To see more detail go to www.myobvi.com and sign up for your free trial.  You will be glad you did.

Name: Fly Ace Corporation
Description:
For over fifty years, Fly Ace Corporation has been bringing top quality brands and food and beverage products in the Philippines, most of which are number one in their respective categories, securing its spot right in the hearts of Filipino homes and families.

Fly Ace directly sources its products from across the globe including Asia, Australia, Europe and North America. It's commitment to offer high quality and excellent products at prices reasonable for Filipino families propels the continuous growth of the company.

Fly Ace is a key player in five categories:
1. Canned Fruits and Vegetables
2. Edible Oils
3. Juices, Milk, Wines and other Beverages
4. Noodles, Pasta, Condiments and Sauces
5. Snacks, Spreads, Cereals and other Markets

Name: Thetford
Description:
With more than 1500 employees worldwide, we continuously deliver quality products to both our customers and industry representatives. Even though we are market leader in sanitation, kitchen appliances, service doors and toilet care products in the recreational and marine market, we value personal attention. This makes us a unique and down to earth company to work for. 

We work with subsidiaries European wide and within our facility in Etten-Leur with over 15 different nationalities. We make sure that everyone feels at home by giving them the opportunity for self-development and to involve them in the process of creating quality products. We use our imagination and expertise to create reliable and safe innovations. To do so, we encourage our employees to participate in this process. All our employees have one thing in common: we have a passion for winning.

At our headquarters in Etten-Leur, we do not only make products, we create them. Every step, we do together with our colleagues. We imagine, create, develop, produce, transport and support. We work together with thinkers and with doers, so we can act global, think local and do what we love.

This is expressed in winning a number of important industry awards over the years.

Thetford is originally an American company, but Etten-Leur houses the leading office in Europe, China and Australia. Furthermore, we have manufacturing facilities in the U.S., The Netherlands, Great Britain, Italy (Tecma) and China. Even though we are located all over the world, we all have entrepreneurial spirit, ownership, we are simple and direct, customer focused and we are at ease in challenging times. Those qualities combined helped us preaching and guaranteeing carefree holidays now for more than 50 years.

Name: Organa Brands
Description:
We began in 2010 with a founding promise to deliver cannabis extractions that were nothing less than extraordinary. Today, we are guided by the same principle. Bringing together the best minds in the regulated cannabis market, Organa Brands operates the longest-running CO₂ extraction facility in the country– Organa Labs. With Organa Labs oil at the core of our products, we’ve had unprecedented success, becoming the first cannabis house of brands to attain a national footprint.

Organa Brands is comprised of: O.penVAPE (cannabis vaporizers), Bakked (concentrates), District Edibles (edibles), Pressies (functionally-enhanced tablets) & Magic Buzz (cannabis-infused beverages).

Please visit: www.organabrands.com for more info.

Name: Buffalo Games
Description: Our vision is “to make life more fun and rewarding” through our family of award-winning Party Games and finest quality Jigsaw Puzzles. Buffalo Games is a design forward company that manufactures and markets consumer products in our self-owned and operated plant in Buffalo, NY. We take great pride in our craftsmanship and relentlessly deliver on the highest quality standards and experience that our consumers have come to love and expect from Buffalo Games.

Name: Pressiani S.r.l.
DupliColorPars
Description:
A successful JV between FoumanChimie Group and DupliColor that produce more than 300 SKU products in painting and industry spray categories.
http://instagram.com/duplipars

Name: BLANCO Canada
Description:
With BLANCO, kitchen chores are transformed to be sources of joyful moments. BLANCO is the premium brand for the well-thought-out kitchen water hub in residential homes. At its core, the BLANCO UNIT is based on three founding pillars: “Drink, Prep, Clean” and is characterized by a wide array of seamless combinations of sinks, high-end faucets, water optimization solutions, complementary accessories and organization systems. This range of product and the design, color and material options, make it easy for every kitchen lover to find their perfectly customized UNIT at BLANCO .

Founded over 95 years ago, the company is now an internationally recognized premium brand for the kitchen water hub. With subsidiaries in Europe, North America and APAC, plus its trading partners, BLANCO has a presence in about 100 countries all over the world and offers its customers a portfolio that is perfectly tailored to consumer needs. The company headquarters and key production sites in support of North American demand are in Southwest Germany and Canada.   

Established in 1925 by Heinrich Blanc, BLANCO is part of BLANC & FISCHER Family Holding. BLANCO America and BLANCO Canada have proudly served the North American market for over 30 years.

Name: Peruana de Moldeados S.A. - Pamolsa
Description: Pamolsa es una empresa líder en el mercado de empaques y envases desechables producidos con materiales plásticos (poliestireno, poliestireno expandido, polipropileno, PET, entre otros), pulpa de papel y aluminio.

Name: Multi-Pak Packaging
Description:
Multi-Pak Packaging is a full service contract packager. We offer an array of services to bring your ideas to market creatively, quickly and cost effectively. Think of us as your business partner and let our experienced staff help you achieve your goals. 

We have built our reputation by providing our customers with exceptional and consistent quality. Our 160,000 square foot temperature and humidity controlled facility and packaging suites are fully equipped to meet all of your solid dose packaging and warehousing needs. We are an FDA registered, NSF certified, Organic, Kosher, UL and Gluten Free facility. We adhere to 21 cfr 210 & 211 standards in all of our Quality Management Systems. This ensures the highest standard of quality at all times throughout the facility. At Multi-Pak Packaging cleanliness, precision and uniform product quality are guaranteed. 

We have built our business on solid relationships with our customers. A dedicated client manager is assigned to your project from the moment you contact us. They are responsible for coordinating every phase of the project from idea to market. We also have a fully staffed engineering department to guide you with any technical questions you may have.

At Multi-Pak Packaging your product is as important to us as it is to you!

Name: Tansley
Description: Tansley is a group of companies (Guaw, Milbby, Brand Story, Bookish) focused on fostering consumer ecosystems around hobbies and passions

Name: CHEMTEF INDUSTRIES
Description:
CHEMTEF INDUSTRIES is engaged in manufacturing corrosion-resistant plastic-lined piping systems,  We may provide these products with linings made of  PTFE, or PFA/FEP.

We are offering an extensive selection of piping, including pipes,fittings & valves made of PTFE, FEP / PFA & PP / HDPE.

Our well-equipped manufacturing facility includes the latest machinery with all the testing equipment as required by the industry standards. We are located at Makarpura G.I.D.C, Vadodara, Gujarat.

Please visit our website at www.chemtef.com or you may email us directly at sales@chemtef.com.

Name: SFS Group Indonesia
Description:
Didirikan oleh Danan Simangunsong, SFS GROUP merupakan perusahaan manajemen startup yang bergerak di bidang FMCG. Main Headquarter Office kami berlokasi di Surabaya, Indonesia.
 
SFS GROUP membawahi perusahaan Spencer's Premium Grocery yakni sebuah brand FMCG di bidang healthy food dan SFS CAPITAL yakni sebuah start-up accelerator dan brand aggregator.

Name: Jerash Garments & Fashions Mfg. Co. Ltd.
Description: Jerash Holdings manufactures and exports custom, ready-made sport and outerwear from Jordan. We make products for leading global brands that include The North Face, Timberland, New Balance, American Eagle, Calvin Klein, and Adidas. With 6 factories and 4 warehouses employing approximately 5,700 people, our annual capacity is more than 14 million pieces.

Name: UK Flooring Direct
Description:
Welcome to UK Flooring Direct, The UK's Largest Online Flooring Retailer. Home of high-quality flooring products and accessories for both retail and trade. Our product range includes – 

Real Wood Flooring – Solid wood flooring and engineered wood flooring in plank, herringbone and 3 strip styles.
Laminate Flooring in plank and herringbone styles.
Vinyl Flooring – Gluedown Vinyl Flooring and Click System Vinyl Flooring in plank and tile styles. 
Accessories – from underlay to skirting, scotia to aftercare products. 

Offering technical experience, knowledge, and advice. With a quarter of a century of experience in the flooring trade that predates the formation of the company, we can offer a wealth of expertise and specialism. Part of the task of our employees is to keep up-to-date on the latest trends and developments in the industry, so we can provide relevant information and support that will meet your needs, whether you are using a traditional kind of floor or one incorporating the latest manufacturing technology. Transforming a room has never been simpler and our team will help you choose the best style that complements your décor or satisfies your customers brief. 

Providing you with the right tools to make informed choices, order free extra-large flooring samples and try out our Room Visualiser tool on the website to see your selection come to life. Seeing your room alongside your shortlisted flooring options enables you to make the right decision for you.

Here at UK Flooring Direct, it is our mission to bring you an unbeatable selection of flooring products at the very best price. Our price match promise means you can shop with confidence and be sure that you are getting the best deal.

Name: GEARWRENCH
Description:
Since its revolutionary inception in the mid 1990's, GEARWRENCH has proven itself to be a force to be reckoned with in the tool industry. The original GEARWRENCH ratcheting wrench is now a tool box necessity for almost every professional tool user. Scores of innovative products, designed to provide a solution for nearly any task, are being introduced every year. We make it our business to know the challenges you face on the job so we can create the tools that help you get the job done faster.

GEARWRENCH has always focused on continuous improvement in three areas: speed, strength, and access. Using the lastest Voice-of-Customer techniques and our proprietary inventor Connect program, we listen to pro tool users to learn how we can design tools that better answer their needs. As a result, the majority of new GEARWRENCH products begin development because of direct customer feedback. So keep talking to us, and we'll keep listening and designing better products to help make your job go faster and easier. Together we Forge Ahead.

Name: BNAL Prefabs Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
BNAL is India's only company with production facilities for continuous line PUF panels & PEB under one roof, along with nationwide distribution capability.

At BNAL, our in-house design and execution teams deliver top-notch services, backed by state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities boasting cutting-edge technology. With a production capacity of 40,000 MT for pre-engineered buildings, 2000 prefabricated structures, and 2.5 million square meters for PUF panels annually, we never compromise on the quality of raw materials used.

We take pride in being a trusted supplier of PUF panels to various industries such as PEB, prefab, pharmaceutical, warehouses, and cold storages. We provide high-quality insulated PUF panels that come with comprehensive guarantees covering thermal, fire, structural, and coating performance.

Further, Our ISO certifications (ISO 9001:2015, ISO-45001) are a testament to the quality and safety of our products.  

Our portfolio of prestigious projects spans across the country, including government organizations, army & paramilitary forces, leading corporate houses such as Tata Projects, KEC International, Dixon Technologies, Bluestar, Livguard, Carrier, Strabag-Affcons JV, Avon Cycles, and many more.

Trust us to deliver superior solutions that cater to your unique requirements!

Name: Stellar Industrial Supply
Description:
Stellar Industrial Supply is a privately held, ISO/AS9120-certified premier industrial supplier. Our specialists, sales force and customer experience managers serve small, medium and large manufacturers; federal, state and local municipalities; and commercial construction companies across the United States.

We Are Dedicated

We have invested in our business to maintain our profitability and stability. We partner with our customers and suppliers to provide individual products and individualized solutions that help you save costs and boost profit, efficiently and without frustration. We go onsite to handle purchasing, receiving and delivery; obtain competitive pricing; and manage tools and inventory.

Your Diligent yet Creative, Hard-Working but Easy-To-Work-With Partner

Innovating our solutions, caring about our people, performing as one with our suppliers and customers. That is how we thrive—acting with authenticity and excellence that improves the customer experience, stakeholder trust, market leadership and value— to benefit all involved.

Name: Mellow Home
Description:
Mellow is an established e-commerce company and a maker of next generation home furnishing goods built-on insight-based creative focus. Mellow exists to  make it easier for many to create a home they crave out of a house. 

What you will get from M E L L O W are user-centric in design, innovative in functions, flexible in structure, conscious in materials and fair in prices.

Name: Keter Italia Spa
Description:
Keter Italia S.p.A. (previously ABM Italia S.p.A.) is part of Keter Group B.V. 
Established  in 1972  and based in Ormelle, in the Northern Italian province of Treviso, Keter Italia has become an international company and the market leader in Europe and beyond, specializing in the production and sale of resin household products for home and leisure.  
Thanks to its widespread sales network, it reaches more than 90 different countries. 
A young and dynamic team, the ongoing search for cutting-edge technologies and the use of quality materials while implementing an environment-friendly approach are some of the ingredients for the recipe of a long lasting success on the market.

Keter Italia S.p.A. is present on the market with several brands: 

• Curver - Kis - Allibert:  Products and solutions for organizing indoor and outdoor living space 

• AP medical supplies a wide range of containers for the disposal of special hospital waste. 
www.apmedical.it

Name: Sukin
Description:
Everything we need to nourish our bodies can be found in nature. So at Sukin, that's what we use.

NO to a long list of synthetic chemicals.
NO harm to our animal friends.
NO hidden surprises.
NO compromises on results.
And NO bells and whistles for the sake of them.

Just ingredients from nature that are good for you, your wallet, and the environment too.

Home is where the heart is, and ours is born and bred in Australia. That’s why it’s so important for us to look after the land, like it looks after us. A brilliant team of people happily make Sukin products in our purpose-built factory right here in Melbourne, Australia. You have never smelt a nicer manufacturing facility – seriously! We are proud to say that Sukin is 100% Australian based and made.

NATURAL INGREDIENTS: At Sukin, we are committed to delivering the perfect balance of naturalness, affordability and safety, to as many people as we can the world over. Sukin products are 98.8% naturally derived, the difference is how we keep our naturally derived ingredients safe for your use. We also choose to leave Genetically Modified Organisms (GMO’s) out of our products.

CRUELTY FREE: Sukin is a certified 100% cruelty free company, committed to creating products that are free from all animal testing. Sukin has been dedicated to cruelty free practices and products from day one. Our manufacturing and testing processes are completely free from animal testing, and we only source from suppliers who do not test on animals.

VEGAN: Sukin is a 100% Vegan brand. This means we do not use any animal derivatives, of any kind in our products. This includes things like lanolin, as well as animal by-products like honey and beeswax.

CARBON NEUTRAL: Climate Change affects us all, here’s what we are doing to make sure we are part of the solution and not the problem. Sukin will continue to champion the environment moving forward, giving you peace of mind that the Sukin product you use, will not negatively impact the environment.

Name: Blue Sky The Color of Imagination
Description:
#1 Dated Products brand*, Blue Sky, represents more than just a pretty planner. Our story began in sunny southern California, with a simple idea to create high quality, stylish planning products for everyone. 19 years later, we continue operating with the notion of delivering planning tools of exceptional quality to our customers – all 13 million of you! Plus, top brands like Dabney Lee, Nicole Miller and Ashley G have trusted Blue Sky to bring their unique visions to life through comprehensive brand partnership programs. We pride ourselves on utilizing our customer feedback to develop planners our customers want to use. Because, at the end of the day, we want to create beautiful, innovative products that empower you to manage your time, so you have the ability to do more of what you love. Recognized for an extensive array of dated planners, calendars, notebooks, and more, our products help the millions who dream of achieving organization reach their goals, and in style (hello, form and function). Blue Sky products have been featured by media including Refinery29, Business Insider, Hollywood Reporter, The Everygirl and Brit+Co. Find the collection online at www.bluesky.com. 
*Source: The NPD Group, Inc. / U.S. Retail Tracking Service, 52 weeks ending Jan. 4, 2020

Name: JUKI AMERICA, INC.
Description:
The official page of JUKI AMERICA, INC.

JUKI offers an extensive line of sewing equipment for the apparel industry -- ranging from lockstitch, overlock and coverstitch machines, to electronic bartackers and automated sewing systems. They have also become predominant in the heavy-duty sewing market, supplying such industries as automotive, upholstery, marine, industrial fabrics, footwear, leather products and home textiles. The JUKI line of home sewers and sergers have become one of the most popular in the home market.

Name: SANCELLA S.A
Description:
SANCELLA: Leading the Way in Hygiene and Personal Care in Africa
Founded in 1970 by a visionary group of pharmacists, SANCELLA has grown to become a key player in Africa's hygiene and personal care industry. We specialize in disposable hygienic products (baby diapers, feminine hygiene, tissues), personal care solutions, and pharmaceutical cotton-based products, always keeping consumers at the heart of everything we do.

Our commitment to innovation and excellence has propelled us forward. In partnership with Essity, Europe’s leading and the world’s third-largest company in single-use hygienic products, SANCELLA has introduced trusted brands like LIBERO PEAUDOUCE, NANA, and LOTUS to over 15 million loyal consumers in the region.

With three state-of-the-art industrial hubs and a wide-reaching distribution network spanning more than 15 countries across North and West Africa, SANCELLA continues to set the standard for quality, reliability, and care.

At SANCELLA, we’re not just delivering products—we’re creating solutions that improve lives, inspire trust, and lead the way to a healthier future.

Name: PT KORINUS
Description:
PT. KORINUS incorporated its business into trade, consulting, distribution, and foodservice. We are moving
forward as a diversified Korean company in global enterprise.

Name: SIGG Switzerland Bottles AG
Description:
SIGG Switzerland Bottles AG – "The art of hydration. Excellence since 1908."  

SIGG is a leading provider of drinking bottles since 1908. Thanks to the company’s rich traditional history, which is known for quality, innovation, design and environmental awareness, the SIGG products are synonymous worldwide with intelligent, sustainable drinking bottles. Originally, the bottles from SIGG, which are well-known for their long-lasting quality and complete reusability, were primarily popular with alpinists and hikers. Today, SIGG offers a wide collection of functional and fashionable bottles for all areas of life, is on permanent display at New York’s Museum of Modern Art and has already partnered with major fashion labels such as Vivienne Westwood. Based on the success story of the original SIGG aluminum bottle and the dynamic SIGG Hot & Cold line, the company has expanded its product range with high-quality drinking bottles made from polypropylene, glass and Tritan, underlining its core values of sustainability and versatility.

Description:

Netsurf offers more than 60 Natural & Herbal products in 4 distinct categories i.e. Health Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Agriculture and Color Cosmetics. Our products are also associated with a unique business opportunity that has transformed the lives of many people in India. With a motive to endow one with an opportunity that helps redefine his career. We take diligent efforts in attaining this, with an endeavor to bring a positive change in the lives of people through our quality products and prosperous business opportunity.

* Trusted By More Than 2.5 Million Consumers

Name: Innodis Group
Description: Innodis Ltd, a public listed company founded in 1973, averages an annual turnover of some MUR 6 billion. We are presently one of the largest groups involved in food production and distribution in Mauritius. With more than 50 years of experience and driven by a workforce of some 1,400 individuals, we currently service more than 5,700 outlets (hypermarkets, supermarkets, corner shops, food chains and over 60 hotels) across the island.

Name: Tarseel
Description:
Tarseel—Urdu for ‘distribute or spread’—is the brainchild of Khalifa Farhan Athar. After having worked in Procter and Gamble for over five years, traversing the length and breadth of the country, he had seen a dearth in the local market for professional FMCG distributors.
As fate would have it, while he was pondering making a foray into the world of distribution, he was introduced to representatives of Energizer Middle East Africa who were looking for a distributor (Pakistan region). At the same time, Imrooz Group was looking towards adding FMCG to it’s portfolio of ever increasing businesses.
In 2005, Farhan left his position at P&G to lead the FMCG arm of the Imrooz Group. Tarseel started with 2 employees, in the mezzanine floor of Qamar House (I.I. Chundrigar Road) in Karachi. Step-by-step, the company has expanded to almost 200 employees nationwide providing a niche service to brands looking for a route to market in Pakistan. Tarseel has evolved from a pure distribution model to one which provides a much more holistic support to its brand partners.
Over time, the leadership at Tarseel has seen new opportunities and made the most of them. Stepping into a new decade, Tarseel aims to go from strength to strength, with its employees as its pillar of support.

Name: Isopetrol Lubricants del Peru S.A.C.
Description: ISOPETROL LUBRICANTS DEL PERU S.A.C., empresa dedicada a la comercialización de aceites y grasas lubricantes automotrices e industriales, consciente de la importancia de brindar productos y servicios de calidad.

Name: EverEver
Description: La mission d'EverEver est de concevoir et proposer de l'électroménager durable et made in France comme alternative au prêt à jeter.

Name: JAL Bath Fittings
Description:
Combining over 35 years of industry expertise with a deep-rooted commitment to excellence, JAL Bath Fittings proudly stands as a beacon of innovation in bathroom solutions. With a rich tapestry of Indian heritage in our product lines, each named after historical rivers, we seamlessly blend engineering prowess with customer-centric designs.

Our journey began with a vision to redefine bathroom experiences, and today, we continue to set new standards by infusing tradition with cutting-edge technology. From faucets to bathware, showers to sanitary ware, every product reflects our unwavering dedication to craftsmanship and innovation.

As pioneers in the industry, we strive to not only meet but exceed the diverse demands, preferences, and budgets of our clientele. Our mission is clear: to offer superior quality products with unparalleled after-sales support, always prioritising customer satisfaction.

Join us at JAL Bath Fittings as we embark on a journey of innovation, pushing the boundaries of possibility to create a bathroom experience like no other. Connect with us to explore our latest offerings and witness firsthand the legacy of excellence that defines JAL.

Name: Canter Power Systems
Description:
Canter Power Systems is a Generac Power Premier Pro dealer and one of the largest independent installers of home standby generators in the U.S. 

Canter Power Systems’ solution capabilities include residential backup generator systems, battery storage technology and preventative maintenance and residential field services. 

Canter Power Systems has a long list of accomplishments, including being Home Depot’s largest national residential generator installer since 2007, being named Home Depot Service Provider of the Year in 2022, and receiving the Generac Industry Excellence Award in 2021 and 2022, all while maintaining Generac’s Power Premier Pro Status since 2016. 

For more information, visit www.canterpowersystems.com

Name: VIOLA Brands
Description: VIOLA was established in 2011 by 16-year NBA veteran, Al Harrington. His inspiration for starting the company came from Al’s grandmother, who suffers from glaucoma and diabetes. After some convincing from Al, she reluctantly agreed to try cannabis for her pain and immediately found relief. Inspired, Al was moved to enter the cannabis space and named his company VIOLA, after his grandmother. Since then, VIOLA has expanded into various markets across the country, offering communities premium products driven by purpose.

Name: Ruud Middle East and Africa
Description:
WELCOME TO RUUD

More than 100 years ago, Edwin Ruud, a Norwegian mechanical engineer, came to America and developed the first successful automatic water heater. That early success marked the beginning of a tradition of innovation and value that led to the introduction of Ruud heating and air conditioning equipment in the 1950s. 

Since then, Ruud has grown into one of North America’s largest manufacturers of quality heating, cooling and water heating products for residential and light commercial use. Today, Ruud operates manufacturing facilities employing highly trained workers and state-of-the-art equipment.

Over the years, the product lines have expanded, changed, and improved significantly as new design techniques and better manufacturing technologies have become available. 

What remains unchanged throughout our history, however, is our commitment to producing the most reliable, long-lasting, efficient equipment you can buy. In the Middle East, Ruud has been present and its products have been in service for over 30 years bringing in the same level of quality, technology and commitment with its products.

Name: Gladskin
Description:
At Gladskin, we believe that everyone deserves healthy skin—and that a balanced microbiome supports the skin’s ability to heal. Gladskin’s high quality skin and body care products foster skin health and are formulated with as few ingredients as possible. Our patented endolysin science helps restore bacterial balance to the skin microbiome. 

Gladskin is a subsidiary of METCH, which is committed to advancing consumer applications for endolysin technology and stewarding skin microbiome health. Learn more at gladskin.com and gladskin.eu.

Name: Steelway Building Systems
Description: Steelway Building Systems is a privately owned Canadian company which manufactures steel building systems, building components and material handling equipment for use in industrial, commercial, agricultural, recreational and institutional applications across North America and around the world.

Name: Mama's Choice
Description:
Mama's Choice is a personal care brand dedicated to creating safe, halal, and natural products for moms and their families. Founded in 2018, Mama's Choice unites the power of carefully selected natural ingredients, extensive research, and the insight of a community of moms to create specially formulated products that are safe for pregnancy, breastfeeding, and beyond.

An award-winning brand with a growing portfolio of products that includes mom, baby, and household items, Mama’s Choice has zero tolerance for harmful ingredients such as parabens, triclosan, alcohol, sodium lauryl sulfate, and phthalates.

Mama’s Choice has a simple yet mighty mission: to help mamas have one less thing to worry about on their motherhood journey.

Name: YKK Bangladesh Pte Ltd.
Description:
YKK Bangladesh Pte Ltd is one of the emerging and rapid growing zipper manufacturers among the YKK Group and in the globe in terms of its production capacity and business volume. It belongs to YKK ASIA region and incorporated in the year 2000. However, the history of YKK business in Bangladesh started in 1989 with setting up YKK Singapore liaison office in Dhaka and afterword opened a branch office in Chittagong in 1997. After incorporation as YKK Bangladesh Pte Ltd; we constructed our manufacturing plant in Dhaka Export Processing Zone in 2001 and commercial production started in 2002. YKK Bangladesh completed its expansion of 2nd & 3rd Phase in 2005 & 2011 respectively. At present we have 2 manufacturing plant located on plot #06-16 and 89-91 in DEPZ. Besides the production plant, we have our head office in Dhaka and a branch office in Chattogram, Gazipur, Narayamganj. There are around 2000 employees are working in YKK Bangladesh considering all of its locations in Bangladesh.

In FY 2018 YKK BGD achieved 1 billion pieces in production for the first time also has plans to expand its business in the near future.

YKK Bangladesh is the company who has the commitments not only for their business development but also the improvement for the society as well as the part of economic development in this country.

Name: Rainco Private Limited
Description: Rainco, A Consumer Marketing and Manufacturing organization dealing across the categories of Fashion and Travel Accessories, Homeware, Mother and Baby And Shoe and Footcare categories, with a dominant position in its home markets. Rainco explores further global markets With an employee base of over 1200 in the south Asian region and a range of products that are brand leaders, Rainco caters to a wide corporate, retail and household client base.

Name: Halo Pets
Description: Halo Pets is committed to delivering better nutrition and wellness choices to help furry family members live healthier, happier, and longer lives. Our brand has 35+ years of experience in the pet food industry.

Name: Summit Brands
Description:
Since its founding in Fort Wayne, Indiana in 1958, Summit Brands has manufactured and marketed leading household cleaning brands, such as Iron Out, Glisten, EarthStone, Plink and Dryel.  

Consumers prefer Summit Brands products because they solve tough cleaning problems. All of our products have a money-back guarantee, promising that every bottle will meet or exceed consumer expectations. 

Our Culture
Imagine working in a place where you have work/life balance and a unique culture with a blend of determined focus, sustainability, innovation, wellness, and family.

Summit Brands provides a challenging career path for the right individual. We offer an exceptional work environment and opportunities for career development alongside some of the industry’s finest.

The Summit Brands Quality Service Model
At the heart of Summit Brands’ success lies a concept we call the Quality Service Model: “We enthusiastically exceed customer expectations through innovation and continuous improvement.”

That’s not an empty phrase to Summit Brands employees — we live it every day on the job. It’s more than just an attitude; it’s an action plan for every task. Perhaps most simply put, it’s a commitment to do the right thing. That’s why we pledge to always do the following:

Project a positive attitude
Provide an exceptional customer experience
Respect, appreciate and value everyone
Go above and beyond
Committed to Treating Employees Right

We strive to do the right things to facilitate a culture that is not only innovative and high performing, but also one that is stimulating and fun to be a part of.

Even with Summit Brands’ remarkable growth, the workplace maintains a “small company” feel and a personalized, family-oriented philosophy. From the daily work environment to special occasions, we’re always focused on doing what is right for our employees.

Name: Multibrands International Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1998, UK-based Multibrands International Ltd manufactures and supplies a range of premium quality, own-brand, everyday FMCG consumer essentials ranging from personal hygiene to advanced LED household lighting solutions, we have expanded the Panodyne care range brand and become a trusted UK supplier of high-quality PPE - including facemasks, protective gloves, hand sanitizer and non-contact thermometers. 

All our brands are wholly owned by Multibrands International Ltd. Every single one of our products are developed and designed in Britain and produced in our own dedicated manufacturing sites to the highest UK and International standards. Our products and brands are available to retailers direct or via leading wholesalers and independent buying groups.

We are totally committed to making buyers’ lives easier by providing outstanding margin potential and by supplying the very best in product quality at prices that enable trade customers to maintain value right through to the end consumer.

Now, we are gearing up to shake the Electronic and Health & Beauty industries to their core with the introduction of two new brands and a multitude of different and exciting products, and that is just the beginning!

Name: Peridot Products (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Peridot Products (Pvt) Limited, formerly known as Sara Lee Kiwi Pakistan (Pvt) Limited has been in operation since 1958 in Pakistan. It is engaged in the manufacturing and marketing of KIWI Shoe Care and Household products under a long term license agreement. It has created its own brands such as Glint and Black Cat which are considered as leading brands in there respective categories.

It has an excellent track record of providing quality products at competitive prices.It is having large customer base across Pakistan using its products with great satisfaction

Name: Omnidesk
Description:
Omnidesk was founded with an ambitious objective: we wanted to revolutionise the world of workspace ergonomics through exceptional price and performance. 

We are a bunch of retired gamers who ventured into the world of entrepreneurship and tech consulting. We soon found the glaring similarities between these seemingly disparate worlds - whether we’re going on end-game raids or simply stuck in endless meetings, we’re still spending hours upon hours on our desks and constantly at the mercy of bad posture.

We needed a desk that is truly our own. 

The unaffordability of existing solutions pushed us to start Omnidesk.

Name: PT.BUMI ALAM SEGAR
Description:
PT Bumi Alam Segar (Wingsfood) merupakan salah satu perusahaan Fast Moving Consumer Goods di Indonesia dengan produk atau brand Kecap Sedaap. Perusahaan yang beralamat di Kota Industri Bekasi lebih tepatnya di Jl. Raya Kaliabang, Kecamatan Medan Satria ini merupakan bagian dari Wings Group.

Wings Group sendiri merupakan salah satu perusahaan besar dan terkemuka di Indonesia dengan bisnisnya di berbagai bidang seperti home Home Care, Fabric Care, Personal Care dan Food and Beverages.

Name: Beacon Wellness Brands
Description:
Founded in 2001, Beacon Wellness Brands designs, develops, manufactures, and markets personal care, beauty care, and sexual wellness devices and accessories. The company sells millions of products annually with many of the finest retailers and resellers in the world.  

At Beacon Wellness Brands our mission is to empower accessible self-care, because well-being for all starts with taking care of yourself.



According to Nielsen, Beacon Wellness Brands:
1. In sexual wellness, Beacon Wellness Brands' plusOne brand is #1 in North America with most of the top ten items in the category and a greater than 60% share of the category.
2. In beauty, Beacon Wellness Brands' plum beauty brand is the fastest-growing beauty/skincare/anti-aging devices category.
3. It has three grooming items that consistently rank in the top five by volume performance in the ladies' grooming category.

Name: Oculus Private Limited
Description:
No. 1 Cosmetic Contact Lens Brand*

Headquartered in Singapore, Oculus Private Limited and its group of subsidiaries have over 25 years of experience in manufacturing and supplying high quality contact lens and contact lens care products to optical retailers and eye-care practitioners.

Oculus is focused on the innovation, manufacturing and marketing of cosmetic contact lenses and has established FreshKon as a leading brand of cosmetic contact lens in South East Asia and Greater China.  The Oculus group also offers disposable clear contact lenses under FreshKon brand, specialty contact lens products such as gas permeable lenses under Ocuviq brand and soft toric contact lenses under Flexcon brand. Oculus’s products are manufactured in accordance to the quality assurance system ISO 9001 / ISO 13485 requirements and meet the Medical Devices Directive 93/42/EEC.

With direct subsidiary presence in Japan, Korea, China, Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia, its products are sold globally in more than 50 countries.

Our Subsidiaries
•	Oculus (M) Sdn. Bhd.
•	Oculus Optical (HK) Co. Ltd.
•	Shanghai Oculus Contact Lens Co., Ltd
•	PT Oculus Indonesia
•	Oculus Korea Limited

Our Vision: To be a global leader in cosmetic contact lenses

Our Mission: OCULUS innovates, manufactures & markets world-class quality cosmetic contact lenses to add color to life

Our Company's Values
•	Responsive and Prompt
•	Teamwork
•	Integrity
•	Open and honest communication
•	Commitment to excellence


*Internal analysis from a leading research company

Name: FACKELMANN GmbH + Co. KG
Description:
The success story of FACKELMANN started in 1919 with a commercial agency for hardware and household goods founded by Sebastian Fackelmann. 

Many housewives and househusbands FACKELMANN is a synonym for smart, convenient and low-priced products for kitchen and household. "Something new every time", "simply convenient", "why didn't I come up with this myself"…these statements by customers reflect the wide-ranging competence and the ingenuity of FACKELMANN.

The FACKELMANN group and its 38 subsidiaries has increased its annual turnover from 30 million in 1985 to approx 382 million EURO. 

FACKELMANN has prepared itself for the future by investing in buildings, machines, logistics and information technology. FACKELMANN is capable of managing even times of crisis with an ongoing innovation offensive and surprising solutions. 

"Content customers and committed employees guarantee permanent success." The most important pillars of the company culture are the above-average dedication of employees and the devoted commitment to the FACKELMANN family (the family spirit can still be sensed in spite of the growing company size) as well as the responsibility and care of the company management for their employees.
