Name: KFB Holding Group
Description:
KFB Holding Group was founded by Mr. Khalid Al Boayz, a first generation entrepreneur, in 1981. He has brought with him a considerable sense of ethics and responsibility to his employees, Partners, and customers. Mr. Al Boayz is firmly committed to bringing the latest products and technologies to Saudi Arabia, while ensuring that they are suited and suitably re-engineered for local conditions.

As President of KFB Holding Group, Mr. Al Boayz has implemented and upheld the best business practices, making it one of the trusted companies in the GCC region.

Business Lines:

1- Manufacturing
2- Contracting
3- Trading
4- Services and Solutions

Name: Ranipur Sugar Mills
Description:
It all started when...
CLIMATES CHANGED, AND OUR TRADITIONAL SOURCES OF ENERGY DWINDLED, MANY SPECIES DIED ALONG WITH THAT DISAPPEARING BOUNTY, BUT THOSE WITH THE ABILITY TO PROCESS SUGAR SURVIVED.
ABOUT 10,000 YEARS AGO, SOMEWHERE IN ASIA, SUGARCANE WAS FIRST FARMED. LATER THESE STALKS WERE PRESSED, THEIR JUICES BOILED AND REFINED TO MAKE A TYPE OF CANDY, LATER KNOWN AS SUGAR. 
IT IS THE MISSION OF RANIPUR SUGAR MILLS TO PRODUCE THE HIGHEST QUALITY OF SUGAR WHILST BEING THE INDUSTRY LEADER IN EFFICIENCY, CUSTOMER RELATIONS AND GREEN PRODUCTION TECHNIQUES.

Name: Dr. Beckmann Group
Description:
For over 90 years, we have stood as an independent family business delivering innovative solutions that make life easier. Our core brand, Dr. Beckmann, is globally renowned and available in more than 70 countries. It is a “Trusted Brand” in the categories of laundry, cleaning, and household products – a brand people trust.

Our portfolio is further enriched by our own brands Bullrich, Carbona, and fess’nett, as well as our distribution brands Bi-Oil, Blistex, Jordan, and fenjal. Every single brand upholds the high-quality promise of the Dr. Beckmann Group.

We combine the value-driven culture of a medium-sized company with the reach and influence of a global player. With over 500 employees from 40 nations, we develop innovative, high-quality, and sustainable products every day. We are problem solvers at heart. Flat hierarchies and short decision-making paths make us an agile company that sees change as an opportunity.

The parent company of our group is delta pronatura GmbH, headquartered in Egelsbach, Germany.

Our Mission:
To make people’s lives around the world permanently easier – with high-quality, innovative, practical, and environmentally friendly everyday products.

Our Responsibility:
Long-term thinking and sustainable action guide our decisions – for generations, not quarters.

Our Strengths:
As a fourth-generation family business, we stand for innovation, quality, and closeness – to our customers, employees, and partners worldwide.

What Drives Us:
Embracing change instead of standing still – with bold ideas, technological excellence, and an open, appreciative corporate culture, we are driving our mission forward.

Learn more about our innovations, international successes, and the people who make us strong. Follow us and become part of our journey!

Name: June Co. - Mosquito Inc | West Emory
Description: We are a multifaceted product development and design studio located in the heart of Minneapolis. Armed with strategy and fueled by passion, we ideate, design, and manufacture beautiful products for retail buyers and consumers. From exclusive + private label to our owned brands, we apply our experience and marketplace intelligence to create collections that speak to your customer.

Name: OwlCrate
Description: OwlCrate is the world's best monthly book subscription box!

Name: Nite Ize, Inc.
Description: Nite Ize was founded by creativity and has continued to commit to innovation throughout 26 years of business. Nite Ize products and brands strive to exemplify problem/solution based products with quality and performance at the core. We create products that we need and make them work. We take pride in the way we conduct our business and do what we say we will do. We are passionate about our products, our customers satisfaction, our team members, partners and our environment.

Name: Mayku
Description:
We believe that anyone should have access to the tools needed to create. We started Mayku to make manufacturing accessible to anyone.  

Centralised mass manufacturing is complicated, slow, expensive, and risky. Because of this, it’s only viable for large runs. There is a huge barrier to entry for people and businesses getting started. 

We’re building the tools for desktop mass production. A Desktop Factory consisting of machines, materials, and software for starting production lines. 

We envision a world where anyone can manufacture what is needed, where it’s needed when it’s needed. We believe this is key to helping accelerate the global shift to local manufacturing.

Name: MM Brands Inc.
Description: MM Brands Inc. is a consumer packaged goods platform within the global legal cannabis sector, dedicated to partnering with best-in-class brands that share the same vision of integrity, commitment to consistent dosing and product efficacy. From adult-use concentrates, confections and beverages to tinctures and cosmetic serums, our products help enhance all aspects of life for both people and pets.

Name: Montana Renewables, LLC
Description: Montana Renewables uses waste feedstocks to produce low-emission alternatives that directly replace fossil fuel products including renewable hydrogen, renewable diesel and sustainable aviation fuel. Montana Renewables, LLC is an unrestricted subsidiary of Calumet Specialty Products Partners, L.P.

Name: Astra Sweets
Description: Astra Sweets adds flavour to the confectionery sector. From our plants in Turnhout (BE), Harlingen (NL) and Nijkerk (NL), we bring delight to consumers in over 25 countries with our delicious sweets. We mainly develop and manufacture private label products, but also have a number of strong brands in our portfolio, including Frisia. Within 3 product categories: gums, mallows and UFOs, we capitalise on trends and develop new ones ourselves, in order to give clients every opportunity and to surprise consumers. Innovation, quality and service play a major role in our organisation.

Name: Fieldcraft Survival
Description: Fieldcraft Survival is a veteran-owned company that teaches you what you need to know and equips you with what you need to have for survival in the worst-case scenarios. We want you to be a more capable you.

Name: BellRock Brands
Description: BellRock Brands is a consumer packaged goods platform within the global legal cannabis sector, dedicated to partnering with best-in-class brands that share the same vision of integrity, commitment to consistent dosing and product efficacy. From adult-use concentrates, confections and beverages to tinctures and cosmetic serums, our products help enhance all aspects of life for both people and pets.

Name: Mercury Racing
Description:
For Mercury Racing, innovation isn’t optional. The minute we finish an engine is the minute we start engineering its replacement. It’s more than tweaking the drive or increasing the horses. It’s about starting a revolution. We don’t just aim to outperform our competitors – we aim to outperform ourselves.

Our goal is to never be comfortable with where we are – because being comfortable means we’re standing still. There’s always something to chase. And we refuse to stop even when we catch it.

Mercury Racing is a division of Mercury Marine and Brunswick Corporation.

Name: Spaas Kaarsen NV
Description:
ABOUT | "Here, the candle has been burning since 1853"   

Since its creation as a small, local candle factory back in 1853 in the town of Hamont in Limburg, Spaas has become one of the most important European players in the candles market. Over the past 165 years, we have grown steadily. With more than 250 employees, Spaas is not only market leader in Belgium, but also a respected international supplier with a strong home base in Europe.

Down through the years, Spaas has remained a strong family-owned company. The company is now being run by the fifth generation. Besides our production site at Hamont, we have a factory in Poland and a Europe-wide sales organization.

  MISSION & VALUES   

Spaas wants to surprise and inspire people with products that create an ambiance and add a touch of warmth to their lives. By responding to modern-day trends, we make it possible for all consumers to personalize their homes using the Spaas range of products. That’s why we offer candles and accessories in different colors, shapes, and scents. For every season or occasion, consumers will find the right candles.

  QUALITY   
Spaas has an excellent reputation when it comes to the quality of our candles. We find it important to make products that do what they are promised to do with safety.

Name: Rana Storage - Material Handling Equipments
Description: Rana Material Handling Equipments Pvt. Ltd leading manufacturers, suppliers & exporters of warehouse rack and material handling equipments. Our range comprises of Warehouse & Industrial storage rack, hydraulic dock leveler, hydraulic dock ramp, hydraulic stackers, hydraulic goods lifts, hydraulic pallet truck, Scissor lifts etc.

Name: On Campus Marketing
Description:
OCM (aka On Campus Marketing) started as a college fundraiser and has evolved into the #1 university-endorsed provider of dorm essentials, care packages, and graduation gifts in the United States. OCM isn’t just another shopping site, we are a retailer, an ecommerce provider, a marketer, a fundraiser, and a partner to the Higher Education community.
 
Why OCM? 
•	Exclusive partnerships with over 900 leading universities; operating and marketing customizable ecommerce sites to support their students and families throughout the college lifecycle
•	The best college assortment of bedding, bath, décor, organization, carpets, kitchen necessities, carpets, and furniture for student’s dorm rooms, suites, or apartments via OCM.com and DormRoom.com 
•	The largest assortment of Care Packages and plans, gifts for every occasion, and Graduation Gifts via OCM.com and CarePackages.com
 
Who is OCM?
•	Developer, curator, and seller of the latest college styles and brands, including our private label Dawn bedding collection
•	Operator of best-in-class multi-channel marketing and ecommerce services for college students and their families
•	Supporter of life’s moments of transition before, during and after college as well as other life moments with solutions that reduce stress and support living and wellness away from home
•	Proud to give back, donating over $50M to universities to support campus activities and students in need

We are a purpose-driven, scrappy, and motivated team, devoted to supporting students, their families, and our university partners

Name: Hunter Douglas Australia
Description: Hunter Douglas Australia part of the Hunter Douglas worldwide group, the established worldwide design leader in custom window fashions. Ever since we created the aluminum blind in 1946, we have continued to redefine our industry with award-winning revolutionary products that deliver extraordinary style and unrivaled functionality at the window. The belief that great design informs all design is the driving philosophy of our company. It fuels our ongoing development of new and proprietary products that lend exceptional beauty and style to the décor while also providing technologically advanced solutions to everyday practical needs, such as insulation at the window, managing natural light, the convenience of motorisation, enhanced child safety, sound absorption and much more. The iconic Luxaflex Window Fashions is just one of the stable of brands within the group.

Name: Globo giocattoli
Description:
GLOBO TODAY
More than 60 employees at its headquarters in Illasi, near Verona.
A total surface of over 1500 square meters.
A trading company in Hong Kong dedicated to the selection of the best toys also in terms of safety and quality.
A 32.000sqm warehouse that allow to handle over 800 containers and 100 trucks in order to ship to our customers 1,200 lorries per year.
And a two-levels showroom of 2,500 square meters entirely renovated, the largest in Italy.
These are the numbers of Globo today.
The most important italian player for the importation of value for money toys, with more than 30-year history of steady growth.
This growth has transformed a small family business run by Carla and Giovanni Ortolani in a “top players” in the industry, able to anticipate market needs exploring, selecting, controlling and making available to every children a surprising variety of toys.

MISSION
At Globo we believe that playing is a right of all children, without exception.
We consider its presence as fundamental in every step of that wonderful path that leads each of us to become a man.
Our responsibility, even to parents, is to facilitate and support this process with safe and challenging toys.
Our task is to explore the worlds of fun selecting only the most suitable products in order to free the power of imagination, the power of creativity, musical talent and mental flexibility.
Skills that transform every child which is free to play in a child which is free to grow and become a fully human being.

Name: Grupo Distribuidor Menax
Description:
Más de 50 años nos avalan como distribuidores mayoristas en el sector. Conocemos de primera mano y con amplia experiencia el producto que trabajamos, consiguiendo así poder ofrecer a nuestro cliente un acertado abanico de producto para su punto de venta.
Casi 3 generaciones son ya las que siguen adelante con este proyecto familiar y que ven, en el menaje de cocina, no un producto al uso sino una pasión por la que trabajar día a día.
Estaremos encantados de poner nuestra experiencia al servicio de su negocio.

Name: MakeAdditive
Description:
Partner ufficiali in Italia di brand di stampanti 3D & materiali.
Divulgazione e promozione di soluzioni innovative per l’additive manufacturing.
Un team vendite pronto a sostenerti nel tuo progetto di acquisto di si soluzioni per la stampa 3D.
Un team tecnico, esperto, per fornirti la tua migliore esperienza di service di stampa 3D. 


Via Alcide de Gasperi 26, Bologna.

Name: VELAMP INDUSTRIES SRL
Description:
VELAMP was born in 1972 as an acronym of VENEGONO LAMPADE, town of the biggest
production plant of former Fratelli Pagani Spa. Founded in 1906, Fratelli Pagani has
accompanied the evolution of Italy throughout the century.
First battery factory in Italy, the firm started to invest and developed the first portable lamps. So
started a long series of innovative products that will still use everyday:
- Invention of the first flashlight
- Creation of the first anti black-out lamp
- Invention of the first headlamp
- Invention of dynamo lamp

Fratelli Pagani was an actor in Italian History: as a supplier of the Italian armed forces its main
factory was totally destroyed by the angloamerican bombings in 1943. After WWII the
Company started its business from scratch and following the “Italian Miracle” produced
portable lamps, mainly for the major actors of the market: Duracell, Rayovac, Varta, Philips….
VELAMP was created with the aim to give an Italian brand to the Company.
From this moment on VELAMP has continued to evolve and innovate, so as to give answers to
the always renewed needs for portable lighting. 

Pioneer on its market, VELAMP has always known how to interpret the technical evolutions
(development of scuba diving, invention of the LED…) to anticipate the market and offer design
and innovative products.

Today, VELAMP INDUSTRIES SRL, owner of theVELAMP brand, intends to continue this story,
offering portable and service lighting for 6 major applications:
- LED general lighting 
- Home portable lighting
- Hobby and Work lighting
- Outdoor lighting
- Gift & Premium 
- Batteries

The strength of its values (Solidarity, Progress, Performance) makes VELAMP a fundamental
actor on this market: responsible and one step ahead. Always.

Name: Paradygm Consulting
Description:
Do you have innovative products that need to get traction with national retailers, excessive product, lack of business, or are you in a stage of moderate to explosive growth and require direction? Or maybe you’re just tired of feeling like you’re always playing runner-up to another manufacturer or supplier. We can help.
Our formalized process uses fact and relationship-based growth drivers to determine the best way to move your business forward. We are not another retail buyer or rep agency – we become an extension of your team and provide full-time sales account management.

We have extensive real-world experience as both retailers and manufacturers. This gives us a unique perspective and allows us to deliver similarly unique solutions for you.

The companies who choose to work with us use our keen insights to learn the best ways to optimize product distribution, breakthrough sales barriers, streamline planning processes, manage data, and so much more. Whatever your business challenges are, we will rise to meet them. Contact us today to learn how we can help you optimize for year-over-year success.

Name: Maped Mexico
Description:
◗ Diseñador y productor de artículos escolares, escritura y oficina. Maped es la única compañía en la industria de papelería en diseñar, producir y vender a gran escala un amplio rango de productos. Su reputación global y expansión es impulsada por su innovación funcional, diseño y calidad en los productos ofrecidos. 

◗ Una empresa familar, un grupo global.
Maped ha tenido una visión a largo placo para su desarrollo corporativo desde 1947, se ha reforzado por su condición de propiedad familiar y estatus independiente. Gracias a su excepcional cobertura geográfica y penetración de mercado, ofrece los beneficios de un líder mundial indiscutible.

Name: Courts Fiji
Description:
Courts is the largest retailer of Electrical, Furniture, Computers, Audio-Visual, Floor Coverings, Sporting and Home Goods with store outlets located in all major cities and towns in Fiji.

Courts is also the largest provider of Consumer Finance outside of the regulated financial institution sector with a current live Customer base of over 75,000 Customers.

Name: Empresas Davis s.a.
Description:
1943Se funda Empresas Davis S.A
Nuestra empresa fue fundada por los señores Frank Westcott y Laurence Smith. En sus inicios, la empresa se enfocó en la representación de licencias de compañías internacionales de gran prestigio, como E.C. de Witt, Bristol-Myers, Perfumes Dana, J.B.Williams Co., Wella y Chesebrough-Pond´s.

1950Consolidación de Davis
En la década del 50 se invirtió fuertemente en las áreas de fabricación, logística y comercialización, a fin de satisfacer las necesidades de los consumidores y los altos estándares de calidad de las empresas representadas, consolidándonos como una de las principales empresas chilenas en el rubro.
  
1980Desarrollo y ampliación de Nuestros Negocios
Creamos la División Farmacéutica, a cargo de la licencia de los productos Bristol-Myers y posteriormente, la prestigiosa línea de insumos hospitalarios de B. Braun Medical. Asimismo, desarrollamos innovadores productos de nutrición enteral y parenteral, como ADN y Vigorbán, los cuales se exportan a varios países del mundo.
  
1997Adquisición de importantes marcas
Adquirimos la marca de protección femenina Donnasept, hoy líder en el mercado. Más tarde, y con el fin de potenciar aún más nuestro negocio, adquirimos las marcas de perfumería de Laboratorios Ghia S.A. y la División de Fragancias Femeninas de Lever Chile. En 2002 la empresa adquirió la marca de higiene bucal Dento.
  
2000Joint Venture Davis – Familia Sancela SCA

Our company dates back to 1946 when we were founded by Henry Bross as a small family business. First an R.V. park and then a service station with the intention of serving the local neighborhood, a need for quality parts and accessories at an affordable price quickly became apparent. The company began growing to serve an ever-larger market, and in 1976 we constructed a massive new showroom, warehouse, and installation facility that quickly became a regional destination. Customers began traveling from all of the surrounding states to get the supplies they needed and were unable to find locally, or for a fair price.

We carry thousands of vehicle accessories such as custom-fit trailer hitches for over 3,100 different vehicles, performance chips, heavy-duty towing supplies, trailer parts, bike racks, cargo carriers, step bars, tonneau covers, lights, car covers, RV supplies, floor mats, and much more, to help you make your vehicle more useful and more fun. Name: RedeCan
Description:
Quality Cannabis Starts with How It's Made
No shortcuts, no excuses. With over 30 years experience in agriculture, we are devoted to delivering you quality cannabis. As a leading Canadian producer of medical cannabis under the Access to Cannabis for Medical Purposes Regulations (ACMPR) and licensed producer of recreational cannabis, located in heart of the beautiful Niagara escarpment, our state-of-the-art greenhouse allows for the optimal use of natural sunlight and clean fresh water.

Our Promise
We are committed to delivering the ultimate experience, from seed to sale.

100% Canadian homegrown
100% Greenhouse grown
Natural growing conditions

Our Process
We are the original growers—farming is in our DNA. We’ve married our years of agriculture experience and our state-of-the-art greenhouse facility to create a cannabis family that’s in a league of its own. 

Our Facility
We grow our cannabis crops in a controlled environment with automatic environmental controls for temperature, humidity, sunlight levels and irrigation to produce premium plants.

Production Practices
We’re serious about consumer safety and product quality, so we follow strict policies on cleanliness, sanitary conditions and production practices.
- All plants are fed with clean, fresh water from a deep well
- No pesticides are used; all controls are managed through biological controls, such as beneficial insects like ladybugs or pest specific biologicals
- All staff wear protective clothing and facility specific shoes that are not worn beyond our facility doors
- All strains are lab tested for THC and CBD levels, pesticides, residues, heavy metals, bacteria among others tests

Name: TPRG Fragrances Pvt Ltd.
Description:
During 1917, in the Rock Fort City of Trichy, a Trading house was formed in the name of M/s. T.P.R.Gopalswamy Naidu & Company, dealing with aromatic chemicals, raw materials for various aroma and Personal care products by the founder - Sri. T.P.R Gopalswamy Naidu. 
After the demise of the founder, his son Mr. T.P.R.Santhanam Naidu succeeded. Being a child prodigy, he had a canny knack for identifying new product concepts. In 1950, Mr Santhanam invented the Dasangam Powder, which is still widely used in most hawans. In the 1960’s he introduced a revolutionary concept - a natural long-lasting perfumery powder - Javadhu Powder. Subsequently, niche products like neeradal podi (Bath Powder) were conceptualised which later blossomed as Kangaroo Kasturi which is still a market leader in the segment. 
In the late 1970's, the sons -Mr. S. Gopi, (Late) Mr. S.Ramesh & Mr. S. Balaji, the present leaders of the business, both veterans in the art of perfumery & blending, mastered the art of blending aroma into quality products with distinction and flair joined the business. Their timeless effort soared the business to new heights by introducing products such as Agarbathis, Sambrani dhoop and Speciality Products.
During the year 1999, M/S TPRG Fragrances formulated as a family business carrying its founder & his pristine heritage legacy. In the year 2000, the Kangaroo Brand was launched. In a span of few years, the Kangaroo Brand emerged to be one of India's leading incense manufacturers & exporters. 
In the Centenary year of 2017, the next generation of the family - Mr. Praghadeshkar Ramesh joined the business. Since then the Company started focussing on the new changes & challenges in the information age. In 2019 the new generation decided to give the Company's umbrella brand a renaissance and launched the brand "GN1917" marking the 100 years of legacy. 
Today GN1917 is is one of the leading manufacturers & exporters of incense & fragrance components in India.

Name: Grubbly Farms
Description:
In 2015, two cousins from Georgia Tech founded Grubbly Farms, a startup in Atlanta pioneering the use of sustainable insect-based protein in pet food.

Grubbly's protein of choice? Black soldier fly grubs. Loaded with benefits and light on the earth. Our grubs are harvested on food that would otherwise go to waste, providing relief to our landfills and combatting our world's massive food waste issue. These nutrient-rich grubs have the power to replace conventional protein such as fishmeal, providing a healthy, hypoallergenic protein to our pets while providing relief to our overfished oceans.

Unlike other companies using environmentally-friendly insect protein, Grubbly has a unique go-to-market strategy that’s transforming how we feed our pets while disrupting the ag industry, and accelerating the production of grubs on sustainable farms around the world. 

What kind of pets are gobbling up all of these grubs?

Chickens from coast to coast are naturally loving Grubbly's pet food. Over 6% of Americans own chickens as pets, and they prioritize high quality feed and snacks. When you’re eating your flock’s eggs, you have higher standards for what your flock eats.

With premium nutrition, highly traceable ingredients, and sustainably-grown grubs, Grubbly Farms is helping backyard chickens return to their roots using insect protein and plant-based foods. 

Backyard chicken owners will also be the leaders and pioneers of a more sustainable protein for all pets. In fact, dogs and cats are drawn to the naturally sweet smell of grubs, generating demand for Grubbly pet food for companion pets too. 

As the Grubbly brand continues to blossom, we can keep our pets happily nourished while helping our planet thrive.

Description: اشتري عبر الانترنت واستمتع بأكبر عروض جوملا مصر التي لا تنتهي وتسوق من بين اكبر خصومات المتاحة طوال العام، وكل هذا من أجل إرضاء عملائنا. انضم إلى أعضاء صفحتنا على فيس بوك لتعرف كل العروض والتخفيضات قبل اي شخص آخر والتي تشمل اسبوع الموبايلات، رمضان، عيد ميلاد جوملا، عيد الأم او وايت فريداي. لدينا فريق متخصص للإجابة على كل أسئلتك فورًا على مواقع التواصل الإجتماعي وخدمة العملاء متوفرة طوال الأسبوع للمساعدة في حل أي مشاكل والإجابة على جميع الاستفسارات، ببساطة اتصل علي 01032949990. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، إذا كنت تمتلك محل أو متجر، يمكنك الآن البدء في بيع منتجاتك على جوملا مصر حيث نحرص دائمًا على مساعدتك في زيادة مبيعاتك! كبر حجم أعمالك الآن وانضم لفريق شركة جوملا. جوملا مصر توفر لك أفضل خدمات عبر الانترنت، منتجات أصلية 100% وعروض حصرية. استمتع بأسرع توصيل الى باب المنزل، طرق دفع امنة و سهلة، بالاضافة الى ارجاع مجاني لجميع المنتجات خلال 14 يوم من الاستلام، ويمكنك ايضا زيارة صفحة سياسة الاسترجاع للمزيد من المعلومات عن إرجاع منتجات جوميا. ابقوا معنا للحصول على أفضل الأسعار في مصر على جميع المنتجات المفضلة لديك مع جوملا مصر.

Name: TCN Group
Description:
La TCN Group è il polo industriale d’avanguardia sito in Alba, Italia, che raggruppa le attività delle aziende:

- Bianco s.p.a. (produzione macchinari per il settore tessile, tessuto non tessuto, tessile tecnico)
- Bianco Engineering (produzione macchinari per il settore packaging e per l'automazione industriale)
- TCN (lavorazioni meccaniche di precisione)
- TCN VD (lavorazioni meccaniche per i settori dell'autoveicolo e del motociclo)
- THOK E-Bikes (mountain bikes a pedalata assistita)
- Galup (marchio storico del settore dolciario da ricorrenza)
- Mandrile Melis (tradizione cioccolatiera artigianale)
- Golosi di Salute (la pasticceria artigianale attenta alla salute)
- Pasticceria Cuneo (laboratorio artigianale specializzato nella produzione di dolci glutenfree)
- Alba Mobility (azienda di produzione di quadricicli elettrici, una realtà innovativa nel campo della mobilità sostenibile)

Visita il nostro sito www.tcngroup.it per maggiori informazioni.

Name: Big E Food Corporation - Lemon Square
Description:
Back in 1985, Lemon Square had its modest beginnings by offering local communities a small selection of homemade-style baked goods. Over the years, its growing popularity & consumer base turned Lemon Square into one of the largest producers of quality baked products in the Philippines, offering the largest & most diverse product line to a mass market of millions. 

As a 100% Filipino-owned company, Lemon Square attained its position by understanding the tastes of its consumers. From the very start, Lemon Square’s vision of providing people with delicious yet inexpensive bakeshop-quality bread, cakes and pastries in the convenience of their favorite supermarkets and stores has been the foundation of its success. This tradition of baking goodness continues today, a testament to the dedication & passion of the people behind Lemon Square.

Name: BioFilm, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1991, BioFilm, Inc, a privately held company, manufactures and distributes high-quality healthcare products that contribute to the well-being of all who use them. Our flagship product, Astroglide Personal Lubricant, is one of the world's top-selling personal lubricants. 

Our headquarters located in Vista, CA is home to sales, marketing, research & development, quality control, regulatory affairs, customer service, operations, engineering, and distribution.

Name: Clive Coffee
Description:
Can we transform everyone into a home barista in one day? Probably. Will we? We certainly hope so. Our passion is helping our consumers enjoy café-style espresso at home by providing a curated collection of high-end espresso machines, grinders, and accessories to people who love amazing morning rituals. 

From our office and showroom in Portland, Oregon we import thousands of machines from Italy and Germany every year, bringing the style, sophistication, and taste of European espresso home to the U.S.

Name: EFILA
Description:
Somos una empresa de capital peruano, contando con  más de 16 años de presencia en el mercado. Contamos con un portafolio de más de 800 productos y permitiéndonos desarrollar nuestras marcas propias como Tuinies, Baby Gardy, Sippy, Family Doctor, Ela Fem Care, Pet Care, Bahli y Sexe.et.

Nuestro objetivo es estar a la vanguardia en packaging y diseño de productos, siendo innovadores y de muy buena calidad. Contamos con red de distribución propia y distribuidores autorizados, llegando así a cada rincón del país.

Name: Padideh Shimi Paydar (PSP Group)
Description:
Padideh Shimi Payedar Group is one of the subsidiaries of Golrang Industrial Group which was established based on valuable ideas of Haj Mohammad Karim Fazli, the founder of Golrang Industrial group, and Engineer Syed Mohammad Bagher Fazelian expertise, aiming to focus on health products and services in 2005.
 Producing newly designed and high quality products, creating a capillary distribution and sales network all over Iran, as well as paying particular attention to the needs of the customers, the company has rapidly expanded its products throughout the domestic and international markets so that it has become a large and dynamic industrial group in the country’s industry.
Padideh Simi Payedar is currently known as one of the successful and entrepreneur Iranian companies having more than 1650 cooperators. 
Among the products of the company are products in home caring group such as dishwashing detergents, surface cleaners, glass cleaners, bleaches, toilet cleaners, and drain openers; fabric caring products such as laundry detergents, fabric softeners, laundry powders, and Ironing sprays; products in body and hair caring group including body shampoos, different types of hair shampoos, hair conditioners, hand washing liquids, and soap; and polymer products including Garbage bag, freezer bag, cellophane wrap and kitchen tablecloths which have a significant share of the market in this field.

Name: Superior Tire & Rubber Corp
Description:
Superior Tire and Rubber Corp. is a designer and manufacturer of solid polyurethane and rubber industrial wear products - often incorporating precision machined steel components.

Material Handling - solid industrial tires, wheels and casters for forklifts, manlifts, AGV's, and floor maintenance equipment.

Construction Wear Parts - wear parts, including tire and wheel assemblies, for the road construction, mining and agricultural industries.

Name: Rescript
Description:
As India’s leading sustainable stationery brand, we craft 100% recycled, unbleached paper products that help businesses and individuals write responsibly—without cutting down a single tree.

Our products are designed to be eco-friendly without compromising on performance. Whether it's notebooks, journals, or corporate stationery, Rescript delivers smooth, durable, and premium-quality writing experiences—all while reducing waste and carbon footprints.

Write to us: care@rescript.in

Name: SP Productos S.A.
Description:
SP PRODUCTOS es una empresa argentina de artículos de escritura y papelería con más de 25 años de experiencia en el mercado.

Nuestra marca insignia SIMBALL, junto con las marcas Crayola, Jovi, Dello e Y-Plus, de las cuales somos distribuidores oficiales, llegan a todo el país gracias a una sólida red de distribuidores mayoristas que confían en nuestros productos.

Nuestro portafolio viene a sumar más de 900 artículos elaborados con los más altos controles de calidad, contribuyendo al campo de la escritura en continua innovación y diseño renovado, siempre siguiendo las últimas tendencias.

Nuestro principal objetivo es ofrecer siempre opciones con atributos diferenciales que demuestren competitividad en precios para poder ofrecer al consumidor la más amplia variedad de productos con nuestro sello de calidad indiscutible.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: BUN Holding
Description:
In the Bun holding, we fight to make our dreams come true. Alongside building this reality, we take pleasure in looking at things we once imagined, come to fruition. Thanks to our team’s genius and creativity, we believe that nothing can stand between us and our goals
We, in Bun holding, started our activity in cultural and publishing fields in 2003. Our journey started with educational books in Kheilisabz. After 12 years, in 2015 we took another step forward and founded our children and teenagers’ publication, Porteghal. 2018 was the year we globalized our ideas and crossed the borders. We founded our international brand, Magink in Germany in order to publish books in English and German. We expanded our activities once again in 2019 and set foot in new territories; Zingo, our toys and board games brand, Khoob, our adult fiction and non-fiction books, and Barizo chain restaurants were born. Soon after our widespread success and acclaim in various fields, we added three more brands to our holding; Monthasheran, an educational brand, Moon, our popular books brand, and also Elipon, a brand for producing stationery. At Bun holding, we are constantly thinking of growing ourselves and our business, and we will be adding more brands to our holding in the near future.

Name: Southwind Floors
Description: Challenging the status quo while manufacturing carpet and developing the finest hard surface products with quality, style, and color in mind.

Name: MONTZI Mountain Spirits
Description:
A high end range of Real Fruit Spirits born in the Alps and inspired by après-ski. A unique blend of organic flowers, including chamomile, edelweiss, mint and gentian perfectly complemented by the natural sweetness of real pressed fruit. With flavours like Sour Cherry, Blackberry, Peach and Pink Grapefruit, MONTZI offers a wonderful variety that caters to every taste. 

The name MONTZI is a clever fusion of French, Latin and Italian words for mountain oats homage to its roots in the European Alps. ‘Mont’ in French, ‘monti’ in Italian, and ‘mons’ in Latin come together to form the brand name, representing the brand’s connection to the majestic mountains where it originated. 

MONTZI’s purpose is to Save The Snow. The company has planted over 500,000 trees with the Sumatran Orangutan Society since 2017, contributing to the fight against climate change by reducing CO2. 

Enjoy MONTZI in real fruit spritzes and cocktails or as a more sociable, lower ABV, and better shooter. 

Find us at www.themontzidrink.com

Name: Sanycces
Description:
Desde 1993 en Sanycces nos dedicamos a la fabricación y el diseño de productos de baño destinados a enriquecer su experiencia de ducha o baño diaria.

Desde nuestra sede central, 17.000 metros cuadrados situados a orillas del mar Mediterráneo, hacemos llegar al mundo el bienestar Sanycces. 

Sanycces mira al mundo. Somos una marca consolidada, líder en el sector de equipamiento de baño español con vocación de expansión. En los últimos años hemos experimentado un fuerte crecimiento en el mercado exterior donde ya exportamos el 60% de nuestra producción total en los países más importantes de Europa, América Latina, África y Oriente Próximo.

La clave de Sanycces. Contamos con un amplio equipo de investigadores que estudian y desarrollan bañeras, platos de ducha, mamparas, lavabos y accesorios de baño; además de nuestro equipamiento Wellness que incluye sistemas de hidromasaje para bañeras y duchas, spas y saunas. 
Acabados a mano. En el proceso de fabricación de nuestra compañía conviven los últimos avances tecnológicos en el tratamiento de las materias primas con los acabados de técnicos especializados artesanos, capaces de transformar un producto estándar en el deseo expreso del cliente.
Nuestro equipo de profesionales es capaz de diseñar a tu medida el espacio de bienestar que necesites. Un tratamiento personalizado junto a procesos de producción optimizados y garantizados nos permiten ofrecer alta calidad a costes competitivos.

Sanycces apuesta de futuro. El progreso consiste en renovarse y por ello invertimos en la Investigación y el Desarrollo de nuevos materiales y productos, siempre teniendo en cuenta la sostenibilidad.

Name: Robert Welch Designs Ltd
Description:
Robert Welch is a British brand renowned for designing timeless stainless-steel cutlery, barware, and holloware. Found in five-star hotels, fine dining establishments, airlines, and homes worldwide, our expertly crafted pieces are designed to elevate every dining experience.

With a commitment to quality, seamless ordering, and fast global delivery, we ensure excellence on every table, everywhere.

Name: Colorama AB
Description:
Colorama är en av Nordens största färghandelskedjor med över 100 butiker runt om i Sverige. I butikerna finns lång erfarenhet tillsammans med teknisk och estetisk kunskap tillgänglig oavsett OM huset ska målas, ett rum ska tapetseras, golven behöver fräschas upp eller badrummet ska renoveras. Här finns ett noga utvalt och kvalitetssäkrat sortiment av färg, tapeter, golv, klinker, kakel och verktyg för alla typer av renoveringsprojekt oavsett plånbok. Låt Colorama väcka din lust och hjälpa dig längst vägen till ett slutresultat som du kan njuta av länge. 
Välkommen in till Colorama – vi finns nära dig.

Name: kdc/one, Knowlton
Description:
kdc/one Knowlton est un membre fondateur du réseau kdc/one depuis 2002. Grâce à ses partenariats stratégiques solides et à son vaste portefeuille de produits pour les meilleures marques grand public, le site compte 23 stations de traitement, 24 lignes de remplissage et 36 réservoirs de stockage fonctionnant 24 heures par jour, sept jours par semaine. Notre gamme de produits comprend des produits OTC à base d’alcool, des antisudorifiques, des désodorisants, des soins capillaires, des savons et des produits de lavage et des produits de soin de la peau fabriqués en plusieurs tailles et formats.
En tant que premier formulateur d'antisudorifiques et de désodorisants en Amérique du Nord, Knowlton a innové de manière significative dans les formes, les textures, la sélection active, les solutions naturelles et les technologies de traitement. Knowlton est également un chef de file dans la fourniture de solutions de remplissage à chaud et de solutions fraîches pour les baumes et les beurres pour le soin des cheveux et divers soins de la peau.
Nos installations comprennent un laboratoire de stabilité complet ainsi que des micro-services, fournis en interne à nos clients. Knowlton est également un fournisseur de premier plan et un spécialiste de la formulation sur mesure de médicaments en vente libre et de produits de santé naturels en Europe et aux États-Unis, fournissant des solutions pour une large gamme de principes actifs et de monographies.
Établissement de classe mondiale et chef de file de l'industrie dans le développement et la production de technologies de déodorant et de déminage à chaud, de soins de la peau, de soins des lèvres, de soins capillaires et de solutions en vente libre.

B-Corp Certified and recipients of the King's Award for Enterprise in Sustainable Development.

Name: Riobel
Description:
Chers employés et abonnés, svp dirigez-vous vers la page House of Rohl : https://www.linkedin.com/company/house-of-rohl/


Chez Riobel, nous sommes conscients de l'enthousiasme lié à l'aménagement et à la rénovation de votre maison. C'est pourquoi nous nous sommes donnés comme mission de vous offrir la meilleure sélection de robinets, de systèmes de douche et d'accessoires qui se marieront parfaitement au style de votre demeure, que ce soit pour la cuisine ou la salle de bains.
 

Nos procédés nous ont mené à la mise en place d'une équipe hors pair et d'un atelier à la fine pointe de la technologie afin de dessiner, tester, améliorer et peaufiner nos produits qui répondront à tous vos besoins de robinetterie. Ainsi, nous sommes en mesure de vous proposer des robinets et des systèmes de douche aussi esthétiques et sophistiqués que performants.
 

L'équipe de Riobel déploie tous les efforts nécessaires afin de garantir la meilleure durée de vie possible et un niveau de qualité supérieur pour les produits qu'elle offre. Nos produits Riobel sont uniques, s'installent facilement et possèdent une garantie.
 

Les robinets Riobel ont été conçus afin d'en faciliter l'installation. Les pièces mécaniques sont aisément accessibles par le dessus de votre comptoir, rendant l'entretien et le nettoyage beaucoup plus simples.
 

Tous nos robinets de lavabo et de bain à deux poignés sont dotés de cartouches de céramique allemandes afin d'assurer la durabilité et le fonctionnement optimal du système.
 

Conçus à Saint-Jérôme, en banlieue de Montréal, et desservis par un vaste réseau de distribution, les produits Riobel sont offerts à travers le Canada et dans plusieurs États américains. Riobel, c'est une tradition d'excellence depuis plus de 20 ans!
 

Grâce à nos innovations et notre savoir-faire, nous dépassons toutes vos attentes.

At Zinus, we value and empower an entrepreneurial spirit in all of our employees and recognize how essential that is to our company’s success. That’s why we’re committed to hiring exceptional people like you to join us and be a part of defining our future story.

We’ve been in the mattress and furniture game for over 16 years, compressing and delivering mattresses in a box a decade before anyone else. So we know a thing or two about this eCommerce business. Name: Flaneurz
Description:
Flaneurz comes from the will of four sneakerheads and wheel sports lovers, who wished to innovate in urban travel and soft mobility. After 3 years of R&D, the first product was launched in 2015: the detachable skates.

Designed, manufactured and assembled in France, Flaneurz products offer total flexibility. On foot or on eight wheels, the detachable Flaneurz skates allow you to assert your individuality.

The Flaneurz Clique is present in more than 50 countries, a community that continues to grow, for the pleasure of skating farther than ever.

Available on: www.flaneurz.com.

Conçus, fabriqués et assemblés en France, les produits Flaneurz offrent une totale flexibilité. À pied ou sur huits roues, les rollers détachables Flaneurz permettent d'affirmer son individualité.

Disponible sur : www.flaneurz.com.

SLADES

- 

Created in 2021, Slades is a skates-shoes brand. It combines the unique system of Flaneurz, its parent company, with affordability. With this patented and certified invention, Slades offers quality products with great versatility and a trendy look.

Name: Centauri Robotics
Description: Centauri Robotics is a consumer robotics company which develops robots to handle your daily mundane tasks, which eat up your time - the time which you can spend with your loved ones, or use to do tasks which matter more.

Name: Handi-Foil
Description: Handi-Foil is the # 1 aluminum container manufacturer in the U.S. All products are made in the United States and from green materials.The foil pan and the plastic lid are made from 100% recycled material.

Name: KLINGER Zambia
Description:
KLINGER is the world’s leading manufacturer and provider of industrial gaskets and valves. Established in 1886 as a family enterprise, the company was a pioneer in gasket technology. 

The group of KLINGER independent companies now has a worldwide presence in over 60 countries, offering independent manufacturing, expertise, sales and service, and on-site consultancies.

KLINGER Zambia provides a range of products and services to customers in the manufacturing, infrastructure, marine, oil and gas, chemicals, pulp and paper, energy, food and beverage, agriculture, mining, and pharmaceutical industries.

In addition, KLINGER Zambia provides professional support, expert material, and advanced training solutions. Our professional services include joint integrity management, on-site machining, on-line leak sealing, and shutdown support.

A local and established company, KLINGER Zambia's dedication to quality consistently guarantees the best possible service, and products that are safe, tested, reliable and innovative.

With over 130 years of experience and expertise, KLINGER remains committed to supplying state-of-the-art sealing, fluid-control, and fluid-monitoring solutions, tailored to customers' needs.

Name: W. R. Case & Sons Cutlery Co.
Description:
An American manufacturer of premium, hand-crafted knives that have been passed down for generations. Based in Bradford, PA, Case’s offerings include a wide variety of knives that fit virtually any need, from the convenience of a handy pocket knife to fixed blade sporting knives and limited edition collectibles. 

Case’s rich history began in 1889 when four brothers - William Russell (W.R.), Jean, John, and Andrew Case (a.k.a. “The Case Brothers”) began fashioning knives and selling them along a wagon trail in upstate New York. W.R.’s son, John Russell (Russ) Case, a former salesman for the Case Brothers brand, launched W.R. Case & Sons around the turn of the 20th century. Russ’s father acted as his son’s consultant, helping to stabilize the company’s early finances while building a reputation as a dependable supplier of high-quality cutlery.

A unique tang stamp dating system used since the very early days of its history has made the Case brand one of the world’s favorite collectable brands. The Case Collectors Club, with 19,000 active members, is the largest known knife collecting association in the world.

Name: Lotte Wellfood
Description:
LOTTE Group (Hangul: 롯데 그룹), is South Korea's fifth largest business conglomerate. LOTTE Group consists of over 90 business units employing 60,000 people engaged in such diverse industries as candy manufacturing, beverages, hotels, fast food, retail, financial services, heavy chemicals, electronics, IT, construction, publishing, and entertainment. Lotte runs additional businesses in China, Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, India, United States, United Kingdom, Russia, Philippines, Pakistan and Poland (Lotte bought Poland's largest candy company Wedel from Kraft Foods in June 2010). Today, Lotte is the largest confectionery manufacturer in South Korea. 

LOTTE Group, LOTTE Confectionery was established in 1967, and has since grown to be No.1 in the delicious world of sweets. Exporting to more than 70 countries for more than US$ 2billion in annual sales, it has remained the leader in the industry through continued development of new products, adoption of diversified marketing strategies and advanced distribution methods. It has also contributed to the sophistication and globalization of the nation’s food industry with the development of technology related to foods of the future. 
 
LOTTE Confectionery plans to increase attention to its functional food business, as well as develop high value-added products, such as health foods. The company also seeks to accelerate efforts overseas, pushing ahead into markets in Asia.

Name: Dalmia Continental Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Dalmia Continental Pvt Ltd (DCPL), a Dalmia family venture, was incorporated in 1990. In 2003, DCPL launched Leonardo Olive Oil, which soon became the leading brand in its product segment and a pioneer in establishing the popularity, image and use of olive oil in India. In 2014, DCPL sold Leonardo Olive Oil to Cargill India.

In 2007, DCPL launched Hudson Canola Oil, a heart-healthy edible oil. Canola is ideal for Indian cooking since it is a standard edible grade oil with neutral taste and flavour. It is also extremely healthy, with the lowest content of saturated fats amongst all oils, high levels of monounsaturated fats, antioxidants and Omega-3. DCPL made Hudson Canola Oil a leading brand and household name. In 2018, DCPL sold the Hudson Canola Oil brand to Bunge India.

In 2013, DCPL launched Marco Polo OliRyze, a blend of rice brand oil & olive pomace oil. In addition DCPL’s product line included Leonardo Olives, Leonardo Pasta, Leonardo Olive Oil Pickles & Leonardo Hazelnuts. Besides its own brands Leonardo, Hudson & Marco Polo, DCPL at various times also exclusively marketed and sold Clausthaler Non-alcoholic Beer, Grace Kennedy Coconut Water & ArteOliva sauces and
dressing.

Today, the Dalmia family and its relatives have interests, among others, in publishing, explosives, cement, magnesite, sugar, milk products, leisure resorts and hotels, refractories, castings, cigarettes, soda ash, textiles and services such as advertising, travel management, television programming, software development and finance. The total turnover of these companies exceeds US $ 15 billion.

Name: MATGroup
Description:
MATGroup  is a multinational organization, specialized in providing a comprehensive and diverse range of product and technology solutions in the areas of passive safety, technical apparel and hands-free communication for several of the main motorcycling and sports brands. 

MATGroup , as a Global Technology and Services Platform, works with worldwide leading companies and brands in each market and product category to jointly achieve a level of differentiation through real, sustainable and powerful technologies, directly integrated, or provided to be integrated into their final products.

Founded in 1997, MATGroup offers from the marketing reasearch, product design and development, product certification and/or homologation, till the QA & QC and production management. Headquartered in Spain, MATGroup has subsidiaries in Italy, China, Hong Kong and Vietnam. 


MATGroup Technology Platforms: 
      M-FORGE Composite 
      M-CLIMA Personal Climate Management System
      TWIINS Connected in Movement
      TWIINS Inside Technology
      CORIUM+ Smart Leather
      AIR-CRADLE Comfort Lining

Name: KWC IRAN
Description:
The importance of water consumption has always been a sensitive subject for either public or private organizations in Iran.The crisis of water consumption has led to the necessity of establishing a high-tech and high-quality faucet manufacturer who is able to produce economical , beautifully designed faucets for luxury kitchens and bathrooms within Iran . 

Consequently Iran sanitary and industrial valve company has started this mission under the license of the well – known Swiss company , KWC , in 1984 located in Saveh / Iran . KWC- Iran factory is facititated with high-tech casting,polishing machining,electroplating and mold making. It has benefited from KWC- Swiss technology and standards.

KWC- Iran has dramatically improved the culture of water consumption among Iranians , especially in the recent years . Nowadays KWC-Iran has become one of the most well-known faucet manufacturers, under the license of KWC-Swiss , within Iran .

Name: Sevinçler Sağlık Ürünleri A.Ş
Description:
After long feasibility studies, Sevinçler Health Products Inc. entered the hygienic sector with the production of baby diaper in 2010. Our company, which aims to grow by adding value to its sector with its experience from the past , progresses without compromising the honesty and human value policy in this direction.

Our founders, who continued production and earnings policy without compromising quality throughout their commercial life, gained the trust of their customers in this sector as well and the growth continued without slowing down. This growth was first realized with the expansion of diaper capacity. After a short while,with the decision of investment for the production of adult diaper, wet wipes and hygienic pad in 2012 ,the company became one of the important producers of the sector.

Sevinçler Health Products Inc.,which is one of the important producers of the sector, continued to its grow and started to produce underpad with its new investment in 2014, and shortly afterwards added baby shampoo and adult pants products to its portfolio and since then the company has been offering one of the most expanded portfolios in its sector to its customers around the World.

As Sevincler Health Products Inc., we continue to grow by adding value to its sector and country by exporting our products from our modern facility to over 70 countries without making any concessions from our quality and values.

Name: CyDen
Description:
Founded in Swansea, Wales in 2002, CyDen is the world’s leading expert in light-based beauty technology, and global market leader for home-use Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal devices. In 2009, Cyden launched its first home-use product in the UK, and ever since it has focused on both technical innovation and clinical advancement in the pursuit of market leading products.

CyDen has shown huge success globally and is widely recognised for its international impact. In 2019, Cyden was awarded the Queen’s Award for Enterprise, in recognition of its efforts in international trade. To date, over 2.5 million devices have been sold globally and our products are now sold in over 50 international territories in regions across APAC, Europe, USA and China. This growth has seen CyDen's headcount grow from 16 colleagues to 400 and open its first overseas office in Tokyo, Japan.  

From research and development to product testing, we look at every step of the product journey. We never create a product unless it has a customer benefit. 

CyDen’s brand, SmoothSkin has also won global recognition, including a category win in the Allure Best of Beauty Awards 2021 and features in Forbes, Cosmopolitan, Vogue, The Independent and Harpers Bazaar. 

To learn more about us, visit: https://www.cyden.com/about-us/

Name: Maxima Watches
Description:
P A Time Industries, with a legacy of over 50 years in the Wrist Watch and Watch Spare business, Created Brands like Maxima, Ego, Max-Pro Smart Watches and Premium Maxima Plus Watches.
The Journey Started in 1962, When Mr. GS Purewal, Chairman, P.A. Group, had set up P A Pinions, One of the largest manufacturing facility for watch spares, this continued with Purewal & Associates and Now with P A Time Industries which manufactures electronic watch components and quartz wrist watches. 
P A Time Industries launched MAXIMA, its flagship brand in the 90s, this brand went on to become hugely popular with its unique patented waterproof technology products. The success of its single point communication of being “India's first guaranteed waterproof watch at Rs.350” created a history of sorts and established the brand among a large consumer base across the country.
MAXIMA was the result of a vision to serve a vast majority of consumers through products that were accurate, reliable, guaranteed for quality and backed by after sales service with a trusted brand assurance. 
Today Brand MAXIMA is known for its contemporary product designs, youthful product styling, and value pricing. It has a large range of products consisting Metal Analogue Watches, Plastic and Fiber Analogue Watches, Digital Watches, Analogue-Digital Watches, Chronograph-Multifunction series of watches and Designer Watches. MAXIMA Offers one-year product warranty on its products and 100% replacement guarantee on defects in waterproof watches. With sleek designs, high product standards and affordable pricing, the brand have seen massive acceptability in the mind of consumers.
MAXIMA can be seen available in every part of the country with the support of over 75 plus distributors/Partner, 5000 Plus loyal retailers and various e-commerce platforms like Flipkart, Amazon, Paytm, Jabong, Limeroad etc. Brand’s massive collection is backed by excellent after sales service across the country.

Name: GM Bear
Description:
PT. Selalu Sukes Prima adalah perusahaan start-up yang bergerak di E-Commerce dan menjual perlengkapan rumah tangga dengan brand GM Bear. Sebagai perusahan yang baru mulai menjalankan bisnis di bidang ini, kami yakin mampu memberikan solusi dan pelayan terbaik kepada konsumen - konsumen kami, melalui pelayanan yang ramah, tepat waktu dan memuaskan.

GM Bear dalam waktu yang singkat mampu bersaing dan bertumbuh pesat pada Platform E-commerce di Indonesia.



Kami mengutamakan lingkungan kerja yang nyaman dan positif, serta memberikan kesempatan dalam menyampaikan ide, aspirasi, dan solusi yang menarik dan kreatif.

Name: Nandan Terry Ltd.
Description:
Nandan Terry, proud part of reputed business conglomerate Chiripal Group, has grown manifold since it's inception in 2016, having produced approx. 8000 metric tones of Terry Towels & Towellng products, we grossed a turnover of 45 million USD (FY: 2018-19).

We are a vertically integrated towel manufacturer having latest technology machines right from spinning to processing and can produce 25 million towel pieces per annum.

Our products have found place on retail spaces of reputed retailers & importers across the world. We are supplying internationally from Walmart, Kohls, Biglots, TJX, Ross Stores to United Colors of Benetton, Trent Westside, Walmart India, Reliance Retail in domestic markets.

Committed to environment, we contribute to our society and adhere to best sustainable practices.

We at Nandan Terry Pvt. Ltd., endeavour to be leaders in every field hence we are committed to serve our customers by providing best quality products at value for money. As we are committed to give to our customers, products made out of latest technology (machines). We consider our employees as our asset and keep on upgrading their skills through regular training programme. We believe to live up to the expectations of our customers, employees and we all strive to do our best to achieve corporate and social goals.

At Nandan Terry, our heart beats for Innovations to meet the requirements of customers. We have developed Bamboo Towels, Zero Twist Towels, Aroma Towels, and towels made from all Natural Fibres. We have in house R&D & Design facility to cater to all kind of designs and trends as per the customer's need.

Name: Tappwater
Description: At Tappwater, we believe in innovation as a driver capable of changing our daily consumption habits and so protecting current and future generations.

Name: Arctic Glacier Premium Ice
Description:
Arctic Glacier is North America’s leading manufacturer and direct-to-store distributor (DSD) of premium quality packaged ice, ice equipment and related services. Since its start in 1882, Arctic Glacier has grown significantly through strategic acquisitions and organically. Today, as the largest producer of packaged ice in Canada and one of the two largest within the United States, Arctic Glacier proudly serves over 75,000 retail, commercial and industrial customers.
 
Arctic Glacier currently operates 50 production and 60 distribution facilities across North America. Arctic Glacier was acquired by the Carlyle Group in 2017 and is well financed and strongly positioned in Carlyle’s Core Infrastructure Fund.

Arctic Glacier has career opportunities in Distribution for CDL Drivers, in Production, Manufacturing, as well as Management positions.  Please visit our career webpage at CareerAG.com for more information.

#arcticglaciercareers #arcticglacierCDLjobs #rewardingwork #strongvalues

Name: Feel Good Foods
Description:
Feel Good Foods offers gluten-free, crave-worthy foods that are ready within minutes and built to share. Nostalgic chef-inspired snacks and breakfast foods made with fewer, better-for-you ingredients. 

Founded by Vanessa Phillips and Chef Tryg Siverson, Feel Good Foods began in New York City’s Chelsea Market, where Vanessa’s experience living with celiac disease met Tryg’s fine-dining background. What started as a small restaurant built on inclusivity and flavor has grown into a leading frozen food brand found in over 18,000 stores nationwide, including Whole Foods, Target, Sprouts, Walmart, and Kroger.

For more information, email us info@feelgf.com or follow us @feelgoodfoods.

-Certified Gluten-Free
-Chef-Inspired
-Non-GMO Ingredients
-Antibiotic-Free Proteins
-Cage-Free Eggs
-Vegetarian & Vegan Options

Name: VIAHART
Description: Viahart was founded in 2010. We design, manufacture, and distribute educational plush, active play products, and building toys. Our company's goal is to inspire capability and confidence in children. Our brands include the building toy Brain Flakes, the racket game Goodminton, and our plush line TigerHart Toys. Our products have been featured in the Wall Street Journal, on television (CNBC and NBC), and in the New York Times.

Name: Love & Green
Description: Love & Green, jeune PME créée en janvier 2011, commercialise en grande distribution et sur internet des produits d’hygiène écologiques : couches, lingettes et produits d’hygiène pour bébé et hygiène féminine. Love & Green s’appuie sur des valeurs fortes : écologie, santé, respect de la peau.

Name: Contrado
Description:
Contrado started in 2002 from the kitchen of our founders Chris and Fran. Since then, we’ve grown rapidly and have proven to be established leaders in design and print manufacturing. 

Contrado means ‘make and deliver together’ and we’ve proudly built a strong community of creatives who are driven by this value.

Our platform enables creatives to sell art and build their brands while giving like-minded consumers the chance to find unique, designer products made to last. 
We print original designs on a range of premium quality products from homeware to fashion and each piece is sustainably handmade to order inside our one-stop production house within 24 hours.

We’ve grown from a few people to 160 and we now operate in 14 countries but we still believe in the same values as day one.

Name: GENERAL TRADING
Description:
GENERAL TRADING is a leading distributor of a diverse range of consumer products with a portfolio of over 30 trusted, quality brands sold globally. 
GENERAL TRADING  sells its products through a wholesale customer network of approximately 1500 store locations, a growing base of GENERAL TRADING franchise stores and store-in-store locations, specialised websites and through an international network of distributors covering over 20 countries.

Name: Takeya USA
Description: Our mission is to foster a team driven by integrity, passion, and curiosity, creating innovative, reliable insulated products that delight our customers. Based in Costa Mesa, California, Takeya specializes in water bottles and other insulated products under the Takeya and ThermoFlask brands.

Name: Papelito Brasil
Description:
DESDE 2012 — NATURALMENTE BRASILEIRA E DONA DO PRÓPRIO PAPEL

A Papelito nasceu pra mudar o jogo. Começamos com a clássica seda amarelinha e viramos referência nacional em produtos e acessórios RYO (roll your own). Hoje, temos mais de 80 produtos, vendemos uma unidade por segundo e estamos presentes em quatro países da América Latina.

Somos a primeira e única indústria brasileira de papéis para enrolar — criamos, testamos, produzimos e inovamos sem depender de ninguém. Tecnologia própria, padrão internacional e uma obsessão por qualidade que dita tendências.

Nossa operação é sustentável da raiz à ponta:
- energia 100% solar;
- carbono neutralizado;
- 200% de reciclagem do que produzimos;
- reflorestamento de 100 mil árvores na Amazônia;
- produtos mais limpos, seguros e conscientes.

E não é só sobre produto — é sobre propósito.
Aqui, a gente valoriza mesmo é quem faz a roda girar e constrói um ecossistema onde parceiros e colaboradores crescem juntos.

Quer conhecer mais sobre a marca que lidera o mercado brasileiro e tá mirando o mundo?
Só vem.

É mais que papel.
É Papelito.

Name: CARYSIL
Description:
CARYSIL LTD, formerly known as Acrysil Ltd, was incorporated in 1987. The company is primarily involved in manufacturing Composite Quartz Sinks.
With a technical collaboration with Schock & Co, CARYSIL LTD produced their first-ever German-engineered sink under the brand Carysil. Within a few years, the Carysil brand became one of the few brands worldwide - and the only one in Asia- to manufacture quartz kitchen sinks that perfectly blend aesthetics, innovation, and technology while meeting global standards. Today, the Carysil brand has evolved into a popular global lifestyle brand. 

Under the visionary leadership of CMD Chirag Parekh, CARYSIL LTD has diversified its offerings to include a range of kitchen products, such as stainless steel sinks, faucets, and built-in appliances like hobs, cooktops, ovens, wine chillers, chimneys, dishwashers, and much more. These products enhance customer lifestyles going beyond mere satisfaction with their quality, durability, and visual appeal. One can instantly recognize CARYSIL products by their striking innovative looks and originality in design.

Drawing upon over 30 years of global experience and expertise, CARYSIL LTD has expanded into diverse sectors, including luxury bathrooms through the Sternhagen brand, as well as surfaces with Maia, Minerva, and Metis in the UK. With global offices in five countries, the company has established a strong presence across six continents and more than 50 countries. The innovative products are available through an ever-expanding network of retail partners worldwide, including North and South America, UK, Canada, China, Germany, France, Far East, and the Gulf states. The company stands strong with over 700 employees, a network of over 3000 dealers and distributors and thousands of customers worldwide.

Name: Mustard
Description:
Mustard is a team of designers and trend hunters headquartered in London and with offices in New York, that brings the perfect combination of design and commercial prowess to the stationery world.

Mustard has a mission…  To take over 10% of every desk in the world, one pen pot at a time.

For businesses:
We help you get the attention your brand deserves! We provide businesses with unique promotional merch that makes a statement and separates you from your competition. With our long-standing experience in retail, product design and manufacturing, we can suggest items that will fit your brief, meet your budget and resonate with your audience.

So, move away from the usual promotional pens, mugs and umbrellas and work with us to create something amazing!

Check out our unique business merch here: https://mailchi.mp/justmustard.com/promo-customers

For trade customers:
We are proud to claim that almost 7 out of 10 products we sell bring 80% revenue for our retailers, who incidentally are some of the world’s most respected from Antwerp to Abu Dhabi.

Join over 6,000 retailers in 67 countries and register with Mustard as a retailer. It only takes 4 minutes to fill out the form and once we activate your account (usually within 24 hours) you’ll be able to place wholesale stationery orders and take advantage of special online discounts and many other perks. We design and create some of the most outrageously fun stationery items and tech accessories on the market.

Shop via our online store here: https://www.justmustard.com/

Name: Rocket Orange
Description:
Rocket Orange builds its brands from the ground up using a constant feedback loop. We make validated decisions based on our own collected data analyzed by our experts.  

At Rocket Orange, we are obsessed with predicting and meeting our customer's needs. Creating products that exceed consumer expectations and deliver value is essential to our success and drives us to grow and innovate every day.

Name: Vitality Brands Worldwide
Description:
Vitality Brands is a privately owned, Australian company dedicated to developing "wellness" products that help people feel healthier and happier thereby influencing their lives in a positive way.

We aim to build great Brands. We also feel strongly about how we go about doing this, and as such we consider our Values of equal importance as our Brands. Our Values help define who we are, and our approach to our business.

We are consistently looking for new ways to delight the consumers of our products and are open to new ways of doing business

At Vitality Brands, it is not only what we do, but how we go about doing it, that is equally important.

Name: Unger Enterprises, LLC.
Description:
Unger Enterprises, LLC. is a leading provider of innovative professional cleaning solutions. Unger is an international company and has been manufacturing professional cleaning tools for more than 60 years. 

Unger takes pride in developing innovative and unique tools that help professionals clean more productively, in order to present a cleaner, healthier building. Unger has offices in the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, as well as manufacturing facilities in the United States, Germany and India. Unger provides innovative cleaning solutions to more than 80 countries worldwide.

Name: Megamaster
Description:
Megamaster, established in 1997, is the largest supplier of lifestyle cooking and heating products in South Africa, with an expanded market presence in the United States.

Megamaster is focused on the supply of patio and outdoor cooking and heating products in the following categories: gas grills, charcoal grills, wood-burning grills (braais), grill accessories, fireplaces, outdoor gas accessories and fire pits. 

We seek to go beyond providing a convenience in cooking and heating products, but to further ignite a cherishable moment for our consumers. It is a Megamaster brand endeavor to provide the urban oasis for all our current and future product companions.

Name: Bellisio Foods
Description:
Bellisio Foods, Inc., is a leading manufacturer of frozen meals sold under the Michelina’s, CP Authentic Asia, and EAT! Frozen Entrees and licensed Boston Market, and Atkins frozen brands, as well as products for foodservice, private label, and co-manufacturing customers, under the banner of Overhill Farms.

Bellisio means beautiful in Italian and our passion is food. We are a fast growing company with a long history of providing quality, innovative food that meets and exceeds consumers’ needs. Bellisio Foods is committed to building dynamic and respected brands through our talented people. We strive for excellence in all we do.

Bellisio products are found in supermarkets and other retail grocers in the United States and Canada, and more than 2 million Bellisio meals are enjoyed every day in restaurants and at home. Products include single-serve entrees, multi-serve meals, and snacks and appetizers.

Our people are the heart of the company. Join our dynamic and growing company. Follow our company on LinkedIn. Apply for great positions at www.bellisiofoods.com.

Name: LIFEAID Beverage Company, LLC
Description: With a focus on great tasting, wellness enhancing, and functionally driven supplement products, LIFEAID Beverage Co. has become a trusted brand among athletes, health-conscious and performance-minded consumers. Headquartered in Santa Cruz, California, LIFEAID is home to premium performance products and passionate people. Their portfolio of better-for-you supplements contains both ready-to-drink and powdered mix blends, including FITAID, FOCUSAID, IMMUNITYAID, DREAMAID, PARTYAID, and now FITAID Energy + Sports Recovery. Visit lifeaidbevco.com to learn more.

Name: Intersand
Description:
Intersand is a world leader in animal hygiene, specializing in the production of premium cat litters. Founded in 1992 in Varennes (Quebec, Canada), Intersand now has 4 Canadian plants and a state-of-the-art plant in Windsor (Colorado, USA).  

Our presence in more than 60 countries is a result of the know-how we have acquired over the past 30 years. Our constant search for innovative solutions allows us to offer high quality products that are thought and created with the health and well-being of animals in mind, but also with a constant concern for our environmental impact. 

Contact us to become a distributor of our national brands (ODOURLOCK, CLASSIC, SIMPLE, ODOURBUSTER, ECOLIFE) or to receive information on the production of a private brand. 

Intersand, Smart Care. Happy Pets!

Name: Cheech and Chong’s Cannabis Company
Description: Our Records weren’t first… But, they were different. Our movies weren’t first… But, they were different. And our Cannabis Company isn’t the first… But it’s different!

Description: Since 1996, Bioviva has been designing, producing and marketing innovative and fun educational games on Nature and children's development, exclusively made in France according to an approach that respects people and the environment.

3x Manufacturer of the Year

WHO WE ARE
We’re a team of product developers, sales professionals, and logistical geniuses who tackle each day with wide-eyed excitement. Retailers worldwide count on us for the next great item to boost their business.
