Description: ORION FOOD VINA COMPANY LIMITED is a Consumer Goods company located in Lot E-13-CN, My Phuoc 2 Industrial Zone,, Binh Duong, Binh Dinh Province, Viet Nam.

Name: Swift Prepared Foods
Description: Swift Prepared Foods is at the intersection of heritage and innovation. We are proud of our history, but not yet satisfied. Swift Prepared Foods is a consumer packaged goods (CPG) company focusing on protein-centric prepared foods in both private label and branded offerings.

Name: NegemCo for Engineering and Contracting
Description:
NegemCo for Engineering and Contracting is a leading specialized steel fabricator company. Established in 1978 in Amman, NegemCo is a pioneer in professional design, manufacture and supply of structural steel buildings, erection and engineering.

Over the years, NegemCo has acquired its reputation in the market for its various specializations and large manufacturing capacity in various structural steel and plate works applications such as trusses and space trusses structures, pipe racks, skids and equipment support structures, built-up girders and columns, high-rise buildings, prefabricated buildings and structural steel buildings.

 

With a steel structure production capacity of 30,000 MT per year, NegemCo’s customer base includes companies from North America, United Kingdom, France, Japan, Germany, Finland, Italy and the Middle East.

 

NegemCo’s main steel fabrication facilities, located near Amman’s Queen Alia International Airport, occupy 85,000.0 sqm with over 35,000.0 sqm of covered area.

 

With years of vast experience and projects, NegemCo is the only company to currently hold the American Society for Mechanical Engineer’s U, S and R Certificate and an ISO 9001-2000 Certificate. Moreover, NegemCo currently implements the QA/QC System as per American Standards. 

NegemCo currently has three divisions for maximum efficiency and productivity with diverse projects. Our current divisions include:

	Structural Steel Division (SSD)
	Pre-Engineered Buildings Division (PEB)
	Process Equipment Division (PEQ)

Our total annual capacity exceeds 10,000 metric tons in steel structure factory and more than 3,000 metric ton in processing equipment factory.

Name: Cliganic
Description: Cliganic creates simple, pure essentials for skin and wellness. Our plant-based products are free from synthetic additives, sulfates and parabens and contain only active, 100% natural ingredients. Formulated for all ages, skin types and genders—and always compromise-free, no exceptions.

Name: PT UNZA VITALIS (A business unit of Wipro Consumer Care)
Description:
WIPRO UNZA, part of Wipro Consumer Care & Lighting Group, is amongst South East Asia’s leading manufacturer and marketers of personal care products, bringing Asian focused brands to millions of Asian consumers.

WIPRO UNZA operates an integrated product development, production, marketing and sales operation across its core markets, which are home to over one third of the world’s population. WIPRO UNZA services over 258,000 retail outlets across South East Asia and Greater China.

Our values are govern by the Spirit of Wipro. WIPRO UNZA employs over 4,000 people of 18 different nationalities throughout Asia. They all share the same vision – to make WIPRO UNZA one of the top 5 players in personal care and household products company in Asia and the Middle East. These professionals are engaged in the entire range of activities from research, development, sales, distribution and brand marketing. An exciting and dynamic Group to work, WIPRO UNZA continues to grow as a result of the hard work and commitment of the staff working in the heart of Asia.

Our Brands for PT Unza Vitalis: Vitalis, Romano, Sumber Ayu, Enchanteur, Safi, Bio-essence, Izzi, Doremi and Maxkleen

Name: Simoldes Group
Description: Founded in 1959 Simoldes is a combination of extensive experience and an innovative approach focused on providing the best solution for the customer. With a strong focus on developing the future, through the development of new materials and composites, sustainable mobility and renewable energies, we are building tomorrow.

Name: Kurvana
Description:
The Kurvana brand was born in 2014 out of a passion for cannabis and a love for Mother Nature. Our staff are more than just employees; we are a family of like-minded individuals working together to become the world’s premium cannabis brand.  

Creating the highest quality cannabis experience through innovation, dedication, and passion is our purpose here at Kurvana.  We set ourselves apart from the competition by controlling the primary technologies and innovations behind the products that we make.  Our scientists and engineers spent years performing research that ultimately led to the development of Kurvana's proprietary extraction process, which focuses on maximizing purity and potency. We believe in saying no to thousands of projects in order to dedicate our time and energy on the few that are truly meaningful and aligned with our organizational purpose. We are passionate about what we create and will not accept anything less than excellent.

Name: Stryve Foods
Description: Stryve is an emerging healthy snacking company which manufactures, markets and sells highly differentiated healthy snacking products. Stryve’s mission is “to help Americans snack better and live happier, better lives.” Stryve offers convenient snacks that are lower in sugar and carbohydrates and higher in protein than other snacks. Stryve offers all-natural, delicious snacks which it believes are nutritious and offer consumers a convenient healthy snacking option for their on-the-go lives.

Name: Videocon Consumer Durables
Description:
Videocon Group, with annual revenue of USD 6 Billion, is a diversified global business conglomerate and a leading Consumer Electronics and Home Appliances brand in the country. Trusted by over 180 million people, company has a foothold across sectors like Mobile Handsets, DTH, & Services, Oil & Gas, Power sector, and Retail.  

Driven by the philosophy of innovation and customer centricity, Videocon has always put-in efforts towards strengthening its offerings and services. Videocon has 12 manufacturing facilities located across the 5 continents. The Company has also invested significantly in Research & Development and  has 4 R&D Centre’s spread across the globe that are constantly working towards building quality products and services with latest technology.

The company today has a diversified portfolio of well-recognized products that are intended to appeal to a broad range of customers from differing socio-economic backgrounds. With one of the largest distribution networks in India, Videocon today reaches out to its customers through strong network of Trade Partners.

Name: Joie International
Description:
We’re a family-first kind of company, driven by the simple joys of childhood. To us, it’s all about being together – whether in the car, around the table, or out and about. We design our products to make family time safer, smoother, and more fun. 

While we call the UK home, our simple and fresh approach to product design as well as the drive to be a leader in safety has helped us expand around the world, with distribution in over 85 countries.

Our commitment to the highest standards of design, engineering and safety means that we are accountable for everything we produce.  All Joie products are designed in house and manufactured in our family-owned ISO 14001 certified environmentally friendly and state-of-the art facility. 

We draw on decades of industry experience that stems from our devotion to do what is right for parents, children and the environment. Over-protection is our goal — so we go above and beyond to make sure each employee is in a secure and healthy workplace. We serve and protect them and the environment, and we give back every chance we can.

Our high quality gear is versatile, and loaded with features that grow right along with little ones. The motivation behind our product design is to develop high-quality and affordable products with the parent’s needs as the driving force. That is why our extensive, award-winning product line is intentionally designed with “simply brilliant” features in mind – making life with children less work and more fun.

Name: CSS Industries, Inc.
Description:
CSS Industries, Inc. is now a part of IG Design Group Americas, Inc! We transform paper and a whole lot more into products that help celebrate life's special occasions and help turn moments into memories. 

We are a leading global manufacturer and distributor of celebrations, decor, creative play and gifting products. We pride ourselves on being a valued partner to our customers and suppliers, and a great place for our employees to work, innovate and design.

Headquartered in Atlanta, GA, Design Group Americas has offices, studios and operations across the US from where we service customers throughout the Americas. Having grown significantly in recent years, we are now the largest segment of IG Design Group plc, a UK public company listed on London's Alternative Investment Market (AIM).

Name: Mepal | Certified B Corp
Description:
This is not a brand which exists of plastic boxes, plates, cups or products to carry food in. This is Mepal! With full dedication we invent solutions to make your life easier and more fun. A lot of thought goes into developing beautiful and original products which will allow you to enjoy the nicest moments of your life, because you can trust the quality and cleverness they offer. 

We are there for you and for everyone close to you. Everyday of your life. We are there during all the little moments which make life what it is. We are there on your first day at school, when you don’t want to let go of dad’s hand, but luckily also forget about him shortly after. We are there when you surprise your colleagues at work with the home baked quiche you made yesterday. We are there at the beach providing pieces of melon with happy faces. We are there when you go camping, eating and enjoying precious time together with the entire family. We are always there, wherever life may take you. For all those moments. We make the best memories together. So please take us along. We are unbreakable. Mepal. Forever.

Name: Jumbo Brands
Description:
Founded in 1985, Jumbo Brands has grown into a leading manufacturer and distributor of quality consumer goods in South Africa. Our products are trusted by major retailers, including Pick n Pay, Shoprite Checkers, SPAR, and Makro, bringing quality and convenience to households nationwide.
We offer a diverse range of food and beverage products, including cappuccinos, 3-in-1 coffee, 3-in-1 tea, hot chocolate, milk modifiers, vinegars, lemon juice, cordials, squash, ice pops, powdered goods, chips, and corn nibs. Our portfolio includes both our own brands - Café Enrista, Craves, Fiestas, Boston, and Jolly Jumbo - as well as house brands developed in partnership with retailers.

Our Vision & Mission
•	Vision: To have a relevant brand in every targeted South African household.
•	Mission: We make Jumbo Brands better everywhere, every day.

Our Values
Excellence | Pursuit of Perfection – We are committed to delivering high-quality products that exceed consumer expectations.
Integrity | Nurturing Trust – Integrity is at the heart of every decision we make and every relationship we build.
Passion | Enthusiasm in All We Do – We are passionate and innovative, and strive to ignite creativity in every aspect of our enterprise.
Agility | Commitment to Growth – Our adaptability enables us to evolve, forge new relationships, and seize opportunities.
Supportive | Putting People First – We are consumer-centric, always striving to understand and meet South Africans' everyday needs.

At Jumbo Brands, we believe our people are our greatest asset. We foster a supportive, dynamic workplace culture that attracts and nurtures top talent, empowering our team to drive innovation and growth.

Name: Trading Care
Description:
Há mais de 45 anos no mercado, a Trading Care respira inovação e oferece produtos com tecnologia e qualidade, que auxiliam no cuidado de automóveis, lares e animais de estimação.

A excelência em seus produtos e processos traduzem a trajetória da Trading Care, sempre impulsionada pela sua tradição em evoluir com a experiência e inovação.

Na linha de cuidados com o carro, a empresa oferece produtos de alto desempenho para diversas superfícies automotivas, externas e internas. A Trading Care oferece uma série de soluções que cuidam de pintura, pneus, vidros, motores, estofados, carpetes e multisuperfícies. 

Pensando em facilitar a limpeza doméstica, a companhia trabalha constantemente em soluções inovadoras, oferecendo uma gama de produtos que podem ser aplicados para uma limpeza a seco, rápida e prática.

No universo pet, a Trading Care oferece linhas específicas de cuidados para cães e gatos, entre soluções para higiene do animal e de seu ambiente. A Trading Care, sempre pensando no bem estar de cães e gatos, ainda oferece uma linha exclusiva de educadores, perfumaria e petiscos.

Trading Care, um universo de marcas, produtos e satisfação.

Conheça mais sobre nós:

Facebook: proauto_oficial
Facebook: procao
Facebook: espumamagica

Instagram: @proauto_oficial
Instagram: @espumamagica
Instagram: @procao
Instagram: @catzone_oficial

Name: The Golden Duck Co.
Description:
BOLD SNACKS for BOLD HUMANS.

Here at The Golden Duck, we believe that if a snack is truly great, it’s gotta be worth sharing. We’re serious about food and obsessed with the art of turning complex flavours into gourmet snacks. Our skilled chefs trawl the world’s food streets to inspire bold snacking experiences – using only real ingredients, crafted almost entirely by hand. We love what we do. More than that, we love it when our snacks bring people together. We call this Snackology; it's the beautiful art of gourmet snack making and us really stepping up to save mankind from bland, boring snacks!

Name: American Tombow, Inc.
Description:
American Tombow, Inc. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Tombow Pencil Co., Ltd. of Tokyo, Japan for distribution of Tombow brand office and art products in North America. Established in California in 1983, American Tombow, Inc. moved to Georgia in 1992 and in 2003 relocated to a larger facility with state of the art technology in Suwanee, Georgia.


Tombow Pencil Co., Ltd. was established in Japan in 1913 as a manufacturer of wood-cased lead and colored pencils. It is not an exaggeration to say that every student in Japan has grown up with the Tombow pencil.

Name: Fuller Pinto S.A
Description:
Fuller Pinto S.A. es una empresa colombiana con más de 50 años de experiencia en el mercado, dedicada a la producción y comercialización de soluciones integrales para el hogar, la industria y el cuidado personal. 

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer productos innovadores y sostenibles que faciliten la vida de las personas, cuidando el medio ambiente y promoviendo el bienestar.

Con un portafolio que incluye marcas líderes como Fuller, Pinto, Fullfresh, Track, Diamante y Fiammé, brindamos calidad, confianza y responsabilidad social. Nuestra visión es seguir transformando hogares e industrias con productos que combinan tradición, tecnología y conciencia ecológica.

Cada día nos inspira la innovación, la calidad y la sostenibilidad para ofrecer soluciones que no solo limpian, sino que protegen y mejoran la vida de los hogares y las industrias.

Name: K-Rain Manufacturing Corporation
Description:
K-Rain is one of largest global manufacturers of irrigation products with distribution in over 60 countries worldwide. It's about hard work and teamwork and a relentless spirit. It’s about fifty plus years of every little thing mattering. 
 
With more than 100 patents and 50+ years of irrigation industry experience, our advanced design and engineering have made K-Rain products easy to install, set, and use.  We back our products with the strongest warranty program in the business.  We continue to make significant advances in developing products for water conservation, and are a premier manufacturer of reclaimed water irrigation rotors, sprays and valves.

Name: Grupo Abrascort
Description:
Desde 1979 atuando no mercado brasileiro, como importador direto e distribuidor autorizado das mais conceituadas marcas internacionais de componentes, a Abrascort integra hoje a maior rede de distribuidoras de peças para máquinas, veículos e equipamentos operacionais para os setores agrícola, industrial e de serviços.

Atualmente,  mantém unidades e estoques em diversos estados, garantindo pronto atendimento às milhares de revendas, indústrias e agro-negócios, que a escolheram como fornecedor preferencial de Correntes de Transmissão, Engrenagens, Rolamentos, Mancais, Correias em "V", Correias Sincronizadoras, Mangueiras e Terminais Industriais e Hidráulicos, Bombas, Motores Redutores, Comandos, itens para Motocicletas, entre outros componentes para manutenção de suas máquinas, equipamentos e veículos.

A missão da Abrascort é “manter o negócio de seus clientes em movimento” e para isso, além de estoques sempre abastecidos e atualizados, conta com uma equipe de atendimento treinada diretamente pelos fabricantes, apta a sanar dúvidas e orientar tecnicamente na escolha de cada componente comercializado.

Name: Orbico Poland
Description:
Let’s learn something more about US!

Orbico Group is a leading European distributor of many recognizable brands. Currently, we are present in 20 countries and almost 8,000 employees work for our joint success. As a distributor we represent a large number ofhigh-quality global brands from diverse categories, tobacco, house hold, personal care, food & beverages, electronics, automotive, toys, beautyand style. We are very proud of our long term win-win relationships with our partners many of whom are global market leaders in their categories. Working closely with them helps us understand each brands unique philosophy and strategy. That is why we can offer a wide range of services from distribution and logistics to sales marketing, brand management, merchandising and retail.

 Values matters for US! 

Our values reflect our heart and soul. They define the way how we operate, behave, communicate. Values are the part of the company culture, which is our real asset in building competitive advantage. They are ouridentity and foundation of our company. They build reputation and business success of the Group. This DNA over the years is the fundament of our business code:

 TRUST 
 PASSION FOR WINNING
 OWNERSHIP 
 HONESTY & INTEGRITY
 RESPECT
 PERSONAL MASTERY 
 ATTUNED FOR CHANGES 

 Join to our TEAM! 

In Orbico Poland we are hiring 1000 employees in different locations. 
Visit our websites and find out moreabout us and our job offers:
- Orbico Poland - www.orbico.com/pl
- Orbico Beauty - www.orbicobeauty.pl/
- Orbico Style - www.orbicostyle.pl/
- Orbico Salon Professional - www.salonprofessional.pl/
- Orbico Supply

Why is worth? Because people are our the most important value!

Name: CPGjobs
Description:
CPGjobs is the only Consumer Products industry network that brings together the best talent by connecting people and companies at a personal level.  

We are continuously developing new tools that help people find jobs and help employers find talented professionals. 
Visit us at CPGjobs.com to see the latest ways you can meet and connect with employers and professionals in CPG, including:
- Job Listings
- Networking Groups
- Referrals & Recommendations
- Career Coaching
- Virtual Career Fairs
- Recruiting
- Data Mining
- Employer Branding


Follow us here to receive all the latest news on careers in CPG and join our community through: 
LinkedIn for Job Seekers: http://linkd.in/cpg_people
LinkedIn for HR Professionals: http://linkd.in/cpgrecruiters

CPGjobs is leading the conversation on CPG careers and industry news with thousands of professionals. 

We also operate the most popular job board for CPG industry-specific positions - from sales and marketing to packaging, category management, manufacturing, operations, finance and more. 

We're Different ...

Every position on the CPGjobs Board is personally checked by hand – we advertise ONLY positions that are REAL and active, and no job posting is older than 30 days.

Our close relationships with our employers enable us to make personal introductions for job seekers with exceptional CPG backgrounds directly to our clients – a terrific way for our registered job seekers to be seen first by hiring managers and Human Resources.

Need social networking recruiting services?  CPGjobs actively recruits job seekers through our popular LinkedIn Group, CPGPeople and through the most active job search Twitter hashtags on our clients' behalf.

Name: Twelve South
Description:
Who’s Twelve South? The passionate, the creative, the crazy ones… if you use a Mac, iPad or iPhone all day, we have a solution that will make your life a little better. 

From stands that turn your MacBook into a desktop, to Oprah’s Favorite Thing - the BookBook case - Twelve South identifies and improves customer’s lives with innovative and one-of-a-kind solutions that others miss. We hear “why didn’t I think of that” a lot.

Twelve South is distributed in over 50 countries but is still run by the same husband-and-wife team that started on a dining room table in 2009. We are continually inspired by the house that Steve built, but we don’t make the Mac. We make it yours.

Name: Bud & Mary’s
Description: Bud & Mary's is a multi-state, vertically integrated cannabis company. Home to a family of lifestyle and medical cannabis brands we take a science-focused approach to research, cultivation, formulation, and dispensary operations.

Name: Aerflo
Description:
At Aerflo, we set out to redefine what’s possible for sparkling water by bridging the gap between reusable bottles and countertop soda makers. Now, with our award-winning portable soda maker, we’ve unlocked true portability and eliminated waste from single-use bottles and cans.

Aerflo is powered by our Capsule Exchange Service: a simple program to exchange empty CO2 capsules for refilled ones. That means there’s no subscription and no waste — every part of the system is circular and designed to be reused.

With personalized carbonation and seamless refills, Aerflo redefines what sparkling water can be.

Name: Ranir
Description: Ranir is a leading global manufacturer of private label consumer oral and personal care products, including power and manual toothbrushes, teeth whiteners, dental floss and flossers, interdental devices, travel accessories and more. Founded in 1979, Grand Rapids, Michigan-based Ranir serves retail customers globally. Its products, including some of the worlds' largest oral care brands, can be found at major retailers in more than 40 countries. The technology and development-focused company also owns, manufactures and markets the Rembrandt, Plackers and Snore Guard brands and proudly employs more than 800 associates worldwide.  For more information, visit www.ranir.com.

Name: Jean Fourche
Description:
Jean Fourche est une marque française de vélos conçus à Bordeaux dont les cadres sont fabriqués au Portugal, la peinture et l’assemblage réalisés à Bordeaux, dans nos propres locaux, avec plus de 75% de composants européens.

Notre objectif est simple : proposer des vélos utilitaires pensés pour durer, fabriqués localement et à des prix raisonnables.

Name: Sensory Spectrum
Description:
Sensory Spectrum, a globally recognized management consulting firm, specializes in understanding the sensory-consumer experience for industry, academia and government. Our team approach links advanced sensory methods to consumer research with the latest statistical analysis procedures to provide business and technical solutions for confident decision making.

Our broad scope of customized services includes sensory program design and review, Spectrum Descriptive Analysis panel training, project management, consumer research, short courses and workshops.

Name: The PUR Company
Description:
At The PUR Company, we are proud to create the #1 selling Aspartame-Free Chewing Gum and Mints globally. Our mission is simple – we make Simple Substitutions with no compromise in taste or quality. That’s why our entire line is made with high-quality, purposeful ingredients for everyone to enjoy. 

PUR is 100% sweetened with Xylitol and always free from Aspartame, GMOs, Gluten, Soy, Peanuts, and Nuts. We’re also Vegan, Diabetic-Friendly. As the demand for cleaner, smarter snacking continues to rise, we’re proud to lead the way in chewing gum and mints that put health and happiness first. 

You can find us in major retailers across North America and online – including Amazon, where we’ve held the #1 Best Seller spot for seven years and counting.

Follow us on Instagram, Facebook and TikTok:  
@thepurcompany

Name: Trudeau Corporation
Description:
Chez Trudeau Corporation, nous sommes fiers d’être reconnus en tant que chef de file dans la conception et le développement d’articles de cuisine et de maison. Depuis 1889, quatre générations se sont succédées dans la gestion de Trudeau Corporation, introduisant des valeurs familiales et traditionnelles dans notre culture d’entreprise. Nous devons notre succès aux efforts d’une équipe chevronnée et dédiée, à nos talentueux partenaires de design, et à l’expertise de nos fabricants soigneusement sélectionnés.

Une des forces du développement de produits chez Trudeau Corporation est son innovation constante. Elle s’allie à une combinaison parfaite entre la simplicité et la sophistication pour la préparation et la présentation de la nourriture et des boissons. Nous sommes fiers d’offrir des produits d’une qualité exceptionnelle, reconnus pour leur conception originale.

****************************************
At Trudeau Corporation we are proud to be recognized as a leader in the design and development of kitchenware and houseware products. Since 1889, four successive generations have managed Trudeau Corporation, instilling the values of family and tradition into our corporate culture. We owe our success to the efforts of an experienced and dedicated team, to the creative input of talented design partners and to the expertise of our carefully chosen manufacturers.

Bringing innovation and the perfect combination of simplicity and sophistication to the preparation and presentation of food and drink is a driving force for product development here at Trudeau Corporation. We pride ourselves on offering products of exceptional quality, recognizable by their distinctive Trudeau design.

Name: Cool Gear International
Description:
For nearly 20 years Cool Gear International, LLC has revolutionized the hydration and housewares industry by delivering innovative solutions to meet consumer needs.  We continue this legacy by joining forces with our parent company Igloo Products Corporation, the number one cooler brand worldwide.  As a combined business, Cool Gear and Igloo are honored to be market leaders in food storage, hydration and insulated coolers.  

Cool Gear remains committed to delivering superior quality product at a value with a 100% customer satisfaction policy.  Our patented technology ensures food and beverages are served the way our customers want them.  Meanwhile, unique designs, vibrant colors, graphics and function identify with the individual needs of our consumers.  

Based in Plymouth, MA, the Cool Gear team designs and delivers custom product, packaging and point of purchase displays for retailers, as well as the premium market.

Name: Silver Cross Ltd
Description:
Born 1877
@madeformums Parenting Brand of the Year 2024

Name: Lloreda S.A.
Description: Estamos dedicados a la producción, comercialización y venta de aceites y grasas comestibles y de productos alimenticios, de aseo, higiene y uso personal. Contamos con fábricas en Yumbo, Cali y Barranquilla y con una plantación de palma africana de 4.670 hectareas en puerto wilches (Bucarelia). Ha mantenido una participación líder con marcas reconocidas por el consumidor colombiano. Su mercado principal es Colombia.

Name: ThunderWorks Company - Maker of ThunderShirts
Description:
Founded in 2009 in Durham, North Carolina, ThunderWorks' mission is to provide innovative solutions for some of the most common challenges faced by families with pets. With two of the best known brands in the pet industry  – ThunderShirt and ThunderLeash – ThunderWorks is already helping millions of dogs and cats worldwide.  ThunderWorks' solutions are used and recommended by thousands of veterinarians and trainers around the world, and are available in Petsmart, Petco and thousands of other fine pet retailers.  As part of the ThunderWorks Gives Back program, the company we have donated many thousands of ThunderShirts to rescue organizations and shelters across the country.   

Our flagship product is ThunderShirt.  Like swaddling an infant, a ThunderShirt applies a gentle, calming pressure to a dog's or cat's torso which has been shown to reduce or eliminate symptoms of anxiety or fear in over 80% of pets.  It is a safe and easy solution to try for all kinds of anxiety and over-excitement situations like thunderstorms, fireworks, separation anxiety, travel, new family member and much, much more.

Our newest product line, ThunderEase, mimics the calming pheromones produced by dogs and cats.  Scientifically tested and proven to be over 90% effective for many anxiety behaviors, ThunderEase brings a natural calm.  Available as diffusers, sprays and collars.

ThunderSnap Leash is the simpler way to attach and remove a leash.  Connects and releases in a Snap!  ThunderSnap uses powerful magnets and a steel ball-bearing latch mechanism to quickly and securely connect to any dog collar or harness.  Tested to hold over 500 lbs.

And there is much more!  Please visit our site to learn more about the exciting, innovative products offered by ThunderWorks.

Name: SABIJER'S
Description:
Somos una compañía con 25 años de trayectoria y dedicación exclusiva al cuidado del cabello. 
Nuestra labor aborda un proceso integral que va desde el desarrollo de ideas, investigación, fabricación, comercialización hasta llegar a los consumidores finales con nuestras creaciones. Estamos conscientes que la innovación es la clave del crecimiento, por eso trabajamos día a día para ofrecer a nuestros consumidores productos geniales, formulados para brindar soluciones específicas para necesidades del cabello. 
La integridad, la curiosidad, el optimismo y la pasión son algunos de los valores que vivimos día a día en todos los niveles de nuestra organización.
Creamos con Pasión para que proyectes lo mejor de ti!

Name: PDC BRANDS
Description:
We believe self-care is self-less because when you take the time to take care of yourself, you are better able to help others.

PDC Brands is one of the fastest growing wellness and personal care companies in the world. We are a family of innovative brands seeking to bring premium yet accessible product experiences to daily self-care. Our innovative products span across wellness, personal care, beauty, and fragrance, and are available in over 100,000 online and retail outlets around the world.

PDC Brands is a fast, lean, and entrepreneurial culture that values inclusivity and collaboration where you have the ability to deliver tangible results. Join us and be a part of the evolution and growth of our category-leading brands in wellness, cosmetics, hair, fragrance, bath and more. 

Our Brands: Dr Teal’s is a category leading wellness brand that offers quality products and therapeutic ingredients and is  most trusted by consumers. Cantu is a leading brand in textured hair and is at the center of consumers embracing natural beauty. Eylure is a leader in lash innovation delivering premium quality lashes for over 70 years. Our fragrance portfolio holds the #1 male and female mass fragrance brands in the US with a highly loyal consumer base.

Name: Restonic
Description:
Since 1938, we have been supporting dreams by producing the highest quality sleep products. For more than three quarters of a century, we have contributed to more good nights than any other mattress company – and we’re thrilled to share our story with you.

Restonic mattresses can be found in fine retail stores nationally and internationally, thanks to our strong manufacturing network throughout the world. As a multi-time winner of the Women's Choice and Consumers Digest Best Buy Awards, Restonic takes the time to focus on the little things, making sure every stitch of your mattress meets the highest standards, giving you the comfort and value you deserve.

Name: Atkins Nutritionals, Inc.
Description:
Atkins Nutritionals Inc. is a leading player in the $2.4 billion weight control nutrition category and offers a powerful lifetime approach to weight loss and weight management. The Atkins Nutritional Approach focuses on a healthy diet with reduced levels of refined carbohydrates and refined sugars and encourages the consumption of lean protein, fiber, fruits, vegetables and good fats. Backed by research and consumer success stories, this approach allows the body to burn more fat and work more efficiently while helping people feel less hungry, more satisfied and more energetic.

We manufacture and sell a variety of nutrition bars, shakes, frozen meals and treats designed around the nutrition principles of the Atkins Diet. The Atkins line of products appeals to a broad audience of men and women who want to achieve their weight management goals and enjoy a healthier lifestyle. Our products are available in more than 50,000 locations throughout the U.S. and internationally.

Name: Arett Sales
Description:
Arett Sales is where retailers grow. We’re a home for the doers, the problem-solvers, and the product people driving the future of lawn, garden, home, and seasonal retail. Whether you're stocking shelves at a national off-price retailer like TJ Maxx, Burlington, Ross, or Marshalls, planning a reset at a hardware chain, or discovering the next must-have product for your garden center—Arett is your partner in possibility. From our sales teams to our fulfillment crews, we move with purpose and pride, helping retailers nationwide stay one step ahead.

Our people are our power. Every Arett team member plays a key role in delivering value to hardware stores, garden centers, off-price chains, and more—connecting top-tier brands and exclusive products to communities across the country. We’re in the business of building strong partnerships, backed by efficiency, service, and a genuine love for what we do.

Think about your local retail destination. If it's stocked with great lawn and garden supplies, tools, grills, fertilizers, décor, or bird food, chances are Arett had a hand in making that happen.

A career at Arett means joining a company with deep roots and a modern mindset.
In our 75th year, we’re a 4th family-owned, future-focused, and all-in on helping retailers thrive. Whether you're launching a new store or picking the perfect product mix, Arett offers the tools, talent, and trust to make it happen.

Join us. Grow with us. Let’s build something better—together.

Name: Techtronic Industries Australia & New Zealand
Description:
TTI Australia & New Zealand (a division of TTI Group) is leading the ANZ markets for Power Tools, Outdoor Power Equipment, and Floor Care and Appliances for consumers, professional and industrial users in the home improvement, repair and construction industries. 

Globally, we have an unrelenting strategic focus on Powerful Brands, Innovative Products, Operational Excellence and Exceptional People.

Our culture is driven by passionate, dedicated employees with an emphasis on ensuring our customers receive the best possible experience with us. This is reflected through our company values of well-being, respect, collaboration, accountability, integrity and communication.

If you would like to be part of our award-winning team, please review our jobs on LinkedIn or alternately follow us here for opportunities across Australia and New Zealand.

Name: Floyd
Description: Floyd is a digitally native furniture brand with a mission to change the way people consume, keep, and enjoy their furniture. We create thoughtful products for the way people live today, with a simple online purchase process and easy assembly. Our products are designed in Detroit and sustainably manufactured primarily in the U.S.

Name: HRB Brands
Description:
As one of the largest independent branded personal care companies in North America, we make it a point of pride to uphold our brands’ rich legacies while evolving their values and formulations to serve the well-being and tastes of savvy modern consumers.  

Starting with ZEST in 2010, HRB Brands has gone to serve as a platform for strategic acquisitions across the personal care category, gradually adding household brand names such as V05, COAST, SGX NYC, THICKER FULLER HAIR, and LA LOOKS.

Now with our latest acquisition of iconic brands like BRUT, SURE, PERT, Infusium, Ammens, SeaBreeze & more HRB Brands will continue to deliver our goal of creating value for our brands & consumers while aiding in product accessibility for our fans. 
 
About Tengram Capital Partners:
Tengram Capital Partners is a private equity firm exclusively focused on investments in leading middle-market consumer companies that own strong recognizable brands. The team has a diverse background of consumer investing and operating expertise that assists and guides company management to unlock the true potential of their brands. Tengram invests in both traditional "growth" and "restructuring/turnaround" situations in each of the public and private sectors. Other Tengram investments, current and past, include Tommie Copper, Tone it Up, Algenist, Lime Crime Beauty, Revive, DevaCurl, NEST Fragrances, Robert Graham, Hudson Jeans, and El Cap.  Additional information can be found at: http://www.tengramcapital.com.

Name: Prestone Products Corporation
Description:
Prestone provides trusted and innovative solutions to deliver worry-free vehicle performance. 

For 80 years, the Prestone name has provided customers the highest quality products, including the leading brand of antifreeze/coolant. Prestone antifreeze has protected cooling systems through seven decades of evolving engine operations and cooling system demands.

Name: Black & Decker HHI
Description:
Black & Decker is a global manufacturer and marketer of quality power tools and accessories, hardware and home improvement products, and technology based fastening systems. Our products and services are marketed in more than 100 countries, and we have manufacturing operations in eleven countries. Throughout our businesses, we have established a reputation for product innovation, quality, end-user focus, design, and value. Our strong brand names and new product development capabilities enjoy worldwide recognition, and our global distribution is unsurpassed in our industries. 

Black & Decker's objective is to establish itself as the preeminent global manufacturer and marketer of power tools and accessories, hardware and home improvement products, and technology based fastening systems.

Name: Marico Egypt
Description: Marico is an international Indian leading Consumer Products & Services company in the beauty and wellness space with more than 25 branches worldwide, in 2006, Marico’s journey had begun in Egypt, by acquiring Haircode & Fiancee the leading local hair styling brands along with their manufacturing facilities. Marico Egypt is commanding a market share of more than 55% and is enjoying a leadership position in the hair styling category. Parachute`s Greenfield factory was a further signal of its commitment to Egypt market, as Marico set up this factory in 2008 in Sadat city. Marico has worked outside the box, to bring innovation to its customers through the careful creation of continuous and sustainable change.

Name: DAFANI
Description: Ouverte le 22 juin 2007, DAFANI S.A. est une unité de transformation de fruits tropicaux installée à Orodara au cœur du bassin fruitier du Burkina Faso. Elle a pour ambition de valoriser la production fruitière de la région.

Name: H-PROOF
Description:
Kaplan Laboratory (H-PROOF) is a women-led nutraceutical company that develops and markets products on the cutting edge of health and wellness. We invest significant time and resources in developing dietary supplements that solve real issues. Our patented formulations are doctor-developed and backed by science.

Our first product, The Anytime You Drink Vitamin, launched in 2019 and is a category-creator. We reached profitability in 2021, and continue to grow exponentially year-over-year. In 2023, we landed a spot on the Inc. 500 as the 53rd fastest-growing private company and the 6th fastest-growing consumer product in America! 

After years of research, product development, and a field trial with 147 H-PROOF customers, The Anytime You Need Energy launched in early 2024 with a patent-pending!

Name: Burda Bebek
Description:
1986 yılında kurulan Burda Bebek, Türkiye'nin anne ve bebek ürünleri yerli üretiminde öncü ve güvenilir bir marka olarak faaliyet göstermektedir. Pazar lideri Wee Baby markasının yanı sıra, Mycey ve Bebsi markalarıyla emzik ve biberonlar başta olmak üzere, annelere özel ürünler, beslenme gereçleri, banyo, bakım ve sağlık ürünleri, aksesuarlar, diş kaşıyıcılar ve kozmetik bakım ürünlerinden oluşan 200’e yakın ürün portföyüne sahiptir. Türkiye genelindeki 30 binden fazla satış noktasında tüketicilere ulaşmakta ve 50’den fazla ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır. 2024 yılı IQVIA verilerine göre Wee Baby, anne ve bebek araç gereçleri kategorilerinde eczacıların en çok tercih ettiği marka olmuştur.

2017 yılında kurduğu Ortadoğu ve Türkiye’nin en büyük anne ve bebek ürünleri fabrikası ile yıllık 16 milyon adet üretim kapasitesine ulaşan Burda Bebek, tüm üretim süreçlerinde FDA ve Avrupa Birliği onaylı hammaddeler kullanmaktadır.  
----------------
Burda Bebek is a pioneering and trusted brand with domestic production in Turkey’s mother and baby products sector since 1986. Burda Bebek reaches consumers at more than 30 thousand sales points throughout Turkey and exports to more than 50 countries with its product portfolio of nearly 200 products consisting of mainly pacifiers and feeding bottles under the brands Mycey and Bebsi, especially the market leader Wee Baby. As of 2024, Burda Bebek has become the most preferred brand by pharmacists in mother and baby equipment with its Wee Baby branded products according to IQVIA data. 

Burda Bebek, which has reached an annual production capacity of 16 million units with the largest mother and baby products factory in the Middle East and Turkey, which it established in 2017, uses FDA and EU approved raw materials in all its production processes.

Name: Eufora International
Description:
Our journey began in 1997 with one simple belief: Nature is Genius.

So, with relentless curiosity for innovation, we sought to create the next age of beauty and hair care with nature as our guide. Every ingredient in our formulas has a purpose and every ounce nourishes your hair, skin and scalp.

Eufora's advanced technology utilizes important botanical extracts that have been scientifically proven to benefit the hair, scalp and skin. We never use fluff ingredients that sound good on the label, but don't provide any real benefit. You can count on Eufora to deliver substance without hype, because when it comes to quality, we believe there are no compromises.

Name: Accell Western Europe
Description:
Accell Western Europe maakt onderdeel uit van Accell Group B.V. en is gevestigd in Apeldoorn en Heerenveen. Accell Western Europe ontwikkelt, produceert en verkoopt fietsen en onderdelen onder de merknamen Batavus, Juncker Bike Parts, Koga, Loekie, Sparta, Van Nicholas en XLC-componenten. 
 
De organisatie speelt sterk in op de veranderende consumentenmarkt door een breed en modern assortiment en een voor de branche opvallende marktbewerking, zowel richting het dealernetwerk als de consument. Het grootste deel van de afzet vindt plaats via de professionele vakhandel. De exportactiviteiten in met name België, Duitsland, Denemarken, Zwitserland en Engeland completeren de afzet.

Name: Petite Keep
Description: Petite Keep is a keepsake brand inspiring memories and cultivating tradition. We are reimagining the keepsake category through modern personalization, curated aesthetic, and intentional design.

Name: Cloud Cannabis
Description:
We’re a cannabis dispensary, but when we say “Live Higher” there’s more to it than you might think. We’re talking about elevating your life – your health, enjoyment and productivity – to go to the next level and be the best version of you.  

Our mission is to make Michigan happier and healthier by demystifying the cannabis shopping experience through education, assortment and community. With our “education first” and “people over profit” approach to business, we help customers navigate which products will deliver their desired effect.  

Our founders are Michigan born and bred, and we have plans to build deep roots in Michigan. We are actively hiring for a variety of positions and looking for people who have a passion about educating the community on the many benefits of cannabis.

Name: Blue Rhino
Description:
Blue Rhino has proudly fueled America’s backyards since 1994. Each Blue Rhino tank is always inspected, leak-tested, and cleaned, so you can grill with confidence. 

Blue Rhino is America's #1 brand of propane tank exchange. You’ll never have to travel too far for a fresh tank, because Blue Rhino is available at nearly 60,000 locations nationwide. We are a proud brand of Ferrellgas, a propane industry leader dedicated to Fueling Life Simply. 

We love rhinos, and we love grilling too! Blue Rhino proudly supports rhino conservation through our partnership with the International Rhino Foundation. We also support Operation Barbecue Relief, a charity of competition chefs who serve grilled food and hope in disaster areas, fight hunger, and serve the military and first responders.  

It's Not Just Propane. It's Blue Rhino.

Name: Cameron's Coffee
Description:
We’re Cameron’s Coffee, and we get it: the more satisfying your sips, the more delightful your days. That’s why we see the world as a mug-half-full kind of place — with the next enchanting roast to entice your senses and brighten the color of your day. Roasted with small town heart in Shakopee, Minnesota, we bring you straight-up, full-flavor, specialty grade coffee that’s always smooth and never bitter. 
Cameron’s Coffee. Proudly Crafting America’s Best Home-Brewed Coffee.
Visit us at www.cameronscoffee.com.

Name: Halwany Consumer Products S.A.L.
Description:
In 1921, a 19-year-old young man by the name of Chafic Halwany started out a small trading business in Beirut, dealing with fresh fruits and vegetables. Driven by hard work and dedication, the business kept flourishing throughout the years, coming a long way from its humble beginning to become, in 1950, one of the main traders in the local and regional markets.
To commemorate the legacy of their father, Chafic Halwany’s sons founded Les Fils de Chafic Halwany s.a.r.l in 1972, taking the business to a new regional level. The company became a major distributor of frozen, chilled and canned food items covering various product lines; namely poultry, meat, seafood, vegetables, fruits and dairy.
In 1992, the management initiated a strategic conversion of the company from a commodity-driven trading to a consumer-oriented business focusing on brand building.
With a vision to expand the business regionally and internationally, the management founded an off-shore company in 2003 under the name of C-Food International s.a.l., to focus on the production, marketing and distribution of a variety of seafood products. Based in Lebanon, with a branch in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, C-Food International covers today more than 35 countries in the Middle East, Africa, Europe and Central America through a well-structured network of distributors.
To better reflect the long-term vision and strategic mission, the company’s name was changed in 2014 to Halwany Consumer Products s.a.l. (HCP). HCP continued moving forward in a competitive market, respecting its values. Today, the company is one of the leading players in the FMCG market in Lebanon, holding a diversified product portfolio that caters to consumer needs in several food categories.
The family holding Halvest s.a.l. (holding) acquired, in 2015, 60% from the shares of Frigorifer S.A., one of the largest cold storage facilities and the only frozen vegetables’ factory in Romania, built on a 50,000 m2 plot of land in the city Tulcea.

Name: Proud Source Water
Description: Proud Source Water is Water Done DifferentTM, making a positive impact through a fundamentally different approach to water: caring for our planet, our communities and our health all at the same time. A certified B-corporation, Proud Source sources from domestic springs in the Rocky Mountains of Idaho and the Apalachicola Forest of Florida and bottles in infinitely recyclable aluminum. It is naturally alkaline with minerals and electrolytes producing a pH of 8.1+/- without any additives. The water is sustainably produced and bottled directly at the source, leveraging energy-efficient methods to reduce the company’s carbon footprint. Proud Source is available in Still and Sparkling varieties, with nationwide distribution at retailers, food service establishments, hotels, stadiums, corporate campuses, and online retailers.

Name: NMC Trading LLC
Description:
NMC Trading, the trading arm of the NMC Healthcare, is one of the UAE’s leading marketing and distribution companies for prestigious brands in FMCG (Food and Non-food), Pharmaceuticals, Medical Equipment and Consumables, Scientific, Educational and Veterinary products.

Within a short span of time the company has emerged as one of the leading players in the trading business – backed by efficient planning, a dedicated team of sales and marketing professionals, strategically located warehousing facilities, a robust sales and distribution network and a fully computerized inventory management system.

NMC Trading, moving ahead with a vision to march over competitors, is continuously adding value to the brands of its trading partners – aided by marketing research findings and recommendations to accurately identify the critical determinants in competitive trade.  We have helped some of the leading brands to reach truly great sales heights.

Today, the numbers speak for itself; more than twenty international brands occupy premier slots and an equal number of brands is surfacing in this list, all thanks to able leadership and focused operational activities.

NMC Trading markets and distributes  a wide range of products, from temperature-sensitive vaccines and life-saving drugs to ECG machines and fetal heart monitors.

Committed to deliver “on time, each time, every time," this urge has made us win many prestigious national & international awards for highest sales and as the best distributor in the region.

In short, NMC Trading is the gateway for establishing sound businesses in the UAE and beyond.

Name: Beta do Brasil
Description:
Filial da Beta Utensili S.P.A

A marca Beta chegou ao Brasil em 2003, através da Costa & Garcia, Grupo de empresas Portuguesas, que trouxe consigo a exclusividade da importação.

Em 2009 as negociações foram iniciadas e foram encerradas oficialmente em Maio de 2012 – nasce a Beta do Brasil, Ltda - a 7ª filial da Beta Utensili S.p.a.

De sua sede em Cotia – São Paulo – a empresa procura atender os seus clientes sempre se baseando numa política de pronta entrega. Apesar das mais de 15.000 referências em seu catálogo, com 1.600m² planos de armazém e com um software integrado e desenhado pela sua equipe, a Beta do Brasil vende para toda a América Latina.

Name: Razor USA LLC
Description:
Fun and freedom in motion, Razor creates rides that push the boundaries and defy the rules. Since launching the iconic A-model scooter in 2000, we’ve grown from a cultural moment to a global movement, inspiring riders of all ages to roll with confidence and creativity.

For 25 years, our commitment has stayed the same: deliver an unmatched riding experience through thoughtful engineering, high-grade materials, and quality you can trust. Born in California and embraced worldwide, Razor continues to redefine how the world moves.

Learn more at www.razor.com

Name: Anchor Hocking
Description:
Anchor Hocking Company is a global industry leader in glass tabletop and houseware manufacturing. Since 1905, we have perfected preparation, presentation, and preservation in product categories such as drinkware, barware, bakeware, serveware, storage jars, and more. 

We are one of the most recognizable glassware brands in the world. We do it by merging beauty, durability, and functionality. The results are products homes really need – made to use and made to last. All designed, marketed, and manufactured right here in the USA. Welcome to Anchor Hocking: discover the genius of utility.

Name: Partex Star Group (Danish)
Description:
Partex Star Group is one of the largest Bangladeshi diversified private sector enterprises. The Group, the then Partex Group, started its journey in 1962, with the torchbearer, Mr. M.A. Hashem, the founder Chairman of the then Partex Group, an eminent industrialist of the country.

Partex Star Group owns and successfully operates twenty manufacturing, service and trading concerns delivering best values to customers through its products and services. Our business primarily exists in two different areas – consumer durables like different types of boards(particle board, veneer board, melamine faced chip board, plywood, PVC sheet) doors and door frames & furniture to FMCG like dairy products, cookies, spices, etc.

Our team is dedicated to creating an enriched customer experience through a top-to-bottom focus on excellence in execution. From the hiring of people to the selection of merchandise, the negotiations with vendors to the design of ours showrooms, the generation of the purchase order to the delivery to our customers' homes.

A motivated work force, management and committed board members led by the Partex Star Group Chairperson and backed by a market oriented corporate strategy has been the cornerstone of the group’s success.

The group has created by and large an employment opportunity of over 5,700 employees as collective work force.

Partex Star Group – a legacy, with a new face forward.

Name: DHI Corp (Design House)
Description: Founded in 1872 and based in Wisconsin, Design House provides a variety of home products to create living spaces you’ll love at prices you’ll appreciate. We offer products for every room at an affordable price, because we believe that upgrading your home shouldn’t break the bank.

Name: PDC BRANDS (UK)
Description:
PDC Brands is one of the fastest growing beauty companies in the world.

With a portfolio of category-leading brands across cosmetics, hair, fragrance, wellness, and bath we are available in over 60 countries across the globe. We are dedicated and focused on delivering exceptional products at affordable prices enabling the world to look and feel beautiful.

Here in the UK, our portfolio includes market leading brands Eylure, Elegant Touch, Salon System, Cantu and Dr Teals. For more information on the brands visit;

www.eylure.com
www.eleganttouch.com
www.salonsystem.com 
www.cantubeauty.co.uk
www.drteals.co.uk

Name: Maison Battat Inc.
Description:
Chez Battat, notre mission est d'encourager les enfants au quotidien à découvrir et explorer le pouvoir du jeu. Nous croyons que l'enfance est une période de curiosité, de créativité et de pure joie, ce qui nous inspire à concevoir et fabriquer une vaste gamme de jouets de haute qualité qui apportent un plaisir sans fin dans les foyers et les cœurs des familles.
En tant qu'entreprise familiale basée à Montréal avec 100 ans d'histoire, notre collection de jouets a atteint plus de 15 marques à succès. Parmi celles-ci, on retrouve les poupées inspirantes Our Generation, les camions robustes DRIVEN et le monde magique de Li'l Woodzeez. Grâce à des partenariats fructueux avec les plus grands détaillants et plateformes de commerce électronique mondiaux, nos jouets sont présents dans les salles de jeux de plus de 70 pays!

Et cela ne s'arrête pas là. Notre équipe dynamique est toujours motivée à explorer de nouvelles façons de grandir, d'évoluer et de fabriquer des jouets qui continueront à faire sourire les enfants pour les générations à venir.

At Battat, our everyday goal is to encourage kids to discover and explore the power of play. We believe that childhood is a time for curiosity, creativity, and pure joy, which inspires us to design and manufacture a wide selection of high-quality toys that fill families’ hearts and homes with endless fun.
Over the course of our 100-year legacy as a family-owned and Montreal-based company, our toy box has grown to include over 15 successful brands: from the inspiring dolls of Our Generation to tough DRIVEN trucks to the magical world of Li’l Woodzeez. We’ve also forged successful partnerships with the world’s leading retailers and e-commerce companies, making it possible to find our toys in playrooms in 70 countries and counting!  

But that doesn't stop there. Our dynamic team is forever motivated to find new and improved ways to grow, evolve and craft toys that'll make kids smile for generations to come.

Name: Chaire Grande Consommation ESSEC
Description:
La Chaire Grande Consommation de l'ESSEC a pour but de préparer les étudiants à la consommation de demain. 
Cette préparation passe par des projets de groupe et par des interventions de professionnels des secteurs de la grande consommation. 
A cela s'ajoute, les visites de magasins, d'événements aux sièges de nos partenaires, d'un voyage de chaire, ...

Name: Multiplex International LLC
Description: Multiplex International LLC specializes in FMCG and Cosmetic products distribution. Established in 1993, the company is one of the leading distributors in the region catering to all the leading hypermarkets, supermarkets, department stores and pharmacies. The company has more than 400 qualified employees, serving UAE, Oman & Qatar. Identifying the right products suitable for Middle Eastern tastes and successful marketing of the products has been Multiplex’s key strength. The most compelling reason behind Multiplex’s success is that the company spares no effort in achieving excellence. It continuously evaluates itself against consumer feedback to deliver the right products at the right price. This constant and unrelenting orientation towards the retailers and customers enables Multiplex to surge forward to provide innovative and world class products.

Name: ALMENA
Description:
Almena S.A. es una Sociedad Anónima comercial uruguaya que importa y comercializa a nivel nacional productos de consumo masivo de reconocidas marcas nacionales e internacionales. 
Su Capital accionario es 100% de la Familia Deicas, propietaria a su vez del Establecimiento Juanicó, principal productora y exportadora de vinos del Uruguay.
Dentro de nuestro portafolio de productos se encuentra Don Pascual, Familia Deicas, Santa Teresa, Pueblo del Sol,  Atlántico Sur, Cavicholli, Bolla, Criadores, Concha y Toro, Norton, Café Iguacu, Underberg, William Grants & Sons, Hendrick's, Moet Hennessy y Cerveza Artesanal Birra Bizarra entre otros.

Name: Borşen Stainless Steel Pipe Co.
Description:
Borşen Boru was founded in 1979. Today Borşen Boru is not only a distributor of stainless steel pipes, valves and fittings but also a leading manufacturer of TIG welded stainless steel pipes in Turkey. 

Borşen Boru, which carries a wide range of all quality products from well respected manufacturers in Europe, supplies its products and services to companies in a wide range of sectors including the petrochemical, chemical, energy, shipbuilding, mechanical engineering, construction, food and beverage production, pipeline installation and trading sectors in Turkey. 

Borşen Boru has started to manufacture TIG welded Stainless steel pipes since January 2006 in its own facilities. Quality assurance system of pipe production is certified by international Lloyd associations. The test laboratory of Borşen Boru is a very important part of Quality Assurance process. Various destructive and non-destructive test procedures are available, such as eddy current testing, surface roughness measurements, hardness test, tensile test, bend test and chemical analysis. 

In Turkey, Borşen is a synonym for high quality TIG welded stainless steel pipes and fittings. 

You can find the technical specification of our products in this catalogue

Name: 4Patriots
Description:
At 4Patriots, we champion freedom & self-reliance.

It all started with pen and paper, a kitchen table, and a dream — to create a company that provided ways to help Americans from all walks of life become more independent and prepared for tough times. To be a great place for great people to work. And to give back to our community, our active military and their families, and our brave veterans. You could say 4Patriots isn’t just a company… we’re a movement, helping Americans become champions of freedom & self-reliance — one family at a time.

Name: Alianza Mayorista (AMSA BRANDS)
Description:
Somos una empresa Centro Americana basada en Guatemala fundada en el 2007 bajo el concepto de proporcionar al mercado centroamericano productos de alta calidad al mejor precio, generando desde entonces historias de éxito con lanzamientos de marcas nuevas y comercializando las mismas en diferentes industrias.  Contamos actualmente con una gama de productos y participamos en mas de 10 diferentes categorías, logrando una participación relevante en cada una de ellas.

Nuestra visión y una excelente ejecución, además de una cultura organizacional en función de nuestros clientes nos ha permitido un crecimiento agresivo en estos  años de historia, respaldados por la excelencia de nuestro capital humano, contamos con una estructura de más 200 colaboradores, una fuerza de ventas al detalle que atiende a más de 150,000 puntos de venta en 8 diferentes paises, un área de Logística con transporte propio y tercerizado, un Centro de Distribución con más de 7,000mts2

Tenemos participación desde Guatemala hasta Panama, República Dominicana y Estados Unidos de Norteamérica y planes de expansión para participar en nuevos mercados.

Name: DK Household Brands
Description:
With a legacy extending back to the Diethelm Keller Group’s origins in the 1860s, and the establishment of Cole & Mason 105 years ago, DK Household Brands has been synonymous with a rich culture of trading and brand building.

Our mission is clear: to build leading brands and enhance our effectiveness as a multi-brand company across all our core markets. We are committed to enriching homes around the world, not just in the kitchen but extending into living spaces with products that every household needs.

With a presence in over 50 countries through retailers and distributors, DK Household Brands supports its global operations from Shenzhen.

DK Household Brands utilises a diverse range of distribution channels to reach its customers globally. This multi-channel approach ensures that the company can meet the needs of a wide variety of customers, from individual consumers to businesses, across different shopping environments.

DK Household Brands is dedicated to providing innovative and high-quality products, poised for further international expansion and driven by a commitment to sustainability and customer satisfaction.

Name: Pink Zebra Home
Description: Pink Zebra is a Direct Selling Company that offers income opportunities for independent Consultants throughout the United States through high quality innovative home fragrance technology. Customers may purchase products through www.pinkzebrahome.com and may host a party through a Consultant and earn FREE products. Products include Candles, innovative Sprinkles, Simmer Pots, Re-sealable Reed Diffusers and other home décor products.

Name: CBI Ghana Ltd.
Description: CBI Ghana Ltd. is a cement manufacturer in Ghana. We have built the most technologically-advanced cement grinding plant to produce premium quality cement according to Ghana Standard (GS 1118) and the European Standard (EN 197).

Name: Duarte Enxovais
Description:
Duarte Enxovais a sua loja de Cama, Mesa e Banho! 

Estamos localizados em ARCOS, CLÁUDIO, DIVINÓPOLIS, FORMIGA, ITAÚNA, NOVA SERRANA, PASSOS e SÃO SEBASTIÃO DO PARAÍSO.

Name: Cello Pens Pvt. Ltd
Description: Stationery

Name: yoobi
Description:
Yoobi is a mission first school supplies brand with BIG IMPACT. Yoobi prides themselves as leaders in trend and design. For every qualifying item purchased, Yoobi donates a school supply item to a U.S. child in need.

Yoobi is currently available in the U.S. and to date, has donated essential school supplies to more than 6 million students. Learn more about Yoobi’s give-back programs  at Yoobi.com/give.

Name: Salentein Argentina B.V.
Description: Salentein started its business operations in 1992 Today, Salentein´s activities comprise different businesses: Wine, Agriculture (crop-farming), Cattle Farming, Premium Beef, and Hospitality. Salentein has operations in Argentina, Uruguay, Australia and The Netherlands, from where our products are exported all over the world.

Name: Bravo CPG
Description:
We provide operations, logistics & supply chain support to growth stage CPG brands that want to stay lean.  Our model allows brands to access the right amounts of support and the right level of seniority, without overpaying for underutilized, full time employees.

Support is customized to your needs, but most commonly includes: demand planning, inventory management, sourcing/procurement, shipping & freight coordination, supply planning, wholesale order management, 3PL management and strategic planning.

Sample clients: Mosh, Joyride Sweets, Cravings by Chrissy, Mela, Parks Project

Name: Lapp Mobility GmbH
Description:
LAPP Mobility GmbH is a company of the LAPP Group that specializes in the development and production of solutions for electromobility. 

Our portfolio includes

- ready to use AC charging cables & devices for automotive OEMs and retailers
- ready to install AC and DC charging cables for charging infrastructure OEMs
- standard cables and harnesses for charging park installers.

All products are manufactured to high quality standards at our two sites in Germany and the Czech Republic. Solutions for the automotive industry are tested in our own test laboratory in accordance with the automotive standard IATF 16949.

The aim of Lapp Mobility GmbH is to promote electromobility with innovative products and to develop high-quality solutions for all players in the e-mobility industry.

Name: Union Cerealera S.A.
Description:
Nuestros comienzos se reconocen en la figura de Antonio Veronesi y Berta Lopez de Veronesi quienes fundaron en 1989 a Unión Cerealera y que junto a sus nueve hijos iniciaron los primeros pasos de esta larga historia que hoy involucra hasta la tercera generación de la familia.
En nuestros comienzos la actividad más importante era la de acopio de cereales, venta de semillas, agroquímicos y maquinaria agrícola.
En 1993 comenzamos a desarrollar actividades industriales, a través del molino arrocero y la elaboración de alimentos balanceados.
Hoy buscamos posicionarnos como proveedores líderes en la región de productos y servicios a la red agroalimentaria, a través de las diversas actividades que realizamos.
En Unión Cerealera buscamos permanentemente incrementar la confianza de nuestros clientes, ofreciéndoles productos de excelente calidad y apostando a la mejora continua de nuestros procesos.

Name: First Home Improvements
Description:
First Home Improvements traces its roots to the 1970's and prides itself on installing highly innovative A rated energy saving products unrivaled by many others within our industry sector.

We offer exclusive and innovative products that are made to the highest possible standards. “We are big enough to cope and small enough to care”. Our in-house designers ensure that we supply bespoke product to compliment your house, all of our units are sourced from quality assured suppliers.

First employs more than 300 industry professionals in various roles ranging from salesmen, designers and specialist craftsmen through to skilled installation teams. All of our products come with a 10 year Warranty. We specialise in Window & Doors (including bi-fold), Conservatories, Roofline and Garage Doors for residential installations and have established a reputation for the enduring quality of our products and outstanding customer care.

Quality is never an accident it is always the result of high intention, sincere effort, intelligent direction and skilful execution; it represents the wise choice of many alternatives.

We all have our own ideas of the perfect home and a place to live that has individuality. At First Home Improvements Ltd we can help you achieve that perfection and turn your dream into a reality with the unique range of products we have to offer. Whether it is replacement Windows, Doors, Conservatory, Roofline or Garage Door, it is vital to select the right company

Name: The TOM Co
Description:
The TOM Co is an Australian, female-owned brand of organic personal care and maternity products for women and planet-friendly eco nappies and babycare range. Our entire range has been developed by women with a commitment to producing quality products with only the purest ingredients imaginable. Our mission is to empower women throughout every life stage to live healthier, more fulfilled lives – this starts with buying and living more consciously. 

In 2016 we launched Tooshies by TOM (www.tooshiesbytom.com.au), our planet friendly baby range consisting of 100% biodegradable baby wipes and eco-nappies. Our nappies are gentle on bottoms and the planet while balancing a commitment to the environment and your baby's needs. Our pure baby wipes are made with plant-based and organic ingredients without any nasties.

In 2012 we became one of the first companies in Australia to become a certified B Corporation meaning we believe business can be a force for good. Together, B Corps redefine success in business by using the power of business to create a positive impact on the world.

In 2017 we won the Australian Organic Business of the Year Award. 

We believe that empowered women empower women.

Name: Lotus Sustainables
Description:
Make life easier. That’s what we all want. Make life easier WHILE being sustainable? That’s the way to get rid of single-use plastic bags. Solving that problem has to start with a benefit to you. That’s Lotus Sustainables. 

Our mission is to show that life without single-use plastic bags can actually be easier. Working with retailers across the country, we create turnkey reusable bag programs with high-quality, reusable solutions to enhance everyday experiences and protect the planet we love. We are a dedicated, mission driven company based in Carlsbad, California committed to using business as a force for good. 

To work with us, reach out to hello@lotus-sustainables.com

Name: Winston Products, LLC
Description:
Winston Products, LLC is a product innovation company that delivers a diverse portfolio of best-in-class brands and merchandising solutions in the automotive, lawn and garden, and home industries. 

Founded in 2004 in Cleveland, Ohio, Winston Products started with a handful of talented people and a mission to bring truly innovative product solutions to the tie-down and towing accessory markets. Since then, our company has grown to include seven successful brands: TowSmart, SmartStraps, CargoSmart, HydroTech, SWOPT Cleaning, FLAT CAT Golf, and W Home Products – with more to come.

From the beginning of our launch, we knew that innovation would be the key to our success. We design our products from the ground up, all while cultivating an environment that values creative problem solving. Our research and development process is fueled by a relentless pursuit of excellence, an efficient and superior manufacturing process, and top-quality customer service. 

We pride ourselves in having not only the best people in the industry, but also creating a culture in which they can thrive. Our motto is “Work Hard, Play Hard, Enjoy Life & Family”. Today, Winston Products is a team of over 100 hardworking people who strive every day to embody this mantra.

Name: Wellis Magyarország Zrt.
Description:
A Wellis Magyarország Zrt. magyar gyártóként piacvezető szerepelt tölt be a hazai wellness berendezéseket gyártó és forgalmazó cégek sorában. A folytonos kapacitásbeli növekedésnek és fejlesztéseknek köszönhetően mára Európa legnagyobb jakuzzi gyártójává vált. 

Minden fejlődő cég történetében vannak kiemelkedő mérföldkövek. A Wellisnél a legutóbbi jelentős fordulópont a 2015-ös év végén következett be. Átadásra került ugyanis 10 000 m2-es gyártócsarnokunk, amivel összességében már közel 17 000 m2-en folyik napjainkban a termelés. A hatalmas, csúcstechnológiás gyártóeszközökkel felszerelt komplexum megépülését a fokozódó piaci igények és a minőségi gyártástechnológiára való törekvés idézte elő. Korszerű eszközökkel és nagyfokú szakmai felkészültséggel igyekszünk vásárlóink egyedi igényeinek megfelelni. A jelentős beruházásnak köszönhetően évi akár 20 000 masszázsmedence legyártása is megvalósíthatóvá vált a Wellisnél. 

Az elmúlt néhány évben robbanásszerű növekedésen ment keresztül a vállalat minden tekintetben: a rendelés állomány megduplázódása magával hozta a gyártási kapacitás ugrásszerű növekedését is, amihez a megfelelő munkaerőt is biztosítani kell. Ennek érdekében lehetőséget biztosítunk munkatársaink számára, hogy a jövőjüket egy Európában piacvezető magyar gyártó vállalatnál építhessék.

Name: Mizu
Description:
Few brands are created to meet the specific needs of a world-class athlete. Mizu was. Not many companies truly live the life they sell, day in, day out. Mizu does. A handful of brands put the planet before profit. Mizu is one of them. 

In 2008, pro-snowboarder, Jussi Oksanen had a vision: to curate a line of reusable products with both function and design. Products for the creative, the style-focused, the never-say-no-to-an-adventure type. Products that could take the beating that a professional athlete might throw their way and keep coming back for more. That, our friends, is how Mizu was born.

At Mizu, we don't just sell an adventure rich lifestyle, we live it. Between our global team of athletes, photographers, and explorers right down to the people developing our products, we spend half our lives outdoors running our gear into the ground. So, don't worry - we've got you covered for round the clock icy cold water, steaming hot coffee, lifetime warranties, and so much more because it's what we need too. But who says a kick-ass product can't be good looking at the same time? Not Mizu. Which is why we focus on elevated design, innovative finishes and a final product that you'll want to own as much for how it looks as how it functions. 

Our path at Mizu is an authentic one. From our very beginnings to our ongoing mission, we have blazed a trail by engineering products that reflect who we are and where we want to go. Join us for the ride. @mizulife / #mizumission / www.mizulife.com

Name: LEM Products
Description:
LEM Products is a consumer-based company located in West Chester, Ohio. We deliver high quality meat processing equipment and supplies for the do-it-yourselfer hunter and home processor. We offer competitive pricing and strive to meet our customers' evolving needs. LEM is also the parent company to Roots & Harvest.

LEM was founded by Larry Metz in 1991 with a simple idea, provide the equipment, supplies and know how to anyone interested in converting their game to delicious sausage and jerky. To do this Larry drew on 35 years of experience as a meat cutter with one of the largest food service company’s in the United States. An avid hunter, his knowledge of processing and love of the outdoors led him to establish a big game processing business in the 1980s. During this time he developed a boneless method of processing that gave the processor a variety of table cuts that were tender, had excellent taste and were custom cut to meet the individual’s needs. In 1991 our first product, a 98 minute video, “Deer Processing From Field to Table”, was produced in response to many clients requests. It remains a best seller to this day. Hundreds of thousands of hunters have learned to professionally process their game from this video. Larry and the LEM team were soon developing an entire line of equipment, supplies and seasonings to meet the varied needs and tastes of big game hunters everywhere.

From humble beginnings, LEM has become the leader in Game Processing. We carry over 700 different products and stand behind them with a trained staff and loaded parts inventory. You can find LEM and Backwoods Brands in over 600 retail stores in 37 states and Canada.

Our goal is simple. Deliver high quality products to hunters and home processors throughout North America. We will support our customers with end-to-end service and guaranteed satisfaction. We believe home processing to be a deeply rewarding experience and an essential part of the outdoor experience.

Name: Camping
Description:

На сегодняшний день компания развивается в двух направлениях:

1.  Поставки и оптовая продажа товаров для туризма и активного отдыха (автохолодильники; изотермические контейнеры и сумки; туристические палатки, спальные мешки, надувные матрацы; аксессуары для гриля; туристическая мебель, посуда и т.д.).
В данном направлении мы являемся лидерами рынка и представляем французскую торговую марку "Campingaz", а с 2006 года –  и собственный бренд "Кемпинг".

2. Поставки, производство и оптовая продажа бытовой техники. На рынке компания представлена испанской торговой маркой "CATA" (кухонные вытяжки и встраиваемая техника) и немецким брендом "PYRAMIDA" (вытяжки, встраиваемая техника, отдельно стоящие плиты).
