Name: GUNNER
Description:
Like some of the best stories, ours begins with a dog, Gunner. 

2008
Addison is a junior at Ole Miss when he brings his first dog home: a British chocolate lab named Gunner. He doesn't know it then, but this is the dog who will change it all.

2012
Addison is increasingly frustrated with the market’s cheap dog products for Gunner. Addison lays the groundwork for the kennel with sketches and concepts for the strongest dog kennel in the world. He uses Gunner as the prototype for sizing.

Summer 2015
The G1 Kennel changes the way people think about safe pet travel. It's featured on TODAY show as the first 5 Star Crash Tested crate per the Center For Pet Safety; GUNNER's first patent is issued. The first G1 Kennel ships to customers!

2020
When Addison wrote down his original goals in 2015, a Food Crate product was one of them. Just like the kennel, the food storage system, launched in 2020, is Overbuilt in the USA and born from Addison's personal frustration with products on the market.

Summer 2023
The GUNNER Bumper, another product that Addison has been passionate about improving for years, launches: designed to be the ultimate, reliable training tool.

Fall 2023
GUNNER releases Dog Bowls, designed for home and built for travel, that are spill proof, rust proof and all-around fool proof. Made right down the road in Nashville, TN.

Overbuilt In The USA
When Addison and Emily Edmonds founded the company in his hometown of Nashville, they had a clear vision of the kind of company he wanted to build.

They wanted to create the best damn dog products in the world; they wanted to have customer service that left an impression; they wanted to build a culture where people liked to come to work; and they wanted to support American business as much as possible.

GUNNER is proud to work with more than 20+ small businesses across the USA to manufacture products like our G1 Kennel, Food Crate and Dog Bowl (made right down the street from our HQ).

Description:

Fondée en 1989 par la famille Jeuland, SCD Luisina est une PME à la culture familiale implantée en Bretagne. Historiquement spécialiste des éviers et de la robinetterie, SCD Luisina n'a cessé de développer son offre au fil des années pour accompagner toujours mieux les cuisinistes au quotidien.

Name: Zyloware Eyewear
Description:
Join us in Celebration National Eyewear Day on June 6th, 2023!

For 100 years, family-owned and operated Zyloware has prided itself on quality, service and customer satisfaction. Founded in 1923 by Joseph Shyer, Zyloware first made its home in Long Island City, New York, when the area was surrounded by potato fields. Through several expansions and its evolution into the global supplier it is today, Zyloware remained on the same block, just across the East River from the Manhattan skyline for 87 years. 

Known as an optical innovator, Zyloware leads the industry in original product development and branding initiatives. Perhaps Zyloware's most widely recognized innovation was the development of the Invincible in 1964. The first frame made out of Nylon and the industry's most successful ever Nylon frame sold in the United States, the Invincible has sold over 20 million frames. 

Today Zyloware is over 20 years into its third generation of family stewardship, and remains an American independent, privately held company. It is the oldest family-owned optical frame supplier in the United States. By carefully adding well-known brands and exciting products, Zyloware continues to grow. The company has increased the scope and size of its sales force in conjunction with its in-house marketing and product development teams. Zyloware continually receives awards for frame quality and design, marketing and our customer service. 

Zyloware is aggressively adapting to the ever-changing needs of the eyewear industry; however, the core values of the company will always remain the same. Zyloware will always develop the highest quality products, provide superior customer service and remain dedicated to the needs of eyecare professionals and consumers. For over 100 years, Zyloware has developed warm, lasting relationships with its customers. The Zyloware family looks forward to continuing those special relationships as it continues to innovate and introduce desirable eyewear products.

Name: Consortium Education
Description:
Consortium has been serving organisations and businesses delivering public services for over 40 years. The simple proposition of bringing together a wide range of disparate products, presenting them in an easy to access way and delivering on a first class service promise is the essence of our Buying Made Easy formula which is so popular with customers.

We currently work with over 25,000 customers from the education, early years and care sectors providing them with all the supplies and services they need to operate on a daily basis. We also have many customers from local government, the emergency services, churches, voluntary groups and charities.

We do our utmost to be a Customer Service led, vibrant and innovative business and are continually voted No.1 for service by our customers. As an organisation, we are committed to working ethically with our customers, suppliers and employees. We play an active role in the United Nations Global Compact Initiative and our efforts to minimise our impact on the environment are core to our business from product sourcing to internal business practices.

In April 2012 The Consortium acquired West Mercia Supplies (WMS) from its 4 Local Authority owners (Shropshire, Hereford, Worcestershire, Telford & Wrekin) and was in turn acquired by Smith News Plc.

Name: Marleybones
Description:
When we couldn’t find nutritious, all-natural food for our dogs that didn’t require a ton of preparation or freezer space; we made it.
 
Marleybones is the easiest way to feed healthy. We are reshaping dog nutrition with our Pantry Fresh dog dining, gourmet treats, and health boosting supplements, all made in the UK to support healthier dogs and a healthier planet. Our Pantry Fresh food and air-dried treats combine freshly-prepared ingredients, superfoods, and a slow-cooking process to create a food that’s as nutritious as it is convenient – without the need for freezing, preservatives or artificial additives. Taking the headache out of frozen food, Marleybones makes healthy living a hassle-free choice for pet-parents. 

Rooted in science, backed by vets, and inspired by Marley, the dog behind the brand.

Nuestro compromiso es entender las necesidades de cada cliente y ofrecer un servicio personalizado, cercano y profesional que supere expectativas. In the Bun holding, we fight to make our dreams come true. Alongside building this reality, we take pleasure in looking at things we once imagined, come to fruition. Thanks to our team’s genius and creativity, we believe that nothing can stand between us and our goals
We, in Bun holding, started our activity in cultural and publishing fields in 2003. Our journey started with educational books in Kheilisabz. After 12 years, in 2015 we took another step forward and founded our children and teenagers’ publication, Porteghal. 2018 was the year we globalized our ideas and crossed the borders. We expanded our activities once again in 2019 and set foot in new territories; Zingo, our toys and board games brand, Khoob, our adult fiction and non-fiction books, and Barizo chain restaurants were born. At Bun holding, we are constantly thinking of growing ourselves and our business, and we will be adding more brands to our holding in the near future.

Name: EMILE HENRY
Description:
Emile Henry est une entreprise française, implantée en Bourgogne du Sud, qui développe et fabrique des ustensiles de cuisson et accessoires de cuisine en céramique de haute qualité. 

Depuis sa création en 1850, six générations se sont passé le flambeau dans les ateliers de Marcigny. Aujourd’hui, Jean-Baptiste Henry, PDG, dirige l’entreprise patrimoniale avec cette même passion pour l’art de la Terre et du Feu.
 
Fière de son héritage familial et de son expertise, l’entreprise Emile Henry s’applique à innover constamment avec de nouveaux concepts chaque année, au côté de ses créations emblématiques. Améliorer l’expérience de cuisine tout en répondant aux préoccupations des consommateurs, une mission qui pousse l’entreprise à imaginer de nouveaux usages quotidiens. 
 
Plats à four, moules à pain, tajines, cocottes… issus d’un travail collaboratif de la phase de conception jusqu’au contrôle qualité, les produits Emile Henry sont certifiés « Origine France Garantie » et s’invitent dans les cuisines de plus de 65 pays.
 
Des matières premières naturelles, qui assurent une cuisson des aliments à la fois saine et savoureuse, sélectionnées avec soin et sublimées par un savoir-faire artisanal reconnu par le label Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant (EPV), voici la recette d’une production locale de qualité, respectueuse des hommes et de l’environnement.

Zaron Cosmetics is a brand dedicated to the enhancement of the well-being and quality of life of all people through the development, marketing, distribution, and sale of quality lifestyle products.

The Zaron brand trades under the names of Zaron International Limited, Zaron Cosmetics Limited and Zaron Hair Products Limited.

Our products are conceived and manufactured in an environmentally sustainable manner to offer consistency, quality, value and style to users in ways that accentuate physical beauty, engender inner satisfaction and self-esteem.

Name: Mypura
Description:
At Pura, we believe that being eco-friendly is no longer a luxury, but a necessity. That’s why we’ve created a range of skin and eco-friendly baby care products that are affordable and accessible to all allowing parents to look after their planet while caring for their children. Simple, just like eco should be.
We’re working towards a real solution on nappy recycling in the UK and we’re also campaigning for a total ban on plastic in wipes.

PRODUCTS
Skin-friendly and eco-friendly wipes and nappies that don’t cost the earth. 100% plastic free, 100% biodegradable baby wipes made from biodegradable plant fibres with 99% water and organic aloe vera; eco friendly nappies made with soft organic cotton, no nasty chemicals, perfumes or allergensand plenty of sustainable materials.

COMPANY OVERVIEW
Pura wasn’t born in a boardroom. We’re real parents who wanted to make a change and find a solution to nappies and plastic wipes pollution. We wanted to make the change for our son, Ezra, and for the future of all kids. So, we designed the Pura range to allow all parents to care for the planet whilst caring for their baby, not only those who can afford it.

a Modern food packing facility built on 15,000m2 of land in Khartoum North and equipped with the latest technology in the packing industry. With the help of a talented marketing and sales team and a modern distribution fleet, Delta Food products have been made available to consumers all around the country at different types of wholesale and retail outlets.

Working towards achieving a 30% market share, Delta Food Complex has the capability to produce a complete range of sesame-based products and other products. Name: Nupo
Description:
Nupo - "To make life a positive experience for people while they're on a diet"

In 1981, the leading Danish obesity researcher Dr. Flemming Quaade
developed a solution that would change the lives of his overweight and
obese patients. A formula to help them lose weight while providing all the
nutrition the body needs.

At the time, dieting generally meant abstaining from certain foods or from
eating altogether. We knew that unhealthy and unbalanced diets negatively
impacted people’s health and psychology, resulting in failed weight loss
attempts and fatigue.

In pursuit of our ambition to set a new standard for weight loss products,
we innovated the Nupo Very Low Calorie Diet (VLCD). The VLCD diet
liberated dieting making it healthier for the body with products containing
all the essential vitamins, minerals, proteins and fibers. Once the diet
products were in place, we needed a compass to guide different lifestyles
and diet preferences. The Nupo Point System was born out of this need.
It removed strictness from dieting, making it flexible to the needs of every
individual. Nupo Brick System liberated the mind from dieting, making it OK
to eat the things that made you happy, as long as you stayed within the
boundaries of your daily brick count. At the time, such adaptability was
unheard of.

Our goal has always been to help people maintain as normal a
lifestyle as possible and still lose weight.

That’s why Nupo is considered the world’s most comfortable diet.

Name: HUMANIC & SHOE4YOU (Brands  of Leder & Schuh AG)
Description: Die LEDER & SCHUH AG zählt mit ihren beiden Vertriebsmarken HUMANIC und SHOE4YOU zu einem der größten Schuhhandelsunternehmen Europas. Das Unternehmen beschäftigt rund 2.000 Mitarbeiter*innen an etwa 200 Standorten in neun Ländern (AT, DE, CZ, SK, HU, SI, HR, RO, BG). Die Unternehmenszentrale befindet sich in der steirischen Landeshauptstadt Graz. Wir legen großen Wert auf den Aufbau von langfristigen Arbeitsbeziehungen und die Förderung von Karrieren innerhalb des Unternehmens.

Name: Candlelight Products Limited
Description:
Candlelight is a market-leading designer, importer and wholesale supplier of design-led Homeware to suit every room and lifestyle.
We have an extremely talented team of in-house designers, who constantly follow the latest market trends, to create new and exciting homeware Candlelight stands as a leading designer of innovative, design-driven home fragrances and accessories. Candlelight is proud to be the fastest-growing candle company in the UK, redefining the market with our trend-led designs, exceptional quality, and customer-focused approach.
Our talented in-house design team stays ahead of market trends, continuously developing fresh and exciting products. Collaborating closely with our customers, we also specialise in creating bespoke own-brand collections and packaging. At the core of our business lies a commitment to innovation, creativity, and a sharp focus on market demands.

Our sourcing and quality assurance teams, based permanently in the Far East, ensure seamless control over our supply chain. Decades-long partnerships with trusted suppliers allow us to adapt swiftly to customer needs while upholding rigorous ethical and social compliance standards.
Operating from our advanced 150,000 sq. ft. UK warehouse, including a 10,000 sq. ft. showroom brimming with inspiration, we cater to the unique needs of both large-scale and independent retailers. By owning every step of the process—from design and sourcing to warehousing and distribution—we deliver unmatched service and responsiveness.
With over 53 years of expertise, Candlelight is well-equipped to meet the demands of major retailers, reliably managing stock, facilitating repeat sales, and efficiently processing high-value orders.

Name: Phoenix Wipes
Description:
Phoenix Wipes  is located on Long Island in the state of New York. We welcome visitors with reservations to tour our facility.  Phoenix Wipes has been in business for over a decade and believes in quality manufacturing of wet wipes and service to various  industries. All products are designed and manufactured to exacting tolerances. Our customers cover the entire gambit of the various industries throughout the world.

Utilization of Phoenix Wipes will allow you to benefit from our years of experience without the cost associated with building and developing the required resources, relationships, and expertise necessary to effectively manage the complexities in contract manufacturing. Let us put that knowledge to work for you with innovative solutions and customized products to best suit you and your customer’s needs.

The team at Phoenix Wipes has a strong knowledge base on best manufacturing practices and extensive experience and diverse product knowledge. Let us put that knowledge to work for you with innovative solutions and customized products to best suit you and your customer’s needs.

Name: Spatial Technologies
Description:
Founded in 2002 and staffed by trained and experienced professionals, including Professional Land Surveyors, Spatial Technologies is the exclusive sales and authorized warranty service centre for Leica’s high-end surveying solutions in Western Canada, and senseFly UAV Solutions. Our head office is based in Calgary, Alberta with additional offices in Edmonton, AB and Richmond, BC. Spatial Technologies sells, services and rents a complete range of surveying equipment and supplies ranging from basic construction lasers to 3D laser scanners.

Our mission is to be the first choice supplier of top quality measurement solutions and service to the Geomatics community. We want to be considered your partner and not just a supplier. Our goal is to develop a reputation of mutual respect, trust and integrity with our business partners, suppliers, and employees, while providing the tools to enhance our clients business. We will accomplish these goals through our dedication to customer service.

Spatial Technologies has become one of the most trusted and experienced supplier of top quality measurement solutions.

Name: WOO More Play
Description:
WOO More Play is a direct-to-consumer sexual wellness brand with a focus on natural, organic ingredients and female-forward products to spark a better sex life. Our products are created with her in mind, and our ingredient list is always short and sweet. WOO leaves behind bad chemicals and additives so you can have good sex, and overall, a healthy and happy relationship. 

Meet WOO More Play at www.woomoreplay.com and on social @woomoreplay

Name: Topshoes Calçados
Description:
A história da Topshoes iniciou em agosto de 2001, no município gaúcho de Picada Café, e integra o Grupo Coopershoes, um dos maiores fabricantes de tênis vulcanizados do país. Por muitos anos, produziu e comercializou calçados para grandes marcas e redes de lojas, assim como a exploração da marca Set Up no mercado nacional. Atualmente, a empresa destina parte de sua produção para o mercado externo, especialmente para os países integrantes do Mercosul.
Com duas fábricas grandes e modernas - matriz em Picada Café / RS e filial Quixeré /RS -  com mais de 15.000 m², a Topshoes tem know-how para produção de calçados vulcanizados e cementados.
 É uma empresa jovem, com 20 anos de mercado, que cresce continuamente com uma gestão eficaz de produção e comercialização das marcas licenciadas, investe em novas tecnologias, pesquisa e novos materiais.
Location: Picada Café, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Brodware
Description:
Since 1964, Brodware has been committed to design authenticity, innovation, and quality, striving to apply this approach to all facets of our craftsmanship and service. 

We have worked to bring together genuine materials, expert detailing, exquisite proportion, and artisanal craftsmanship to create personal and luxurious environments. Our tapware, fittings and accessories are dynamic three-dimensional forms that deliver graceful silhouettes, detail and meaning to any space. They are functional sculptures that go beyond creating a stylish room; they transform it into a personal retreat. 

From a complete master bathroom suite down to a single piece, choosing Brodware means character, flexibility, and attention to detail; everything you need to see your vision reflected in a physical space. With over five decades’ experience developing these spaces within which we enjoy our down-time, Brodware remains dedicated to evolving what is possible in bathrooms, delivering elegant functionality in a way that appears effortless.

Name: AXA Home Security
Description:
From origin, AXA develops, manufactures and sells builders hardware and bicycle accessories, both under its own brand name and as custom-made solutions for OEM clients. AXA has a strong position in the middle segment and high end of these markets. 
AXA changed from a product oriented to a ‘swinging’ sales & marketing organisation, utilising the well known and strong brand name ‘AXA’. 

AXA was split in two separate sales divisions, each with their own branding and marketing strategy. These two sales divisions are operating under the brand names: ‘AXA Bike Security’ and ‘AXA Home Security’.
AXA aims for substantial and profitable growth in the Home Security and Bike Security markets. This growth can be achieved among others through the development of new products, broadening of the product ranges, the increase of (export) activities, and acquisitions. 

AXA distinguishes itself from competitors not only by its high quality products but also through its branding and innovation.

Home Security
The current product portfolio of Home Security is divided into six product groups: hinges, casement stays, window fasteners, aluminium door furniture, door locks and ASSA door locks and cylinders. 

Bike Security
Bike Security is divided into three product groups: locks, lighting and guards. The locks range includes frame locks, cable locks and chain locks. The lighting product range includes front lights, rear lights and dynamos, whilst the guards range comprises chain guards and dress guards.

AXA is part of the Allegion group.
About Allegion
Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) is a global pioneer in safety and security, with leading brands like CISA, Interflex, LCN, Schlage, SimonsVoss and Von Duprin. Focusing on security around the door and adjacent areas, Allegion produces a range of solutions for homes, businesses, schools and other institutions. Allegion is a $2 billion company, with products sold in almost 130 countries.
Visit www.allegion.com.

Name: Burst Oral Care
Description:
BURST has one simple aim: to make sonic oral care affordable and available to everyone. With the help of the dental community, we've crafted an incredible sonic toothbrush that boasts charcoal nano-particle embedded bristles, 33,000 sonic vibrations and an industry leading lithium ion battery that lasts for 4 weeks on just one charge. 

In just two years we've amassed hundreds of thousands of subscribers, and more than 35,000 dental professionals in our ambassador community who recommend our products daily. Join the community, recommend affordable yet extraordinary oral care products at a discount to your patients (available exclusively through you!) and earn a little something on the side for your support. Learn more by visiting www.burstambassadors.com

Name: Nature's Craft
Description: At Nature’s Craft, we pride ourselves on our wide range of supplements made with only the best ingredients to address various health concerns. We have something for everyone, whether it's capsules, gummies, or even drops you’re looking for. Your road to wellness starts here, with a supplement for every stage of your wellness journey

Name: Anveya Living Private Limited
Description: Anveya is building powerful brands that create a positive impact for the consumer, the industry and the planet. We're transparent, direct-to-consumer, online-first in our approach, and are focusing in the high-potential space of beauty & personal care. This is a time of hyper growth and expansion for the company. We are young, eager to experiment, to create and to disrupt. We are an ambitious startup, looking for people with high ownership and a bias for action who share our vision and will help us make a difference to the world.

Name: Tupperware México
Description:
Desde hace más de 55 años estamos en la mayoría de los hogares mexicanos con productos innovadores, de gran calidad y diseño cuidando el medio ambiente. 

En Tupperware México, damos soluciones para la vida diaria y creamos historias de éxito, a través de nuestras Distribuidoras y Fuerza de Ventas. La compañía ha ayudado a miles de personas a obtener ingresos extras, capacitación constante y desarrollo personal, al formar parte de nuestro equipo. 

Además, nuestra presencia se ha extendido al universo digital, con nuestra tienda en línea y más herramientas digitales que han hecho crecer el negocio.

Name: Ind. & Com. Plásticos Cajovil Ltda
Description:
Contribuir para o crescimento saudável e feliz de um bebê é a nossa razão maior de existir. Saber que ajudamos as famílias a cuidarem melhor de seus mais novos integrantes nos faz realizados!

A Cajovil nasceu a partir da reunião de um grupo de pessoas que realmente desejava oferecer produtos plásticos melhores para as famílias do Brasil. E não tardou para a linha bebê ser a de maior sucesso na empresa, o que contribuiu enormemente para a realização do sonho de ter neste segmento a principal linha de produtos da Cajovil. Foram muitos desafios para implementar os produtos mais adequados à cada fase, mas, com toda dedicação, pesquisa e desenvolvimento, a Cajovil conseguiu superar todas as dificuldades e se firmar como uma empresa especializada em bem servir o bebê brasileiro. Tudo isso escutando a parte mais interessada: papai e mamãe!

Estar em família é acolhimento e carinho, se preocupar com a evolução, a segurança e cada detalhe. Essa nossa visão sustenta a importância de fabricar com perfeccionismo cada um dos nossos produtos. Investimos constantemente em tecnologia, pesquisa internacional e escutamos a opinião dos nossos clientes em primeiro lugar, para oferecer sempre o melhor produto, visando a plena satisfação de cada um deles!  É por esse motivo que hoje temos o maior mix de produtos do Brasil para a linha bebê, produzidos em uma área de 20 mil m² de total dedicação ao bebê <3. 

A Cajovil hoje é detentora de 3 marcas, uma nacional chamada Adoleta Bebê, uma americana, chamada Nûby e outra australiana, chamada Dreambaby. Cada uma ocupa um pedacinho do coração da Cajovil, ajudando os papais nos diferentes momentos da vida do bebê. 

Para melhor atender papais e mamães, estamos presentes de ponta a ponta no país, e nossos produtos também estão disponíveis para compra nos principais market places  / e-commerces do Brasil. Também exportamos para a América Latina, América Central, Europa, África e Ásia!.

Name: ILNA Inc.
Description:
Interloop North America (ILNA) is a small, passionate team, with a big vision! We are the North American representative of Interloop Ltd., one of the world’s leading sock manufacturers.  Located in the heart of downtown Winston Salem, NC, ILNA’s mission is to be an agent of positive change for the stakeholders & community by pursuing an ethical and sustainable business.  A career at Interloop North America offers countless ways to make an impact in a fast growing organization.  

Our customers value the quality of our products, our creative design and product capabilities.  We bring a breadth and depth of experience and market insights to support our customers'  own brand initiatives.  Interloop has longstanding partnerships with leading global brands and retailers based, not only on amazing capabilities and large scale, but also a deep and longstanding commitment to ethical business practices, sustainability and LEAN manufacturing.

ILNA is the exclusive North America socks licensee for PRINCE, The Comfort Sock, Hidden Peak Outdoor &  Wiggletoes socks.

Name: Bumble Bee Foods
Description:
The Bumble Bee Seafood Company is passionately pursuing its purpose of feeding people’s lives through the power of the ocean. The iconic 120-year-old fishing company consistently aims to deliver delicious, healthy and affordable food to consumers while working hard to find new ways to protect the ocean and those that rely on it. Bumble Bee is firmly anchored in a commitment to connect the world to the ocean by re-defining sourcing, producing and enjoying products from and inspired by the ocean.

 

Bumble Bee’s full line of seafood and specialty protein products are marketed in the U.S., Canada and over 50 markets globally under leading brands including Bumble Bee, Brunswick, Clover Leaf, Snow’s, Wild Selectionsand Beach Cliff. For more information about the company, visit TheBumbleBeeCompany.com. For product information, visit www.BumbleBee.com.

Name: Golden Africa Djibouti SARL
Description:
Golden Africa Djibouti (GAD) SARL is an ISO 9001:2015 certified international prime edible oil manufacturing and packing complex strategically located near Doralleh port of Djibouti, Horn of Africa. We are proud producer of two leading market pacesetter edible oil brands: Liba and Al Naqi. 

Golden Africa Djibouti is also known for its export service of Bulk Palm Oil, Sunflower oil, and other byproducts like PFAD and Stearin to various African markets such as Ethiopia, Yemen, Somalia, Turkey, Lebanon and other middle east countries.

Name: Prestige Consumer Healthcare
Description:
Prestige Consumer Healthcare continues to build on its long commitment of equal employment opportunity and anti-discrimination by consciously and proactively promoting inclusion and equity of people with unique cultural and ethnic heritage, color and backgrounds, gender identification and sexual orientation, and other traits. We strive to facilitate the acquisition of diverse attitudes, skills and talents particularly for future leadership roles through hiring, workplace practices and employee development. Be a part of our culture of nourishment, equity and belonging where everyone is a leader and where the words “Thank You” have true meaning.
Look at the opportunities available for our Tarrytown, NY offices and Lynchburg facility at www.prestigebrands.com/careers/open-positions.

BEWARE OF CYBER JOB SCAMMERS
The jobs you see posted here on this website are the ONLY positions for which Prestige is currently recruiting candidates. Prestige also does not post "Work from Home" jobs. If you are contacted for a job by anyone using a Gmail, Yahoo or similar email account and claiming to be a representative of Prestige, you are likely dealing with a scammer. If you believe you have been a victim of a scam, report the activity to the Internet Crime Complaint Center at www.ic3.gov or your local FBI field office, which can be found online at www.fbi.gov/contact-us/field-offices.

Name: Gorton's
Description:
Since 1849, Gorton’s mission has been to help people everywhere enjoy the goodness of great seafood. Headquartered in Gloucester, Massachusetts, Gorton’s is one of America's oldest continuously operating companies, and continues to be the innovative leader in the seafood industry. Gorton’s full line of frozen seafood products spans from breaded and battered Fish Sticks, Fillets, and Shrimp to gluten free Grilled Fish and new product innovation like Air Fried Garlic & Herb fish fillets and Double Crunch Shrimp. Gorton’s products are available nationwide in independent and chain grocery stores.
 
Gorton's proudly stands behind the promise that consumers can, “Trust the Gorton’s Fisherman,” for the best-tasting, highest-quality seafood. The Gorton's Fisherman, in his yellow slicker and rain hat, embodies this commitment. For more information, please visit https://www.gortons.com/ or call 1-800-222-6846

Learn more about the exciting things we are up to at: https://www.gortons.com/

Name: Kidde
Description:
Founded by Walter Kidde, a pioneer in early smoke detection and fire suppression, Kidde is a leading manufacturer of fire safety products. Each day, we work to expand upon our legacy of innovation, providing advanced solutions to protect people and property from fire and related hazards. 

Kidde is a part of Kidde Global Solutions.

Name: Combe Incorporated
Description:
Since 1949, Combe brands have been part of people’s most personal moments. When a man faces his first gray hairs in the mirror — or a woman wonders how to care for the most intimate area of her body — Combe brands are here to help people feel like themselves again: Confident. Comfortable. Looking and feeling their best.

We put people’s personal care needs at the center of every thing we do. These aren’t niche needs. They are universal needs, but often kept private. We respect that. At Combe, instead of shying away from these very personal Personal Care problems, we aim to solve them. We believe that’s the right thing to do for people and the smart thing to do for business.

Remaining true to our consumer-oriented innovation and marketing platform, Combe markets a portfolio of established brands that include Just for Men, Vagisil, and Sea-Bond in major international markets and Aqua Velva, Lectric Shave, and Brylcreem in the U.S. and Canada. Building upon its success in the United States, Combe has grown steadily in international markets over the last almost four decades, and generates approximately one-third of its revenues from markets outside of the U.S. and Canada including the United Kingdom, Spain, Italy, Australia, Canada, Mexico, and Brazil. 

The company has transitioned to its third generation of Combe family leadership, under the direction of Keech Combe Shetty and Akshay Shetty.

Name: CHOGAN GROUP SPA
Description:
Born as a family-run business, Chogan Group S.p.A. has been one of the most renowned companies in the network marketing industry for over ten years. Today, it boasts a solid reputation thanks to its ability to adapt and respond to the ever-evolving needs of the market.

Operating across Europe with more than 10 brands, Chogan Group S.p.A. is committed to the care of people and the world around them through a constantly expanding network of over 100,000 consultants.

The well-being and satisfaction of both consultants and customers are at the core of everything Chogan does.
The company provides continuous training, tools, and resources to help everyone achieve their goals — creating not only financial opportunities but also a space for connection across different cultures and nationalities.

With a catalogue of over 2,000 products spanning multiple categories, Chogan offers a complete range of personal care and lifestyle solutions, maintaining high standards of quality, safety, and ethics.

Despite its remarkable growth, the company’s innovative spirit and drive for continuous improvement remain unchanged. This evolution is not a destination, but a motivation to reach even higher goals.

It is this mindset of constant progress that makes Chogan Group S.p.A. a trusted choice for those who want to be part of a company in continuous evolution.

Name: Orkla Finland
Description:
Two Orkla companies, Orkla Suomi and Orkla Care Finland, represent more than 60 brands for both everyday life and special occasions. 

Orkla Suomi is a leading company in the food industry. We provide Finnish homes and foodservice sector with high-quality and tasteful food, treats and food solutions. orklasuomi.fi

Orkla Care Finland provides Finnish homes with high-quality products for personal wellbeing, health and wound care, for home and personal care, as well as basic garments and underwear that fit the Finnish taste. orklacare.fi

Name: AYIKA SCIENCES PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: Ayika Sciences specialises in Manufacturing of Natural and organic products for your everyday necessities. From hygiene products such as disinfectants wipes, alcohol swabs, anti bacterial wipes, sanitising wipes to personal, cosmetic and baby care wipes and industrial use wipes and liquids, we manufacture all under one roof. Our Manufacturing Plant and Warehouse is located in Manesar, Haryana and spread across a massive 50,000 sq ft area.

Name: Earth Rated
Description:
About Us
Earth Rated is driven by the knowledge that we can make things better. We are in constant pursuit of improvement and relentlessly challenge the status quo to impact our community positively.

Our Mission: Make everyday moments for people and their dogs simpler and better.
Our Vision: Empower dog owners to positively impact their dogs’ lives and the community around them.

At Earth Rated, we exist to make a difference.

À propos de nous
Ce qui nous anime chez Earth Rated, c’est la certitude que nous pouvons améliorer les choses. Nous cherchons continuellement à nous améliorer et à bousculer le statu quo afin d’avoir un impact positif sur notre communauté.

Notre mission: Simplifier et améliorer le quotidien des gens et de leurs chiens.
Notre vision: Permettre aux propriétaires de chiens d’avoir un impact positif sur la vie de leurs compagnons canins et sur la communauté qui les entoure.

Chez Earth Rated, nous existons pour contribuer à un monde meilleur.

Name: Famsa
Description:
Desde nuestra fundación en 1970, en Grupo Famsa hemos venido consolidándonos como una empresa pública líder en el sector minorista; enfocada en la venta de productos y servicios a crédito. 
Siguiendo un proyecto disciplinado de crecimiento, hemos fundamentado nuestra estrategia en el desarrollo de un portafolio sólido de negocios complementarios basados en el crédito al consumo y el ahorro. A través de nuestras tres unidades de negocio, brindamos una oferta de valor integral dirigida a mejorar la calidad de vida de un segmento poblacional que demanda servicios personalizados y opciones de crédito que no le son brindadas por la banca tradicional. 
Un comprometido equipo de trabajo con más de 18,000 empleados y una amplia red de 421 tiendas con cobertura en 78 ciudades de México y 37 de las ciudades con mayor población hispana de Estados Unidos, están dedicados a superar las expectativas de más de 9 millones de clientes de Grupo Famsa. 

En enero de 2007 inició operaciones Banco Ahorro Famsa, S.A., Institución de Banca Múltiple, que constituye un ambicioso proyecto para instituir el brazo financiero de Grupo Famsa y complementar nuestra propuesta de valor con servicios bancarios. Los avances en la implementación de nuestro banco ya comienzan a convertirse en valiosas sinergias con el área comercial que impulsan el desempeño operativo y financiero del Grupo.

Name: Sheela Foam Ltd
Description:
Sheela Foam Limited is India’s leading manufacturer of PU foam and mattresses, best known for its flagship brand Sleepwell. With over 50 years of excellence, the Company has built a strong legacy of technological innovation, quality manufacturing, and customer-centric solutions.

Headquartered in India, Sheela Foam has a presence in Spain and Australia, and operates a network of 18+ advanced manufacturing plants across three continents. These facilities are recognized for their high standards in both quality and environmental sustainability.

The Company’s diverse product portfolio is distributed through 20,000+ retail touchpoints across India, under trusted brands like Sleepwell and Kurl-on. Its extensive pan-India sales and distribution network, supported by highly qualified and professional management teams, ensures wide market reach and operational efficiency.

Sheela Foam is also the first mattress and home comfort products company in India to be listed on the stock exchanges. A notable achievement includes a patented technology integrated across its product range — the latest in a line of ongoing innovations. These are further strengthened by the Company’s well-integrated operations and economies of scale.

The Company is guided by its core values: Integrity, Humility, Innovation, Accountability, and Customer Orientation.

Visit us at: www.sheelafoam.com
Headquarters: Sleepwell Tower, #14 Sector 135, Noida, UP – 201301, India

Name: VST Industries Limited (affiliate of British American Tobacco)
Description:
The Vazir Sultan Tobacco Company Limited was incorporated on 10th November, 1930, under the Hyderabad Companies Act No. IV of 1320 Fasli and now governed under the Companies Act, 1956/2013. The name of the Company was subsequently changed to VST Industries Limited on 30th April, 1983. The Company has its Registered Office at Azamabad, Hyderabad.

The Company’s shares are listed on BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

Name: Lipka Group of Companies
Description:
Luxury, efficiency, and exclusivity are synonymous with the ever-growing vogue of the ISI and ISO (9001:2015) accredited, Lipka. A well-known brand in the realm of bathroom and kitchen fittings, LIPKA has undoubtedly achieved a superior position in the industry, promising to be the one-stop solution to all the lifestyle essentials.

Born as a vision to a dynamic entrepreneur, Lipka is an Indian company based in New Delhi and has spread its presence in the markets of over 1000 cities. It started as a modest SSI unit and went out to grow into a large deferential family with a range of over 4000 products being sold by 5000 dealers across the country. Team LIPKA comprises over 300 plus committed members who aim to bring to their customers, convenience and elegance – all at once! The team works vigorously and ensures compatibility with the diverse choices of its consumers with its versatile products. Team LIPKA remains on its toes throughout the year to introduce new products and modify the existing ones with creative add-ons, keeping in mind the ever-changing needs of the consumers.

Now more than a decade old, LIPKA stands at the apex on the list of the most-selling floor drains and has gained substantial momentum with respect to its other remarkably designed products such as its practical kitchen sinks, stylish faucets/taps, sturdy PTMT fixtures, and so on. The 100% indigenously manufactured products of Lipka, have the most extensive range of designs in the country for bathroom fittings, kitchen fixtures, and other utility requirements.
LIPKA’s core values echo customers’ need for quality, creativity, functionality, and brilliance. It is not only the fastest growing online brand in the country but also aspires to be the best multinational brand for bathroom and kitchen fittings that reflect sophisticated, hygienic, and green living.

Name: Gillette India Pvt. Ltd
Description:
The Best A Man Can Get.

At the heart of men's grooming for more than 100 years, Gillette understands that when men look good, they feel good and they perform well. This is a reflection of how shaving & grooming plays an important role in a man's day. With the increasing number of men engaging in facial and body grooming on a daily, weekly or monthly basis, one thing is clear: men have carved out their niche in the beauty industry and Gillette designs products specific to their needs. To view a list of our award-winning razor blades click here: http://www.gillette.co.in/en-in

For millions of men all over the world, Gillette is intrinsically linked to helping them look, feel, and be their best every day. With Gillette’s precision in men’s razors, expertise in male grooming products, and mentorship, we are able to help men all over the world conquer their day with confidence.

Name: Not Your Mother's Haircare
Description: We celebrate our differences and create high quality, salon-inspired, clean haircare products for all generations. We’re bold, different and always evolving.

Name: Tom's of Maine
Description:
We made our mark making natural products like toothpaste and deodorant. But what is most important to us? Working to make positive change by doing good. This has been our focus for over 50 years, and for the next 50, we’re challenging ourselves to help solve some of the world’s biggest social and environmental problems through our products, our policies, and our partnerships. We make natural products that really work – including toothpaste,
deodorant, mouthwash, bar soap, body wash, dental floss, and toothbrushes – by combining naturally derived ingredients and scientific know-how. Most Tom's of Maine products are vegan, kosher, halal-certified and gluten-free. As a Certified B Corporation, we are held to the highest social and environmental standards, and we donate 10% of our profits to nonprofits addressing issues facing our health, our environment, and our kids. Visit us online at https://www.tomsofmaine.com, or connect with us on Instagram, Facebook, or Twitter.

Name: CHALLENGER
Description: Empresa de manufactura Colombiana líder en la fabricación de electrodomésticos, muebles de cocina y carpintería arquitectónica así como uno de los mayores productores en refrigeración, contando con las más altas especificaciones de calidad.

Name: C&D Foods (ABP Group)
Description:
C&D Foods and its affiliates are one of the largest pet food manufacturers in Europe, offering specially-formulated cat and dog food for the private label market.

Founded in 1969, C&D Foods and its affiliates have grown to become one of the industry’s leading pet food producers with eight manufacturing sites across Europe supplying quality products to customers around the world.

We provide a one-stop-shop for all our customer’s wet and dry pet food needs, from large-scale, low-cost highly-automated facilities to multi-purpose, smaller volume flexible sites. 

Through our dedicated Nutrition & Research Centre and focus on continuous improvement, we’ve developed a reputation for innovation, collaboration, quality and market expertise.

Name: PGS
Description:
At PGS we use our industry knowledge to develop amazing products and to deliver them to customers at incredible prices.
Putting the customer at the heart of what we do, PGS has built up trusting relationships with retailers that allow us to grow in partnership.
Our global leverage, regional expertise and value service model enable us to adapt to a worldwide customer base in the ever-evolving market of consumer retail.

Name: Radio Systems Corporation
Description:
Radio Systems Corporation is the leading manufacturer of pet products with an overall mission "to build the most trusted pet brands".  Our family of brands include PetSafe (www.petsafe.com), Invisible Fence Brand (www.invisiblefence.com), SportDOG (www.sportdog.com), Kurgo (www.kurgo.com) and Premier Pet (www.premierpet.com). We are a company driven by innovation and dedication to our customers and communities. Since our founding in 1991, Radio Systems has grown into an international corporation selling in over 52 countries, and is expanding its reach every day. Our portfolio includes a wide array of electronic training and containment systems, waste management products, fountains, pet doors, innovative treats and much more. We are headquartered in Knoxville, TN but have remote offices in various places across the globe. 

At Radio Systems, we have an open environment  in all of our offices which lends itself to collaboration and a team-oriented culture. Our CEO even moves desks once per year to have the opportunity to directly collaborate with different teams! 

RSC is dedicated to offering equal employment opportunity for all teammates and fostering a work environment free of discrimination and harassments.

We have a culture of wellness that engages and partners with our associates in their health. In our Knoxville HQ we have an onsite fitness center and medical clinic and we reimburse remote associates the cost of a gym membership. A massage therapist comes onsite weekly and we have lunch and learns often to educate our associates in their health.

Career development is also a huge part of our culture. Our online learning platform, RSC College, helps partner with our teammates for their development needs as well as hosting live courses each month. 

The best part of our culture is arguably bringing your dog to work! It is a great reminder of why we do what we do!

Check out our open positions and apply today at https://www.radiosystemscorporation.com/

Name: Globe Electric

In our uniquely open studio environment, we aim to inspire innovation and imagination from every single team member.  Our commitment is to our consumers, partners, associates, and our product.  

Every day we strive to develop and sustain the creative energy that has kept us going for nearly 90 years.  

“ At Globe, our creative energy is a driving force leading us towards innovation and long term growth. With each new step we take, we readily let go of outdated thinking and shift towards a brighter, leaner, efficient, and ultimately more sustainable future- socially, environmentally, and economically” 
- Edward Weinstein, CEO




Nous sommes un groupe dynamique et créatif qui travaille ensemble à la conception, au développement et à la fabrication de produits d'éclairage et électriques innovants. Dans notre environnement de studio ouvert, nous visons à inspirer l'innovation et l'imagination de tous les membres de notre équipe. Notre engagement est envers nos consommateurs, partenaires, associés, et nos produits. Chaque jour, nous nous efforçons de développer et de maintenir l'énergie créative qui nous a soutenue pour plus de 80 années.

« Chez Globe, nous croyons que notre énergie créative est une force motrice qui nous conduit vers l'innovation et la croissance à long terme. Avec chaque nouvelle étape que nous franchissons, nous laissons tomber les anciennes manières afin de s'orienter vers un avenir brillant, allégée, efficace et ultimement un avenir durable - socialement, écologiquement et économiquement »
 -Edward Weinstein, PDG

Name: Ind. & Com. Plásticos Cajovil Ltda
Description:
Contribuir para o crescimento saudável e feliz de um bebê é a nossa razão maior de existir. Saber que ajudamos as famílias a cuidarem melhor de seus mais novos integrantes nos faz realizados!

A Cajovil nasceu a partir da reunião de um grupo de pessoas que realmente desejava oferecer produtos plásticos melhores para as famílias do Brasil. E não tardou para a linha bebê ser a de maior sucesso na empresa, o que contribuiu enormemente para a realização do sonho de ter neste segmento a principal linha de produtos da Cajovil. Foram muitos desafios para implementar os produtos mais adequados à cada fase, mas, com toda dedicação, pesquisa e desenvolvimento, a Cajovil conseguiu superar todas as dificuldades e se firmar como uma empresa especializada em bem servir o bebê brasileiro. Tudo isso escutando a parte mais interessada: papai e mamãe!

Estar em família é acolhimento e carinho, se preocupar com a evolução, a segurança e cada detalhe. Essa nossa visão sustenta a importância de fabricar com perfeccionismo cada um dos nossos produtos. Investimos constantemente em tecnologia, pesquisa internacional e escutamos a opinião dos nossos clientes em primeiro lugar, para oferecer sempre o melhor produto, visando a plena satisfação de cada um deles!  É por esse motivo que hoje temos o maior mix de produtos do Brasil para a linha bebê, produzidos em uma área de 20 mil m² de total dedicação ao bebê <3. 

A Cajovil hoje é detentora de 3 marcas, uma nacional chamada Adoleta Bebê, uma americana, chamada Nûby e outra australiana, chamada Dreambaby. Cada uma ocupa um pedacinho do coração da Cajovil, ajudando os papais nos diferentes momentos da vida do bebê. 

Para melhor atender papais e mamães, estamos presentes de ponta a ponta no país, e nossos produtos também estão disponíveis para compra nos principais market places  / e-commerces do Brasil. Também exportamos para a América Latina, América Central, Europa, África e Ásia!.

Name: Solo Cup Company
Description:
Since 1936, Solo Cup Company has simplified life with single-use products that enrich everyday meals and special occasions. Solo is exclusively focused on the manufacture of single-use products used to serve food and beverages for the consumer/retail, foodservice and international markets. 

Solo has a broad portfolio of product solutions available in paper, plastic, foam, post-consumer recycled content and annually renewable materials, and creates brand name products under the Solo, Sweetheart, Creative Carryouts and Bare by Solo names. Over the years, Solo’s innovative products and designs have become iconic parts of our culture. The often copied red party cup, first introduced by Solo in the 1970s, has been a staple at barbecues, tailgates and picnics for more than a generation. In 2005, Solo’s popular Traveler hot cup lid – found at coffee houses around the world – was recognized for its form and function by the Museum of Modern Art and named to the museum’s permanent collection. In 2008, Solo introduced Bare by Solo, the industry’s first full line of environmentally preferable single-use products made using recycled, recyclable, compostable or renewable materials. 

Solo Cup has a global presence with facilities in Europe and The Americas. Solo Cup Company was acquired by Dart Container in May 2012 and has corporate offices in Mason, MI and Lake Forest, IL.

Name: Mega Disposables S.A.
Description:
The 100% Greek company, Mega Disposables SA, constitutes today one of the largest manufacturing companies of personal hygiene products in Europe. 

Founded in 1980, Mega Disposables looks back on more than 45 years of success, with a leading position in its sector in the Greek market and a powerful international force. The company’s well-known brands such as: EveryDay, Pom Pon, BabyCare, Babylino, Tipers, Wet Hankies, Sani, Rispet etc. hold leading positions in their categories in the Greek market, as well as strong positions in our export countries.

Product Categories: 
Woman 
Sanitary napkins, pantyliners, cotton discs, make-up removal wipes, intim wipes, intim wash
Baby and child 
Baby diapers, baby pants, baby wipes, bed pads, antiseptic wipes for children.
The elderly 
A full range of incontinence products (light inco pads, pants, briefs, bedpads)
Family 
Cotton wool, cotton buds, antibacterial wipes, disposable surgical masks, antibacterial hand lotion and other speciality products

Ever since its founding, Mega Disposables has built a built  100% Greek proposal for personal hygiene: a complete product range designed to provide excellent performance paired with unmatched, proven respect to the skin.
During the period from 2010 to 2021, MEGA increased its turnover by 230%, while achieving a tenfold increase of its export activity, and an increase of  its personnel by 160%.  

At MEGA, our self-commitment to Sustainable Development stems from our own principles and values. An integral part of our strategy for sustainable development is our commitment to improve our environmental performance, producing products of excellent quality with unique skin friendliness attributes, but also with the utmost respect for the environment. 

In order to ensure the highest standards, MEGA holds certifications such as: ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, ISO 9001, ISO 22716, ISO 13485, FSC, ZERO Waste to landfill, OEKOTEX STANTARD 100, COSMOS ORGANIC.

Name: Ideal Standard MENA
Description:
Ideal Standard is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of innovative bathroom solutions, operating across Europe, Middle East and Africa with bathroom solutions as core business for more than 100 years, and with presence in MENA region since the 60’s.

Ideal Standard MENA, part of Ideal Standard International Group, was formed to drive focus on the massive business opportunities in Middle East, Egypt and Africa. With Head Quarter in Dubai, UAE and human capital approaching 3,000 employees, Ideal Standard services over 60 countries in Europe, Middle East and Africa, and operates 18 manufacturing sites across Europe and Egypt. 

We are uniquely positioned with deep-rooted engineering and manufacturing expertise of high quality ceramic sanitary ware, bathroom mixers and showering systems, bathing and wellness solutions, as well as furniture and accessories. Customers are at the heart of everything we do, and wherever Ideal Standard branches are located, we have one aim: enabling people to create beautiful bathrooms in residential, commercial and industrial spaces, by offering them innovative and smart products, which incorporate the latest water and energy saving technologies.

Ideal Standard products are offered under strong international brands: The flagship is Ideal Standard, followed by Armitage Shanks (UK), Porcher (France), American Standard (only for Middle East), Jado (Germany) and Vidima (Eastern Europe), brands with leading positions around Europe, Middle East and Africa.

In November 2016, Ideal Standard opened its Design Bathroom Centre in Dubai, UAE, the first-of-its-kind in the region, a luxury designed establishment of 1000 sq. meters. It is a one-stop destination for all bathroom solutions, showcasing all design ranges and innovations.

Later in November 2017, Ideal Standard followed the same lead in Egypt and opened its second Design Bathroom Centre in Cairo to showcase all the product ranges which vary in design and innovation.

Name: Biscuiterie Jules Destrooper
Description:
A story of taste.

It is 1886, and Jules Destrooper works quietly and passionately on ways of preparing his by now world-renowned delicacies. He refines them with the best ingredients, thus creating a true wealth of butter-biscuit specialities that gives everyone, right up to the present, the chance to savour these delicious and authentic flavors.

While the original Jules Destrooper recipes remain a closely guarded secret to this day, we are happy to say our biscuits are only made from the purest ingredients. What that means is we use no preservatives, colourings and articial favourings. 

You think that's old fashioned? We take that as a compliment!

Name: Lifetime Products
Description: Lifetime Products is the world’s leading manufacturer of folding tables and chairs, and always a leading innovator of HDPE plastic and metal products. Lifetime was founded in 1986 as the maker of portable basketball systems that revolutionized the industry by inventing the first basketball hoop that could be adjusted in seconds and picked up at any retailer all in one box.
