Name: Dacor
Description: The story of Dacor begins in California in 1965. From the very beginning our aim was clear — create distinctive appliances rooted in style and driven by innovation. Today, that mission still powers everything we do. We seek to elevate the art of living well. Designed with exceptional materials, Dacor blends precision performance with meaningful innovation delivering heightened experiences to make your home truly unique.

Name: DAUGHTER EARTH
Description:
The making of our award-winning beauty is nothing short of an incredible romance. A love affair with the mountains, a living conversation with the wild ecology of bio-diverse forests, cold deserts, and harsh landscapes of India.

We’ve foraged the earth - with our own hands -  for rare survivor botanicals that would help heal and restore the skin, and then used supercritical extraction processes with classical Ayurvedic methods, blended them to formulate skincare that is safe, natural and - more importantly - effective.

Name: Himalaya Wellness Bangladesh
Description:
Welcome to Himalaya. Since our inception in 1930, we’ve been driven by a single passion – to develop safe, natural and innovative products for a healthier, happier life. 

It was the insatiable curiosity of our founder, Mr. M. Manal, that led to the discovery of Serpina, the world’s first antihypertensive drug, and Himalaya’s first product. Developing the best herbal products was his life’s mission, but equally important to him was the desire to make a difference. Mr. Manal strongly supported the idea that healthcare should be affordable and accessible to all. These enduring values act as our compass, guiding us to do the right thing. 

Science and research lie at the heart of product development at Himalaya. We combine the wisdom of traditional medicine with modern scientific research. Although our scientists have studied more than 10,000 herbs and developed a range of over 300 products, we continue on our journey to unravel the mysteries of nature.

Name: Winelivery - Drinks at your doorstep!
Description:
Winelivery knows how stressful your working frenzy and daily routine are and how important is for a home delivery service to be easy, fast and convenient.

We don’t have intermediaries, we establish exclusive relationships with our producers in order to deliver their products directly to our customers place... to make them spend less.

Our aim is to offer a superior experience, combining a rapid and detailed service, with both a team of experts for the best labels selection and by managing our own assortments and deliveries, for a 360 ° service care.

Winelivery was born in Milan in 2016, as the first Italian delivery service of alcohol, ice and soft drinks at home, in under 30 minutes and at the right temperature.

Our mission is to combine speed and convenience of on-demand delivery together with high quality products: we’re changing both one of the largest, oldest and most resilient industries, the alcoholic beverages, together with one of the newest in the world, the last mile delivery... and it’s amazing. 

We currently serve more than 60 cities around Italy in under 30 minutes, but we can reach all the other zones of the country in 24/48H.

Name: Fiocchi
Description: Fiocchi Munizioni is an Italian company that produces small caliber ammunitions.

Name: Nestlé Purina Petcare Australia
Description:
At Nestlé Purina PetCare, we are committed to helping pets live longer, happier and healthier lives through proper nutrition and care. We have a fundamental responsibility to provide safe, palatable and nutritious products made to the highest standards of quality and safety.

We understand and share the strong feelings of love and respect pet owners develop for their pets, because most of us are pet owners, too. Therefore, at Nestlé Purina PetCare, the welfare of dogs and cats is our top priority and a responsibility we will not compromise.

Our mission is to continuously find, develop, keep, and challenge people from diverse backgrounds who exemplify our core values of integrity, passion, expertise, and relentless dedication to performance

We're always on the lookout for great people to join our team. If you think you have the skills, experience and attitude to join Purina, we'd love to hear from you. Please send your CV through to http://www.nestle.com.au/careers

Name: STOCK SPIRITS GmbH & Co. KG
Description: As part of the Stock Spirits Group, one of the leading spirit companies in Europe, we think innovatively and set new themes in the world of spirits. Within the Stock Spirits Group, outstanding spirits brands from various European countries are brought together under one roof. The portfolio of more than 70 brands combines local and regional heritage with innovation and is available in more than 50 countries worldwide. Get to know the diversity behind Stock Spirits Germany and immerse yourself in our brand worlds from all over the world. The company's portfolio includes brands such as Sierra Tequila de México, Finsbury Gin, Clan Campbell, and Żołądkowa, among others.

Name: BIBS
Description:
BIBS is a premium Danish baby brand established in 1978. Our iconic round Colour pacifier, first created over 45 years ago, has been continuously refined and updated to help meet all the different preferences on the market. While still focusing on our popular pacifiers, we are rapidly expanding our product categories to offer a full range of baby essentials. 

Our ambition has always been to produce high-quality products in the best possible materials, delivered in an aesthetically pleasing design. With a strong focus on functionality, safety, and the environment, our wide range of products gives little ones a colorful beginning to life.

All our pacifiers are carefully designed and manufactured in Denmark.
Read more about our vision and products at www.bibsworld.com

Name: Nathor Indústria e Comércio de Bicicletas
Description:
Líder de mercado há mais de 40 anos e genuinamente brasileira, somos a maior indústria de bicicletas infantis da América Latina.

   Nosso comprometimento com qualidade e inovação conquistou a confiança e o reconhecimento do mercado, o que nos permite trabalhar em parceria com grandes marcas do Brasil e do mundo.

   Acreditamos na importância da tecnologia em favor da alta qualidade, por isso utilizamos as mais avançadas máquinas na fabricação de nossos triciclos e bicicletas, com cortes a laser, soldas por robôs, dobras CNC, entre outras.

   Em um parque fabril com mais de 24 mil m², produzimos quase 7 mil bicicletas por dia, alimentando um mercado exigente, que espera nada menos que excelência.

    Nosso total comprometimento com o consumidor está presente em cada detalhe de nossos produtos. 
E nossa paixão por detalhes é o que nos move!

Seja bem-vindo ao novo mundo das bikes!!

Name: Bandai America
Description: A leader in developing engaging, quality toys that capture children's imaginative spirit and provides endless "Fun For The Future", Bandai America Incorporated is the manufacturer and master toy licensee of some of the most popular brands in children's toys and interactive entertainment today.  The Bandai America brand family includes Power Rangers, ThunderCats, Ben 10, and Pocoyo, among other boys, girls, preschool and hobby product lines.  Bandai America Incorporated is a subsidiary of NAMCO BANDAI Holdings (USA) Inc., an entity that resulted from the integration of Namco Ltd. and Bandai Co. Ltd. of Japan.  Global interests encompass three strategic business units:  Toys and Hobby, Amusement Facility and Contents.  The company is headquartered in Cypress, California.  Find out more about our expertise in connecting with kids in fun and fresh ways at www.bandai.com.

Name: Assembly
Description:
Assembly's easy elegance leads the way—whether you’re entering into  a softly lit hotel lobby, or stopping by an airport bar. We're your seasoned traveller ensemble, your club lounge essential, your 
everywhere upgrade. The subtle yet thoughtful details say it all.  

To ensure you glide into these fleeting moments, we decided to be more than just functional four-corners on wheels. We're sleek-shelled elegance—with zips that slide, wheels made for strolling and a design that lets you focus on the part you love most—travel.

So pack it all in (there's plenty of room)—the easy days, the tranquil sunrises and vibrant sundowners. And the endless possibilities that have always been waiting for you.

Name: Asian Paints Arabia
Description:
In the Middle East, Asian Paints Berger is a well- respected brand. It is one of the largest paint company in GCC equipped with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities. Asian Paints Berger exports to Africa, Arab League countries and Central Asia.

Asian Paints Berger has a strong manufacturing base in the Middle East, with dedicated plants in Dubai, Sohar, and Bahrain. These fully automated units create our range of Middle East specific products. Our range of topcoats, undercoats, designer finishes, and kid-specific products are testament to our commitment to giving our customers the best choices. 
Our products are tailored to meet Middle Eastern climate challenges.

Our innovations in paint technology and our range of décor products with best-in-class features will give you an edge. We reach out to customers in over 60 countries with exciting new colour and design concepts.

As an organisation operating in the industry for over seven decades, our key to staying motivated is the awareness that our solutions make a positive difference in our stakeholders’ lives. Our innovative product targeting the health and hygiene segment - Royale Atmos Health Shield neutralises formaldehyde (a pollutant released into indoor environments from sources like glue, wood finishes, cooking gas, cigarette smoke, upholstery, etc.) Also it is designed with silver ion technology which kills 99% of infection-causing bacteria on the painted surface. Hence Royale Atmos Health Shield shows excellent resistance to microbial growth, when tested for antimicrobial activity thereby providing more hygienic environment at home.

Asian Paints Berger is committed to making infinite dreams come to life by revolutionising customer experiences and creating infinite moments of celebration.

We believe inclusion of designer finish on walls is one of the most accessible and practical ways of transforming our spaces. Our luxury range oozes class and opulence. They are playful, edgy and very stylish.

Name: General Mills Foodservice
Description:
General Mills Foodservice serves the convenience, foodservice and bakery industries by providing quality products from time-trusted brands. 

Our distinguished brand portfolio includes Big G Cereals, Yoplait, Nature Valley, Gold Medal, Pillsbury, Chex Mix, Bugles, and Gardetto’s. 

Headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, we continually provide culinary, nutrition education and marketing resources to help our operators succeed. Follow us for updates on business solutions, culinary, events and news.

Name: AMINU
Description:
Skin health is both an art and a science!
and it's our mission to redefine your relationship with it!

We’re skincare pros committed to helping everyone—across all ages, genders, skin moods, skin needs, and your unique era—achieve their best skin. Every formula we create is made with high-performance ingredients, meticulously balanced for gentleness and pro-grade results. Our carefully crafted products work to restore, rebalance, and protect your skin, empowering it to repair itself, nurture healthy cells, and stand resilient against environmental stressors.

We find inspiration everywhere—from the powerhouse nutrients in superfoods to the captivating realms of microbiology, material sciences, art, and culture. We’re inspired by those who create, challenge boundaries, explore the world, juggle multiple roles, question norms, live fearlessly, trust their journey, and relentlessly pursue their dreams.

At AMINU, we’re here to support your one-of-a-kind path to radiant, healthy skin.

Name: KANDIL EGYPT
Description:
Kandil Egypt is a leading manufacturer and distributor of premium decorative lighting solutions. Established in 1976, the company has grown to become the first producer of chandeliers and decorative lighting applications in Egypt, the Middle East, and North Africa.

With a strong presence in the local market and an expanding global footprint, Kandil Egypt exports its products to more than 14 countries across the Middle East, North Africa, Europe, and Asia. The company provides high-quality lighting solutions for residential projects, hospitality destinations, hotels, mosques, and governmental entities.

Our commitment to craftsmanship, innovation, and strict quality standards has earned the trust of clients across all markets we serve. Today, Kandil Egypt continues to lead the industry with a diversified portfolio, advanced production capabilities, and an unwavering dedication to excellence.

Name: LifePharm
Description: LifePharm Inc. exemplifies a history of innovation through its premium line of epigenetic products and independent business opportunity. LifePharm’s products address the root cause of anti-aging at the DNA level, evidenced in its proprietary egg bioactive growth factor technology that helps stimulate our own stem cells for cellular regeneration. The company’s epigenetic product line features its flagship product LAMININE, and its patented skin cell regeneration serum LAMIDERM. A global direct selling company, LifePharm operates in over 45 markets worldwide and has had over 500,000 independent business owners and counting.

Name: Strottman
Description:
Strottman International is the parent company to Strottman, Luki Lab and the Luki Lab Animation Studios.

Started in Southern California in 1983, the company has been focused since its inception on making safe, affordable and high-quality toys.

Our strong emphasis on safety means that our toys undergo rigorous testing and meet or exceed all industry standards, and we are proud to have a perfect safety record. 

The Strottman division has been working with some of the world's largest brands in providing them with custom toy products for their kids and family customers. We are also a leader in providing experiential retail solutions to brands such as Lowe's and Kroger.

Name: Groupe EDL
Description:
Groupe diversifié
Coeur de métier : distribution
Spécificité : Market Development 
Buisness Units: Distribution Automobile - Distribution de produits de grande consommation - Distribution de produits de construction et de Bricolage - Unité de services

Name: SSW Advanced Technologies
Description:
SSW Advanced Technologies, LLC is a multinational supplier to the global appliance OEMs.  With more than 75 years of expertise and innovation, we design and sell components and systems to the residential appliance industry (refrigeration, cooking, laundry), commercial refrigeration, HVAC, retail display and home/office organizational markets,  More information is available on our website, www.sswtechnologies.com

We are a rapidly growing company with excellent career opportunities North America Wide! If you want to be a part of a fast paced, entrepreneurial organization helping customers build a better product in a globally competitive marketplace, this is the organization for you!

Name: Bogota Beer Company
Description:
Bogotá Beer Company (BBC) se fundó en el año 2002 como una compañía dedicada a la producción y venta de cervezas de alta calidad, inspiradas en estilos clásicos europeos. 
BBC inicia la venta de sus cervezas por medio de su propia cadena de pubs. Actualmente, cuenta con 22 Pubs, 2 bodegas y 1 container, ubicados en sitios estratégicos de Bogotá, Medellín, Barranquilla, Cartagena y próximamente en Santa Marta.  Adicionalmente las cervezas de BBC se distribuyen en sitios de consumo y supermercados en las principales ciudades del país.

Name: Grupo DIPO
Description:
Grupo DIPO es el distribuidor líder de bienes de consumo en Costa Rica, también es considerado por proveedores y clientes minoristas como la empresa comercial y de distribución más grande y confiable en Costa Rica para bienes de consumo de rápido movimiento en todo el país.
Como dato importante, DIPO SA representa a empresas y marcas líderes como Procter & Gamble, Kelloggs, Tuny, Genomma Labs, OKF, Arroz y Frijoles Don Pedro, Ferrero, Badia Spices y algunas otras marcas líderes.

Name: Gemcon Group
Description:
Gemcon’s inception was in 1979 with the formation of Castle Construction. Gemcon’s business interests span the fields of organic tea, engineering, education, retail, sea food, jute, media and sports. Gemcon is powered by a professional management team and a skilled workforce of about 5000+ people.

The Group has always entered into ventures that contribute to national development through job creation, and by bringing innovation to specific fields. Gemcon’s vision for the future is also guided by a deep commitment towards corporate social responsibility, and the desire to make all stakeholders a real partner in its growth.


Our Vision:  
	Defining Standards in Innovation and Service.

Our Missions:  
	Quality products and services for our consumers.
	A satisfactory working environment for our staff.
	Fair, respectful and consistent working relationship with our suppliers and channel partners.
	Profitable and responsible growth for our shareholders.

Our Values:
	Team Spirit
	Integrity
	Challenge
	Skills & Processes
	Responsibility

Name: Rinac India Limited
Description:
Rinac: Solution Architects and Builders of Cold Chain Infrastructure and Clean Modular Construction
Rinac is a forerunner cold chain and clean construction company, incorporated in 1994 , having registered and corporate office at Bangalore. Equipped with four modern-day manufacturing units at Bangalore and one unit in Mumbai, Rinac has thirteen branch offices across India and more than 600 associates. Rinac’s International operations span Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Qatar, UAE, Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Congo and Nigeria. Rinac is renowned for its expertise in conceptualizing, designing, manufacturing, installing and commissioning of turn-key cold chain projects and clean construction solutions for Horticulture , Milk and Milk Products , Seafood , Meat, Poultry , Ready-To-Eat , Hospitality , Healthcare , Pharma , Warehousing and refrigerated logistics and other related industries. Our clients include large corporations and SMBs alike ITC, Britannia, Tata, Reliance , Nestle, Flipkart, Biocon, Pepsico, Dupont, Ferrero, Haldiram’s, Patanjali, Heritage etc.

Name: Erse Kablo
Description: Believing that success will be reached only with a vision that is adopted and internalized by the entire institution, Erse Kablo continues to lead the sector through its customer relations and service-oriented work approach that meet the demands as soon as possible with the products with high added value at national and international quality standards. Combining its technological power in manufacturing with the dynamism and experience of its employees, it is distinguished in the sector with the brand image which creates value and supports continuous development.

Name: Honest Tea
Description:
Our Mission
Honest seeks to create and promote great-tasting, healthy, organic beverages. We strive to grow our business with the same honesty and integrity we use to craft our recipes, with sustainability and great taste for all.


Aspirations for Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR)

We will never claim to be a perfect company, but we will address difficult issues and strive to be honest about our ability or inability to resolve them. We will strive to work with our suppliers to promote higher standards. We value diversity in the workplace and intend to become a visible presence in the communities where our products are sold. When presented with a purchasing decision between two financially comparable alternatives, we will attempt to choose the option that better addresses the needs of economically disadvantaged communities. 

A commitment to social responsibility is central to Honest Tea's identity and purpose. The company strives for authenticity, integrity and purity, in our products and in the way we do business. In addition to creating a healthy alternative beverage with a lot less sugar than most bottled drinks, Honest Tea seeks to create honest relationships with our employees, suppliers, customers and with the communities in which we do business.

Name: Melitta North America
Description:
For more than 100 years, Melitta has dedicated itself to providing the ultimate coffee experience with its premium line of coffee, coffee filters and high quality coffee makers, bringing European indulgence to life with “The Flavor of Europe in Every Cup.” The company was founded in 1908 by Melitta Bentz, after receiving a patent for her coffee filtering system consisting of a filter and filtration paper. The filter system was the first to successfully remove coffee residue in the brewing process, revolutionizing the way coffee was made. 

Melitta North America is a part of the privately held Melitta Group in Minden, Germany. Melitta USA, headquartered in Clearwater, FL, is responsible for the production, sale and marketing of coffee filters, roasted and single-serve coffee and non-electric coffee preparation products in the United States. Melitta Canada, headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, is responsible for the sale of coffee filters, coffee and non-electric coffee systems in the Canadian provinces. Melitta products are also sold throughout Mexico, the Caribbean and Central America.

Melitta North America is recognized worldwide for its high-quality products and as an innovator and leader within the coffee industry.

Name: LifePharm
Description: LifePharm Inc. exemplifies a history of innovation through its premium line of epigenetic products and independent business opportunity. LifePharm’s products address the root cause of anti-aging at the DNA level, evidenced in its proprietary egg bioactive growth factor technology that helps stimulate our own stem cells for cellular regeneration. The company’s epigenetic product line features its flagship product LAMININE, and its patented skin cell regeneration serum LAMIDERM. A global direct selling company, LifePharm operates in over 45 markets worldwide and has had over 500,000 independent business owners and counting.

Name: Final Bell
Description:
Final Bell empowers cannabis businesses to scale smarter through proprietary systems, advanced manufacturing solutions, and deep industry expertise. We solve the complex operational challenges that hold cannabis companies back from reaching their full potential.

Our Core Capabilities:

Manufacturing Optimization & Automation – We enhance production efficiency with best-in-class SOPs, customized automation, and cutting-edge equipment specifically engineered for cannabis operations.

IP, Product Development & Supply Chain Solutions  – Our portfolio of patents and proprietary technologies, combined with expert consulting, helps brands and manufacturers navigate supply chain complexities with confidence.

Through our subsidiary 14th Round, we deliver innovative hardware, packaging, and design solutions that drive product differentiation and market success.

Strategic Brand Partnerships & Licensing – We accelerate brand growth through strategic licensing agreements and white-label manufacturing, enabling seamless entry into new territories with full operational and distribution support.

From startups to established brands, Final Bell provides the technology, expertise, and manufacturing backbone that transforms cannabis businesses into market leaders. We don't just manufacture products – we engineer success.

Name: Equal
Description:
Equal, also known as Unique Power Technologies, was established back in the year 2001 as a manufacturer, supplier, and exporter of a wide array of weighing instruments, weighing solution, material handling equipment's, climbing solutions, smart furniture, home & kitchen, safety & security equipment's and elevator parts. Our company has been a strong pioneer in the weighing technology and material handling equipment industry, with over 21 years of experience and backed by advanced infrastructure and a highly competent team.

We started from modest beginnings and have come along way in our journey of evolution as a trusted brand in the weighing industry. Our commitment to personalized service, convenience, confidence, quality, and consumer satisfaction is reflected in the strong relationships we have built with our customers through our pan-India distribution network. Our success in the domestic market has led us to expand our reach to the overseas market. We have already exported our high-quality products to Nepal, Bangladesh, Bhutan, and Africa, and we are constantly looking for new opportunities to grow and expand our business. 

At Equal, we believe in staying ahead of the curve and constantly innovating to meet the evolving needs of our customers. We have a strong team of highly skilled professionals who are dedicated to developing cutting-edge products and solutions that deliver exceptional value to our customers.

Name: Faber-Castell India
Description:
Welcome to Faber-Castell, where creativity knows no age.
Founded in 1761, we are one of the world’s oldest industrial companies. Today, we are represented in more than 120 countries around the world.
We take pride in our traditional commitment of the highest quality & finest product innovations. After all we are the ones who invented the world’s first pencil!
We bring to you the tools of expression. We help you to draw life into your wonderful ideas. We build with you a world of imagination that will never fade away. We believe in the power of your creativity, whether you are 6 or 60. 
We are your  Creative Companions For Life!

Name: We the Wild Plant Care
Description: We the Wild is on a mission to become the most loved plant care brand in the world by creating products that are better for plants, people and the planet. Our range of organic fertilisers and sprays replicate the biodiversity of the forest floor to make houseplants strong, fast growing and resilient.

Name: TTRacing
Description: Welcome to the world of TTRacing, where the art of gaming chair craftsmanship meets the pursuit of ultimate comfort. Our refined collection of exquisitely designed chairs elevates your gaming experience, ensuring not only enhanced productivity but also unmatched opulence. Embrace a realm of unparalleled indulgence as you strive for excellence, guided by the fusion of elegance and performance in every chair we create.
Location: Bangsar Utama, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

Name: Kapa Oil Refineries Limited.
Description:
Kapa Oil Refineries Ltd is a leading manufacturer of edible oils, margarine, baking powder, detergent powder, laundry and toilet soaps and glycerine. Over the years, we have expanded our portfolio to include toilet cleaners, tissue paper, matchsticks, fabric softener and instant noodles with new innovations on the way.

We are committed to leading the market through the quality and performance of our products. Kapa strives to be the benchmark company for premium consumer goods in Africa.

Our focus is on delivering high-quality products that offer value at competitive prices while operating responsibly and sustainably. We also invest in the communities around us by supporting education and medical facilities and providing shelter for the elderly and disadvantaged children.

At Kapa, we nurture our people, fostering a workplace where employees can learn, grow and achieve their aspirations.

Name: Wild Earth
Description: Wild Earth is dog food made for dogs. Not wolves. Let your evolved dog eat what they really crave. High-quality and delicious food and nutritional products that deliver uncompromising dog wellness benefits—they just happen to be plant-based and are always cruelty-free.

Name: Matouk
Description: John Matouk & Co. is a maker of finely crafted linens and home accessories for passionate and discerning consumers around the world.  At Matouk we strive to create beautiful, high quality products and to provide our customers with exceptional service. As a third generation, family owned company we maintain long term relationships by being fair and committed to our employees, customers and vendors.

Name: Beautyrest
Description:
We don’t just make mattresses so you can get better sleep, we make them so you can #BeMoreAwake
 
At Beautyrest, you’ll get the chance to inspire, impact, and innovate every day. Since 1870, we’ve been leaders in the bedding industry, from inventing the Pocketed Coil spring in 1900 to recent technology like our Beautyrest Sleeptracker monitor. These innovations helped us grow to a $1 billion company, yet despite our size, we still maintain a one-team culture that supports our associates so they can develop and succeed together.

Name: Ariro Toys
Description: Designed by a team of passionate Montessorians, ARIRO toys address a precise need for a very specific age. We strive to select the best materials and Artisans to obtain a wholesome product.   Our team ensures that the final output is the best for the child’s mental and physical health. We majorly use Neem wood (Azadirachta indica) and other woods like Ivory (Wrightia tinctoria), Beech (Fagus sylvatica), Rubber wood ( Hevea brasiliensis) etc.

Name: JATA ELECTRODOMESTICOS GRUPO
Description:
Electrodomésticos JATA fue fundada como compañía familiar en el año 1943 y tras esa larga trayectoria se crea en 2001 JataHogar bajo el prisma de la fabricación y comercialización de aparatos domésticos y de menaje del hogar. 
La sede central del Grupo JATA se ubica en Tudela, Navarra.

Name: SINDICERV - Sindicato Nacional da Indústria da Cerveja
Description:
Fundado em 1948, o Sindicato Nacional da Indústria da Cerveja (SINDICERV) representa as empresas responsáveis por cerca de 80% da produção de cerveja no Brasil – setor que contribui com, aproximadamente, R$ 25 bilhões em geração de impostos por ano (2% do PIB nacional) e que emprega 2,7 milhões de pessoas, entre colaboradores diretos, indiretos e induzidos.

A entidade tem como objetivos principais estudar, defender e coordenar os assuntos comuns à categoria e adotar medidas em defesa de suas associadas perante os poderes públicos (Federal, Estaduais e Municipais), organizações privadas em geral e a sociedade civil. Sobretudo, atua continuamente para o debate de regulamentos, leis, normas, políticas públicas e práticas que contemplem a evolução e o desenvolvimento da indústria nacional da cerveja e suas respectivas cadeias produtivas.

Name: Goodlife Company
Description:
Good Food, Good Vibes, Goodlife – ein gesunder Lifestyle, der Spaß macht und leichter erreichbar ist. Genau das haben wir uns zur Mission gemacht und wollen mit unseren healthy Snacking Produkten unserer Marke HEJ Natural Bewegung in den Lebensmittelmarkt bringen. Denn wir finden, Zuckerbomben, Schokoriegel und Co. waren gestern. Jetzt ist Zeit für #bessersnacken. Deshalb haben unsere innovativen Produkte hochwertige Inhaltsstoffe, kurze Zutatenlisten und sind insbesondere eines: Richtig lecker!

Richtig gut, dass du dich bei uns im Büro jederzeit daran bedienen kannst. Apropos Büro, das befindet sich direkt an der Elbe und der Ausblick auf die Elphi und den Hafen ist für uns dabei ein besonderes Highlight. Das Beste ist aber unser Team, mit dem wir täglich alles für unsere gemeinsame Mission geben: Verantwortung übernehmen, Ideen einbringen und Gestaltungsfreiräume nutzen - ob Praktikant/in oder Geschäftsführung, wir gehen dabei nicht nur den einen, sondern auch den zweiten Schritt mehr.

Name: PsiBufet
Description:
PsiBufet to świeżo gotowane jedzenie dla psów. Firma istnieje od 2016 roku i jest liderem nowej kategorii żywienia czworonogów w Polsce. Karmi już kilkadziesiąt tysięcy piesków, a z każdym miesiącem merdających klientów przybywa coraz więcej.

Firma jest częścią Butternut Box, europejskiego lidera świeżego jedzenia dla psów, co oznacza stałą współpracę z osobami z Wielkiej Brytanii, Niemiec, Czech, Belgii czy Holandii, a także duże możliwości rozwoju - zarówno dla polskiej części firmy, jak i wszystkich pracowników.

Jest także firmą z certyfikatem B Corp. Co to oznacza? To dowód, że prowadzi biznes w sposób odpowiedzialny i zrównoważony. Spełnia najwyższe standardy w zakresie odpowiedzialności społecznej i środowiskowej, dbając o dobro ludzi, zwierząt i naszej planety.

Name: MC Nutraceuticals
Description: Manufacturer & Distributor Minor Cannabinoids (Delta-8, CBD, HHC, THC-O, THCp, THCv, CBN & CBG)

Name: L'alchimiste
Description: L’alchimiste est une marque engagée depuis 2018 qui vous accompagne dans le soin de votre linge et de vos intérieurs, sans produit chimique toxique et sans plastique à usage unique.

Name: GO Home Ltd.
Description:
We Bring The World To You

Our roots were sewn at the parent company Golden Oldies in Flushing, NY where patriarch, Mark Weinstein created an antique importing empire 35 years ago. It went on to become one of the largest importers of antiques in the United States.

And one night, over a glass of wine GO Home Ltd. was conceived. (The “GO” is a nod to Golden Oldies.) We talked about the importance of home, creature comforts and things that made us feel safe. How curling up in a chair, hugging your favorite pillow, lowers your blood pressure. About the serene feeling of lighting a candle in a beautiful candlestick. And, that these small treasures tie our homes together. More importantly, the consensus was they shouldn’t have to cost a fortune.

We place an emphasis on customer service, unique designs and a family atmosphere. The products we create are handcrafted, European-flavored designs based on the vintage items from the Golden Oldies collection. Our designers travel numerous times a year to find inspiration from around the world. Over 400+ new products are added each year.

Name: Southerland
Description: Southerland, a 123 year old privately owned, top 20 United States manufacturer of mattresses, foundations, and adjustable foundations.  Southerland is best known for its ability to provide high quality sleep systems at the best value in the market and its commitment to "make it right" for its employees, customers, and partners.  At the core of the Company are its values of: honesty, and integrity, quality components and craftsmanship, safety of employees and consumers, team before self, humility, and continuous improvement.  Southerland's heritage and values are at the heart of its growth strategy which has allowed it to expand from a single factory in Nashville, TN to four factories across the US.  Southerland currently serves over 40 states with its family of brands and private label products and continues its aggressive growth strategy.  For those seeking employment, we have some excellent opportunities.  We have a competitive benefit package including Health, Dental, Vision, Life, Short Term and Long Term Disability, Accident, Critical Illness, and 401K.

Name: FMCG Association Australia
Description: The objective of the FMCG Association Australia is to bring together the best FMCG minds, techniques and tools to get the FMCG industry onto the “front foot” again, with smarter innovation, smarter marketing, smarter pricing and distribution strategies, doing our 4P’s smarter. The Association will also focus on the 5thP of marketing = smarter people, and will be challenging the industry to grow our FMCG intellectual capacity.

Name: ToyPro
Description: We're a marketing and product development house that aims to bring rich, localized, and exciting marketing content to build top-selling brands. We're made up of a team of expert designers, product developers, content creators, and retail marketing specialists who are all working towards bringing the most exciting toy brands.

Name: Oslo Brewing Co.
Description: Oslo Brewing Co. is an independently owned premium beer brand located in Oslo, Norway. We produce a wide range of delightful and enticing beers for both local and international markets. The company sells a decent amount of its beer in Norway, and exports a decent amount to Japan, Taiwan, Singapore, Iceland, and also brews and sells in the USA. Name: Cat Person
Description:
Cat Person launched in March 2020 with a full line of cat care essentials designed for cats and the people who love them, delivered straight to people’s homes. 

How did this all come about? Cat Person was born when a dreamer cat met a business cat. Two cat-obsessed persons who believed that cats and the people who loved them deserved a lot more attention and care than the industry offered. More thoughtful products, more thoughtful food, and a more thoughtful way to purchase and use these essentials. 

Today, we’re a small team of cat lovers working to make the experience of caring for cats even better than it already is. We’re starting by improving the essentials: wet and dry food recipes made just for cats, thoughtfully packaged for the cat person; beds and bowls made to support a cat’s anatomy, designed for a person’s aesthetics; treats and toys to bring our two favorite animals—cats and their persons—even closer together. 

We are passionate about not just building an amazing brand but building a wonderful company. Inclusion, thoughtfulness and respect for everyone’s lives outside of work are just as important to us as finding talent with the entrepreneurial drive required to work a start-up and contribute to the team’s success. 

For more information about careers, pounce on us at hello@catperson.com.

Name: Azafran Innovacion Ltd, India
Description:
Azafran Innovacion is an established group in the organic industry, admired for dedication to organic ingredients & quality products. Our product lines are created using nature's purest ingredients that are grown, harvested, extracted and processed at our own facilities.
 
At Azafran, everything starts with nature. We have our own organic farms with large greenhouses where numerous varieties of plants, flowers and herbs are grown. Ingredients are collected & essence is extracted in the most natural way perfectly capturing the soul of botanicals. Our ingredients are awarded the USDA and ECOCERT stamp of approval. Our in-house formulators invest hours of research, development & testing to come up with formulations that give quality and best results. From Farm to Formulation, our products are made without any compromise on quality fulfilling our commitment to the environment.
 
Our portfolio is made of many individual brands, each serving customers in different ways—but all with a focus on bringing a change in your day to day lives.

Name: C-Food International s.a.l.
Description:
At C-Food International, we specialize in the production, marketing and distribution of foodstuff. We build brands with international quality standards to meet the global nutrition needs of people. 
C-Food International’s mission is to serve the consumer’s changing needs. We are always committed to meet daily needs of nutrition with premium brands produced and handled with accurate care until reaching the consumer’s hands. 

C-Food International was founded in the year 2003 when the founders decided to launch the Siblou brand in the international markets. Siblou is a specialized seafood brand; its range of retail and food service products includes 80 SKUs of mostly frozen but chilled and canned as well. After five years of operation, Siblou today is distributed in 27 countries located in the Middle East, Africa and Europe through a network of specialized distributors. During 2008, the company launched three new food brands: Sirella, Adriana and Trébon. The first two are seafood brands and targeting two different segments. Sirella caters to the needs of premium and gourmet seafood product consumers, whereas the latter targets shoppers who want to enjoy seafood at an affordable cost. The third brand, Trébon, is a canned vegetable brand tailored to fit the common needs of the mass consumers.

Real food. Real Love. Simplify.

Name: Meliconi S.p.A.
Description:
Meliconi S.p.A was founded in 1967, thanks to the strong entrepreneurial spirit of Loris Meliconi. In over 60 years of activity, it has been able to build a history of great smart ideas, becoming an integral part of the daily life of millions of people. Initially specialized in household items, the company underwent a turning point in the 1980s with the invention of the famous "Remote Control Shell," revolutionizing the way people interact with their devices. Since then, Meliconi has evolved, expanding its range of products that now include TV mounts, audio-video accessories, including TV headphones, and extending to the line of overlay kits for appliances and the new range of MyBike bicycle mounts.
From its foundation, Meliconi has introduced original and accessible ideas to simplify everyday life in the market. Thanks to the creativity, passion, and unwavering power of good ideas from those who work with us, Meliconi continues to invent a better and sustainable future every day.

Name: Conservas Pinhais C & Lda.
Description:
Established in 1920, Conservas Pinhais & Cª proudly produces the world’s best-canned sardines. It uses only the freshest ﬁsh, as well as pure olive oil, tomato, and other high-quality ingredients. It guarantees, through its own traditional method, its culture, of values and entire teamwork, added value and quality products. We are a remarkable piece of living history.

We have been operating, since 1920, using a unique traditional method and dealing with the highest quality products. Our legacy was built upon traditional values and stands on the work of a team that strives to take the sea's purest taste to your table. 
The result is an exclusive palette of ﬂavors made with the freshest ﬁsh, the most exquisite olive oil, the juiciest tomatoes, and the most stimulating spices.  A basket of ﬁnely selected products carefully produced.

The company exports its products to demanding markets such as the USA and Europe, amongst other countries. 

Our products can also be found at the best gourmet shops all over Portugal and at a click away in our online shop

Name: LE COUVENT - Maison de Parfum
Description:
L'ART DU PARFUM SINGULIER
Héritage Noble & Matières Rares

Fondé en 1614 en Haute-Provence, le Couvent des Minimes est un lieu chargé d'histoire où vécut Louis Feuillée, Botaniste du Roi de France Louis XIV. Parti voyager dans le monde à la recherche d'espèces végétales singulières, ses découvertes botaniques donnèrent naissance à ce que l'on appela la Botanique Remarquable : Botanica Nobilis. Inspirée par son histoire botanique unique, La Maison de Parfum LE COUVENT crée une Haute Parfumerie contemporaine et singulière, luxueuse et accessible, élaborée à partir de matières naturelles nobles et rares. Un Art du Parfum Singulier sous la Direction Olfactive de Jean-Claude Ellena, l’un des plus talentueux parfumeurs au monde. Une collection unique de parfums & de soins 100% vegan contenant jusqu’à 99% de Matières d’Origine Naturelle.

Sous l'impulsion de Didier Tabary, Président du groupe KRESK, la Maison de Parfum Le Couvent a fait l'objet d'un repositionnement complet et a été relancée en 2018 en parfumerie. Elle offre des collections de parfums, de soins, de fragrances d'intérieurs et de coffrets cadeaux, aux senteurs nobles et singulières.

Name: Gorilla Glue Europe Ltd
Description:
The Gorilla Glue Company has been offering industry leading adhesives for over two decades and currently serves the UK and Europe from offices based in Chorley, Lancashire. The original Gorilla Glue formula was first discovered being used in Indonesia on teak furniture, but consumers soon found it to be incredibly versatile and demand soared. Gorilla’s ever-expanding range of adhesives are designed to be TOUGH, and now include Super Glues, Wood Glue, Specialist Tapes, Epoxies, Sealants and much more.

Gorilla Glue Europe is family-owned and operated and prides itself on its family atmosphere and dedication to providing a healthy work culture centred on family values. We build brands people love with products we believe in alongside people we care about – that’s the Gorilla Way.

Name: GMPC
Description:
GMPC provides a full ‘white glove’ service for Private Label Accessories and Apparel.

We offer trend reports, design, development, sourcing, manufacturing, packaging, quality control, and domestic and international logistic services We are one of the largest suppliers private label headwear, bags, belts, wallets, apparel, and fashion accessories for some of the best brands and retailers in the action sports, fashion, lifestyle, theme parks, and outdoor industries. 

If your strategy is to extend your brand, grow business, and create brand-enhancing accessories, GMPC is truly a turn-key partner.

Name: KENT Pet Group, Inc.
Description:
Kent Pet Group is proud to maintain an 85-plus year legacy as a family-owned company that is dedicated to its customers. The company was built on our founder's inventive spirit and our independent standing gives us the flexibility to push product innovation to new places while remaining close to the partners and customers we serve every day.

Kent Pet Group operates as a highly independent business unit of Kent Corporation, and its core business is World’s Best Cat Litter, the fastest-growing natural litter brand in the U.S. 

As a privately held company, we operate a fun, family-friendly and team-oriented work environment. We are dedicated to serving our community and are committed to benefiting pets, people and the planet.

Name: (United Company for Trading & Distribution (UCTD
Description:
United Company for Trade and Distribution UCTD is the sole agent and importer for several fortune pharmaceutical and FMCG companies in Egypt. Meanwhile, it is the exclusive and/or main distributor of fortune personal care products to the pharmacy market in Egypt. 
UCTD serves six classes of customers including chain pharmacies, individual pharmacies, wholesalers, hypermarkets, supermarkets and convenient stores.

The company distribution network comprises of 7 regional satellites providing coverage to around 6000 pharmacies 2,890 doors of modern trade, supermarkets and convenient stores in addition to more than 1100 wholesalers.

UCTD distributes more than 3,500 different products supplied by 43 vendors. The Company’s strategy calls for focusing its distribution services to the largest 6000 pharmacies through very aggressive key account management for those pharmacies. Meanwhile, leaving the rest of pharmacies for UCP that provides 100% coverage of all operating pharmacies in Egypt (34,000 Pharmacy).

Name: Marley Natural
Description:
Marley Natural is a premium product line crafted with awareness, authenticity, and a genuine respect for nature’s nourishing benefits.  Our flower, accessories, and body care products are all responsibly sourced and integrity driven.  And each of our offerings is a direct reflection of the Marley ethos that integrates nature’s goodness with a belief in the positive potential of herb. As agents of change, we promote positivity, connectivity, and personal transformation.  And as believers in progress, we offer an exceptional lifestyle line that is directly rooted in Jamaica. Undeniably unique and unmistakably natural, we are the only authentic Marley cannabis brand in the world.  Marley Natural invites you to join us on a worldwide vision for positive change.

Rise Up
Motivated by the unique spirit of the individual, Rise Up is an ongoing philanthropic movement created by Marley Natural with the intention of advocating and expanding on Bob Marley’s ethos, ideals, and core values.  His vision for an inclusive and compassionate global community is at the root of our quest – beginning first and foremost with giving back to Jamaica, and extending our support globally.

The aim of Rise Up is to benefit local communities and organizations where the need for assistance is greatest. Our aim and mission is to promote Bob Marley’s message of natural well-being while empowering others through positive change.

Marley Natural promotes a worldwide vision for positive change. Find out more about Rise Up at marleynatural.com

Name: National Cooperative Consumers' Federation Of India Limited (NCCF)
Description:
NCCF was established on 16 th October, 1965 to function as the apex body of consumer cooperatives in the country. It is registered under the Multi-State Co-operative Societies Act, 2002. It operates through a network of 26 Branch Offices located in different parts of the country.

NCCF Headquarters is situated in New Delhi.

NCCF, as an organisation to promote consumer cooperative movement in the country, aspires to facilitate the voluntary formation and democratic functioning of cooperatives, based on self-reliance and mutual aid for overall economic betterment and financial autonomy.

Name: Sisma S.p.A
Description:
Sisma Spa nasce a Mantova nel 1965 per opera della famiglia Lotti.  

Oggi opera con due stabilimenti produttivi e un centro logistico dislocati nelle province di Mantova e Milano, specializzati nella produzione di articoli per la casa e di cotone idrofilo e derivati, quali dischetti levatrucco, bastoncini puliorecchie, batuffoli e salviette umidificate. 

Nei centri di produzione e lavorazione di Sisma vengono trattati materiali estremamente delicati e per questo i processi utilizzati, tecnologicamente avanzati e seguiti da personale altamente specializzato, sono una condizione indispensabile affinché la qualità dei prodotti sia sempre ai massimi livelli. 

Sisma, dal 1998, è certificata ISO 9002 (oggi ISO 9001:2015), e a ulteriore garanzia di un rispetto costante e rigoroso delle norme che regolano il sistema produttivo aziendale, da quest’anno, ha ottenuto anche la certificazione IFS-HPC. Un altro importante traguardo volto a sottolineare l’impegno della azienda a offrire prodotti di qualità e sicuri per la salute dei consumatori.

E' nostra responsabilità contribuire allo sviluppo della comunità nella quale viviamo e lavoriamo, impegnandoci a creare ogni giorno prodotti migliori e curati sia sotto il profilo igienico sia microbiologico. 

Questa è la nostra filosofia, che quotidianamente ci impegniamo a perseguire al servizio e nel rispetto di tutti i nostri Clienti e che ha reso Sisma, nei settori in cui opera, la maggiore azienda italiana e tra le prime in Europa nel segmento dei cotonati, con esportazioni in tutto il mondo, pronta a cogliere le nuove e sempre più importanti opportunità che, nel nuovo millennio, i mercati europei e mondiali offrono. 

Sisma, presente nelle più importanti insegne della GDO e DO italiana, ha 3 divisioni:
Personal Care
Brand di riferimento: Cotoneve e Farmacotone. 
Prodotti per la cura della persona e dell'igiene: batuffoli di cotone, puliorecchie, cotone struccante, spugne corpo.
Food Care
Brand di riferimento: Samurai

Name: Chris Ejik Group of Companies
Description: Incorporated in 1987, Chris Ejik Group is a multi dimensional company with interest in Power Generation & Transmission, Pharmaceutical & Healthcare Products, Electronics, and Agro Allied Products. Carving a niche for itself, Chris Ejik Group and its subsidiaries operates in several sectors of the Nigerian economy and is on the move to cover more grounds.

Name: Solésence
Description:
At Solésence, our mission is to Deliver Joy through Innovation in Skin Health. Empowering well-being, confidence, and self-expression, we push the boundaries of skincare and color cosmetics by merging scientific excellence with human-centered design, ensuring a joyful product experience across the full range of human beauty. 

Our proprietary Active Stress Defense technology suite, including award-winning Solésence Kleair, redefines mineral-based sun protection by maximizing transparency, effectiveness, and aesthetics while enabling the development and commercialization of new textures and formats in the mineral space. 

The versatility of Solésence technologies and innovations across product formats, combined with our path to market through dozens of beauty brands across categories and price segments, enables the delivery of a mission beyond what we could achieve as a single consumer brand—and we are proud to have partnered with dozens of brands to execute the development and manufacture of hundreds of skin care, sun care, and color cosmetics products globally. 

With more than 8 billion people in the world, we are on a mission to transform how everyone experiences skin protection—making it a joyful, empowering, and essential part of life.

Name: Shifman Mattress Company
Description:
Shifman Mattress Company is a leading designer and manufacturer of luxury, handcrafted mattresses which are built with the same commitment to quality, integrity and true craftsmanship.

For over 120 years, Shifman has crafted the finest handmade mattresses in the world. Combining the highest quality natural materials and old-world handcraftsmanship, Shifman provides a mattress that offers extraordinary support for correct posture, pressure relief and improved circulation leaving you feeling refreshed and revitalized in the morning.

Shifman continues to be one of the only American mattress manufacturers that has maintained its dedication to making a two-sided mattress. Beautiful to the eye and unparalleled in durability, a two-sided mattress provides comfort beyond compare.

Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with a Shifman mattress.

Name: SBI - Stove Builder International
Description:
SBI specializes in the design and fabrication of residential heating appliances using various types of fuels such as wood, wood pellets, and biomass. SBI commercializes its products through multiple brands enjoying a high level of recognition in their respective market. 

SBI has a diversified customer base consisting of distributors, wholesalers, home centers, and specialty retailers located throughout North America. SBI also services a few export markets such as Brazil, Australia, New-Zealand and Europe.

Name: Mustika Ratu
Description:
About us
Manufacturer of Jamu and Cosmetics Notes from the Founder DR BRA Mooryati Soedibyo SS,MHum : Seiring dengan makin menggemanya semangat "back to nature", banyak orang di seluruh dunia kini makin menggandrungi produk-produk yang terbuat dari bahan alami dan proses produksinya tidak merusak kelestarian alam. Perusahaan kami pun telah lama tumbuh berdasarkan prinsip ini. Produk-produk jamu dan kosmetika tradisional Mustika Ratu dibuat dari bahan-bahan alami. Hampir seluruh produk kami diramu sesuai resep leluhur, pusaka Keraton Surakarta Hadiningrat, yang diwariskan turun menurun. Namun kini produk-produk ini dibuat dengan menggunakan teknik dan mesin modern yang memenuhi standar ketat kualitas dan keamanan. Berawal dari usaha rumah tangga, kini telah tumbuh menjadi perusahaan consumer products yang besar. Produk-produk Mustika Ratu kini menempati posisi puncak di pasar domestik dan diterima baik di pasar luar negeri, seperti Malaysia, Singapura, Brunei Darussalam, Asia Timur, Eropa Timur, Timur Tengah dan beberapa negara Afrika. Bertolak dari keberhasilan ini, perusahaan berencana untuk meningkatkan ekspor dan penetrasi ke pasar internasional. Mustika Ratu kini memusatkan usahanya pada produk jamu dan kosmetika tradisional, yang kategori produknya - baik jenis produk maupun mereknya - terus berkembang. Mustika Ratu akan terus menyempurnakan dan mengembangkan setiap aspek usahanya. Dengan ini, kami berharap untuk terus meningkatkan performa perusahaan sekaligus meningkatkan kontribusi pada masyarakat.

Description:
Sparx Hockey, inventors of the Sparx Skate Sharpener, is the leading developer and manufacturer of skate sharpening equipment and related accessories for ice hockey, figure skating and sled hockey.

Name: Mallows Beauty
Description:
I am the ultimate destination for self-love. I aim to make you feel good by encouraging you to; forget stress, your phone & instead make some time for you - you deserve it. 

I am 100% REAL; real skin, real bodies, real problems, and real results...no lies here thank you! 

Instead of being faced with insecurities you need to ‘fix’, my products will ‘treat’ your skin, body & mind, with a positive message that you can adopt for the day, week or forever really… now repeat after me "I am enough.” I want to empower you to appreciate yourself rather than criticise…you wouldn't bully your BFF, so why do it to yourself & your body?!

Say bye-bye to brands that promote a ‘perfect’ (photoshopped) model & promise you the world but never deliver. And say hello to me, Mallows Beauty!”

Have a sneaky read of my packaging, as I will sharing my inside knowledge on mental wellbeing, skincare, body positivity & giving you a cheeky compliment or two...you're welcome.

Come and join us on Instagram and Tiktok @mallowsbeauty

Description: The Motisun Group is a privately owned diversified business conglomerate based in Tanzania with various manufacturing companies in building materials such as steel, roofing products, cement, plastic tanks, pipes, paints etc. It is also present in sectors such as real estate, logistics, food and beverages and hospitality. Name: Lexington Home Brands
Description:
Lexington Home Brands is a global leader in the design, sourcing, manufacturing and lifestyle marketing of upscale home furnishings. The Company’s award-winning product line of wood, upholstery and outdoor living designs encompass the industry’s most diverse range of styling, featuring recognized consumer brands like Lexington, Tommy Bahama Home, Tommy Bahama Outdoor Living Artistica Home  Barclay Butera  and Sligh.

As a design leader for over a century, the Lexington Home Brands product assortment is presented and marketed as lifestyle collections, offering products for every room of the home, including bedroom, dining room, living room, home office, media room and outdoor living. The Company offers its dealers a single-source relationship with proven expertise in innovative product design, exceptional quality, strong relative value and comprehensive customer support.

Residential products are distributed in the U.S. and internationally through a network of independent furniture retailers, interior designers and design firms, trade showrooms and select Internet retailers. The Company also produces home furnishings for the contract and hospitality markets.

Lexington Home Brands is headquartered in High Point, NC, with manufacturing and distribution facilities in Lexington and Hickory, NC; wholesale showrooms in High Point, NC; trade showrooms in Denver and Manhattan; and a dedicated Tommy Bahama Home retail store in Newport Beach, CA.

Lexington Home Brands continues to reshape the look of today’s most fashionable interiors through innovative design, recognized consumer brands, exceptional value, and outstanding craftsmanship across a broad range of styling.

Name: 6d Sports Nutrition
Description:
We apply an athlete’s mindset to the science of sports nutrition
6d is sports nutrition for athletes who are serious about optimising their performance.

We apply an athlete’s mindset to the science of sports nutrition. Good is never good enough. If you want to consistently improve, you need to put in the work, dig deeper, be smarter and stay focused on outperforming your most worthy opponent: yourself. Science is not that different: you look for new ways of doing things, test them out, keep what works, test again, always learning, revising and rigorously applying research to get better results. We are leaders in exploring this overlap between the athlete’s mindset and scientific methods. Our sports nutrition is constantly questioned, tested and pushed towards better, safer, more reliable results.

Our products are driven by peer-reviewed science and inspired by top-level athletes. Any serious athlete will tell you that performance is a process that invites optimisation at every level. We have a similar mindset when it comes to our product development. We try to match an athlete’s dedication, consistency and attention to detail in every product we put out. Even though the ingredients of our sports nutrition have already been proven to measurably enhance your performance and recovery, our products will forever remain a work in progress. There are always better ingredients to be sourced, innovations to be explored and lessons to be learned. There is a joy in finding out where your limits are. And then pushing those limits even further, with scientifically developed nutrition that has your body’s best performance in mind.

Our science advisory board not only keeps us informed by looping us in on the latest research and innovations. It keeps us in check, too. We only put out products that are backed by the latest in scientific research.

Name: Reflexx SpA
Description:
Reflexx means top quality disposable gloves for professionals working in different industries: janitorial, food, tattoo, cosmetics, safety, industrial, medical and dental.

Founded in 2004, after a previous experience of 20 years in the disposable glove industry, nowadays Reflexx is a leading company in design, developement and manufacturing, in collaboration with the best manufacturing companies in the Far East, of disposable and reusable Nitrile, Latex, Vinyl and other innovative materials Gloves.

Company MISSION
. To provide, efficiently and fast, gloves for professional users looking for maximum protection and performance, with extreme attention to products consistency and quality/price ratio.

. Continuous search for innovative products and materials that can offer best protection at the lowest possible costs.

Reflexx sells in 23  countries in EMEA region.

Name: INABA FOODS (USA), INC.
Description:
INABA is deeply rooted in a family tradition of excellence that has continued for generations. In 1805, Mr. Yoshizo Inaba started his business in Japan, harvesting fresh tuna from the sea, while providing high-quality food to families throughout Japan. Building on our seafood harvesting heritage, Inaba Foods branched into pet food in 1958. In 2012, the Churu brand was born and in 2016, Inaba Foods came to the United States.

The Inaba family is committed to giving pet parents healthy options for their beloved companions. Our treats are made from high-quality ingredients, including farm-raised chicken and wild-caught tuna. We make them low-calorie and high-moisture to help keep pets healthy. Treats are also always free from grains, preservatives and artificial colors.

Our company continues to thrive in the 21st century. Today, Inaba is the most popular brand of premium cat & dog dinners and treats in Japan. Our products are available throughout the world.

Name: Otolift Stairlifts
Description: Otolift Stairlifts is a family-owned company which was founded in 1891. The core-business of Otolift Stairlifts is the development, production and sales of stairlifts.

Name: PET WORLD NUTRITIONS SDN BHD
Description:
Pet World Nutritions Sdn. Bhd. was established in 2006. The passion and love for animals has been an important core that motivated us in the establishment of the company. Fitted out with our commitment and withstanding vision, we have developed two major leading brands within the Pet food industry, ProDiet & ProBalance & a Premium Category brand, Delizios. 

ProDiet cat food was first introduced and launched in the second quarter of year 2006. As ProDiet has reached its' 15th year; it has successfully made its mark as one of the leading cat food brand in Malaysia. Serving a complete and balanced nutritional cat food, ProDiet upholds a good quality and nutritious dietary product for cats.

Another major branch of the family is ProBalance dog food which was launched early in the year of 2011. Since its first appearance in the market, ProBalance has been receiving good responses and numerous positive feedback. ProBalance is a complete formulation which provides your dog daily nutritional requirements.

Delizios was launched on year 2017. Used only 100% Human Grade White Meat which provides comparable levels of protein, minerals and vitamins to red meat with far less fat. Delizios is crafted with 7 unique exquisite taste to treat your cat with the ultimate indulgence experience!

Pet World Nutritions Sdn. Bhd. has successfully grown within the pet care industry. We use only the finest ingredients in manufacturing ProDiet cat food, ProBalance dog food & Delizios, provides pets with a complete balance of nutrition to ensure our pets complete protection. 

Combining with our stringent quality practices and reliability, Pet World has successfully strike the hearts of many pet lovers nationwide. We also have been actively engaged in various welfare activities with NGOs in the attempt to promote pet caring and awareness. As a company and as individuals, we take great pride in contributing to the communities where we live and work.

Name: Unger Germany GmbH
Description:
UNGER – for safe, fast and efficient cleaning

As the leading international manufacturer of window and building cleaning tools, UNGER is making its mark around the world. The main reason for this is the company’s principle – established by founder Henry Unger – of developing products which make the everyday working lives of professional window and building cleaners safer, faster and more efficient thanks to their quality, efficiency and safety.

Safer, faster and more efficient: these standards must always be met by all products – from tools for window & maintenance cleaning, through those for floor cleaning, to devices for dusting.
Quality is the absolute top priority for UNGER and the guiding principle of all company activities.

Looking forward to the future, UNGER remains as geared towards growth as it always has been. Along with geographical expansion in a global context, the manufacturer will also be focusing on expanding its expertise as it moves forwards. Further product innovations during this and the coming year will set us on the course to achieve our objectives.

More information: www.ungerglobal.com

Privacy policy: http://bit.ly/2IZLZkq

Name: E-Cloth Inc.
Description:
At E-Cloth, we think there’s a better way to clean. One that works beautifully, yet takes less time, uses fewer resources, creates less waste, doesn’t rely on additional cleaners, and even saves you money. 

We precision-engineer quality microfiber cleaning tools that power through chores with the help of just water. From specialized cloths that leave windows and chrome gleaming to nimble mops that grab grime and pet hair in a nanoflash, they’re made to last for hundreds of uses, streamlining cleaning and simplifying shopping.

Better for people. Better for the planet. 

Make it work. 
Our high-quality textiles are treated so the fibers are perfectly uniform and 100xs finer than human hair. When damp, water’s molecular structure attracts and traps grease and grime in these fibers – instead of just pushing it around. There it stays – until you rinse it away.  

Keep it pure and simple. 
Nature already designed the perfect cleaning fluid – water. Why use anything else? 

Make it last. 
No refills or replacements. Provide tools you can reuse, week after week, month after month.

Name: Lion Corporation Japan

Lion's wide-ranging consumer products encompass toothpastes, toothbrushes, cosmetics, soaps, shampoos, rinses, laundry detergents, dishwashing detergents, household cleaners, as well as pharmaceutical and food products. All of these products enjoy high brand awareness and major shares in their respective markets. Name: Life at Huawei Egypt
Description:
Huawei is a leading global provider of information and communications technology (ICT) infrastructure and smart devices.

Founded in 1987, we have more than 194,000 employees, we operate in more than 170 countries and regions, and we serve more than one third of the world's population.

Our customers are at the center of everything we do, we are committed to create value for them with innovative products, thanks to our hard-working and dedicated employees.
Focusing on smart devices, connectivity, computing, and cloud, we provide products and solutions for 3 customer groups: consumers, carriers, and government & industry customers.

We also work with different stakeholders including open source communities, standards organisations, universities, and research institutes all over the world to cultivate a broader ecosystem that thrives on shared success, help drive advancements in technology, and grow the industry as a whole.

Our vision and mission is to bring digital to every person, home and organization for a fully connected, intelligent world.
To this end, we will drive ubiquitous connectivity and promote equal access to networks; bring cloud and artificial intelligence to all the four corners of the earth to provide superior computing power where and when needed; build digital platforms to help all industries and organizations become more agile, efficient, and dynamic; redefine user experience with AI, making it more personalized, whether they’re at home, in the office, or on the go.

We believe that great work begins with great people. If you value excellence, meaningful connections with others, and leaving things better than they were found then let's talk.  

For more information on our company, check out our site: https://www.freshwatersystems.com/pages/about-us

Name: Adventure Operations
Description:
Adventure Operations is a market-leading leisure business home to a portfolio of trusted and iconic brands, including OZtrail, Kakadu, Companion, Campfire, Jamec Pem and Trade Flame.  We have a fast-expanding global reach with proprietary offices in five countries and distribution in over 25 countries.

We remain proudly Australian owned, operated with over 110 staff, multiple distribution sites, corporate offices and sales coverage throughout the globe.

History

The family owned foundation companies were formed more than 30 years ago with a mindset to bring Australian inspired and designed product to market to allow families to get outside and have fun.

Both businesses flourished domestically within a landscape of competitive global brands, whilst adding to their portfolios through acquisition and expansion.

The new organisation is leveraging its scale and is one of the largest outdoor leisure businesses in the Oceania region with its sights set on continuing its global expansion as it launched in the US in 2023.

Name: Cannon Security Products
Description:
Cannon Security Products is a company built on core values. We take immense pride in our products and the people that back them. With a focus on continual improvement, we believe in developing our team to their highest potential in order to manufacture the best possible safes to protect individual’s most prized possessions.

Cannon Security Products has positioned itself to be the category champion and a full solution in the safe, security, and storage industry. With brands origination dating back to 1965 we are no stranger to the industry. In fact, we have been leading innovation in large scale personal safes, home security products, smaller-scale firearm safes, garage storage and organizational structures since our brands’ conception. 

About Our Brands
Cannon Safe: 
Cannon Safe is a start to finish manufacturer that has been in business since 1965. Key products include large scale personal safes, home security products and smaller-scale firearm safes.
Stack-On:
Stack-On has over 40 years of proven success in the manufacturing and distribution of home safes, gun security products, garage storage and organizational structures.
GunVault: 
Founded in 1990, GunVault is the leader in quick access gun safes. Key products include quick access gun safes and other security solutions for handguns, firearms and personal valuables.
Cannon Security Products:
CSP was founded in 2010 and is committed to making sure every household has a way to protect its valuables. Key products include covert security items for the home.

Name: Stanhome Spain
Description:
Hace 90 años, Stanley Beveridge, un emprendedor visionario, creó una nueva forma de compras desde el hogar en los Estados Unidos, ofreciendo a las mujeres una actividad generadora de ingresos para mantener a sus familias en tiempos de crisis.
Hoy Stanhome es una marca de Groupe Rocher, que sigue persiguiendo el mismo objetivo y afirmándose más que nunca como fabricante de contactos y vínculos sociales.
En España, estamos presentes desde hace 54 años y a partir de 2021 comenzamos a escribir un nuevo capítulo, donde apostamos por un modelo de negocio dual: Offline y Online, donde la venta directa tradicional y el social selling se unen para consolidar nuestro compromiso con las personas y el medio ambiente.
Gracias a nuestras 4 marcas y manteniendo a la familia en el centro de nuestra actividad, cumplimos con las últimas expectativas y damos a todos aquellos que quieren encontrar tiempo para sí mismos la posibilidad de conciliar mejor su vida personal y profesional.
  [STANHOME] – HOGAR Y FAMILIA:  Desde la cocina hasta los muebles, desde el suelo hasta el techo, desde las tareas más rutinarias hasta las más especializadas, Stanhome es la única marca de venta directa que ofrece una gama tan completa de productos para el cuidado del hogar y para el cuidado de toda la familia. Stanhome siempre ha estado comprometido con la transición ecológica y social con su programa ACT FOR GREEN HOME: 
 [KIOTIS] - BIENESTAR: Una línea de productos basada en el poder natural de los aceites esenciales, para una experiencia de belleza que beneficia cuerpo y mente.
 [DR. PIERRE RICAUD] - ANTI-AGE: Una gama completa de productos de cuidado fabricados en Francia que combina la ciencia cosmética de las plantas medicinales con la dermocosmética, para dar a cada mujer el poder de vivir su edad como la mejor.
 [FLORMAR]- MAQUILLAJE: Alegría, emoción y vivacidad en todos sus matices; cada año, más de 3000 colores, desde maquillaje hasta soluciones para manos.
Location: San Fernando de Henares, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: Edge Eyewear
Description:
Edge designs and delivers dependable, protective and accessible eyewear. Since quality shouldn’t be exclusive, our promise is ensuring everyone has access to protective, high-performing glasses. We’re obsessed with designing advanced optical solutions with the latest eyewear technology, most advanced features and finest materials to protect your eyes—whether you’re on the job, at the river or anywhere in-between.   

Edge started at a rented desk in the back office of a construction supply company. Outdated technology and low-quality materials ran rampant across many of the protective eyewear products available. And, largely, they still do. Edge set out to crush these norms.  

We pioneered polarized safety glasses. We created the finest anti-fog technology on the market. We build our frames with virtually indestructible materials. We verify all our safety standards with stringent third-party testing—something, shockingly, not all safety eyewear manufacturers can claim. And we continue to be driven by innovation. 

Our roots are in safety eyewear. But we’re looking beyond. We’re seeking more. We’re leveraging our history, our knowledge, our expertise. We’re asking how everyday eyewear can be better. More innovation. More accessible. More performance. More style.  

We’re driven to defy norms and disrupt the sunglass industry, just like we did the safety glass market. And we won’t stop. We won’t deter from designing performance eyewear that refuses to let you down when it matters most. We’re makers. We’re innovators. And we’re defenders of vision.

Name: Decor

Décor has been making consumers everyday lives easier and more enjoyable for over 60 years, with homewares that are beautiful, functional, affordable and made to last. 

Originating in Melbourne, Australia in 1958, Décor has built its reputation on design excellence, product innovation and trusted quality.

Today there are over 500 products available across the Décor and Willow brands including food storage, lunch, hydration, insulated coolers, ice, gardenware, laundry, refuse, cleaning and more. 

With a strong commitment to research and development, new products are continually being introduced.

Décor and Willow products can be found in many retail channels which include grocery, discount department stores, hardware stores and garden centres throughout Australia, New Zealand and from selected retailers globally through North America, Europe, Middle East and Asia Pacific.

Name: GiGiS International L.L.C
Description:
At GiGiS International LLC, we believe that the smallest details make the biggest impact. As a leading name in the FMCG industry, we specialize in crafting high-quality stationery designed for effortless writing, creativity, and productivity. From our signature ballpoint pens to markers, highlighters, glue sticks, and erasers, our products are built for reliability—whether in the office, classroom, or everyday use.
