Name: Mauser
Description:
Legends for Generations

The Mauser brand has stood as a symbol for the real, successful hunting experience for over 140 years. All hunting rifles made by Mauser are based on traditional, down-to-earth values, combined with the most modern of rifle technology. Reliable, state-of-the-art firearm technology, solid one-piece steel structures, the Mauser double square bridge and exceptional inventive talent are what fascinates hunters all over the world.

Name: Kaba Ilco Corp
Description:
Kaba Ilco Corp. is the largest US-based key blank manufacturer located in Rocky Mount, North Carolina. In our 300,000 sq. ft. vertically integrated (brass foundry to finish goods) state-of-the-art ISO Certified manufacturing facility we produce millions of keys each week. These keys range from original equipment keys manufactured for the lock and automobile industry to aftermarket keys sold to security professionals, retail and service stores throughout North America.

The Ilco brand is known for exceptional quality at competitive prices. Our company and employees are committed to high-quality standards and innovative technology. We are a leader in key blanks as well as in automotive transponder technology, key cutting/duplication machines, and brass replacement cylinders.

Our sister companies, Silca, and Advanced Diagnostics add to our group’s strength making us the prime single direct source for the broadest and deepest product range in the industry worldwide.

Our combined companies provide not only the broadest line of keys, extensive line of key cutting machines and technologically advanced automotive programming and cloning systems but in North and Central America, Ilco provides a line of quality solid brass replacement cylinders, a line of security hardware products and locksmith supplies to supplement the primary line of products to meet all our customers’ requirements.

Ilco, Silca and Advanced Diagnostics are members of the dormakaba Group, headquartered in Rümlang (Zurich/Switzerland). This group is a leader in the global market for access and security solutions. With approximately 16,000 employees worldwide and numerous cooperation partners, dormakaba is active in over 130 countries.

Name: Jansen Wall Solutions
Description:
Manufactured in Portugal, designed for the World! Jansen Wall Solutions is a global & quirky brand that focuses on your workplace in the most circular and innovative way. 

Would you like to create a workplace where your employees feel good? Do you need stimulus-free spaces where you and your team can work in peace? Or, on the contrary, a space that elevates everyone's heartbeat? Do you want to divide or even redivide your work environment into zones without violating the open character?  Are you looking for eco-friendly partitions that are quick and easy to assemble, dismantle and reassemble?

Discover our high-end range of demountable partition walls.

Name: Show-Me Organics
Description:
Show-Me Organics is among the fastest growing cannabis companies in Missouri, and operates a vertically integrated house or brands with products for everyone in the cannabis market.

- Vivid is dedicated to innovating cannabis experiences, and offers a charismatic line of premium flower and extracts for connoisseurs and quality seekers. 
- Missouri's Own creates unique cannabis experiences and attracts new customers to the category and brand through partnerships with locally loved brands. 
- Buoyant Bob brings the inherent fun of cannabis to dispensary shelves, with a line of no frills products to make sure our budget-conscious shoppers are always afloat. 
- Blue Sage Cannabis Deli is a dispensary with the vibe of a local corner store—a place where experts congregate and newcomers feel welcome.

Name: Zaimella del Ecuador
Description:
Zaimella del Ecuador S.A. es una empresa industrial Ecuatoriana, emprendedora y vanguardista, que se mantiene siempre inquieta en la búsqueda de formas novedosas de llevar la conveniencia al hogar de los consumidores.

Especializados en la fabricación y comercialización de productos de higiene y cuidado personal, hemos consolidado un importante crecimiento desde nuestra fundación en 1995, el mismo que se ve reflejado en nuestras marcas, que ocupan lugares de liderazgo en el mercado ecuatoriano y en mercados internacionales. Además, estamos presentes en más de 10 países del continente americano y contamos con una moderna e innovadora planta industrial de aproximadamente 40.000 m2 de construcción. Contamos con más de 430 empleados y con una cadena de más de 80 tiendas directas que cubren 19 provincias y 68 poblaciones diferentes del Ecuador.

"Seguimos a la vanguardia de la manufactura en la industria."

Las principales marcas bajo las cuales se comercializan nuestros productos son: Panolini, Pompis, Prudential, Maternity, Pompifresh, Para Mi Bebé, Opus y Pañaleras Pototín. Innovamos para la conveniencia de todos los actores y segmentos que participan en nuestra cadena de valor.

Name: Loop
Description:
Loop is a circular shopping platform that transforms the packaging of your everyday essentials from single-use disposable to durable, feature-packed designs. In partnership with some of the world's leading brands, we hope to change the way the planet shops. Think of it as the milkman, reimagined.

Want to join the Loop team? Apply today!

Name: Shinola
Description: Born in Detroit, Shinola is a design brand with an unwavering commitment to crafting lasting products, from watches to leather goods and even a hotel. We celebrate timeless design and thoughtful craftsmanship with products and stories that inspire people to live well and be confident in a style that is uniquely their own.

Name: Chandaria Industries
Description:
Chandaria Industries is the largest company within Chandaria Group’s portfolio and was established on 1st May 1964. The company started out as a small Tissue Converting operation and today is the largest Tissue and Hygiene products manufacturer in Kenya, East and Central Africa. We are also the only Tissue and Hygiene products manufacturer that manufactures its products 100% in Kenya and the only fully integrated Tissue Paper manufacturer whose process starts from everyday paper waste as the raw material to the final distribution of our finished products.

Being an ISO 9001-2008 certified company; our processes and systems ensure the manufacturing of quality products with a strong commitment to recycling and environment protection.

Chandaria Industries is the largest recycler of paper waste in East and Central Africa.

We have the widest range of products in our Tissue and Hygiene portfolio, achieving Superbrands status through brands such as Velvex, the most popular choice in the premium category. Nice & Soft, Toilex, Rosy and Dawn Pekee are also market leading brands and together provide a rich selection of choice for every customer segment.

BUY KENYAN, BUILD KENYA!

Name: Nuna
Description:
Nuna, the global brand with Dutch roots has been focusing on creating smart, helpful and bold baby gear since 2007. 

First-hand experiences in parenthood show that practicality and beauty is the perfect balance when it comes to Nuna's clever solutions that spans across car seat, stroller, and in home categories. Inspired by the clean lines and ingenuity of Dutch design, the collection is as easy, safe, and as flexible as new parents need it to be. 

With thoughtful design put in to every detail, Nuna designs around your life.

Name: Samsons Group of Companies
Description:
Samsons Group of Companies is a rapidly growing FMCG enterprise with advanced systems and a respectful culture where every employee is treated like family. Over the years, Samsons has expanded its reach across various industries, delivering outstanding service and quality through its diverse business ventures both locally and globally.

The Group is engaged in FMCG, Tourism, Textiles, Education, Hospitality, and more. With operations extended worldwide, Samsons has established a robust distribution network in parts of Eastern Europe, South and West Africa, Central and South Asia, and the Middle East.

For several decades, Samsons Group has been recognized as a top-rated company, earning accolades such as the Best Exporter award in recent years. Our continuous growth is fueled by a clear vision and high potential, positioning us as a leader in our respective industries.

Name: Chandaria Industries
Description:
Chandaria Industries is the largest company within Chandaria Group’s portfolio and was established on 1st May 1964. The company started out as a small Tissue Converting operation and today is the largest Tissue and Hygiene products manufacturer in Kenya, East and Central Africa. We are also the only Tissue and Hygiene products manufacturer that manufactures its products 100% in Kenya and the only fully integrated Tissue Paper manufacturer whose process starts from everyday paper waste as the raw material to the final distribution of our finished products.

Being an ISO 9001-2008 certified company; our processes and systems ensure the manufacturing of quality products with a strong commitment to recycling and environment protection.

Chandaria Industries is the largest recycler of paper waste in East and Central Africa.

We have the widest range of products in our Tissue and Hygiene portfolio, achieving Superbrands status through brands such as Velvex, the most popular choice in the premium category. Nice & Soft, Toilex, Rosy and Dawn Pekee are also market leading brands and together provide a rich selection of choice for every customer segment.

BUY KENYAN, BUILD KENYA!

Name: Nestlé Purina PetCare Europe
Description:
We believe that when people and pets bond, life becomes richer.

Here at PURINA, many of us are pet owners too so we know first-hand how important pets are in people’s lives. We’re committed to creating nutritious foods that will keep cats and dogs of all ages happy, healthy and content.

This is why we are committed in creating richer lives for pets and the people who love them through high-quality nutrition and care. For over 130 years, Purina has been one of the pioneers in unlocking the power of nutrition, providing great tasting products made to the highest standards of quality and safety.

Purina’s commitments go beyond the advancement of pet nutrition, providing support along the entire pet parenthood journey to further strengthen the pet-human bond. In 2022, Purina announced its second set of Commitments (2023 – 2030 ) to support adoption and responsible pet ownership, help the wellbeing of people in vulnerable situations and support the regeneration of soil and ocean ecosystems. 

The Purina brand portfolio includes many of the best-known and best-loved pet foods including Felix, Purina ONE, Gourmet and Pro Plan.

Name: Budweiser Brewing Group (AB InBev)
Description:
We are Budweiser Brewing Group, the UK & Ireland business of AB InBev, the world’s leading brewer. We brew some of the UK’s favourite beers including Budweiser, Bud Light, Stella Artois, Corona & Camden Hells. We have big ambitions when it comes to growing the beer category, championing our nation’s iconic beer community, promoting a smart drinking culture & protecting our environment.

Most of all we want to be a great place to work where everyone can develop at the pace of their talent. Our people are our greatest strength and our culture of meritocracy means whether you are a brew master, brand enthusiast or new graduate, if you are willing to accept the challenge & embrace our fast-paced environment, the opportunities are limitless. 

As part of AB InBev we work with 175,000 colleagues in 50 markets, brewing & selling over 500 different beer brands in more than 150 countries. We are a diverse group but what unites us is our culture of constantly looking for new challenges and our shared dream of bringing people together for a better world.

Name: Tempur Sealy International
Description:
Iconic brands. Storied history. Industry-leading innovation.

Tempur Sealy International, Inc. is the world's largest bedding provider. The company develops, manufactures and markets mattresses, adjustable bases, pillows and other sleep and relaxation products. Combining a proud history and groundbreaking innovation, the company holds some of the most highly recognized brands in the industry: Tempur, Tempur-Pedic, Cocoon by Sealy, Sealy, and Stearns & Foster.

Name: Keter
Description: Keter Group is a global leader in developing innovative solutions for use in and around the home. Through our outdoor storage, home solutions, iconic tool storage, and garden furniture, we help people redefine how they live and enjoy their spaces. We integrate environmental responsibility across our operations, delivering well‑designed products that improve everyday living and contribute to a sustainable future. With a history spanning over seven decades and distribution in more than 100 countries, Keter continually seeks new ways to meet the needs of today while molding tomorrow.

Name: Colour Republic
Description: Formed in 2004, Colour Republic specializes in the sales and complete service to mass-market customers around the USA and Canada, bringing the beauty of Ecuador’s flower fields to people in a whole new way. In addition to our outstanding quality and unique designs, our arrangements are 100% hand-tied for a more personal touch. The company transforms the flowers into elegant, colorful and especially handmade bouquets with the goal of creating a special meaning for different occasions in customers’ lives.

Name: Eveready Industries India Ltd
Description: Welcome to the official page of Eveready Industries India, one of India's leading Battery, Flashlight and Lighting Solutions Company. Stay tuned & explore the RED within you.

Name: KHADI ESSENTIALS
Description:
At Khadi Essentials, we invite you to delve into an experience that emanates from the manifestation of the ancient science of Ayurveda that has stood the testament of time and art of contemporary lifestyle, a rhapsody of quintessential beauty and wellness rituals that are coveted by all. 

Inspired by our unparalleled appreciation for finer details, we present an eloquent testimony of recipes that actualise beauty and wellness from inside, and not just create an ‘illusion’ of it, because healthy is beautiful and beautiful is effervescent.
Endowed with an enchanting melange, our products are labour of love and trust, and have been carefully curated to enliven all your senses and accentuate the luminescence of skin, hair, body and beyond.

Experience magnum opus of affluence, surreal inward and visibly outward, never short of beauty and glory.

Name: IFB Appliances
Description:
IFB Appliances was initiated in 1991 with a vision to revolutionize the way Indians lived. Over the last two decades, we have grown in strength to become a word synonymous with home solutions. Through a constant evolution in the very best in Washing Machines, Clothes dryers, Dishwashers, Microwave ovens, Air Conditioners, Refrigerators, Chimneys & Modular Kitchens we have helped usher in a lifestyle of convenience and freedom for the housewives whose lives we have touched.

Today more than 3 million Indian households own IFB products, making us one of the most trusted home appliances brands in the country. Our service network of 250 franchises and 2200 service engineers ensures we deliver exceptional quality of service across the country.

Name: ANA International
Description:
ANA Oils and Fats India Pvt. Ltd., is the newest entrant in the edible oil space in India.  The company is a subsidiary of ANA International Pte. Ltd., a joint venture (JV) between Apical group and Acalpo Pte. Ltd. This JV brings together their combined expertise in sourcing, refining, and marketing of edible oils globally.
Acalpo was founded in 1999 by Mr. Gautam Rampuria, an Indian origin entrepreneur based out of Singapore. Acalpo has business interests in India, South East Asia, and West Africa. The Apical group specializes in farming, refining, merchandising, distribution, and the trading of crude palm oil and its many derivatives. Apical is one of Indonesia's largest processors and exporters of palm oil with a refining capacity of 10.4 million metric tonnes of crude palm oil and 8 processing facilities across the globe.
In India, ANA has a large trading operation with toll operated plants in Kakinada, Mumbai and Chennai. Further, the company operates in the branded edible oil segment with two brands Hello Life and CookPal. Hello Life is the brand for soft oils and recently launched its first variant in the sunflower oil segment. CookPal is the brand for Palmolein based oils. ANA has its headquarters in Hyderabad and its branded products are sold in the twin states of Andhra and Telangana. 
ANA has a lot of exciting initiatives in the works. The company plans further expansion in the eastern and southern regions of India. The company also plans to foray into the bakery fat segment under a master brand Bakemate. Also underway are plans to launch more variants under Hello Life and Cookpal master brands. Yet another initiative is the setup of a state-of-the-art greenfield manufacturing project in Krishnapatnam. A lot of other exciting initiatives are in our plans so stay tuned and say hello to a new life in edible oils.

Name: The Cookware Company
Description:
The Cookware Company is a global cookware manufacturer with worldwide brand presence. Starting in Belgium in 2007 with their original brand, GreenPan, The Cookware Company was the first to introduce PTFE-free non-stick cookware into the market. 

With Thermolon ceramic non-stick, GreenPan has given customers a whole new option when it comes to healthy cooking. This technology has taken the world by storm, spreading from Belgium to other countries. 

Since the birth of GreenPan, The Cookware Company has grown to a group of numerous and high standing brands, such as Green+Life, Vita+Verde, Green Chef, Gero, BK Cookware, Van Kempen & Begeer, Keltum, Kochstar … and we are just beginning!

Today, all of our brands can be found in retail, grocery, mass market and specialty stores as well as on television shopping channels and retail websites in over 100 countries around the world. 

The Cookware Company continues to be known as the house of innovation, launching new cookware concepts on a regular basis. That’s why we are continuously looking for driven and entrepreneurial human assets. From Belgium to New York and Hong Kong. 

Are you ready to spread the word about Thermolon ceramic non-stick technology?

Name: PT Forisa Nusapersada
Description:
PT. Forisa Nusapersada was established in 1995, focusing on the production and marketing of various beverages, particularly in the form of pulverized powder, that are of high quality. Forisa’s head office is in Jakarta, with a wide distribution network for its products to domestic and international market (Afrika, Australia, Brunei, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore). We are now considered to be one of the strongest players in the country’s beverage industry.
The Company is always committed to creativity and innovation, determined to always satisfy the direct consumers. Our popular brands are POP ICE, NUTRIJELL, ANGET SARI  and SISRI TEA.

Culture and work of habit Forisa totally lead the team in maximal effort to achieve company vision and mission, our values :

1. God center: always express gratitude and surrender all our endeavors to God Almighty
2. Loyalty: Sense of belonging and caring about one another. Responsible for every step and decision we make.
3. Integrity: We expect all our employees to uphold honesty, discipline, involvement, commitment and consistency in our day-to-day business activities.
4. Team work: Good cooperation within all team members.
5. Innovative: Creativity and perseverance in producing the best products to help raise the well being of our society
6. Keen to Positive attitude : A family atmosphere, humble and willing to accept critic from outside as well  as within the organization

Name: Da Milano Italia
Description:
Da Milano is a luxury leather accessories brand that provides the sublimity of a luxury brand at a price that is affordable. It provides a holistic range of wallets, handbags, laptop bags, portfolio bags, travel bags, office and home essentials and much more.

Da Milano entered the luxury market in 1989 with a distinct design sense. Since its inception the brand has consistently delivered quality of the highest standards, offering lifetime service warranty on all its products. 

Da Milano boasts of two state of the art manufacturing units having the latest and most advanced machinery and highly skilled workforce operating under the guidance of Italian technicians. 

Catering to clientele with discerning eye for fashion, the brand holds a reputation for bringing on table the most unconventional colors in leather which includes neon, red, orange, mustard, jade blue, etc other than tan, black, con etc. The brand prides itself on currently producing more than 300 designs per season.

Da Milano operates more than 85 stores across Asia and Middle East which includes company operated stores at 21 airports. The brand ships its products across the globe, offering a smooth shipping and billing process.

Name: Haco Industries Kenya Limited
Description: HACO Industries is the Region’s leading FMCG manufacturer. HACO develops, innovates, and supplies a wide range of high-quality and affordable products across East Africa and the COMESA markets to meet consumers' personal and home care needs.

Name: The Moms Co. | Good Glamm Group
Description:
Born out of a mom's need to give only the best to her babies, at The Moms Co., we are on a mission to help moms make safe, natural, effective choices for themselves and their families.

Our products, developed and tested with the best experts for over a year, are #MadeWithLove and #MadeWithoutCompromise. With Mother Nature making her presence felt very strongly, everything we create retains the good and rejects the bad to give you a product that is as pure as Mother’s Love.

Name: Verde Valle
Description:
Desde su nacimiento en 1967, Verde Valle se construyó sobre el principio de contribuir activamente a la sana alimentación de sus consumidores en México y el mundo.

Hoy, en Verde Valle contamos con distribución en 200 territorios de México y tenemos presencia en países como Cuba y Norteamérica. Contamos con un sofisticado proceso de selección de granos e ingredientes de las mejores cosechas de México y el mundo. Nuestro riguroso control de calidad implementa lo último en ciencia y tecnología, otorgandonos certificaciones FSSC 22000 (Food Safety System Certification), la norma internacional que garantiza la inocuidad de nuestros productos.

Name: Abul Khair Group
Description: A Group of Companies having annual turn over about USD1.0 Billion located in Bangladesh serving domestic market mainly with little footge in export market. Product handled Cold Rolled Steel Coil, Galvanized Corrugated Iron Sheet, deformed Bar, Cement, Tobacco, Cigarette, condensed Milk, Full Cream Milk Powder, Food Grains, Serials etc.

Name: Plasticaucho Industrial S.A.
Description: Plasticaucho Industrial S.A. is a consumer goods company based out of Panamericana Norte km 4 1/2, Ambato, Ecuador.

Name: Servis Tyres Pvt Ltd
Description:
Pioneers in tyre & tube manufacturing in Pakistan since 1970.

“SIL is an accomplished name in Tyre manufacturing industry since 1970 and is recognized as one of the biggest manufacturers and largest exporter of tyres in more than 40 countries. Servis Tyres is striving towards progress day by day and continuously expanding its business globally.

With an unwavering commitment towards quality, its untiring R&D efforts and never-ending search for finding methods to produce quality products keeps Servis Tyres ahead of its competition. 

Servis Tyres employs state-of-the-art machinery, world-class standards and latest technology to manufacture tyres for:
1) Bicycles
2) Motorcycle/Scooters
3) Rickshaws/Tuk Tuks
4) ULTs
5) Tractors

Servis Tyres stands proud as the major supplier for OEMs like Honda, Yamaha and other local market assemblers in Pakistan.

Servis Tyres is committed to providing a safer and better experience for customers on and off the road.”

Name: Liberty Coca-Cola Beverages
Description:
At Liberty Coca-Cola, we just don’t want to sell you beverages.

Instead, think of us as your strategic partner for total beverage solutions. Backed by nearly 4,500 highly-trained associates and a creative leadership team, we serve thousands of restaurants, supermarkets, and retailers spanning 16,169 square miles across three states, New York, New Jersey and Pennsylvania.

Name: Rinnai Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 1975, a Rinnai Brasil está sediada na cidade de Mogi das Cruzes/SP, onde possui uma moderna planta industrial, preparada para produzir uma diversificada linha de produtos e componentes.

A Rinnai atende todos os requisitos normativos importantes, por isso merecidamente, a empresa possui certificação NBR ISO 9001 e agora em 2011 certificada com o NBR ISO 14001. Com este perfil, aliado à capacitação de seu corpo técnico e operacional, a Rinnai tem investido continuamente no desenvolvimento e nacionalização de seus produtos, contribuindo para o fortalecimento da economia nacional, gerando empregos e participando cada dia mais das soluções que possam oferecer maior qualidade e conforto ao consumidor e contruibuindo com a melhoria do nosso planeta.

Entre as principais preocupações da empresa, está a segurança do usuário dos equipamentos a gás. Assim, a Rinnai conta com engenharia de precisão e testes diversificados, de modo a assegurar que cada produto saia da linha de montagem pronto para uso e dentro das especificações, já que todos os itens nacionalizados recebem aprovação da matriz do Japão.

No mundo, a Rinnai se faz presente através de suas afiliadas e subsidiárias na Austrália, Brasil, Hong Kong, Indonésia, Malásia, Nova Zelândia, China, Singapura, Coréia do Sul, Taiwan, Tailândia, Inglaterra, Estados Unidos e Italia.

A Rinnai investe firmemente no desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias e produtos, buscando sempre melhorar os níveis de segurança, conforto, praticidade e modernidade de seus produtos. Fatores como baixo consumo de combustível e cuidado com o meio ambiente, agora tão relevantes, sempre foram considerados como de extrema importância.

Esta postura pro-ativa faz com que a própria marca se confunda com as qualidades do produto. Assim, o nome Rinnai, gera imediata identificação com robustez, confiança e satisfação. 

Imagens utilizadas sob licença da Shutterstock.com

Imagens criadas por freepik – www.freepik.com
Location: Mogi das Cruzes, São Paulo - SP

Name: Annie's Inc.
Description:
Annie’s is a rapidly growing natural and organic food company with a widely recognized brand, offering consumers great-tasting products in large packaged food categories. We sell premium products made from high-quality ingredients at affordable prices. Our products appeal to health-conscious consumers who seek to avoid the artificial flavors, synthetic colors and preservatives used in many conventional packaged foods. According to a leading industry source, we have the #1 natural and organic market position in four product lines: macaroni and cheese, snack crackers, fruit snacks and graham crackers.

Our loyal and growing consumer following has enabled us to migrate from our natural and organic roots to a brand sold across the mainstream grocery, mass merchandiser and natural retailer channels. Today, we offer over 145 products and are present in over 35,000 retail locations in the United States and Canada. 

We are committed to operating in a socially responsible and environmentally sustainable manner, with an open and honest corporate culture. Our mission is to cultivate a healthier, happier world by spreading goodness through nourishing foods, honest words and conduct that is considerate and forever kind to the planet. 

Our corporate culture embodies these values and, as a result, we enjoy a highly motivated and skilled work force that is committed to our business and our mission. Our colorful, informative and whimsical packaging featuring our iconic mascot, Bernie, the “Rabbit of Approval,” conveys these values. We believe our consumers connect with us because they love our products and relate to our values, resulting in loyal and trusting relationships.

For more information, visit www.Annies.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (www.Facebook.com/annieshomegrown), Instagram (@annieshomegrown), and Twitter (@annieshomegrown).

Name: Cool & Cool - ABC International Ltd.
Description:
Cool & Cool International, a leading UAE based international FMCG brand is known for its exceptional reputation by delivering trustworthy and reliable premium quality products. Established in 2004 and marketed by ABC International Ltd. UAE, Cool & Cool offers a diverse selection of high-quality products, which are spread amongst different categories such as Mother & Baby Care, Skin Care, Personal Care, Convenient Wipes, Paper and Detergents.

ABC International Ltd. made its start in the United Kingdom in 1992. It’s a core part of renowned ABC Group of companies based in the United Arab Emirates, who have continued to produce and expand into widely diversifying product segments while constructing and maintaining newer companies within the group successfully over the past several years. Furthermore, it’s one of the largest manufacturers of Paper and Hygiene family products in the Gulf region. With a market presence in over 25 countries across the globe, Cool & Cool has always stayed put to its commitment towards implementing innovative product development and impeccable customer service.

ABC International Ltd. is located in Jebel Ali Free Zone and one of its business unit by the name of ABC Industries LLC is located in Ras Al Khaimah. In addition, different divisions were created as a result of exponential growth such as Manufacturing, Packaging and Printing and all were led and managed by a team of highly trained professionals who brought their technical expertise to aid in the company’s success with the help of technology and unparalleled production facilities. ABC International has acquired trust and support of its clients by offering a cost-effective process with efficient product solutions that led to the company’s growth. With that, ABC International has managed to create its mark in the industry on a global level.

Name: Productos Paraíso del Perú
Description: Somos una de las empresas más grandes de colchones en la región con  60 años de experiencia en el mercado y líderes en la industria del bienestar y descanso. Contamos con tres unidades de negocio: colchones, espumas y envolturas flexibles. Actualmente, nuestra empresa cuenta con más de 1500 colaboradores, y un área de más de 120.000 m2. Somos titulares de la reconocida Espuma Zebra, gracias a su innovador diseño a rayas.

Name: JAKKS Pacific
Description:
About JAKKS Pacific, Inc.
JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) is a leading designer, manufacturer and marketer of toys and consumer products sold throughout the world, with its headquarters in Santa Monica, California.  JAKKS Pacific’s popular proprietary brands include MorfBoard, TP Blaster, Disguise, Moose Mountain, Maui; a wide range of entertainment-inspired products featuring premier licensed properties from the world's leading licensors, inclusive of The Walt Disney Company, Warner Bros., Nintendo, NBC Universal, and more; and C’est Moi, a new generation of clean beauty.  Through JAKKS Cares, the company’s commitment to philanthropy, JAKKS is helping to make a positive impact on the lives of children.   Visit us at www.jakks.com and follow us on Instagram (@jakkspacific.toys), Twitter (@jakkstoys) and Facebook (JAKKS Pacific).

2019 JAKKS Pacific, Inc. All rights reserved.

Name: Western International Group
Description:
Western International Group is a multifaceted holding group comprising of several verticals and businesses that spread over more than half the world. The Group is a diversified business conglomerate, which owns and manages several brands like GEEPAS (Electronics Products), NESTO (Retail Chain with several Hypermarkets and Department stores in the region), ROYALFORD (Household Products), YOUNGLIFE (Garments & Innerwear), BABYPLUS (Baby Products), OLSENMARK (Electronics Products),  PARAJOHN (Luggage and Travel Accessories), JAZP.COM (Online-Store), BRANDZONE (Fashion and Household Retailer), KRYPTON (Electronics Products), WIGME.COM (Online-Store), etc. and has been, in a span of 30 years, able to build a strong presence in the market.

WIG employs over 20,000 personnel from over 15 nationalities in 12 countries. Headquartered in Dubai, the group has over the years diversified into very many business enterprises. Having originated in the Kingdom of Bahrain, the group is firmly rooted in the Middle East, Africa, South East Asia and Europe with new brands and divisions being added to the portfolio every often.

GEEPAS is the flagship brand of the group, which was introduced in the year 1983 as a modest business in the country of Bahrain. Now the group has a wide network of offices in UK, UAE, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Hong Kong, China, Thailand and India. The Group’s products are exported to over 86 countries in like European Union, Africa, Middle East, CIS Countries and many others through its distributor and dealer network.

With the expertise and vision of its Senior Management, Western International Group is focused to give its customer the best deals in their daily needs of life.
Location: National Industries Park, Jebel Ali, Dubai

Name: Filgo
Description:
Somos la empresa líder de artículos de escritura. Nos destacamos por nuestro foco en la innovación, en el continuo y dinámico desarrollo de nuevos productos y packs. Nos dedicamos a ofrecer la línea más completa del mercado, ofreciendo un portfolio de más de 600 referencias. 

Entendemos las necesidades de nuestros clientes, por eso tenemos como premisa brindarles siempre la mejor relación precio – calidad, entendiendo las necesidades del consumidor y generando rentabilidad para nuestro canal de distribución, nuestros verdaderos socios estratégicos. 60 años de trayectoria en representaciones y distribución, nos respaldan dentro del negocio Librero/Papelero.

Filgo se encuentra en plena expansión, regionalizando su presencia. Desembarcamos en cada país con una estrategia desarrollada ad hoc: adaptando para cada plaza la forma de comercialización, el surtido y con ello, avanzando en el desarrollo de productos exclusivos; creando e implementando planes y activaciones de comunicación y trade marketing a medida para la expansión de cada mercado. 

Actualmente nos encontramos en Chile, Perú, Paraguay y Uruguay. 

Te invitamos a conocer todos nuestros productos y más sobre nuestra historia en www.filgo.com.ar
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Santex Products (Pvt.) Limited
Description:
Santex Products (Pvt.) Ltd is a fast-growing company within the FMCG sector, driven by a vision to become the leader in personal hygiene. Name: Zesty Paws (part of H&H Group)
Description:
For every amazing thing that pets do to bring happiness to our lives, it’s only right that we do our part to show them how much we appreciate their companionship. At Zesty Paws, we’ve made it our mission to help pet parents do just that.

Through extensive research and a deep-seated passion for pet wellness, Zesty Paws specializes in providing premium products that are formulated with one important goal in mind – to keep our loving pets as strong as the bond they share with us.

With a company culture rooted in passion, quality, transparency, and innovation, we are committed to making wellness more achievable and enjoyable for the four-legged member of your family.

Recognized by the Orlando Sentinel and The Orlando Business Journal as one of the best places to work, Zesty Paws, exhibits a startup culture that is highly collaborative, challenging, and fast-paced. We encourage each individual team member to strongly impact the growth and direction of our success through their hands-on contributions. For this reason, we value personal and professional growth and never shy away from rewarding smart work.

We also recognize our team members’ commitment to Zesty Paw’s growth and success by offering competitive benefits such as paid time off, flexible work hours, a casual dress code, and team outings where you enjoy hanging out with your co-workers. And while hard work and a strong work ethic are an integral part of our culture, we balance this with a fun work environment.

Name: Dopper
Description:
Dopper exists to solve something, not sell something. 

We exist to solve the problems caused by packaged water, and the pollution it creates in our world's waters.

We are here to end packaged water. 

We do this by getting people to drink from the tap, stopping companies from selling single-use water bottles, and lobbying governments to ban them. Because in order to change everything, we need everyone. 

Our solutions range from reusable water bottles and accessible water taps to community actions and governmental lobbying. Raising the bar in sustainable standards while we're at it.

Find out more: www.dopper.com.

Name: Läderach
Description:
Läderach is a Swiss chocolate factory that is internationally renowned for its high-quality fresh chocolate. In addition to the famous FrischSchoggi, its product range includes fine pralines and truffles, Italian tartufi and a host of other creations. Over the past 60 years, Läderach has repeatedly introduced impressive new chocolate ideas and revolutionized the market with innovations, such as the production of thin-walled hollow truffle shells. Its other innovations included the open sale of FrischSchoggi in its branded chocolateries, along with the innovative development of Mini Mousse. What’s more, it also introduced vegan chocolate. Elias Läderach confirmed his groundbreaking role at the World Chocolate Masters in 2018, when he showcased the company's exceptional chocolate expertise with his impressive victory.
The family company was founded in Ennenda (Canton Glarus) in 1962. It has been run by brothers Johannes, Elias and David Läderach, the third generation of the Läderach family, since 2021. Läderach is one of the leading names in the Swiss chocolate industry and still has its production facilities exclusively in Glarus. The rapidly expanding group now employs over 3,000 people from more than 80 countries and operates over 250 chocolateries across the world – including in Paris, New York and Shanghai.
Läderach is one of the few chocolate producers to oversee the entire process from the cocoa bean to sales in its own chocolateries – from bean to bar – and to produce its own fresh couvertures. It ensures the highest quality with premium raw materials and selected ingredients, a generous portion of passion and professional artisanal skills. Läderach prioritizes sustainability and social responsibility with the utmost importance. The company sources regional Swiss raw materials wherever possible and pays its cocoa farmers well above the market price.

laderach.com

Name: Fellow

Inspired by the need for high quality equipment to properly brew high quality coffee, Fellow brings the confidence of the specialty coffee world into the lives of everyday coffee lovers, from the curious to the prosumer. 
 
Fellow’s products and services include: kettles, grinders, French presses, mugs, and a seasonal selection of exclusive, limited release coffee from roasters around the world. Fellow’s Stagg EKG Electric Kettle, Ode Brew Grinder and Carter Move Mug have won a number of renowned awards and accolades, including the Specialty Coffee Association Awards, the Red Dot Design Award, and the Dezeen Awards. 
 
Founded in 2013, by CEO Jake Miller, Fellow is headquartered in San Francisco, Calif. For more information about Fellow and to learn about career opportunities, visit jobs.lever.co/fellowproducts.

Name: Seventh Generation
Description: For the past 30 years, we’ve been a company with strong beliefs about the rights of people and planet. We’re a company that believes you have a right to know that the products you buy are safe for you, your family, and our environment. We believe that a company's values are as important as the products it makes. We know that plant-based products can provide exceptional efficacy, and that products designed from renewable plant-based ingredients are better for the planet than products made from petroleum. We believe that waste, is well... a waste. It's why we use recycled materials to design our packaging, and why we design our packaging to be recycled. Description:
Globalleşen dünyanın rekabet ortamında zirvede kalabilmek için ürün tedariğinden son tüketiciye kadar kusursuz dağıtım organizasyonu yürüten Engin Grup, 1998 yılından beri bünyesinde bulunan, güçlü şirketlerle satış ve dağıtım sektörünün öncü ismi olarak müşterilerini bir adım öne taşıyor. 

Dünyanın önde gelen kişisel bakım, ve kozmetik markalarının satış ve dağıtım organizasyonunu başarıyla yürüten ve gerçekleştirilen işbirlikleri sayesinde distribütörü olduğu parfümeri, hızlı tüketim ürünleri, gıda, temizlik ve hijyen sektörünün dev markalarını nihai tüketiciyle buluşturuyor. 

Engin Grup alanlarında uzman 2 bin personeli ile her gün binlerce siparişi en etkili ve sorunsuz şekilde karşılıyor. Şirket içi eğitimlerle, motivasyonu yüksek ve nitelikli insan kaynağını oluşturmayı başaran Engin Grup, daima büyüyen bir istihdam politikası ve inovasyon odaklı yönetim anlayışıyla hizmet kalitesini her geçen gün artırıyor.

Name: Hunter Douglas Europe
Description:
Hunter Douglas is the world’s leading manufacturer of window coverings as well as a major manufacturer of architectural products. Our strength is our ability to develop innovative, high quality, proprietary products that can be found in millions of homes and commercial buildings around the globe. 

Innovation at the window:
Innovation is at the very core of our business. Ever since we created the aluminium blind in 1946, we have continued to redefine our industry with award-winning products that deliver extraordinary style and unrivalled functionality. We believe that great products start with great design and this drives our ongoing development of new, proprietary products that feature outstanding light control, aesthetics and technologically advanced solutions to everyday practical needs. Insulation at the window, managing natural light, the convenience of motorization, enhanced child safety, sound absorption and much more. 

Architectural Innovation
For more than 60 years, the architecture and design community has specified architectural solutions from Hunter Douglas including Sun Control Solutions, Suspended Ceilings, Ventilated Facade Systems and Translucence Materials.  Collaborating with architects to bring ideas off the drawing board and into inspiring reality, we develop new, smarter ways of tackling the most stubborn of real-world obstacles by innovating high-performance architectural materials with proprietary characteristics in design, comfort and sustainability.

Our Culture
Established by entrepreneurs, our culture is one of innovation that attracts the best and the brightest people. Or philosophy is guided by the principle “Business is People”. Our people are passionate and creative individuals who continuously seek out innovative ways to advance our company, our industry and our employees. Career opportunities span a wide range of disciplines, including manufacturing, R&D, fabrication, home automation, marketing, customer service, and more.

Name: cocokind
Description:
In 2015, cocokind set out to create a brand that would transform the beauty industry by empowering and celebrating people for exactly who they are. With a commitment to high-quality skincare formulas at transparent prices, cocokind develops every formula to deliver powerful results while being kind to sensitive skin.

Our Values
We believe in two universal truths in skincare - hydration and barrier support, which we believe are the requirements for glowy, happy skin.

Where a beauty product’s price comes from can often be unclear, and we want you to know what you’re paying for. We’re able to keep our superior formulas at approachable prices because our expertise and resources go in the formula.

We know from experience that skincare goes way beyond our physical skin and we want to make sure that a 'bad' skin day doesn’t ruin your day. We want to help you strengthen that voice in your head that reminds you that you are enough, just as you are.

Our sustainability efforts are rooted in substance. We hold ourselves accountable to measuring our carbon footprint annually and getting better at this process every year. We dedicate time and resources to measurement, create tangible goals for reduction, and offset our footprint with our dollars.

And while skincare is our “thing”, we are a team of human beings that are deeply conscious about each other and our planet. That means sometimes, we’ll opt to skip the skincare and use our voice and platform for things that matter to all of us.

Name: Lindt & Sprüngli Schweiz
Description:
Willkommen bei Lindt & Sprüngli Schweiz.
  
Lindt ist mehr als nur ein Unternehmen, das Schokolade herstellt - es ist unsere Leidenschaft. Unsere engagierten Teams an den Standorten Kilchberg, Altendorf und Olten setzen jeden Tag ihr Bestes ein, um hochwertige Schokoladenprodukte zu kreieren.

Als Team sind wir stolz darauf, den Unterschied zu machen und jedes Mitglied unseres Lindt-Teams trägt dazu bei. Entdecke die Leidenschaft und Hingabe hinter jedem Lindt-Produkt.

Lindt & Sprüngli (Schweiz) AG ist eine Tochtergesellschaft der globalen Lindt & Sprüngli Gruppe und hat ihren Sitz sowie ihre Produktionsstätte in Kilchberg am Zürichsee. In Altendorf betreiben wir unser eigenes Logistikzentrum und in Olten befindet sich das Lindt Cocoa Center, wo wir Kakaomasse für uns und unsere weiteren europäischen Werke herstellen. Zudem gibt es in der Schweiz 14 eigene Lindt Shops, unter anderem auf dem Jungfraujoch und im Verkehrshaus Luzern. Insgesamt arbeiten über 1000 Mitarbeitende aus mehr als 50 Nationen bei uns.

Crystal applications and gifts
Decoration Factory

Utilizing the latest in technology, powered by prolonged years of market expertise the company introducing its unlimited possibilities to transform dreams into impressive reality, in addition to unmatched precision across all stages of its operations; from choice of materials to timely delivery and seamless installation, guaranteeing a hassle-free experience for all clients where convenience comes first.
Asfour Crystal’s name has become synonymous with the world’s most impressive projects, thanks to its unrivaled experience in leaving a unique mark that crowns any given space to transform it into picturesque work of art that inspires light, life and special moments.

Name: Muc-Off
Description: Muc-Off was founded in 1994 and is the fastest growing bike lifestyle and maintenance brand in the UK. Following 5 years of explosive growth the company is expanding fast into the European, Asian and North American markets focusing on its core categories of cycling, motorcycle and athlete performance products.

Name: De'Longhi
Description:
De’Longhi is the global brand that offers consumers innovative products with a unique combination of style and performance. Born in 1974 as a brand of electric radiators, De’ Longhi has created iconic products such as Pinguino and Tasciugo, Sfornatutto and Rot-Fryer, broadening over time its offer to every area of the house.
De’ Longhi offers innovative appliances for comfort, home cleaning and kitchen. Within the latter segment, coffee machines currently represent the heart of the brand and have led De’ Longhi to be among the world leaders in their production.

Name: Sheenlac Paints Limited
Description:
Sheenlac is one of India’s leading companies in the paint and finishes space. Since its inception in 1962, Sheenlac has grown to be one of the top 5 paint companies in India with its presence in India, Middle East and Sri Lanka.

Sheenlac, today, offers its customers a wide range of products from decorative paints to industrial coatings, thinners to emulsions, distempers to enamels, sealers and paint removers. In 2010, Sheenlac set-up operations in Sri Lanka, which was followed up with two big joint ventures - first with Noroo Coatings (South Korea) and the second with Jenson & Nicholson (I) Ltd that helped Sheenlac to capture the North, North East and East Indian markets.  

Sheenlac’s steadfast growth is fuelled by its legacy of founder, Mr. John Peter, and today it's spearheaded by Sudhir Peter, the Managing Director.

Name: Skip Hop
Description: Skip Hop is a global lifestyle brand devoted to designing innovative products for parents, babies and kids. With a core philosophy that begins and ends with “Must-Haves Made Better,” Skip Hop re-thinks, re-energizes and re-engineers essentials to infuse family life with joy and ease. Founded in 2003 in New York City, Skip Hop became part of the Carter’s/OshKosh B’gosh family in 2017—two of the most recognized brands in the marketplace. Our award-winning products encompass a wide range of categories including diaper bags, on-the-go accessories, bathtime, mealtime, playtime, nursery and toddler and are sold in Carter’s and Skip Hop stores, online in the U.S. and Canada at www.skiphop.com and www.skiphop.com.ca, as well as national chains and specialty stores domestically and internationally. The company’s Skidaddle by Skip Hop brand, launched in 2017 is available at Walmart. With distinctive design elements and superior function, Skip Hop products complement the modern home while pleasing parents and kids alike.

Name: Upper Echelon Products
Description:
Headquartered in Austin, TX, Upper Echelon Products ("UEP") is a data-driven consumer products company selling our extensive line of branded products through eCommerce channels. We are the sole manufacturer and distributor of Repel and Rain-Mate  umbrellas, Everlasting Comfort  seat cushions, back cushions, knee pillows, humidifiers, oil diffusers, mattress and pillow protectors, Le Chateau wine decanters, Café Du Chateau French presses, LumiLux toilet bowl lights, and Flux Phenom magnetic screen doors. 

To brag, 
- We’re currently ranked among Amazon’s TOP 100 US sellers
- Our products are sold in the US, UK, EU, Canada, Mexico, and Japan
- We’re a global business with offices in the US, Europe, and China
- We generated more than $100M in sales on Amazon 

We’re customer-focused, thrive on challenges, and live to bring comfort to every individual. You’ll have the opportunity to create exceptional, responsibly sourced, and innovative products that improve people’s lives. Not to mention, be a valued member of our fast-growing team spread across the world. Our success depends on the good we’re doing each and every day.

Name: Modi Naturals
Description: At Modi Naturals we believe that good health is at the center of happy living. We intend to create natural products that assure a healthy way of life for all our consumers, so that they can cherish every moment that life has to offer.  The promise- healthy, naturally lies at the heart of every decision we make.

Name: Our Place
Description: We make products that simplify home cooking, and share stories about our favorite traditions. We'll see you at Our Place.

Name: Radio Popular
Description:
Somos uma marca de retalho de tecnologia com uma forte presença no mercado português. Estamos presentes de norte a sul do país e arquipélagos e contamos com 63 lojas abertas para oferecer o melhor da tecnologia a todos os que nos procuram.

Quem nos visita sabe que vai encontrar uma equipa especializada, com 48 anos de experiência, e uma grande variedade de produtos, campanhas e descontos, porque nada nos move mais do que a satisfação dos nossos clientes.

Name: Triveni Group
Description:
Our motto” A promise for life” defines our commitment to serving customers and shareholders. We have always believed in our core principle of being transparent, truthful, and empowering people thereby making them responsible for their actions.

Triveni group has been able to establish itself and has accumulated experiences of over 80 years. What began as a textile venture eight decades ago, today is a conglomerate of 42 companies employing around 15,000 people.

The founder of the Triveni group--Shri Gopal Rai Sanghai, a self-made entrepreneur in the 1930s, imported textiles from South Asian countries for trade in Nepal. Triveni Group, since then has accelerated businesses into a range of investments in areas such as manufacturing, trading and distribution, banking and insurance, energy, retail, education, entertainment, and hospitality. 
                                    
Triveni Group has been successful in gaining insight into the Nepalese market, technology, and values to create the best products and services.

Name: Imagimake
Description:
Imagimake – one of the fastest growing and most innovative start-up in the field of Toys, Games & Artist Supplies.  In a span of slightly more than 3 years, Imagimake has launched 2 brands: Imagimake & Quill On and has established itself as a leading player in artist supplies, creative and constructive toys that win with both parents and children! 
Imagimake products are available all over India through its network of modern trade partners such as Landmark, Hypercity, Crossword, Hobby Ideas and all leading portals such as Flipkart, Amazon, Snapdeal and Paytm. Recently they are also drawing attention from the International market and are available on Amazon.com as well. In this short journey, our company has won several accolades and some of our achievements include:
1.	Patented products to create a niche and differentiation in the market
2.	Awarded “Toy of the Year” in Model Construction and Activity Toys by TAITMA
3.	Winner of  Rivokids Parent & Kids Choice Awards in Activity Toys & DIY Category
4.	2nd runner-up in readers choice award  in DIY Segment by Kidsstoppress
5.	Featured as Top Brands in Toys & Games in Amazon.in

Name: The Deep Seafood Company
Description:
The Deep Seafood Company (LLC) established in the year 1986, started its operations supplying quality seafood to Royal Palaces and Federal Government Organisations in Abu Dhabi, the capital city of UAE, which led to developing a fish processing facility in the emirate of Ajman, Dubai and later in Umm Al Quwain. The idea behind this was to preserve quality and freshness of the hard earned fishermen catch. Now it has grown to an HACCP, FSSC 22000, ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certified and USFDA registered seafood processing and exporting firm with its state of the art facility at  Mafraq industrial area, Abu Dhabi, UAE. 

Our integrated operations enable us to provide the best comprehensive seafood products and services to the domestic and international market. 

Over the period of more than 3 decades,  The Deep Seafood Company has become synonymous of class in efficient supply of quality Live, Chilled, Fresh and Frozen Seafood, which has its strong and wide sourcing power across the globe.

Name: Wilton Brands
Description:
Since 1929, Wilton has been a pioneer in bakeware, decorating, and education with a commitment to making baking and decorating accessible and enjoyable for all. Today, Wilton continues to champion adding sparkle and fun to any occasion with an array of renowned baking and decorating products designed to help create sweeter moments. 

We’re a creative company where great people deliver innovative products and exceptional customer service. As styles, trends, and tastes change, the company evolves to make sure it’s bringing the latest and most relevant products and ideas to the market. 

Wilton's parent company, Dr. August Oetker KG, is a family-owned, multi-national, multi-billion-dollar leader in our industry with over 125 years of history.

Name: Powerhouse91
Description: Powerhouse91 is the parent company of Azah & Slovic - two Health & Wellness focused brands started with the mission of improving the overall well being of Indians through high-efficacy innovation-backed products.

Name: The Lion Match Company (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Established over 100 years ago, The Lion Match Company (Pty) Ltd has developed some of South Africa’s favourite brands.

From our iconic and nationally cherished Lion Safety Matches through to our growing range of home and personal care products, we have to date succeeded in establishing an impressive array of brands, products and manufacturing capabilities. Internationally we have a growing snacking business based in the United Kingdom and are rapidly developing a number of route to market opportunities throughout Southern Africa with a growing presence in Brazil.

Our brand investment strategy ensures that we are constantly striving to improve product quality and exceed the expectations of our valued consumers, and we continue to actively invest in a number of environmentally friendly and community support programmes. It is this commitment to product excellence that serves as the cornerstone of our company’s philosophy.

Name: Royal Prestige
Description: De propriedade da Hy Cite Enterprises, LLC, a Royal Prestige é uma marca inovadora de utensílios de cozinha projetados com rigorosas normas de qualidade, comercializados por uma rede de mais de 4.500 distribuidores. Presente em países como Estados Unidos, Canadá, México, Argentina, Brasil, Colômbia e Peru, entre outros, oferece panelas, assadeiras, acessórios e artigos de cutelaria, que prezam pelo resgate do prazer de cozinhar de modo saudável, prático e ágil.

Name: mDesign Home Decor
Description: mDesign is a direct-to-consumer, digitally native vertical brand that brings solutions with style to consumers’ homes through thoughtfully designed storage and décor products. As a seller of home goods on several marketplaces, as well as mdesignhomedecor.com, we are at the center of multiple consumer trends including the focus on the home, shift to online shopping, and growth of marketplaces. Our functional, beautifully designed products, unparalleled value proposition, unique market position, and talented team has led to hyper growth since our inception in 2015.  We are a leader in our industry, ranking in the top 5 of Amazon third party sellers…… and we are just getting started.

Name: Big Heart Pet Brands
Description: We are pleased to announce The J.M. Smucker Company has completed the acquisition of Big Heart Pet Brands. We look forward to providing you with some of America’s best-known and beloved pet brands, including Meow Mix, Milk-Bone, Kibbles n’ Bits, 9Lives, Natural Balance, Pup-Peroni, Gravy Train, Nature’s Recipe, Canine Carry Outs, and Milo’s Kitchen, among others.

Name: ~Pourri
Description: Founded by entrepreneur Suzy Batiz in 2007 under the name Poo~Pourri, ~Pourri is a company that transforms life's stinkiest moments and turns them into something magically fresh. From your home, bathroom and beyond, ~Pourri ensures all aspects of life smell amazing and clean—without the funky ingredients or stigmas. All ~Pourri products are formulated with essential oils, plant-based ingredients, and our Proprietary Funk Lock Technology, and made to be household, earth, pet, and family-friendly.

Name: Duni Group
Description:
Duni Group is a market leader in sustainable dining and food packaging solutions for the restaurant market. The Group markets and sells its products under primarily the brands Duni, BioPak and Paper+Design, which are represented in more than 50 markets. Duni Group has around 2,500 employees in 23 countries, its headquarters in Malmö and production units in Sweden, Germany, Poland, Slovenia, UK and Thailand.

Duni Group is listed on NASDAQ Stockholm under the ticker “DUNI”.

Name: Greenworks
Description: Greenworks Tools is the industry leader in battery-powered outdoor power tools for DIY-consumers and landscaping professionals! The company distributes Greenworks branded and private label products, as well as products for an extensive network of Original Equipment Manufacturers.  With a robust line of Greenworks branded products including 24-volt, G-MAX 40-volt, 60-volt, 80-volt, and commercial grade 82-volt battery-powered outdoor power equipment, as well as a full line of corded equipment and power tools, Greenworks offers the right tool for every job.  Utilizing best-in-class technology, Greenworks tools deliver the power and performance of comparable gas-powered tools without the mess, fumes, aggravating pull cords and noise associated with gas products. For more information, find us on the web at greenworkstools.com or greenworkscommercial.com.

Name: Gorilla Commerce
Description:
We are Gorilla Commerce, a direct-to-consumer home, business, and pet product development platform. We operate at the intersection of creativity and analytics to create and provide obsession worthy, high-quality products at reasonable prices. Our vision is to continually innovate and improve our products based on customer needs and industry trends. 

By utilizing a data-driven approach to select product categories, and a systematic process to evaluate underlying market characteristics, we are able to provide affordable, durable, and standout products that make everyday life easier for our consumers.  We effectively manage thousands of SKUs across dozens of product categories through a portfolio of brands that include Gorilla Grip, Kangaroo, Sofa Shield, Mighty Monkey, and others.

Name: PT Agrinesia Raya
Description:
Focused in the field of food manufacturing, PT Agrinesia Raya (Agrinesia) is founded on a steadfast commitment to innovation, quality, and the rich cultural values and unique local characteristics of Indonesia's diverse regions.

Today, guided by Agrinesia's vision of delivering happiness in every moment of life, the company has rapidly grown and developed into one of Indonesia's leading food industries with an array of renowned products. Agrinesia consistently delivers joy through its products, including Lapis Bogor Sangkuriang, Lapis Kukus Pahlawan, Bakpia Kukus Tugu Jogja, Bolu Susu Lembang, Nusa Rasa, Bolu Malang Singosari, Bolu Stim Menara and Coklatana.

All Agrinesia products have met food safety standards, as evidenced by Halal Certification and BPOM registration numbers. 

In its journey, Agrinesia aligns every action with its core purpose of Caring & Sharing, reinforcing the company's commitment to always deliver excellence with care and generosity. This principle extends to employees, consumers, communities, and the environment, ensuring that Agrinesia makes a positive impact on all fronts.

Name: Yamaha Motor Manufacturing Corporation of America
Description:
Yamaha Motor Manufacturing Corporation of America (YMMC) assembles WaveRunners, ATVs, Golf Cars and Side-by-Sides at our facility in Newnan, Georgia. Yamaha Motor Manufacturing Corporation (YMMC) was formed in 1986 and started manufacturing units in 1988. It now manufactures Golf Cars, ATV's, Water Vehicles and Recreational Off-Road Vehicles for global distribution.  In January of 2015 YMMC manufactured its 3 millionth unit and celebrated 30 years of manufacturing at their Newnan location in June of 2018.  
Our products are marketed through Yamaha Motor Corporation, USA (YMUS), a recognized leader in the outdoor recreation industry. The company's ever-expanding product offerings include Motorcycles and Scooters, ATV and Side-by-Side vehicles, Snowmobiles, WaveRunner Personal Watercraft, Boats, Outboard Motors, Outdoor Power Equipment, Power Assist Bicycles, Golf Cars, Power Assist Wheelchair Systems, Surface Mount Technology (SMT) and Robotic Machines, Unmanned Helicopters, Accessories, Apparel, Yamalube products and much more. YMUS products are sold through a nationwide network of distributors and dealers in the United States. YMUS has a corporate office in California, two corporate offices in Georgia, facilities in Wisconsin and Alabama, and factory operations in Tennessee and Georgia. Additional U.S.-based subsidiaries include Yamaha Marine Systems Company (YMSC) with divisions Bennett Marine (Florida) and Kracor Systems (Wisconsin), Skeeter Boats (Texas), with division G3 Boats (Missouri), and Yamaha Precision Propeller (Indiana).
